By leveraging software APIs that communicate with the GTA game engine, the framework modifies illumination and weather conditions while preserving scene geometry, camera pose, and the identity and placement of dynamic objects. For each sampled location, it procedurally instantiates dynamic entities and renders pixel-aligned images under diverse adverse conditions. The benefit of the proposed generation framework in driving scenarios is demonstrated through a systematic analysis of semantic segmentation models, whose output degradation can be attributed more directly to photometric shifts rather than to uncontrolled semantic or geometric factors.

</details>


### [141] [Feature Alignment Determines Fusion Strategy: A Comparative Study of Cross-Attention and Concatenation in Multimodal Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01207)
*Zhiqiang Zhou,Xuezhen Xie*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文通过理论分析和实验证明，多模态融合中拼接与交叉注意力的选择取决于特征对齐质量而非数据规模：当特征已对齐时，拼接因样本效率优势（O(d_v+d_t) vs O(d_v*d_t)）始终优于交叉注意力；特征对齐退化时，拼接优势反而增大（1.3%→2.8%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态融合中交叉注意力与拼接的选择缺乏理论指导，仅凭直觉决定。本文旨在建立基于原则的选择框架，揭示决定融合策略优劣的根本因素。

Method: 在Flickr8k上使用ResNet18和CLIP ViT-B/32两种骨干网络进行对照实验，通过控制特征对齐质量（预对齐vs退化）和数据集规模（2048-16384样本），对比拼接与交叉注意力的性能差异。同时提供基于样本复杂度的理论分析。

Result: 1) 特征预对齐时，拼接在所有规模上超过交叉注意力4.1-5.1个百分点；2) 拼接样本复杂度O(d_v+d_t)，交叉注意力O(d_v*d_t)，对于512维CLIP特征差距达256倍；3) 特征对齐退化时，拼接优势从1.3%单调增长至2.8%。

Conclusion: 特征对齐质量是多模态融合方法选择的首要决定因素，拼接在特征对齐场景下因样本效率优势成为更优选择，该发现对多模态大语言模型设计具有直接指导意义。

Abstract: The choice between cross-attention and concatenation for multimodal fusion remains governed by practitioner intuition rather than principled understanding. In this paper, we demonstrate that feature alignment quality, not data scale alone, is the primary determinant of which fusion strategy excels. Through controlled experiments on Flickr8k using two feature extraction backbones (ResNet18 and CLIP ViT-B/32), we show that concatenation outperforms cross-attention by 4.1-5.1 percentage points across all tested scales (2048-16384 samples) when features are pre-aligned by a vision-language pretraining objective. We provide a theoretical explanation grounded in sample complexity analysis: concatenation requires O(d_v + d_t) samples to learn its fusion projection, while cross-attention requires O(d_v * d_t) samples to learn bilinear attention weights, over 256 times as many for 512-dimensional CLIP features. When features are already aligned, the approximation error gap between the two methods vanishes, and concatenation's sample efficiency dominates at all practical dataset sizes. An alignment degradation study confirms a monotonic trend: as feature alignment degrades, concatenation's advantage grows from 1.3% to 2.8%. These findings provide a principled decision framework for fusion method selection in multimodal systems, with direct implications for the design of Multimodal Large Language Models.

</details>


### [142] [TECCI: Tricky Edits of Collected and Curated Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01213)
*Aishwarya Agrawal,Roy Hirsch,Yasumasa Onoe,Sherry Ben,Jason Baldridge*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了TECCI基准，包含7550对精心设计的困难图像编辑任务，评估发现现有模型整体成功率不足22%，在最小编辑和视觉质量方面表现尤其薄弱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本引导的图像编辑方法在指令遵循、最小化编辑源图像和保持高视觉质量方面仍存在诸多不足，尤其面对位置、运动、视角、尺度和创意编辑等困难任务时表现不佳，但缺乏系统性的测试基准来衡量这些问题。

Method: 构建了TECCI基准数据集：包含7个图像类别的新图像集，使用Gemini自动生成每张源图像的5种编辑类型指令，并额外策划了530张图像的人工编写的困难编辑指令，共7550对图像-指令对。采用人工评估（从指令遵循、编辑最小性和视觉质量三个维度）和基于Gemini的自动评分器（74.7%准确率）对5个领先的图像编辑模型进行评估。

Result: 1) 所有模型总体成功率均低于22%；2) Nano Banana Pro表现最佳；3) 模型在指令遵循方面显著优于最小编辑和视觉质量；4) 模型在编辑建筑和自然图像时表现最差；5) 推理和创意编辑最难，颜色和外观编辑最容易。

Conclusion: TECCI基准揭示了当前图像编辑模型在困难编辑任务上的显著局限性，特别是在保持编辑最小性和视觉质量方面，为未来研究提供了明确的方向和评估标准。

Abstract: Despite tremendous recent progress, current text-guided image editing methods still struggle with many aspects of editing involving instruction following, minimally editing the source image, and ensuring high visual quality. These problems are especially apparent when the requested edit is challenging, such as those that involve position, motion, viewpoint, scale and creative edits. To systematically test generative image editors, we propose a novel image editing benchmark -- TECCI: Tricky Edits of Collected and Curated Images. TECCI consists of a completely new set of images we are releasing. The images in TECCI span 7 image categories. The images and these categories were curated intentionally to target weaknesses of existing methods. The edit instructions in TECCI are automatically generated by Gemini, covering 5 edit types per source image. We also curated a set of 530 images for which we created challenging manually written edit instructions. Overall, TECCI contains 7550 pairs of images and edit instructions. We conduct human evaluations of five leading image editing models on TECCI. Humans judge outputs along three dimensions: 1) instruction following, 2) minimality of the edits, and 3) visual quality. To scale-up the evaluation, we also build an auto-rater using Gemini that achieves 74.7% accuracy in matching human evaluations. Our evaluations reveal that: 1) none of the models exceed a 22% overall success rate, demonstrating the challenging nature of TECCI, 2) Nano Banana Pro is the best performing model overall, 3) models perform significantly better at instruction following compared to minimal edits and visual quality, 4) models struggle with editing architecture and nature images which require strong understanding of spatial layout and intricate visual details. 5) reasoning and creative edits are the most difficult, whereas color and appearance edits are the easiest.

</details>


### [143] [Distilling Neuro-Symbolic Programs into 3D Multi-modal LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01215)
*Wentao Mo,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: APEIRIA是一个神经符号3D多模态大语言模型，通过三阶段课程学习将符号推理模式蒸馏到MLLM中，结合了神经符号方法的可解释推理和MLLM的灵活性，在3D空间推理任务上超越了先前的NS3D方法并达到了SOTA MLLM的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D空间推理方法存在根本性权衡：神经符号3D概念学习器（NS3D）具有可解释推理能力但受限于封闭概念集和简单程序；端到端3D多模态大语言模型（3D MLLM）能处理复杂自然语言和开放词汇但缺乏显式空间验证的黑盒推理。作者旨在桥接两种范式，同时获得可解释性和灵活性。

Method: 提出三阶段课程学习策略：a) 3D感知对齐（将物体视觉-几何特征对齐到LLM）；b) CoT监督微调（从符号程序轨迹学习查询分解和逐步验证）；c) CoT强化学习（将推理模式扩展到开放集概念和深层嵌套指令）。核心思想是转移推理模式而非概念特定知识。

Result: 在3D空间推理数据集上的接地、问答和描述生成评估中，APEIRIA超越了先前的NS3D方法，并匹配了最先进的3D MLLM的性能。

Conclusion: APEIRIA成功统一了符号方法的系统推理能力和MLLM的灵活性，保留了透明推理和规划-感知组件的模块化互换性等关键NS3D优势，为3D空间推理提供了一条桥接两种范式的新路径。

Abstract: Current 3D spatial reasoning methods face a fundamental trade-off: neuro-symbolic 3D (NS3D) concept learners achieve interpretable reasoning through compositional programs but are constrained to closed-set concept vocabularies and simple programs; end-to-end 3D multi-modal LLMs (3D MLLMs) could handle complex natural language and open-vocabulary concepts but suffer from black-box reasoning without explicit spatial verification. We introduce APEIRIA, a neuro-symbolic 3D MLLM to bridge two paradigms by distilling symbolic reasoning patterns into MLLMs with natural language chain-of-thought. Our three-stage curriculum progressively builds reasoning capabilities: a) 3D perception alignment grounds object visual-geometric features to the LLM, b) CoT-SFT teaches query decomposition and stepwise verification from symbolic program traces, and c) CoT-RL extends reasoning patterns to open-set concepts and deeply nested instructions. By transferring reasoning patterns rather than concept-specific knowledge, APEIRIA preserves key NS3D virtues: transparent reasoning and modular interchangeability of planning and perception components. Evaluations on grounding, question answering, and captioning show that APEIRIA surpasses prior NS3D methods and matches state-of-the-art 3D MLLMs on 3D spatial reasoning datasets, unifying symbolic methods' systematic reasoning with MLLMs' flexibility. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/APEIRIA.

</details>


### [144] [Analysis of Ethnic Disparities in Autism Spectrum Disorder among Toddlers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01217)
*Aadithya Prabha Ramaharsha,Deevna Reddy,Uma Ranjan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究通过逻辑回归分析了三个种族群体（白种欧洲人、亚洲人、中东人）与ASD特征之间的关系，发现种族对ASD发病率有显著影响：白种欧洲人风险增加81%，中东人风险降低79%（以亚洲人为参照）。同时证实新生儿黄疸和男性性别是ASD的重要预测因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究种族因素与ASD特征之间的关系，以及行为评分、性别和新生儿黄疸在不同种族群体中的影响，旨在为考虑种族差异的ASD诊断框架和干预措施提供依据。

Method: 采用逻辑回归分析方法，比较白种欧洲人、亚洲人和中东人三个种族群体，分析种族、性别和新生儿黄疸等变量对ASD发病率的影响。

Result: 种族对ASD发病率有显著影响：与亚洲人相比，白种欧洲人ASD风险增加81%，中东人ASD风险降低79%。新生儿黄疸是ASD的显著预测因素，男性儿童的ASD风险显著高于女性儿童。

Conclusion: ASD的诊断框架和干预措施需要考虑种族差异，以确保在不同种族群体中ASD特征的评估和呈现更加准确和有效。

Abstract: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is a neurodevelopmental disorder characterized by challenges in communication and behavior. This study examines the relationship between ethnicity and ASD traits, along with behavioural scores, sex and neonatal jaundice across three ethnic groups: White Europeans, Asians, and Middle Eastern individuals. We perform a logistic regression and show that ethnicity has a significant effect on incidence of ASD. White Europeans are 81% increased risk of ASD and Middle Easterners are at 79\% reduced risk of ASD compared to Asians. We also confirm earlier studied which show that neonatal jaundice is a significant predictor of ASD, while male children are at much higher risk of ASD compared to female children. These results suggest the need for diagnostic frameworks and interventions that account for ethnic in the presentation and assessment of ASD traits

</details>


### [145] [Where to Look: Can Foundation Models Reach a Target Viewpoint Through Active Exploration?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01247)
*Liyang Li,Muzhi Zhu,Zhiyue Zhao,Hengyu Zhao,Ke Liu,Linhao Zhong,Hao Chen,Chunhua Shen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出目标视角复现（TVR）任务——智能体通过主动调整3D环境中的视角来匹配目标图像，并构建TVRBench基准。现有模型表现较差（开源7.8%，闭源12.0%），主要瓶颈在于多轮视觉历史理解和空间位移映射。通过统一后训练框架（SFT+GRPO），9B模型可达51.4%成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基础模型的空间智能多聚焦于对预采集观测的被动理解，缺乏主动感知与行动能力（如人类通过头/身体运动复现目标视角），因此提出TVR任务填补这一空白。

Method: 构建TVRBench室内仿真基准；提出统一后训练框架，包括专家轨迹SFT、推理监督CoT-SFT、离线单轮GRPO和在线多轮GRPO（基于模拟器实时rollout）。

Result: 最强开源模型仅7.8%成功率，闭源模型12.0%；统一框架下9B模型达50.8%（SFT）和51.4%（多轮GRPO）；CoT监督和单轮GRPO反而降低闭环性能。

Conclusion: TVRBench可作为衡量和训练主动感知与行动3D智能体的有效测试平台；视觉-动作SFT是主要增益来源，多轮GRPO提供额外多房间细化提升。

Abstract: Humans can reproduce the viewpoint specified by a target image through active head and body motion, yet spatial intelligence in foundation models has largely been studied as passive understanding of pre-collected observations. We introduce Target Viewpoint Reproduction (TVR) -- an active task where an agent adjusts its viewpoint in a 3D environment until its observation matches a given target image -- and TVRBench, an indoor-simulation benchmark spanning scene scale and target-view visual richness. TVR is far from solved: on the evaluation split, the strongest open-source and closed-source models reach only 7.8% and 12.0% success. Fine-grained analysis identifies two consistent bottlenecks: off-the-shelf models struggle with multi-turn visual history, and performance drops sharply when viewpoint reproduction requires body translation rather than in-place rotation, exposing a gap in mapping spatial discrepancies to embodied movement. To study reducing this gap, we build a unified TVR post-training framework covering expert-trajectory SFT, rationale-supervised CoT-SFT, offline Single-turn GRPO, and on-policy Multi-turn GRPO from live simulator rollouts. Visual-action SFT supplies the main gain, raising a 9B open-source model to 50.8% success; Multi-turn GRPO provides targeted multi-room refinement and reaches 51.4% overall, while CoT supervision and Single-turn GRPO degrade closed-loop performance. These results establish TVRBench as a testbed for measuring and training foundation models that actively perceive and act in 3D environments. Our code, data, and models are available at https://github.com/aim-uofa/TVRBench.

</details>


### [146] [Exploiting In-Sensor Computing for Energy-Efficient Earth Observation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01271)
*Luigi Capogrosso,Pietro Bonazzi,Loris Hoxhaj,Michele Magno*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于索尼IMX500智能视觉传感器的星上感知计算框架，通过TinyML技术将地球观测数据处理下沉到传感器层面，在8MB约束下达到96.68%精度、17.40 FPS吞吐量和14.19 mJ/推理的超低能耗，有效缓解了卫星数据下传带宽瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卫星产业快速增长导致地理空间数据采集量激增，而地面站下行带宽有限，形成严重的数据传输瓶颈。现有星上计算（OBC）虽能部分缓解，但仍需进一步将处理前移至传感器端，以过滤噪声和无关数据，减少下传负担。

Method: 将TinyML技术与索尼IMX500智能视觉传感器集成，构建端到端地球观测流水线；将处理计算直接从主嵌入式设备卸载到传感器级别；在EuroSAT数据集上评估SqueezeNet、ShuffleNetV2和MCUNetV1等多种高效卷积神经网络。

Result: 模型在IMX500平台8MB约束下保持96.68%的竞争性精度；平均处理吞吐量17.40 FPS，延迟27.43 ms；每次推理能耗仅14.19 mJ，能效达42.26 GMAC/J。

Conclusion: 所提出的传感器内计算框架在严格资源约束下实现了高精度、高吞吐量和超低能耗，证明了其用于星上传感器部署的可行性与有效性，为解决卫星数据下行带宽瓶颈提供了新路径。

Abstract: The rapid growth of the satellite industry has driven a significant increase in geospatial data acquisition, highlighting a critical bottleneck: the severe disparity between the volume of collected sensor data and the limited downlink bandwidth available to ground stations. While On-Board Computing (OBC) has helped address this by pre-processing data in orbit, this article further advances the paradigm by introducing an in-sensor computing framework. We present an optimized end-to-end Earth Observation (EO) pipeline tailored for strict computational constraints by integrating TinyML techniques with the Sony IMX500 Intelligent Vision Sensor. Specifically, our approach shifts processing directly to the sensor level, offloading the computation from the primary embedded device, and effectively mitigating the downlink transmission of noisy or irrelevant data. We evaluated several efficient Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets), i.e., SqueezeNet, ShuffleNetV2, and MCUNetV1, on the EuroSAT dataset. Experimental results show that, despite the optimizations required for deployment on the IMX500 platform, our models maintain a competitive 96.68% accuracy while operating within its 8 MB constraints. Specifically, the models reach an average processing throughput of 17.40 FPS with a latency of 27.43 ms. Furthermore, our system profile exhibits high energy efficiency, with a low energy footprint of 14.19 mJ per inference and an efficiency rating of 42.26 GMAC/J, demonstrating its viability for in-sensor deployment.

</details>


### [147] [Event-Based Vision in Space: Applications, Trends, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01280)
*Luigi Capogrosso,Pietro Bonazzi,Michele Magno*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文综述了事件视觉（神经形态相机）在太空领域的最新应用，提出了一种涵盖大气观测、环境监测、在轨处理与地理空间建模四大领域的分类体系，指出神经形态工程是解决当前遥感与太空探索关键瓶颈的范式变革。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统帧式光学传感器在轨道环境中存在运动模糊、高功耗和数据冗余等问题，而事件传感器的太空应用文献高度碎片化，缺乏系统性综述。

Method: 基于检索到的文献，提出了一个以四个主要领域为核心的分类法：1) 大气与高速观测；2) 环境监测与变化检测；3) 操作支持与在轨处理；4) 地理空间建模与预测分析。

Result: 综述表明神经形态工程不仅是辅助成像技术，而是一种能够直接解决现代遥感与可持续太空探索关键瓶颈的范式转变。

Conclusion: 事件视觉传感器在太空领域具有广阔前景，其异步、低功耗、高动态范围等特性可有效应对传统传感器的局限性。

Abstract: Earth Observation (EO) is undergoing a significant transformation driven by the deployment of novel sensing technologies. Traditional frame-based optical sensors often struggle with motion blur, high power consumption, and extreme data redundancy in challenging orbital environments. In contrast, event-based sensors, also known as neuromorphic cameras, offer a bio-inspired asynchronous approach. By capturing only local illumination changes, they provide microsecond temporal resolution, an extremely high dynamic range, and exceptional energy efficiency. Although the use of these sensors is rapidly expanding from terrestrial systems to orbital platforms, the scientific literature surrounding their space-based applications remains heavily fragmented. To bridge this gap, this article presents a comprehensive review of the state-of-the-art in event-based vision in the space domain. Based on the retrieved literature, we introduce a taxonomy structured around four primary domains: 1) atmospheric and high-speed observation; 2) environmental monitoring and change detection; 3) operational support and onboard processing; and 4) geospatial modeling and predictive analysis. As a result, this survey highlights that neuromorphic engineering is far more than a supplementary imaging technique; it is a paradigm shift that can be used to directly address critical bottlenecks in modern remote sensing and sustainable space exploration.

</details>


### [148] [KG-FairDiff: Knowledge Graph-Guided Prompt Refinement for Demographically Fair Text-to-Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01282)
*Farbod Davoodi,Seyed Reza Tavakoli Shiyadeh,Pooria Safaei,Sana Harighi,Parsa Gholami,Amirali Amini,Kimia Vanaei,Emad Firoozi,Parham Abed Azad,Babak Khalaj,Siavash Ahmadi,Amir Hossein Payberah,Mohammad Hossein Rohban,Soheil Kolouri,Ali Diba*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: KG-FairDiff是一个模型无关、推理时干预的框架，通过知识图谱引导的提示词优化，在保持语义的同时显著减少文本到图像生成系统中的性别、种族、年龄和交叉性偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文生图系统在部署规模上造成人口层面的伤害（如对女性、有色人种、老年人及非西方文化的低表征或刻板印象），而现有缓解方法要么需要昂贵的重新训练（对闭源模型不可行），要么依赖忽略文化背景的固定人口统计模板。

Method: 将公平感知的提示词优化形式化为约束优化问题，实现为闭环流水线：包含约1200个文化与偏见相关三元组的知识图谱检索结构化上下文，LLM重写器提出优化建议，验证器仅接受降低基于散度的公平损失同时保留语义保真度的提示词。

Result: 在八个广泛部署的骨干生成器上评估，KG-FairDiff显著降低了性别、种族、年龄和交叉性差异，同时保持了提示语义。论文还提供了有限终止界证明，并建立了Bias-P/Bias-W与目标分布散度、ENS与KL散度之间的数学一致性评估套件。

Conclusion: KG-FairDiff提供了一种实用、可直接部署的途径，用于实现更公平的生成式AI，无需修改模型本身即可在推理时减少偏见。

Abstract: Text-to-Image (TTI) systems are now everyday infrastructure for journalism, education, advertising, and public communication, and the demographic and cultural stereotypes they inherit from training data (rendering women, people of colour, older adults, and non-Western cultures as under-represented or caricatured) become a population-level harm at deployment scale. Existing mitigations either require costly retraining, infeasible for the closed-source backbones that dominate consumer products, or rely on fixed demographic templates that ignore cultural context. We present KG-FairDiff, a model-agnostic, inference-time framework that formalises fairness-aware prompt refinement as a constrained optimisation problem and operationalises it as a closed-loop pipeline: a knowledge graph of ~1,200 culture- and bias-related triples retrieves structured context, an LLM rewriter proposes refinements, and a validator accepts only prompts that reduce a divergence-based fairness loss while preserving semantic fidelity to the user's original intent. We prove a finite-termination bound for the refinement loop, contribute a mathematically consistent evaluation suite linking Bias-P/Bias-W to divergence from target distributions and ENS to KL divergence, and audit eight widely-deployed backbone generators. KG-FairDiff substantially reduces gender, race, age, and intersectional disparities while preserving prompt semantics, offering a practical, deployment-ready route to more equitable generative AI.

</details>


### [149] [Knowledge-Intensive Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01285)
*Chenxu Wang,Mingda Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出知识密集型视频生成（KIVI）任务，要求模型根据信息寻求型提示生成视频，并构建了包含1080个提示的KIVI-Bench基准，提出自动评估事实性和有用性的指标。实验表明，七个主流视频生成模型在该任务上表现远落后于人类，尤其在视觉属性、程序操作和信息清晰呈现方面存在显著不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文生视频模型在视觉质量上进步显著，但在事实性和实际可用性方面的评估仍然不足，缺乏对知识密集型、信息寻求型视频生成能力的系统性评测。

Method: 1）定义知识密集型视频生成（KIVI）任务，要求模型从简短信息寻求提示（如解释、步骤、演示）生成视频；2）构建KIVI-Bench基准（1080个提示）；3）提出自动评估事实性和有用性的指标，并通过人工评估验证其与人类标注的一致性优于现有指标。

Result: 七个SOTA文生视频模型在KIVI任务上均显著低于人类水平，尤其在视觉属性准确性、程序化操作逻辑和清晰的信息呈现方面差距明显。所提自动指标与人类标注的一致性显著优于现有替代指标。

Conclusion: KIVI是一个具有挑战性的新方向，揭示了当前视频生成模型在事实性和指导性有用性方面的严重不足，为未来模型改进提供了明确的方向。

Abstract: Text-to-video generation has advanced rapidly in visual quality, but remains under-evaluated for factuality and practical usefulness. We introduce knowledge-intensive video generation (KIVI), where models generate videos from short information-seeking prompts that ask for explanations, procedures, or demonstrations. To evaluate this setting, we construct KIVI-Bench, a benchmark of 1,080 prompts, and propose automatic metrics for factuality and helpfulness. Human evaluation shows that our metrics significantly better align with human annotations than existing alternatives. Experiments on seven state-of-the-art video generation models show that current systems still lag behind human performance, especially on visual properties, procedural operations, and clear information presentation. These results highlight KIVI as a challenging direction for factual and instructionally useful video generation.

</details>


### [150] [Beyond Visual Memory: Mechanistic Diagnostics of Latent Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01287)
*Garvin Guo,Yu Chen,Xiang Wang,Shuai Li,Xinpei Zhao,Huaxing Liu,Shuai Dong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文通过将潜在视觉推理中的潜在令牌分解为三个可测试组件（潜在槽、边界标记和格式），发现性能提升的真正来源并非视觉记忆，而是来自边界标记、格式以及注意力模式，并呼吁在评估时不仅要看准确率，还要考察模型实际依赖的机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜在视觉推理方法通过在多模态语言模型中插入连续潜在令牌来提升性能，但近期分析发现这些令牌与图像关联弱、对答案贡献小；然而已有分析将潜在令牌视为单一整体，掩盖了真正增益来源，因此需要分解并系统探究各组件的作用。

Method: 将潜在令牌分解为三个可测试组件：潜在槽（latent slots）、边界标记（boundary markers）和格式（format）；开发了一种最先进的方法作为探针，在六种方法-阶段设置和四个感知密集型基准上进行测试，检验视觉记忆假说的预测。

Result: 潜在槽在所有设置中均未能满足视觉记忆假说的预测；仅保留边界标记即可在若干设置中保留78-100%的增益；模型在潜在位置比在答案位置更窄地关注图像。增益因此来自边界标记、格式和这种注意力模式，而非潜在槽。

Conclusion: 潜在视觉推理的评估不应仅依赖准确率，还需考察模型实际依赖的机制；不同训练监督方式下，即使准确率匹配，机制也可能存在显著差异。

Abstract: Recent latent visual reasoning methods achieve substantial gains by inserting continuous latent tokens into multimodal language models. These gains are commonly attributed to the tokens encoding visual evidence; recent analyses, however, reveal a paradox: the tokens are loosely tied to the image and contribute little to the answer. Critically, these analyses treat latent tokens as a single unit, obscuring the true source of the gains. We therefore decompose latent tokens into three testable components: latent slots, boundary markers, and format, and develop a state-of-the-art method as a probe under favorable conditions. Across six method-stage settings and four perception-heavy benchmarks, latent slots fail every prediction of the visual-memory account. Strikingly, retaining only the boundary markers preserves 78 to 100% of the gain in several settings, while the model attends to the image more narrowly at latent positions than at answer positions. The gain therefore comes from boundary markers, format, and this attention pattern, not from latent slots. How each method engages this mechanism depends on its training supervision: at matched accuracy, mechanisms can still differ markedly. Latent visual reasoning thus needs evaluation not only by accuracy but by what the model actually relies on.

</details>


### [151] [DeblurNVS: Geometric Latent Diffusion for Novel View Synthesis from Sparse Motion-Blurred Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01315)
*Changyue Shi,Wangbo Yu,Chaoran Feng,Li Yuan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DeblurNVS 是一个无需逐场景优化的模糊感知新视角合成框架，能够从稀疏的运动模糊图像中直接合成高质量清晰新视图，通过恢复中间几何表示来提升多视图推理能力，并在合成和真实模糊场景上均优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有新视角合成方法大多假设输入为清晰观察，但实际拍摄中运动模糊（相机抖动、场景运动、有限曝光）会破坏局部细节和跨视角几何对应关系。现有模糊感知 NVS 方法依赖昂贵的逐场景优化，难以实现高效且可泛化的稀疏视图合成。

Method: 提出 DeblurNVS 框架，直接从稀疏运动模糊图像中恢复中间几何表示（如结构和对应关系），再结合目标相机信息合成目标视角表示并重建清晰 RGB 新视图。同时构建了基于 DL3DV-10K 的插值有限曝光模糊合成数据集用于大规模训练。

Result: 在合成运动模糊基准上优于现有基线方法，并能泛化到真实运动模糊场景，生成感知上更清晰、结构更稳定的新视图，且无需逐场景优化。

Conclusion: DeblurNVS 有效解决了稀疏运动模糊输入下的新视角合成问题，兼顾了高效性与泛化能力，为实际拍摄场景中的高质量 NVS 提供了一种实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Novel view synthesis (NVS) is a fundamental problem in computer vision and graphics. Recent advances in neural radiance fields (NeRF), 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), and generative view synthesis have substantially improved its quality. Yet most methods still rely on clean observations, where image structures and cross-view geometric cues are well preserved. Motion blur breaks this assumption by corrupting local details and weakening multi-view correspondences. Such blur commonly arises from camera shake, scene motion, or finite exposure in practical capture. Blur-aware NVS methods address this degradation by modeling image formation, but their reliance on costly per-scene optimization limits efficient and generalizable sparse-view synthesis. To address this, we propose DeblurNVS, a novel framework for synthesizing high-fidelity novel views directly from sparse motion-blurred images, without requiring per-scene optimization. DeblurNVS restores the intermediate geometric representations needed for multi-view reasoning, enabling blurred inputs to recover reliable structure and correspondence cues. The restored representations are then combined with target camera information to synthesize the target-view representation and reconstruct a sharp RGB novel view. To enable the large-scale training, we construct a motion-blurred NVS dataset from DL3DV-10K using interpolation-based finite-exposure blur synthesis. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeblurNVS outperforms existing baselines on synthetic motion-blur benchmarks and generalizes to real motion-blurred scenes, producing perceptually sharper and structurally more stable novel views while avoiding costly per-scene optimization. Project page: https://github.com/PKU-YuanGroup/DeblurNVS.

</details>


### [152] [HOLA: Holistic Multi-Modal Alignment for Open-Set 3D Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01334)
*Koby Aharonov,Oren Shrout,Ayellet Tal*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出通过多视图图像和多文本描述联合对齐3D点云，并设计了解耦多正例对比损失（Decoupled Multi-Positive Contrastive Loss），以提升开放集3D识别在长尾分布上的性能，同时保持高帧率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放集3D识别方法依赖2D ViT蒸馏语言-视觉知识，通常将每个点云与单张图像或单条文本对齐，导致表征局限于局部视角，无法捕捉3D物体的整体理解。

Method: 1) 将每个点云与多张图像和多条文本描述对齐；2) 提出解耦多正例对比损失（Decoupled Multi-Positive Contrastive Loss），分离正例聚合与负例竞争，避免"聚光灯拥挤"问题；3) 设计轻量级文本适配器（Text Adapter）用于网络爬取文本，减少与人工标注之间的领域差距。

Result: 在长尾基准上取得开放词汇SOTA性能，零样本识别能力显著提升，同时保持高帧率。

Conclusion: 多模态多实例对齐与解耦对比损失能有效提升3D开放集识别的泛化能力，轻量文本适配器使得大规模无监督文本得以有效利用。

Abstract: Open-set 3D recognition requires models that generalize to rare or unseen categories. Recent approaches address this by distilling language-vision knowledge into 3D encoders, typically relying on heavy 2D ViTs and aligning each point cloud with a single image or caption, thus anchoring representations to partial views. We propose aligning each point cloud with multiple images and textual descriptions to capture a more holistic understanding of 3D objects. To realize this idea, it is essential to design a loss function capable of jointly aligning a 3D instance with multiple matched signals, multi-view images and multiple texts, while separating positive aggregation from negative competition. We introduce such a function, termed the decoupled multi-positive contrastive loss. Our formulation enhances the loss's hardness-aware focus on challenging negatives, avoiding the "spotlight crowding" that occurs when many positives share the same softmax with all the negatives. Complementing this, we present a lightweight text adapter applied only to web captions, reducing the domain gap to curated annotations and enabling effective use of large-scale unsupervised text. Our model demonstrates state-of-the-art open-vocabulary performance on long-tail benchmarks, yielding substantial zero-shot improvements while sustaining high frame rates.

</details>


### [153] [ChartArena: Benchmarking Chart Parsing across Languages, Scenarios, and Formats](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01348)
*Shangpin Peng,Gengluo Li,Xingyu Wan,Chengquan Zhang,Hao Feng,Binghong Wu,Huawen Shen,Weinong Wang,Ziyi Cai,Zhuotao Tian,Han Hu,Can Ma,Yu Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ChartArena是一个涵盖8种图表家族、3种视觉场景（数字渲染、印刷照片、手绘照片）的双语基准，通过格式无关的评估协议和结构感知指标，系统评估了26个多模态大语言模型的图表解析能力，发现前沿闭源模型领先但开源模型快速追赶、文档解析模型在图表结构上表现不佳、专业图表解析器限于窄领域等关键发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图表解析基准存在三个问题：一是只关注窄范围的图表类型，忽略了流程图、思维导图等图表结构；二是模型输出格式不兼容，难以公平比较；三是数据集很少包含实际场景中常见的印刷或手绘图像。为解决这些问题，作者提出了ChartArena。

Method: 通过人机协同标注流程构建双语基准，覆盖8种图表家族和3种视觉场景；设计格式无关的评估协议，将异构输出映射到规范化三元组视图和有向图视图两个规范语义空间，采用结构感知指标进行评分；对26个前沿多模态大语言模型进行全面评估。

Result: 三类发现：(i) Gemini 3.1 Pro等前沿闭源模型整体领先，但最强开源系统正在快速缩小差距；(ii) 文档解析模型在数值图表上表现合理，但在图表结构上大幅落后；(iii) 专业图表解析器仍局限于窄图表家族。雷达图和手绘场景对所有模型都特别具有挑战性。

Conclusion: ChartArena暴露了现有模型在图表解析能力上的明显差距，为未来进展提供了统一基础。

Abstract: Charts are a primary medium for conveying quantitative and relational information, yet systematically evaluating chart parsing models remains difficult. Existing benchmarks focus on narrow chart types and leave diagrammatic structures such as flowcharts and mind maps largely unaddressed, while models produce outputs in incompatible formats, and datasets rarely include the printed or hand-drawn images encountered in practice. To address these issues, we introduce ChartArena, a comprehensive bilingual benchmark covering eight chart families spanning both numeric charts and diagrammatic structures, each evaluated across three visual scenarios: digital renderings, printed photos, and hand-drawn photos. The dataset is built via a human-agent collaborative annotation pipeline with multi-stage human verification to ensure annotation reliability. To enable fair cross-model comparison, we further design a format-agnostic evaluation protocol that maps heterogeneous outputs into two canonical semantic spaces, a normalized triple view and a directed graph view, and scores them with structure-aware metrics. Through extensive evaluation of 26 leading MLLMs, we observe three consistent findings: (i) frontier proprietary models such as Gemini 3.1 Pro lead overall, yet the strongest open-source systems are rapidly closing the gap; (ii) document parsing models handle numeric charts reasonably but fall sharply behind on diagrammatic structures; and (iii) expert chart parsers remain limited to narrow chart families. Across all models, radar charts and hand-drawn scenarios stay especially challenging. These findings show that ChartArena exposes clear capability gaps and provides a unified foundation for future progress. ChartArena is publicly available at https://github.com/pspdada/ChartArena.

</details>


### [154] [Diamonds in the Sky: Pareidolic Animals in Clouds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01361)
*Miriam Horovicz,Yacov Hel-Or,Yael Moses*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种基于扩散模型的AI方法，用于预测人们在云朵中可能感知到的拟人化动物（空想性视错觉），并通过生成形似云朵的动物图像及形态变化视频，帮助人们识别原本未注意到的错觉动物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人们常在云朵中看到动物形状（空想性视错觉），但现有最先进的识别方法通常无法检测到这类动物，因此需要一种能够预测并辅助人类感知这些错觉动物的方法。

Method: 使用扩散模型将云朵区域转换为与原始云朵视觉上相似的动物形状；扩散过程仅在目标动物与云朵形状相似时成功，且微妙的视觉提示足以帮助人们识别；利用成功生成的图像预测拟人化动物，并通过从生成图像过渡回原始云朵的短时变形视频，进一步增强人类对错觉动物的感知。

Result: 能够成功生成与云朵形状相似的动物图像，并据此预测人们可能感知到的拟人化动物；变形视频可有效提升人们对原本未识别到的错觉动物的感知能力。

Conclusion: 该方法利用扩散模型的特性，实现了对云朵中拟人化动物的预测和辅助感知，为理解空想性视错觉提供了新的计算途径。

Abstract: People often see animal shapes in clouds, a phenomenon known as pareidolia. We propose an AI-based method that aims to predict which animals people are likely to perceive in clouds, even though state-of-the-art recognition methods typically fail to detect such animals. Additionally, we introduce a method to assist individuals in perceiving specific pareidolic animals, even if they did not recognize them initially. Our approach uses a diffusion model to transform cloud segments into an animal shape that visually resemble the original cloud. This diffusion technique is inspired by the observation that the diffusion process succeeds only when the target animal resembles the shape of the cloud, and that subtle visual hints often suffice to help individuals recognize specific pareidolic animals. A generated image, successfully derived from the diffusion model, is then used to predict the pareidolic animal. Additionally, a short morphing video transitioning from the generated image back to the original cloud segment is employed to further enhance the human's perception of the pareidolic animals.

</details>


### [155] [Training-free image inversion for one-step diffusion models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01380)
*Tao Wu,Senmao Li,Yaxing Wang,Shiqi Yang,Kai Wang,Joost van de Weijer*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练的逆推框架TFinv，用于一步扩散模型的真实图像逆推与编辑。通过识别初始潜变量可编辑性和描述差距两个关键因素，提出了迭代噪声对齐（iterNA）和后缀学习（suffL）两种新技术，实现了精确的图像逆推和编辑，在PIE-Bench数据集上达到了最先进的性能，且效率显著优于现有多步方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有一步扩散模型在真实图像逆推和编辑中面临两大挑战：(1) 初始潜变量可编辑性不足，初始噪声与理想高斯分布之间存在距离；(2) 描述差距，即文本描述与图像表示之间的对齐不足。这两个因素影响了逆推效率和可编辑性。

Method: 提出了TFinv框架，包含两个核心技术：(1) 迭代噪声对齐（iterNA），通过最小化分布差距使其与标准高斯分布对齐；(2) 后缀学习（suffL），通过引入可学习的后缀提示令牌来增强文本到图像的描述对齐。此外，还提出了一种基于掩码的编辑技术以实现局部编辑并保持背景完整性。

Result: 在PIE-Bench数据集上的全面实验表明，TFinv在一步扩散编辑中达到了最先进的性能，并且在效率上显著优于现有的多步方法。

Conclusion: TFinv框架无需训练即可有效实现一步扩散模型的真实图像逆推和编辑，解决了初始噪声分布和描述对齐两个关键瓶颈，为高效图像编辑提供了新方案。

Abstract: In this work, we introduce a novel training-free inversion (TFinv) framework for one-step diffusion models,addressing key challenges in real image inversion and editing. We first identify two critical factors hamperingreal-image inversion and editing: (1) Initial Latent Editability, which is related to the distance between theinitial noise and the ideal Gaussian distribution, and (2) Caption Gap, which means the alignment betweentext captions and image representations. Both factors influence inversion efficiency and the editability ofone-step diffusion models. Then, we propose two novel techniques: iterative noise alignment (iterNA), whichminimizes the distribution gap to align with the normal Gaussian distribution, and suffix learning (suffL),which enhances text-to-image caption alignment by introducing learned suffix prompt tokens. These techniquesenable precise inversion of input images into their initial noise representations and facilitate image editing.Furthermore, we propose a mask-based editing technique for localized edits while preserving backgroundintegrity. Comprehensive experiments on the PIE-Bench dataset validate that our method TFinv not onlyachieves state-of-the-art performance in one-step diffusion editing, but also significantly outperforms existingmultistep approaches in efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/tttao-uwu/TFinv.git.

</details>


### [156] [PAI-Studio: Cinematic Video Background Replacement with Camera-Aware Motion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01399)
*Heyuan Gao,Bangxun Tang,Yiren Song,Guian Fang,Zijian He,Jie Yang,Mike Zheng Shou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PAI-Studio提出了一种新的参考条件视频合成任务，通过扩散Transformer骨干网络和双向注意力机制，实现与前景运动对齐的动态背景生成、前景重新照明和身份保留，构建了3万规模数据集，显著优于现有开源和商业方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开源系统和商业API无法同时保证运动一致的背景生成、高保真前景重新照明和前景身份保留，往往导致静态背景、不一致边界和明显的合成伪影。

Method: 基于扩散Transformer视频骨干网络，将问题重新表述为上下文条件生成任务，通过双向注意力机制在统一架构中联合捕获前景动态和背景参考信息，并构建了3万规模的高质量电影和在线视频数据集。

Result: 大量评估表明该方法显著优于现有的开源和商业API解决方案。

Conclusion: PAI-Studio成功解决了电影级背景替换中动态背景生成、前景重新照明和身份保留的长期挑战，为参考条件视频合成提供了有效框架。

Abstract: We present PAI-Studio, a new reference-conditioned video synthesis task that addresses a long-standing challenge in cinematic background replacement: generating dynamic backgrounds aligned with foreground motion while preserving foreground identity, matching reference scene appearance, and achieving globally consistent illumination with realistic foreground relighting. Existing open-source systems and commercial APIs cannot simultaneously ensure motion-consistent background generation, high-fidelity foreground relighting and foreground identity preservation, often resulting in static backgrounds, inconsistent boundaries, and noticeable compositing artifacts. To bridge this gap, we build upon a Diffusion Transformer video backbone and reformulate the problem as an in-context conditional generation task. Through bidirectional attention, our model jointly captures foreground dynamics and background reference information within a unified architecture. We further construct a 30K-scale dataset sourced from high-quality films and online videos to support this task. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing open-source and commercial API solutions.

</details>


### [157] [Agent Skills Should Go Beyond Text: The Case for Visual Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01414)
*Binxiao Xu,Ruichuan An,Bocheng Zou,Hang Hua*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出多模态技能范式，将文本逻辑与视觉支持结合，在GUI等视觉密集型任务中优于纯文本技能方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技能学习方法仅存储文本格式的可复用经验（如指令、推理轨迹），但在视觉密集型任务中，可复用知识依赖于空间布局、视觉定位、细粒度外观和局部状态变化，纯文本范式存在根本性瓶颈。

Method: 提出\NAME多模态技能范式，包含三种可复用形式：静态先验（稳定空间约定）、动态先验（视觉工作记忆）、交错视觉技能（有序文本步骤与源帧/截图/页面区域的绑定）。同时提出\SYSTEM自动系统，将智能体经验转换为可复用多模态技能，保留文本推理、空间参考、视觉边界和交互模式。

Result: 在GUI及其他视觉密集型任务实验中，多模态技能在需要空间对应、视觉证据和状态感知交互的场景中持续优于纯文本技能。

Conclusion: 可复用智能体技能应超越纯文本，成为多模态资产，以适应未来多模态智能体的需求。

Abstract: Reusable skills are a key mechanism for extending agent capabilities, allowing agents to accumulate experience and solve increasingly complex tasks. Yet most existing skill-learning methods store reusable experience as text-only assets, such as instructions, reasoning traces, or summarized trajectories. We argue that this text-only paradigm creates a fundamental bottleneck for visual-centric tasks, where reusable knowledge often depends on spatial layout, visual grounding, fine-grained appearance, and localized state changes. To address this limitation, we propose \textbf{\NAME}, a multimodal skill paradigm that combines declarative textual logic with explicit visual support. We distinguish three reusable forms: static priors for stable spatial conventions, dynamic priors for in-situ visual working memory, and interleaved visual skills that bind ordered text steps to the source frames, screenshots, or page regions that justify them. Rather than only describing what to do, visual skills also encode where to look, how to inspect, and how to verify visual outcomes. To scale visual-skill construction, we introduce \textbf{\SYSTEM}, an automatic system that converts agent experience into reusable multimodal skills by preserving textual reasoning, spatial references, visual boundaries, and interaction patterns from task trajectories. Experiments on GUI and other visual-centric tasks show that visual skills consistently outperform text-only skills, particularly when success requires spatial correspondence, visual evidence, and state-aware interaction. These results support our central position: reusable agent skills should go beyond text and become multimodal assets for future multimodal agents.

</details>


### [158] [DENSER: Depth-Guided Ensemble with Staged EFA-GS Reconstruction for Soccer Novel View Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01419)
*Parthsarthi Rawat*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DENSER是一种用于足球比赛新颖视角合成的深度引导集成方法，通过在EFA-GS基础上引入基于相机高度的损失加权、单目深度监督和三模型像素平均集成，在五个挑战场景上达到29.89 dB平均PSNR。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升足球赛事广播视角的新颖视角合成质量，解决纹理缺失区域的几何正则化问题，以及单个模型在复杂动态场景中合成质量不稳定的问题。

Method: (1) 基于相机高度的损失加权，优先考虑地面广播视角的合成质量；(2) 使用Depth-Anything-V2提供单目深度监督，在纹理缺失区域正则化几何结构；(3) 通过改变训练时长和高斯缩放限制，从共享基检查点出发训练三个模型，进行像素级平均集成。

Result: 在五个保留挑战场景上，平均PSNR为29.89 dB，SSIM为0.791，LPIPS为0.366。

Conclusion: DENSER通过深度引导集成策略有效提升了足球场景的新颖视角合成质量，三个关键贡献协同作用，在多个指标上取得了有竞争力的结果。

Abstract: We propose DENSER, a Depth-guided ENSemble with Staged EFA-GS Reconstruction for soccer novel view synthesis. DENSER extends EFA-GS with three key contributions: (1) camera-height-based loss weighting that prioritises ground-level broadcast views, (2) monocular depth supervision from Depth-Anything-V2 to regularise geometry in textureless regions, and (3) a three-model pixel-average ensemble whose members diverge from a shared base checkpoint by varying training length and Gaussian scale clamping. On five held-out challenge scenes we achieve a mean PSNR of 29.89 dB, SSIM of 0.791, and LPIPS of 0.366.

</details>


### [159] [SafeGen-Bench: Benchmarking Safety in Image-Conditioned Text-to-Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01481)
*Yingzi Ma,Xiaogeng Liu,Yawen Zheng,Chaowei Xiao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了SafeGen-Bench基准，专门用于评估条件文本到视频（T2V）模型在文本和图像输入组合下生成有害视频内容的安全性。实验发现现有模型难以避免生成恶意内容，且单一模态的护栏防御效果不足（80%失败率）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频安全基准主要关注恶意文本提示，忽略了安全文本与安全图像组合仍可能生成有害视频这一常见且具有挑战性的场景。

Method: 定义了10个恶意类别，专注于时序序列和行为相关风险；从多种图像/视频源中精心筛选起始帧，配以对应文本提示构建基准；评估多种条件T2V模型，并测试基于文本和基于图像的护栏防御效果。

Result: 当前条件T2V模型在SafeGen-Bench上不安全分数高达44.5，难以持续避免生成恶意内容；单模态护栏在7个恶意类别上失败率达80%。

Conclusion: SafeGen-Bench填补了条件T2V模型安全性评估的空白，揭示了现有模型和防御机制的不足，有望推动更安全可控的条件T2V模型发展。

Abstract: With the rapid advancements in text-to-image diffusion models, generative video models (T2V models) like Sora can now produce short synthetic videos from a text prompt or an initial image. However, synthetic video generation -- especially when guided by an initial image -- often poses risks, including the potential creation of illegal, politically sensitive, or unethical content. Existing benchmarks have started to consider the safety of generated videos, but they primarily focus on testing models with malicious text prompts, ignoring the scenario where text prompt and image combination may still lead to harmful video content. In practice, this is a common and challenging issue: videos generated from safe text and image inputs can nonetheless convey harmful information. To bridge this gap, we introduce SafeGen-Bench, a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate the safety of conditional T2V models. Our benchmark defines 10 malicious categories, concentrating on risks related to both temporal sequences and depicted behaviors. SafeGen-Bench consists of carefully selected start frames from diverse image and video sources, paired with corresponding text prompts to simulate realistic inputs. We evaluate a variety of conditional T2V models on SafeGen-Bench, and the results indicate that current models struggle to consistently avoid generating malicious content with unsafety scores reaching up to 44.5, especially under conditions requiring high quality. Furthermore, we assess the effectiveness of both text-based and image-based guardrails on our benchmark, finding that unimodal guardrails alone were insufficient to provide a robust defense, with an 80\% failure rate across seven malicious categories. We hope that SafeGen-Bench will foster the development of safer and more controllable conditional T2V models.

</details>


### [160] [Perception First: A Frontier Native-Video Model with Self-Consistency for Implicit Video Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01485)
*Ali Alavi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了多种开源视频大模型在VRR Challenge（需跨帧推理的视觉问答基准）上的表现，核心发现是该基准受限于感知能力而非推理能力：推理增强策略无效甚至有害，基础模型的感知质量和轻量测试时去噪才是关键提升手段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频问答基准多为单帧可答，VRR Challenge提出需跨不连续帧进行空间布局、运动、深度、视点、因果、社会语境等多维度推理的问题。作者旨在系统探究：当前开源视频大模型在此类需要复杂推理的任务上，瓶颈究竟是感知能力还是推理能力。

Method: 对Qwen2.5-VL、Qwen3-VL、InternVL3、Gemma-3及两个RL微调推理模型（Video-R1、VideoChat-R1.5）等开源自回归视频模型进行训练无关的系统评估；对比多种推理增强技巧（思维链、问题分解、描述-推理级联、音频转录、空间状态提示、自一致性、多模型集成、类别路由）的效果；按类别进行细粒度错误分析，并针对最弱的深度感知类别尝试注入单目深度线索的提示。

Result: 1) 推理侧增强方法对准确率无提升甚至有害；2) 基础模型的感知能力和轻量测试时去噪是唯一可靠的有效手段；3) 按类别分析：相对深度、视点和计数是最难的类别，因果和社会推理几乎被解决；4) 针对最弱的深度类别注入显式深度提示反而使准确率下降5.8个百分点。

Conclusion: VRR Challenge基准是感知受限而非推理受限，模型真正需要的是更好的感知能力（percept），而非更好的推理流程（procedure）。

Abstract: We describe our submission to the VRR Challenge @ CVPR 2026, built on the \emph{ImplicitQA} / \emph{VRR-QA} benchmark~\cite{implicitqa}: multiple-choice video question answering in which answers are deliberately \emph{not} observable in any single frame and must be inferred from spatial layout, motion, depth, viewpoint, causality, and social context across discontinuous frames of creative video. We conduct a systematic, training-free study spanning open-source Video-LMMs (Qwen2.5-VL~\cite{qwen25vl}, Qwen3-VL~\cite{qwen3vl}, InternVL3, Gemma-3, and the RL-tuned video reasoners Video-R1~\cite{videor1} and VideoChat-R1.5~\cite{videochatr15}) and a battery of inference-time strategies (chain-of-thought, question decomposition, describe-then-reason cascades, audio transcripts, spatial state prompting, self-consistency~\cite{selfconsistency}, multi-model ensembling, and category routing). Our central finding is that this benchmark is \emph{perception-bound rather than reasoning-bound}: reasoning-side augmentations are neutral-to-harmful, whereas base-model perceptual capability and lightweight test-time denoising are the only reliable levers. A per-category error analysis localizes the difficulty to low-level perception -- relative depth, viewpoint, and counting are the hardest categories, while causal and social reasoning are nearly solved -- and a prompt that explicitly injects monocular depth cues to attack the weakest category \emph{lowers} test accuracy by $5.8$ points, confirming that the model needs a better \emph{percept}, not a better \emph{procedure}.

</details>


### [161] [Splatshot: 3D Face Avatar Generation from a Single Unconstrained Photo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01493)
*Hao Liang,Zhixuan Ge,Soumendu Majee,Joanna Li,Ashok Veeraraghavan,Guha Balakrishnan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SplatShot提出了一种无需训练的新框架，通过将3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）表示与2D扩散先验直接在去噪过程中耦合，从单张非约束照片重建高保真3D面部头像。该方法在每一步去噪时，利用3D反馈循环确保多视图几何一致性，同时保持2D扩散先验的逼真度，在多样化的野外图像上取得了优于现有方法的身份保持、真实感和多视图一致性表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前馈式3D高斯泼溅模型在分布外输入上性能退化，而预训练扩散模型虽能生成高保真图像但缺乏多视图一致性。作者观察到这两种范式具有互补性：显式3D表示保证几何一致性，2D扩散先验确保逼真度，因此提出将二者在去噪过程中直接耦合。

Method: 给定一个基础3DGS面部模型和单张参考图像，在去噪过程中对所有目标视图进行联合去噪，并引入每步3D反馈循环：从噪声潜变量预测干净图像，将3DGS重新拟合到这些多视图预测上，然后将3DGS重渲染与2D预测之间的光度差异反向传播到噪声估计中，引导采样轨迹朝向严格3D一致且身份保真的输出。

Result: 在多样化的野外图像上，SplatShot生成的头像在身份保持、逼真度和多视图一致性方面均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 显式3D表示与2D扩散先验可以在去噪过程中直接耦合，无需额外训练即可实现兼具几何一致性与逼真度的3D头像重建。

Abstract: Reconstructing a photorealistic 3D face avatar from a single unconstrained photograph is challenging: feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) models degrade on out-of-distribution inputs, while pretrained diffusion models produce high-fidelity images but lack multi-view consistency. We observe that these paradigms are fundamentally complementary: explicit 3D representations guarantee geometric consistency, whereas 2D diffusion priors ensure photorealism. Building on this, we propose SplatShot, a training-free framework that couples these representations directly within the denoising process. Given a base 3DGS face model and a single reference image, we jointly denoise all target views using a per-step 3D feedback loop. At each timestep, we predict clean images from the noisy latents, refit the 3DGS to these multi-view predictions, and back-propagate the photometric discrepancy between the 3DGS re-renderings and 2D predictions into the noise estimate. This steers the sampling trajectory toward strictly 3D-coherent, identity-faithful outputs. Experiments on diverse in-the-wild images demonstrate that SplatShot produces 3D avatars with superior identity preservation, photorealism, and multi-view consistency.

</details>


### [162] [On the Limits of Token Reduction for Efficient Unified Vision Language Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01503)
*Siyi Chen,Weiming Zhuang,Jingtao Li,Lingjuan Lv*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究了统一视觉语言模型（VLM）训练中基于token缩减的加速方法，发现视觉理解存在深层冗余而视觉生成依赖持续，但任务特定的token丢弃会破坏联合训练的协同效应，揭示了高效统一建模需要保留共享跨任务结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 统一VLM的联合训练计算开销巨大，但效率优化问题长期被忽视，本文旨在探索token缩减加速方法的可行性及其局限性。

Method: 通过逐层注意力分配的系统分析，发现视觉理解在深层存在视觉token冗余，而视觉生成对图像token有持续依赖；据此设计任务特定的加速器分别缩减图像token计算，并分析统一训练中的协同损失。

Result: 任务特定的token缩减在独立场景下显著提升效率，但在统一训练中导致参数路径分歧，消除了联合优化带来的相互性能增益，产生协同损失。

Conclusion: 高效统一建模需要保留共享的跨任务结构，未来应发展协同感知的加速策略。

Abstract: Unified vision-language models (VLMs) integrate visual understanding and visual generation within a single autoregressive backbone, but their joint training is computationally expensive and largely overlooked from an efficiency perspective. In this work, we study the feasibility and limits of token-reduction-based acceleration for unified VLM training. Through a systematic analysis of layerwise attention allocation, we uncover a fundamental asymmetry: visual understanding exhibits substantial late-layer visual redundancy, whereas visual generation maintains persistent dependence on image tokens across depth. Guided by this observation, we design task-specific accelerators that selectively reduce image-token computation for each objective. While these methods achieve significant efficiency gains in isolated settings, we observe a consistent synergy loss under unified training -- task-specific token dropping necessitates divergent parameter pathways and eliminates the mutual performance gains typically observed in joint optimization. Our findings suggest that efficient unified modeling requires preserving shared cross-task structures, highlighting the need for synergy-aware acceleration strategies. Project page: https://chicychen.github.io/TokenReductionUnifiedVLM/.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [163] [DraDDP: A Multimodal Multi-Party Dialogue Discourse Parsing Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00012)
*Shannan Liu,Peifeng Li,Yaxin Fan,Qiaoming Zhu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了首个公开的英文多模态多轮对话话语解析数据集DraDDP（基于美剧），包含495个对话片段、6374条话语和9.1小时视频，实验证明多模态信息对捕捉对话结构和关系类型有价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多限于文本模态或两方对话，无法满足多模态和多方的对话场景需求。

Method: 基于美国电视剧构建了首个公开英文多模态多轮对话话语解析数据集DraDDP，并在该数据集上建立基准评测，深入分析不同模态的影响。

Result: DraDDP包含495个对话片段、6374条话语和9.1小时并行视频内容，实验证明多模态信息在捕捉对话结构和关系类型方面的价值。

Conclusion: 多模态信息对多轮对话话语解析有效，数据集和代码将公开发布以推动该领域研究。

Abstract: Multi-party dialogue discourse parsing aims to identify dependency structures and relation types between utterances in conversations. Previous studies are mostly limited to textual modality or two-party dialogue, failing to meet the multimodal and multi-party settings. In this paper, we construct the first publicly available English multimodal dataset DraDDP for multi-party dialogue discourse parsing, based on American TV dramas. DraDDP contains 495 dialogue segments with 6,374 utterances and 9.1 hours of parallel video content, covering rich multi-party interaction scenarios. Moreover, we establish comprehensive benchmarks by evaluating this task on DraDDP and conducting in-depth analysis on the impact of different modalities. Experimental results demonstrate the value of multimodal information in capturing dialogue structures and relation types. We will publicly release the dataset, annotation guidelines, and code to promote future research in multimodal dialogue understanding.

</details>


### [164] [Toward Robust In-Context Learning: Leveraging Out-of-distribution Proxies for Target Inaccessible Demonstration Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00014)
*Hao Xu,Rite Bo,Fausto Giunchiglia,Yingji Li,Rui Song*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DOPA是一个基于OOD代理的演示检索框架，通过近似不可访问的目标域并引入马氏距离全局多样性约束，在分布偏移加剧时提升LLM的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明LLM在OOD任务上表现良好，但随着分布偏移加剧其优势减弱。研究者尝试从源域检索分布相似且信息丰富的示例来增强LLM的推理能力，但在目标域不可访问的实际场景中，评估未知分布具有挑战性，间接影响所选示例的质量。

Method: 提出DOPA框架：1) 引入OOD代理来近似不可访问的目标域，指导检索过程；2) 基于代理评估，引入基于马氏距离的全局多样性约束，确保检索到的示例具有充分的多样性。

Result: 在多个LLM和任务上的实验结果表明，DOPA有效增强了OOD设置下的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DOPA通过代理评估和多样性约束，成功解决了目标域不可访问时演示检索质量下降的问题，提升了LLM在分布偏移场景下的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Although studies have demonstrated that Large Language Models (LLMs) can perform well on Out-of-Distribution (OOD) tasks, their advantage tends to diminish as the distribution shift becomes more severe. Consequently, researchers aim to retrieve distributionally similar and informative demonstrations from the available source domain to boost the inference capabilities of LLMs. However, in practical scenarios where the target domain is inaccessible, evaluating the unknown distribution is challenging, which indirectly impacts the quality of the selected demonstrations. To address this problem, we propose \textbf{DOPA}, a demonstration search framework that incorporates an OOD proxy to approximate the inaccessible target domain and guide the retrieval process. Building on proxy-based evaluation, DOPA further introduces a Mahalanobis distance-based global diversity constraint to ensure sufficient diversity among the retrieved demonstrations. Experimental results on multiple LLMs and tasks demonstrate that DOPA effectively enhances robustness in OOD settings\footnote{https://github.com/bort64/ood\_code}.

</details>


### [165] [AEyeDE: An Attention-Based Attribution Framework for AI-Generated Text Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00016)
*Aria Nourbakhsh,Adelaide Danilov,Christoph Schommer,Salima Lamsiyah*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出AEyeDE方法，利用代理Transformer模型的注意力归因图作为区分信号，通过轻量级CNN学习表征，用于检测AI生成文本。该方法在编码器-解码器设置中优于纯文本基线，在解码器-only设置中表现稳健，并发现注意力图存在可区分的局部结构模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着现代语言模型达到人类水平的流畅度，基于表面统计或似然信号的检测器容易被绕过，需要更鲁棒且可解释的检测信号。

Method: 使用代理Transformer模型提取人类和AI生成文本的基于注意力的归因矩阵，训练轻量级卷积神经网络从这些归因图中学习判别性表征。

Result: 在编码器-解码器翻译设置中持续优于纯文本基线；在解码器-only设置中，生成器特定检测表现强劲，标准基准测试中具有竞争力，且在跨数据集迁移和拼写扰动下表现出鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 基于注意力的归因图提供了互补且可解释的信号用于AI生成文本检测，注意力图中存在可重复的局部结构模式，其相对频率在人类与AI文本间存在一致差异。

Abstract: Detecting AI-generated text is becoming increasingly challenging as modern language models approach human-level fluency and can evade detectors that rely on surface statistics or likelihood-based signals. We propose \textsc{AEyeDE}, an attribution-driven approach to human-AI authorship detection that leverages model attention as a discriminative signal. Specifically, we extract attention-based attribution matrices for both human- and AI-generated text using a \emph{proxy} Transformer model with white-box access and train a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network to learn representations from these attribution maps. Across encoder-decoder translation settings, our method consistently outperforms a text-only baseline. In decoder-only settings, it performs strongly in generator-specific detection, remains competitive on standard benchmarks, and shows robustness under cross-dataset transfer and alternative-spelling perturbations. We further show that attention maps exhibit recurring local structures whose relative frequencies differ consistently between human- and AI-generated text across datasets and proxy models. These findings suggest that attention-based attribution maps provide a complementary and interpretable signal for AI-generated text detection. We will make the code publicly available to support future research.

</details>


### [166] [CSRP: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Chinese Text Correction via Reinforcement Learning with Efficiency-Aware Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00020)
*Wei Tian,Yuhao Zhou,Man Lan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CSRP三阶段框架（持续预训练+思维链微调+基于组相对策略优化的效率感知奖励），在中文语法纠错任务上达到SOTA（NACGEG基准F0.5=50.99，精确率=57.17），有效缓解过纠偏误；同时将CSCD拼写纠错F1提升至59.61，超越GPT-4达5.20个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用LLM缺乏针对中文语法细粒度区分的语言学先验知识，且基于MLE的有监督微调无法优化精确率导向的指标，导致系统性过纠偏误。

Method: 三阶段框架：(1) 持续预训练（CPT）在590万平衡样本上内化领域知识；(2) 思维链有监督微调（Chain-of-Thought SFT），引入显式错误推理实现诊断透明性；(3) 组相对策略优化（GRPO）结合效率感知奖励，显式惩罚不必要编辑。

Result: NACGEG基准上F0.5=50.99, 精确率=57.17，超越之前最佳结果；CSCD拼写纠错F1=59.61，超过GPT-4达5.20点；RL对齐阶段较SFT基线带来8%相对提升，且该增益与大规模CPT的贡献正交。

Conclusion: 显式优化编辑效率对于高质量语法纠错至关重要，三阶段渐进式构建纠错能力的方法有效缓解了MLE训练固有的过纠偏误，达到SOTA性能。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) based Chinese Grammatical Error Correction (CGEC) systems face two critical challenges: general-purpose models lack specialized linguistic priors for subtle grammatical distinctions, and Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Maximum Likelihood Estimation fails to optimize for precision-focused metrics, leading to systematic over-correction. We propose CSRP, a three-stage framework that progressively builds correction capability through Continual Pre-training (CPT) on 5.9M balanced samples to internalize domain knowledge, Chain-of-Thought SFT with explicit error reasoning for diagnostic transparency, and Group Relative Policy Optimization with a novel Efficiency-Aware Reward that explicitly penalizes unnecessary edits. On the NACGEC benchmark, CSRP achieves state-of-the-art performance with 50.99 $F_{0.5}$ and 57.17 precision, substantially outperforming previous best results while effectively mitigating the over-correction bias inherent in MLE-trained models. Our method also advances CSCD spelling correction to 59.61 F1, surpassing GPT-4 by 5.20 points. Comprehensive ablation studies demonstrate that the RL alignment stage contributes a 8\% relative gain over the SFT baseline, and that this gain is orthogonal to the contribution of large-scale CPT, validating that explicit optimization for edit efficiency is essential for high-quality grammatical error correction. Our code is available at https://github.com/TW-NLP/ChineseErrorCorrector.

</details>


### [167] [SENSE: Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation for Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00021)
*Shaowen Chen,Zhicheng Liao,Hongwei Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出SENSE方法，通过语义嵌入导航和软门控评估模块替代传统基于词法匹配的检索式推测解码，在LLaMA和Qwen系列模型上实现了最高4.09的平均接受长度和3.26倍加速，且不牺牲生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索式推测解码（RSD）方法受限于严格的词法依赖，导致检索和验证对表层形式变化敏感，性能受限。

Method: SENSE方法包含两个核心组件：(1) 语义嵌入导航——基于目标模型隐藏状态进行语义级检索；(2) 软门控评估——验证候选token的语义等价性而非词法匹配。同时构建统一框架将现有方法分解为原子原语，支持细粒度组件级比较。

Result: 在LLaMA和Qwen系列模型上，SENSE达到最高4.09的平均接受长度和3.26倍加速，性能优于多个基线方法，且生成质量无损。

Conclusion: 基于语义对齐的检索与验证策略能有效突破词法依赖瓶颈，显著提升推测解码的加速效果，且保持了即插即用的特性。

Abstract: Speculative Decoding (SD) accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by employing a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens, which are verified in parallel by the target model, without compromising generation quality. While Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding (RSD) is favored for its plug-and-play versatility, its potential is impeded by rigid lexical dependencies, rendering both retrieval and verification brittle to surface-level variations. To address this, we propose SENSE (Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation). By anchoring retrieval on the hidden states of the target model, SENSE establishes robust semantic alignment, which empowers the Soft-gated Evaluation module to validate semantic equivalence rather than surface forms. To ensure rigorous benchmarking, we deconstruct existing methods into atomic primitives within a unified framework, facilitating granular, component-level comparison. Extensive experiments across diverse domains demonstrate that SENSE outperforms multiple baselines on the LLaMA and Qwen families, attaining up to 4.09 mean acceptance length and 3.26x speedup, while preserving generation quality. Our code will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [168] [lmfaoooo at SemEval-2026 Task 1: Humor Is an Audience. Preference Modeling for Constrained Humor Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00022)
*Alexey Tikhonov,Alexey Ivanov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出"生成多样候选集 → 基于偏好模型排序选择"的幽默生成策略，通过多步提示、模型集成和多样性解码生成候选，利用从人工成对比较中学习的偏好模型替代绝对趣味性评分进行排序。系统在SemEval-2026 MWAHAHA任务中英语和中文子任务获第一，西班牙语子任务获第二，并开源了2.5K人工成对判断数据和中间产物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 幽默生成面临三大挑战：生成流畅新颖的笑话本身就难、"有趣"具有受众依赖性（偏好随受众、语境、文化变化）、标注噪声大（标注者一致性低）。现有方法缺乏对生成结果进行有效偏好排序的手段，无法适应幽默的主观性。

Method: 采用"生成多样候选集 → 偏好模型择优"两阶段策略。生成阶段：多步提示、模型集成、多样性导向解码。排序阶段：通过Humour Arena原型收集2.5K人工成对比较数据，训练偏好模型学习"读者"的偏好判断（而非绝对趣味性评分），将成对比较转化为可解释的偏好模型，用于候选排序。

Result: 在三个偏好数据集上持续优于基线，展现出更强的跨域迁移能力；在MWAHAHA任务中英语和中文子任务排名第一，西班牙语子任务排名第二。

Conclusion: 基于成对比较学习的偏好模型能有效替代绝对评分，适应幽默的主观性和受众依赖性，且支持跨域迁移。释放的2.5K人工判断数据和中间产物（候选池和排序）为后续研究提供了基础。

Abstract: Humor generation remains difficult not only because producing fluent, novel jokes is hard, but because "funny" is audience-dependent and supervision is noisy -- preferences vary with audience, context, and culture, and annotator agreement is often low. In this paper, we describe our system for the SemEval-2026 Task-1 (MWAHAHA), which focuses on humor generation under explicit constraints. The task evaluates submitted systems via human preference judgments in 1-on-1 arena-style comparisons.
  We adopt a "generate-many -> select-best" strategy. First, we generate a diverse pool of candidates per instance using multi-step prompting, model ensembling, and diversity-oriented decoding. Second, we select outputs using a preference model that approximates a "reader" by learning from human comparisons rather than absolute funniness scores. To support this approach, we release 2.5K human pairwise judgments collected through the Humor Arena prototype. We further propose an interpretable pipeline that converts labeled comparisons into a preference model. Across three preference datasets, our models consistently outperform baselines and show stronger cross-domain transfer. Finally, we apply the learned preference model to rank candidates for the MWAHAHA setting and release intermediate artifacts (candidate pools and rankings) to facilitate follow-up work.
  Our system ranked 1st in the English and Chinese subtasks of MWAHAHA and 2nd in the Spanish subtask.

</details>


### [169] [TrustLDM: Benchmarking Trustworthiness in Language Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00023)
*Yichuan Mo,Yukun Jiang,Yanbo Shi,Mingjie Li,Michael Backes,Yang Zhang,Yisen Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对语言扩散模型（LDMs）提出了首个综合性可信度基准TrustLDM，从安全、隐私和公平性三个维度评估不同架构的LDM，发现其在用户提示下表现良好，但在恶意上下文（尤其是遮蔽响应后附加的上下文）下对齐行为显著下降。研究进一步揭示了上下文长度、解码顺序和生成长度对评估结果的影响，并提出了自动化评估框架TrustLDM-Auto以系统识别脆弱配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言扩散模型（LDMs）凭借灵活的解码策略在速度和生成质量上挑战了自回归模型，但其任意顺序解码可能带来新的可信度风险（安全、隐私、公平性），而现有研究缺乏针对LDMs可信度的系统性评估。

Method: 构建了TrustLDM基准，涵盖多个LDM架构及多种静态后上下文类别，从安全、隐私、公平性三维度进行评估；并提出TrustLDM-Auto自动评估框架，利用LDMs解码灵活性系统识别脆弱配置。

Result: LDMs在仅有用户提示时表现强可信度；但在恶意后上下文（尤其遮蔽响应后）下对齐行为显著下降。上下文长度不总是单调增强效应；解码顺序和生成长度影响评估结果。TrustLDM-Auto揭示了所有模型在所有维度上存在显著的可信度弱点。

Conclusion: LDMs的可信度问题不容忽视，尤其在恶意上下文攻击下；TrustLDM及TrustLDM-Auto可为构建更可信的LDMs提供系统评估工具和指导。

Abstract: The rapid development of Language Diffusion Models (LDMs) challenges the dominant position of auto-regressive competitors in language processing. However, their flexible, any-order decoding strategies not only enable fast decoding speed but also potentially bring new trustworthiness challenges. To better understand the risks behind their pipelines, we introduce a comprehensive trustworthiness benchmark tailored to LDMs (TrustLDM), evaluating safety, privacy, and fairness across different LDM architectures with multiple categories of static post contexts. Our empirical results show that although LDMs generally exhibit strong trustworthiness with only the user prompts, their alignment behavior degrades noticeably when the malicious post contexts are attached to the masked responses. We further observe that longer contexts do not necessarily induce stronger effects, and both decoding order and generation length affect the evaluation outcomes. Finally, we propose TrustLDM-Auto, an automatic evaluation framework that leverages LDM decoding flexibility to systematically identify vulnerable configurations, revealing substantial trustworthiness weaknesses across all evaluated models and dimensions. Our work may potentially help the community build more trustworthy LDMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ML/TrustLDM.

</details>


### [170] [ART: Attention Run-time Termination for Efficient Large Language Model Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00024)
*Chen Qiu,Guozhong Li,Panos Kalnis*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ART是一种轻量级运行时机制，在核执行期间跟踪累积的注意力输出，当后续KV块贡献可忽略时终止访问，从而提升长上下文LLM解码吞吐量约20%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文解码受限于KV缓存的内存带宽，现有方法多采用解码前仅基于键的剪枝，因为同时考虑值会带来过高开销，但注意力输出实际依赖于键和值的联合作用。

Method: 提出Attention Run-time Termination (ART)，在核执行期间实时跟踪累积注意力输出，一旦后续KV块的贡献变得可忽略，立即终止其访问，且该机制可与现有基于键的KV缓存管理方法正交集成。

Result: 在LongBench基准上，ART在大批量设置下相比最先进基线实现了20%更高的生成吞吐量，同时保持可比的准确性。

Conclusion: ART是一种高效的运行时KV缓存管理补充机制，通过动态终止不重要的KV块访问来提升解码效率，且能与现有方法无缝集成。

Abstract: Long-context decoding in Large Language Models (LLMs) is severely constrained by the memory bandwidth required to fetch the extensive Key-Value (KV) cache. Most existing KV management methods rely on key-only pruning before decoding, despite the evidence that attention outputs depend jointly on keys and values, as incorporating values in their methods incurs prohibitive additional overhead. In this paper, we propose Attention Run-time Termination (ART), a lightweight run-time mechanism that tracks accumulated attention outputs during kernel execution and terminates subsequent KV block accesses once further contributions become negligible. This design makes ART orthogonal to existing key-based KV cache management methods, enabling seamless integration with them. Experiments on LongBench benchmarks show that ART achieves 20% higher generation throughput in large batch size than state-of-the-art baseline while maintaining comparable accuracy.

</details>


### [171] [Cognitive-Linguistic Indicators of Depression in Online Communities: Analysed by DistilBERT and Holographic Reduced Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00026)
*Brian Van Steen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究探究了将认知语言特征与Transformer嵌入相结合，用于自动检测在线文本中的抑郁症。基于Beck认知理论，提取第一人称代词密度、绝对化词语和负面情绪等特征，在Reddit数据上比较了TF-IDF+朴素贝叶斯基线模型与DistilBERT+HRR混合模型。混合模型在宏F1（0.94）、5折交叉验证F1（0.92）和AUC（0.981）上均显著优于基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的抑郁症自动检测方法通常仅使用词嵌入或语言学特征，缺乏将认知理论驱动的语言学特征与深度学习嵌入相结合的系统性研究。作者希望验证这种结合是否能提升检测效果。

Method: 基于Beck认知理论的三类认知扭曲特征（第一人称代词密度、绝对化词语、负面情绪），使用HRR编码与DistilBERT句子嵌入拼接，结合逻辑回归分类器。基线为TF-IDF+朴素贝叶斯。数据集为Kaggle Reddit自杀与抑郁检测数据子集。

Result: 混合DistilBERT HRR模型宏F1为0.94（基线0.80），5折交叉验证F1从0.83提升至0.92，AUC从0.958提升至0.981。

Conclusion: 将认知语言学特征与Transformer嵌入相结合能显著提升抑郁症文本检测性能，验证了认知理论驱动的特征工程在心理健康NLP任务中的有效性。

Abstract: This paper investigates whether combining cognitively grounded linguistic features with transformer-based embeddings improves automated detection of depression in online text. Using Beck's Cognitive Theory of Depression, the study extracts cognitive distortions as measurable features, including first-person pronoun density, absolutist words, and negative emotion in Reddit posts from depression-related and control communities. Using a subset of the Kaggle Reddit Suicide and Depression Detection dataset, two classification pipelines are compared, a TF-IDF embedding with Naive Bayes as a baseline, and a hybrid model that concatenates DistilBERT sentence embeddings with Holographic Reduced Representation (HRR) vectors encoding the cognitive-linguistic features, followed by Logistic Regression. The hybrid DistilBERT HRR model achieves a macro F1 score of 0.94 versus 0.80 for the TD-IDF baseline, with 5-fold cross validation F1 improving from 0.83 to 0.92, and AUC from 0.958 to 0.981.

</details>


### [172] [A Multi-Domain Red Teaming Framework for Safety, Robustness, and Fairness Evaluation of Medical Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00027)
*Andrei Marian Feier,Veysel Kocaman,Yigit Gul,Ahmet Korkmaz,Alexander Thomas,Aleksei Zakharov,Jay Gil,Mehmet Butgul,David Talby*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个多领域红队评测框架，对11个LLM在690个临床场景中进行了评估，发现平均性能掩盖了关键的安全风险，高性能系统在特定场景下会出现完全失败，且自动化评估会遗漏临床相关错误，因此需要结合自动化与临床专家监督的混合评估方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准无法捕捉LLM在临床实践中常见的对抗性或伦理复杂条件下的行为，缺乏对模型在安全关键场景下真实可靠性的评估。

Method: 构建了覆盖9个领域、150多个子类别的690个临床场景的多领域红队评测框架，引入对抗性变换，采用七维度评分标准，结合LLM辅助评分与人工验证的混合评估方法。

Result: 模型平均得分范围0.791-0.984，但高性能系统在安全关键场景下出现完全失败；公平性相关任务中人口统计学修改导致10-20%的错误放大；人工审查发现了自动化评估遗漏的临床相关失败。

Conclusion: 性能方差和最坏情况失败比平均准确率更能反映临床可靠性，混合评估方法（自动化+临床专家监督）是可信安全评估的必要条件。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across healthcare, yet existing benchmarks fail to capture model behavior under adversarial or ethically complex conditions common in clinical practice. We developed a multi-domain red teaming framework evaluating eleven contemporary LLMs across 690 clinically grounded scenarios spanning nine domains and over 150 subcategories. Scenarios incorporated adversarial transformations, and responses were assessed using a seven-dimension rubric with LLM-assisted scoring and human-in-the-loop validation. Results revealed substantial performance variance, with mean scores ranging from 0.791 to 0.984. Critically, several high-performing systems produced complete failures in individual safety-critical scenarios, demonstrating that aggregate accuracy masks clinically meaningful risk. The highest-performing systems (X-BAI, GPT-5, Claude Opus 4.1) achieved scores above 0.97 with low variance, while performance varied significantly across domains. Equity-related tasks showed 10-20% error amplification with demographic modifications, and human reviewers identified clinically relevant failures missed by automated evaluation. Our findings demonstrate that performance variance and worst-case failures provide more clinically meaningful reliability indicators than mean accuracy alone, and that hybrid evaluation approaches combining automation with clinician oversight are essential for credible safety assessment.

</details>


### [173] [TCAR-Gen: Temporal Graph Retrieval with Evidence Fusion for Knowledge-Grounded Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00029)
*Sidra Nasir,Muhammad Noman Zahid,Rizwan Ahmed Khan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TCAR-Gen是一个结合查询条件图神经网络、时间证据融合和树链推理的检索增强生成框架，在维多利亚犯罪叙事基准上显著优于现有RAG方法，但生成质量随模型容量降低而下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG系统在处理历史犯罪案件叙事中的复杂时间推理和多源证据融合问题时存在不足：要么独立于查询语义进行检索，要么无法连贯地整合多个证据来源。

Method: 提出TCAR-Gen框架，包含三个核心组件：查询条件图神经网络（query-conditioned GNN）、时间证据融合机制（temporal evidence fusion）和树链推理（chain-of-trees reasoning），将答案生成锚定在检索到的证据上。

Result: 在Victorian Crime Diaries基准上，TCAR-Gen的Recall@5达到0.3738，在七种查询类型（包括多跳推理和反事实问题）上均优于Vanilla RAG、Temporal RAG、GraphRAG-C和GraphRAG-T。消融实验表明上下文图、时间惩罚机制和查询条件化是关键组件。跨模型评估显示小模型仍保持检索覆盖率，但生成质量显著下降。

Conclusion: 显式时间建模和多分支证据融合对于基于知识语料的忠实且推理密集的问答任务至关重要。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation systems struggle with temporal reasoning and evidence fusion when answering complex questions over historical criminal case narratives. Existing approaches either retrieve independently of query semantics or fail to integrate multiple evidence sources coherently. We propose Temporal Context Augmented Retrieval Generation (TCAR-Gen), a framework that combines query-conditioned graph neural networks, temporal evidence fusion, and chain-of-trees reasoning to ground answer generation in retrieved evidence. On the Victorian Crime Diaries benchmark, TCAR-Gen achieves 0.3738 Recall@5, outperforming Vanilla RAG, Temporal RAG, GraphRAG-C, and GraphRAG-T across seven query types including multi-hop reasoning and counterfactual questions. Ablation studies reveal that the context graph, temporal penalty mechanism, and query conditioning are critical components. Cross-model evaluation across five language model (GPT-OSS 20B to TinyLlama 1.1B) demonstrates that TCAR-Gen maintains robust retrieval coverage at smaller model scales, though generation quality degrades substantially with reduced model capacity. Our work shows that explicit temporal modelling and multi-branch evidence fusion are essential for faithful, reasoning-intensive question answering over knowledge-grounded corpora.

</details>


### [174] [LLMs for Cardiovascular Risk Prediction from Structured Clinical Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00031)
*Jeba Maliha,Md Rafiul Kabir*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合结构化临床数据与大语言模型的混合框架用于冠心病预测，将结构化数据转换为LLM可理解的临床叙述，在保持94.61%数据保真度的同时，实现无需直接暴露敏感数值数据的自然语言分类预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冠心病仍是全球主要死因之一，需要可靠的预测系统支持早期诊断和风险评估。传统机器学习模型在结构化数据上表现良好，但大语言模型为解释自然语言表达的医学信息提供了新可能，同时保护患者敏感数值数据的隐私。

Method: 使用包含1190条患者记录、11个临床属性的公开数据集，将结构化变量转换为可解释的特征表示和合成临床叙述。通过验证管道进行反向提取并计算一致性分数（平均保真度94.61%）。评估四种传统机器学习模型，并与基于LLM（GPT和Gemini）的零样本和少样本分类进行比较。

Result: 随机森林模型在准确率上最高。LLM-based分类虽然在准确率上不及随机森林，但在真实临床环境中具有优势，因为LLM直接操作自然语言患者描述，无需暴露敏感的数值患者数据（如实验室值、血压读数、诊断代码）。

Conclusion: 将结构化临床数据与LLM生成的叙述相结合可以为混合临床预测系统开辟新的方向，在保护隐私的同时实现有效的疾病预测。

Abstract: Coronary artery disease (CAD) remains one of the leading causes of death globally, highlighting the need for reliable predictive systems to support early diagnosis and risk assessment. While traditional machine learning models perform well on structured clinical data, large language models (LLMs) present new possibilities to interpret medical information expressed in natural language. In this work, we develop a hybrid framework that bridges structured clinical data and natural-language representations for CAD prediction. Using a publicly available dataset of 1,190 patient records with 11 clinical attributes, structured variables are converted into interpretable feature representations and synthetic clinical narratives using LLMs. A validation pipeline performs reverse extraction of clinical variables and computes a consistency score with the original records, achieving an average fidelity of 94.61%. We then evaluate four conventional machine learning models and compare their performance with LLM-based classification under zero-shot and few-shot prompting settings. We use two LLMs here, GPT and Gemini. Experimental results show that Random Forest achieves the highest accuracy. Despite this advantage, LLM-based classification remains beneficial in real-world clinical settings. This is because LLMs operate directly on natural language patient descriptions, meaning that sensitive numerical patient data such as exact lab values, blood pressure readings, and diagnostic codes are kept private. Findings suggest that combining structured clinical data with LLM-generated narratives can enable new directions for hybrid clinical prediction systems.

</details>


### [175] [Graph-Augmented Retrieval for Cross-Entity Financial Sentiment Analysis: A Comparative Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00062)
*Rajan Bastakoti,Sagar Bhetwal,Nirajan Acharya,Gaurav Kumar Gupta*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出并评估了一种两跳图检索增强生成（Graph-RAG）架构，用于跨实体金融情感分析。相比传统向量RAG基线，该架构通过构建情感加权知识图谱并结合密度过滤图遍历，在实体召回率（+6.4%）和复杂多实体查询的答案相关性（+11.7%）上取得显著提升，且不影响答案质量，仅增加22.6%的延迟。消融实验发现图遍历强度阈值与答案质量呈倒U型关系，最优阈值为τ=0.5。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于向量的RAG系统在捕获金融市场中结构化、多实体关系方面存在根本性局限，无法有效支持跨实体情感分析任务。

Method: 构建包含59个股票实体、255篇新闻文章的情感加权知识图谱，提出两跳Graph-RAG架构，在稠密检索基础上增加基于强度过滤的图遍历（INFLUENCES边）来获取向量检索无法触及的关系证据。在100个有依据查询上使用语义相似度、实体召回率、RAGAS指标、延迟基准和消融实验进行评估。

Result: Graph-RAG在实体召回率上提升6.4%（p<0.001），复杂多实体查询的答案相关性提升11.7%（关系型问题提升16.1%）。答案质量无显著变化（语义相似度差异+0.001，Cohen's d=0.078），平均延迟增加22.6%但延迟方差降低80%。消融实验确定图遍历强度最优阈值τ=0.5。

Conclusion: 图增强检索存在精度-覆盖率的权衡，为构建面向多实体金融分析的RAG系统提供了可操作的架构指导。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become foundational for grounding large language models in domain-specific corpora, yet conventional vector-based RAG systems are fundamentally limited in their ability to capture the structured, multi-entity relationships that underpin financial market analysis. This paper presents a comprehensive comparative study of a novel two-hop Graph-RAG architecture versus a standard vector-only baseline for cross-entity financial sentiment analysis. Our system constructs a sentiment-weighted knowledge graph of 59 equity entities from 255 news articles covering 10 major technology stocks, then augments dense retrieval with intensity-filtered graph traversal over INFLUENCES edges to surface relational evidence inaccessible to vector search alone.
  We evaluate both architectures on 100 grounded queries (30 Direct, 70 Relational) using semantic similarity, entity recall, RAGAS metrics, latency benchmarks, and ablation studies. Graph-RAG achieves a statistically significant improvement in entity recall (+6.4%, p < 0.001, Wilcoxon signed-rank) and delivers substantially more relevant answers for complex multi-entity queries (+11.7% Answer Relevancy), with gains concentrating in relational question types (+16.1%). Critically, these improvements come at no measurable cost to answer quality (delta = +0.001 semantic similarity, Cohen's d = 0.078), with a modest 22.6% increase in mean latency offset by an 80% reduction in latency variance.
  An ablation study on the graph traversal intensity threshold reveals an inverted-U relationship with answer quality, identifying tau = 0.5 as optimal over the production default of tau = 0.7. These findings characterize a precision-for-coverage trade-off inherent to graph-augmented retrieval and provide actionable architectural guidance for practitioners building RAG systems for multi-entity financial analysis.

</details>


### [176] [DLLM-JEPA: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures for Masked Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00091)
*Sangdae Nam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出DLLM-JEPA，将JEPA与掩码扩散语言模型结合，消除显式多视图数据需求和两次梯度前向传播开销，训练FLOPs减少33%，在多个任务上取得显著提升，并发现几何-功能漂移解离现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM-JEPA虽将JEPA引入自回归语言模型，但存在两个成本：需要显式多视图数据（如文本-代码对）以及每次训练需要两次梯度携带的前向传播。作者希望消除这两项开销，提升训练效率。

Method: 将JEPA与掩码扩散语言模型结合。扩散模型的双向注意力通过不同掩码率自然生成同一输入的两种语义不同视图，无需显式数据对；同时支持单次梯度携带前向传播。采用L2-to-base参数锚定策略。

Result: 相比扩散模型微调基线，在LLaDA-8B GSM8K提升+18.7百分点，Dream-7B GSM8K提升+11.4百分点，Spider、NL-RX-SYNTH、Django任务上均有一致正向提升。训练FLOPs相比LLM-JEPA减少33%。在LLaDA-8B Wide-t配置下，GSM8K从65.2提升至67.1，保留Wikitext损失低于预训练基座，MMLU精度保持不变。

Conclusion: DLLM-JEPA有效消除了LLM-JEPA的两项核心成本，在多个任务和架构上一致优于扩散模型微调基线。层探测揭示了中层Transformer层集中的几何-功能漂移解离机制，该现象在Dream-7B上同样存在，表明其具有一定通用性。

Abstract: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) have reshaped self-supervised representation learning in vision. The recent LLM-JEPA ported JEPA to autoregressive language models but inherited two steep costs from the causal-attention substrate: it demands explicit multi-view data (e.g., text-code pairs), and it requires two gradient-carrying forward passes per step. We introduce DLLM-JEPA, which pairs JEPA with masked-diffusion language models to eliminate both costs at once. The bidirectional attention of diffusion models yields two semantically distinct views of the same input via different masking rates -- no explicit pairs needed -- and supports a single gradient-carrying forward pass, cutting training FLOPs by 33% relative to LLM-JEPA. DLLM-JEPA improves over diffusion-only fine-tuning in every (task, architecture) combination we evaluate: up to +18.7 pp on LLaDA-8B GSM8K and +11.4 pp on Dream-7B GSM8K, with consistent positive gains on Spider, NL-RX-SYNTH, and Django. Beyond accuracy, DLLM-JEPA exhibits a dual-win property: on LLaDA-8B with the Wide-t configuration, it simultaneously raises GSM8K accuracy (67.1 vs. 65.2, +1.8 pp), drives held-out Wikitext loss below the pre-trained base, and preserves MMLU accuracy at base level across three fine-tuning seeds -- whereas an L2-to-base parameter anchor matches baseline accuracy with no task gain. Layer-wise probing reveals the mechanism: a geometric-functional drift dissociation in which the fine-tuned backbone moves further from the pre-trained weights than the baseline yet forgets less on held-out Wikitext, with the amplification concentrated in middle transformer layers. The pattern appears on Dream-7B as well, indicating the phenomenon is not specific to a single backbone.

</details>


### [177] [Agreement Metrics for LLM-as-Judge Evaluation: What to Report and Why](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00093)
*Delip Rao,Chris Callison-Burch*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文批判了当前LLM-as-judge验证中报告多种一致性统计量的冗余做法，指出在二元评价标准下大多数指标（Pearson r、Spearman ρ、Kendall τ_b、φ系数、MCC）等价，仅有Cohen's κ提供额外信息；同时揭示了弃权处理（CANNOT_ASSESS）会打破这些等价关系，并提出了标准化报告清单。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM-as-judge论文在验证判决一致性时，统计指标选择混乱，且与判断尺度、平局处理、无效输出和弃权处理纠缠不清，这些选择很少被明确陈述。作者旨在澄清这些混淆。

Method: 调查24篇近期LLM-as-judge论文，分析其指标选择模式；通过数学推导证明在非退化二元数据上多种相关系数等价；分析弃权处理三种方式的差异及其对等价关系的影响；扩展到多裁判集成场景的Fleiss' κ和Krippendorff's α。

Result: 在二元评价标准下，Pearson r、Spearman ρ、Kendall τ_b、φ系数和MCC都约简为同一数值；Cohen's κ因归一化方式不同而提供额外信息，其与φ的差距衡量裁判的正类率漂移。弃权处理三种方式对应不同研究问题，会打破上述等价关系。

Conclusion: 提出标准化报告清单：应明确声明判断尺度、弃权和平局处理模式、覆盖率、混淆矩阵、聚合层级，以及标量一致性系数。
