Abstract: Validating an LLM judge against human annotations usually means reporting several agreement statistics: accuracy, precision, recall, $F_1$, Cohen's $κ$, and one or more rank correlations. A survey of 24 recent LLM-as-judge papers finds metric choice entangled with the judgment scale, tie handling, invalid outputs, and abstention handling, and those choices rarely stated. For binary criteria -- the common case in rubric-based evaluation, where each criterion is graded MET or UNMET -- most of the reported numbers are redundant: Pearson's $r$, Spearman's $ρ$, Kendall's $τ_b$, the phi coefficient $φ$, and the Matthews Correlation Coefficient all reduce to a single number on non-degenerate binary data, so reporting several of them only creates an illusion of corroborating evidence. Cohen's $κ$ is the one agreement coefficient that adds information: it shares $φ$'s numerator but normalizes differently, and the gap between them measures how far the judge's positive-label rate has drifted from the human's. We then trace what changes when a judge may abstain with a CANNOT_ASSESS verdict: the three common ways of handling abstentions are not interchangeable preprocessing choices but answer different questions, and they break the binary equivalences. The same equivalences reappear, up to a negligible finite-sample correction, for multi-judge ensembles scored with Fleiss' $κ$ or Krippendorff's $α$. We close with a reporting checklist that names the judgment scale, the abstention and tie handling mode, coverage, the confusion matrix, and the aggregation level alongside any scalar agreement coefficient.

</details>


### [178] [Enhancing BiGRU with a KAN Block for Legal Document Classification and Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00116)
*Ahmed Faizul Haque Dhrubo,Souvik Pramanik,Most. Aysha Siddika Sumona,Shahnewaz Siddique,Mohammad Ashrafuzzaman Khan,Mohammad Abdul Qayum,Mohsin Sajjad*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于KAN的BiGRU架构，用于低资源多语言法律文档的分类和摘要生成，在孟加拉国法律文档数据集上实现了分类准确率67.96%、F1分数0.65，以及摘要ROUGE得分分别为0.38、0.23和0.31。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决低资源多语言场景下法律文档处理中的领域语言差异、多语言混用、长依赖上下文及类别不平衡等问题。

Method: 分类任务采用BiGRU模型结合KAN模块；摘要任务采用基于注意力机制的GRU结合KAN模型头。数据集来自孟加拉国法律文档及Manupatra，包含孟加拉语、英语和音译孟加拉语三种语言。

Result: 分类准确率67.96%，F1分数0.65；摘要ROUGE-1/2/L的F1得分分别为0.38、0.23、0.31。消融实验表明KAN模块将分类准确率从57.34%提升至67.96%。

Conclusion: 提出的KAN-BiGRU架构在低资源多语言法律文档分类和摘要任务上优于传统ML算法和预训练语言模型基线，KAN模块有效提升了模型性能。

Abstract: This study introduces a novel architecture of KAN-based BiGRU model for the task of classification and summarization of legal documents in a low-resource multilingual setup. In order to tackle problems associated with domain language, the usage of different languages, long dependencies within context, and class imbalance, we employ the dataset composed of legal documents from Bangladesh and taken from Manupatra, which include Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali languages. Our classification task involves BiGRU model, along with Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) module, while the summarization part utilizes attention-based GRU, combined with a KAN model head. Classification model yields 67.96% of accuracy and 0.65 F1 score; while ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2, and ROUGE-L measures for summarization yield 0.38, 0.23, and 0.31 F1 scores, correspondingly. Ablation study shows that the use of KAN increases classification accuracy from 57.34% to 67.96%. Moreover, our proposed technique is compared to several baselines, including classical ML algorithms and pretrained language models.

</details>


### [179] [RealityTest: How People Probe AI Identity and Whether Models Disclose It](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00168)
*Anna Gausen,Sarenne Wallbridge,Bessie O'Dell,Christopher Summerfield,Hannah Rose Kirk*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出RealityTest基准，首个大规模多模态多语言AI身份披露测试，基于来自49个国家约750名参与者的真实人类数据，发现仅31%的人会直接询问AI身份，人类提问多样性远超机器生成问题，且问题措辞和对话上下文对披露行为的影响大于模型本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI身份披露评估存在局限：仅限英文、基于机器生成问题、仅限文本模态，无法反映真实部署场景中用户与AI交互的复杂性。

Method: 收集来自49个国家约750名参与者的3,152个身份探测查询（文本和语音），覆盖5种语言；基于此构建RealityTest基准，对17个文本模型和6个语音模型进行测试。

Result: 仅31%的人在模糊场景中直接询问身份；单条压制指令可将最佳模型的披露率降至30%以下；问题措辞和对话上下文对披露行为的影响大于模型本身。

Conclusion: 基于狭窄或合成查询集的安全性评估可能错误描述模型在实际部署中的行为；真实、多样化、人类基础的数据对评估AI身份披露至关重要。

Abstract: AI systems are increasingly deployed in conversational settings where users may be uncertain whether they are speaking with a human or an AI. Despite mounting regulatory attention to this known safety risk, existing evaluations of AI disclosure are typically English-only, based on machine-generated questions, and restricted to text. We present RealityTest to comprehensively test whether AI systems disclose their identity when asked. The benchmark is the first large-scale multimodal and multilingual evaluation, grounded in human data on how people actually encounter and question AI identity in the real-world. Alongside the benchmark, we release the underlying dataset of 3,152 identity-probing queries collected from ~750 participants across 49 countries and five languages, in text and speech scenarios. We find that only 31% of people ask about identity directly in ambiguous scenarios, and that the questions people ask are far more diverse than machine-generated queries. We test 17 text and 6 speech models, and find substantial variation in disclosure behaviour. However, a single suppression instruction reduces disclosure rates to below 30%, even in the best-performing models. Validating our investment in diverse, human-grounded evaluation data, we find that how the question is phrased and the context of the conversation matter more for disclosure than which model is being tested. Safety evaluations built on narrow or synthetic query sets risk mischaracterising how models behave in realistic deployment settings.

</details>


### [180] [BOUTEF: A Multilingual Corpus for FakeNews in North Africa -- Language as a Weapon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00193)
*Kamel Smaili,Yassine Toughrai,Amina Laggoun,David Langlois*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一个名为BOUTEF的大规模多语种语料库，用于研究阿尔及利亚和突尼斯的假新闻传播。该语料库整合了假叙事、真叙事和用户评论三个互补部分，涵盖多种语言和方言变体。通过定量与定性相结合的综合实证分析，研究发现假新闻严重依赖情感化叙事、煽情框架和混合语言实践来增强传播力和受众参与度，而辟谣内容则采用更注重事实和验证的风格。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 假新闻在社交媒体上快速传播已成为重大挑战，尤其是在多语言和低资源环境（如北非）中缺乏大规模、多语种的标注数据集来系统研究假新闻的传播特征和影响。

Method: 构建了BOUTEF语料库，包含假叙事、真叙事和用户评论三个互补组件，覆盖MSA、阿尔及利亚方言、突尼斯方言、Arabizi、法语、英语及代码转换语言。采用定量（统计分析主题分布、情感模式、社交参与动态）和定性（语言修辞策略分析）结合的方法进行实证分析。

Result: 主题类别与消息真实性之间存在显著关联，用户参与度与假内容可见性之间存在强相关。假新闻依赖情感化叙事、煽情框架和混合语言实践以增强病毒式传播和受众参与；辟谣内容则采用更注重事实和验证的风格。阿尔及利亚和突尼斯之间既有共享动态，也存在由社会政治背景塑造的国家特有特征。

Conclusion: 非正式语言实践在错误信息的传播和接收中发挥重要作用。BOUTEF语料库为假新闻检测、低资源语言处理和信息失调研究提供了丰富的公开可用资源。

Abstract: The rapid spread of fake news on social media has become a major challenge, particularly in multilingual and under-resourced contexts such as North Africa. In this paper, we introduce BOUTEF, a large-scale multilingual corpus designed to study the propagation, characteristics, and impact of fake news in Algeria and Tunisia. The corpus integrates three complementary components: fake narratives, genuine narratives, and associated user-generated comments, along with verified debunking information. It covers a wide range of languages and linguistic varieties, including MSA, Algerian and Tunisian dialects, Arabizi, French, English, and code-switched language. Building on this resource, we conduct a comprehensive empirical analysis combining quantitative and qualitative approaches. We examine thematic distributions, linguistic and rhetorical strategies, sentiment patterns, and social engagement dynamics. Statistical analyses reveal significant associations between thematic categories and message veracity, as well as strong correlations between user engagement and the visibility of fake content. Our findings show that fake news relies heavily on emotionally charged narratives, sensational framing, and hybrid linguistic practices that enhance virality and audience engagement. In contrast, debunking content adopts a more factual and verification-oriented style. Furthermore, a comparative analysis between Algeria and Tunisia highlights both shared dynamics and country-specific characteristics shaped by sociopolitical contexts. The results emphasize the role of informal language practices in the diffusion and reception of misinformation. By providing a rich, annotated, and publicly available dataset, this work contributes to advancing research on fake news detection, low-resource language processing, and the understanding of information disorders in complex linguistic environments.

</details>


### [181] [DeSQ: Decomposition-based SPARQL Query Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00203)
*Papa Abdou Karim Karou Diallo,Aditya Sharma,Neshat Elhami Fard,Amal Zouaq*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DeSQ是一个KB无关的框架，通过将复杂问题分解为原子约束，生成对应的SPARQL片段并组合成完整查询，在五个主流基准测试中的四个上超越了现有方法，同时简化了评估过程并支持细粒度错误分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KBQA方法分为两类：生成形式化查询（脆弱且可解释性差）和通过KB探索直接检索答案（计算成本高且易产生幻觉）。为结合两者优势并克服各自缺点，提出DeSQ框架。

Method: DeSQ采用三阶段流程：(1) 将复杂问题分解为原子约束，反映底层KB的关系结构；(2) 生成两部分的结构化输出：每个AC到对应SPARQL片段的映射（使用标准化变量和URI占位符），以及URI接地块描述每个占位符；(3) 将这些片段组装成完整的SPARQL查询。

Result: 在五个主要基准测试中的四个上超越了现有最先进方法，展现出对词汇变化的优越鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DeSQ不仅提升了性能，还消除了对实时KB端点的需求从而简化了评估过程，其结构化输出支持细粒度错误分析，有助于更有针对性的改进。

Abstract: Dominant approaches to Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) fall into two categories. First is the generation of a formal query that suffers from brittleness and limited explainability, and the second is direct answer retrieval through KB exploration that is computationally costly and prone to hallucination. To combine the strengths of both paradigms while mitigating their respective weaknesses, we introduce DeSQ (Decomposition-based SPARQL Query Generation), a KB-agnostic framework that operates in three stages. First, it decomposes complex questions into Atomic Constraints (ACs) that mirror the relational structure of the underlying KB. Second, it generates a two-part structured output: (a) Mapping of each AC to its corresponding SPARQL Fragment, using standardized variable and URIs placeholders, and (b) URIs Grounding block describing each placeholder. Third, it assembles these fragments into a complete SPARQL query. DeSQ surpasses state-of-the-art approaches on four out of five major benchmarks and demonstrates superior robustness to lexical variation. Beyond performance gains, our framework greatly simplifies evaluation by eliminating the need for a live KB endpoint, and its structured output enables fine-grained error analysis, allowing more targeted interventions for improvement.

</details>


### [182] [Effects of Varying LLM Access on Essay Writing Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00250)
*Julia Christenson,Karin de Langis,Shirley Anugrah Hayati,Dongyeop Kang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究通过24名大学生的写作实验发现，不同级别的LLM辅助（无访问、有限访问、无限访问）对论文整体质量无显著影响，但有限访问组的学生报告更高的 authorship 信心（62.5%愿将其作为独立作业提交），而无限访问组则降低了创意表达。研究表明限制性LLM访问可能比完全禁止更有利于保持学生 authorship 信心和写作收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究不同级别的LLM辅助如何影响大学生的写作表现、参与度和 authorship 感知，以制定既能支持学生学习成果又不削弱其能力的LLM整合策略。

Method: 开展 pilot study，将24名大学生随机分配到三组：无LLM访问、有限访问（≤3次提示，每次回复≤100词）、无限访问。比较各组在论文质量、写作行为和 authorship 感知上的差异。

Result: 三组论文整体质量无统计学显著差异；有限访问组 authorship 信心最高（62.5%愿作为独立作业提交），组织能力提升明显，提示策略更具反思性和针对性；无限访问组写作时间更长，产出与LLM输出相似度更高，创意表达降低。

Conclusion: 限制性（而非完全禁止）LLM访问可能是在保留AI辅助的脚手架作用的同时，维持学生 authorship 信心和写作自主性的有效策略。

Abstract: Investigating the degree to which large language models (LLMs) affect teaching and learning in universities can help identify strategies for integrating LLMs in a way that supports, rather than undermines, student learning outcomes. This study examined how varying levels of LLM assistance affect writing performance, engagement, and perceived authorship. We report a pilot study in which 24 college students were randomly assigned to write a short essay with no LLM access, limited access (<=3 prompts, responses capped at 100 words), or unlimited access. Overall essay quality was statistically indistinguishable across groups. Yet writing behavior and perceived authorship diverged sharply: students with limited access reported higher ownership (62.5% would submit the essay as independent work, vs. 25% in the unlimited group), stronger organizational gains, and more strategic, revision-focused prompting. The unlimited group spent more time writing, produced essays more similar to LLM output, and reported reduced creative expression. Our findings suggest that constraining, rather than banning, LLM access may preserve authorship confidence while retaining the scaffolding benefits of AI assistance.

</details>


### [183] [Parameter Alignment Mitigates Catastrophic Forgetting in Multilingual Expert Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00284)
*Sanchit Ahuja,Terra Blevins*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了多语言持续预训练(CPT)中的灾难性遗忘问题，提出了五种层感知参数对齐策略（硬冻结、软正则化、事后权重恢复、模型合并），在32种语言、五个语系的基准上评估，发现参数对齐能以最小的语言获取代价显著减少遗忘，不同策略在不同任务上各有优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续预训练扩展大语言模型到新语言时，朴素微调会导致灾难性遗忘，破坏已有能力；基于语系组织训练虽能减少跨语言干扰，但无法单独防止下游任务所需通用知识的遗忘。

Method: 提出五种类感知参数对齐策略：硬层冻结、软正则化、事后权重恢复和模型合并；在32种训练语言（五个语系）及保留语言上，沿困惑度、阅读理解、物理推理、翻译四个评估轴进行系统比较。

Result: 参数对齐在最小化语言获取代价的前提下显著减少了遗忘；层冻结和正则化最佳保留了理解能力，事后恢复在翻译任务上取得最强提升。

Conclusion: 研究绘制了语系专家CPT的获取-遗忘边界，并为不同策略匹配其最优服务任务提供了实践部署指南。

Abstract: While continual pretraining~(CPT) is a practical way to extend large language models to new languages, naïve finetuning on targeted data erodes existing capabilities through catastrophic forgetting. Organizing training around language families reduces cross-language interference but cannot alone prevent forgetting of the general knowledge needed for downstream tasks. We link this forgetting to parameter drift in multilingual CPT and present a suite of five layer-aware parameter alignment strategies: hard layer freezing, soft regularization, post-hoc weight reversion, and model merging. We systematically compare our alignment strategies against two unregularized CPT baselines on benchmarks spanning 32 training languages from five language families, plus held-out languages, across four evaluation axes: perplexity, reading comprehension, physical reasoning, and translation. Parameter alignment substantially reduces forgetting at minimal cost to language acquisition: layer freezing and regularization best preserve comprehension, whereas post-hoc reversion yields the strongest translation gains. Together, these results map the acquisition--forgetting frontier for family-expert CPT and offer practical deployment guidelines pairing each strategy to the tasks it best serves.

</details>


### [184] [Model-Based Quality Assessment for Massively Multilingual Parallel Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00285)
*Abdelaziz M. A. Ibrahim,Zihao Li,Jörg Tiedemann,Shaoxiong Ji*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨大规模多语言平行语料中的两大问题（非平行句对和低质量翻译），提出将模型评估分解为平行性评估（多语言嵌入）和无参考质量估计（QE）两个独立组件。在FLORES-200和BOUQuET检索任务上对四个嵌入模型进行基准测试，并在FLORES-200专业翻译上评估九个无参考评估器。结果表明没有模型在所有翻译方向上普遍可靠，建议将多语言平行数据评估视为方向感知的路由与校准问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模多语言平行语料中普遍存在非平行句对和低质量翻译问题，需要一个系统化的评估方法来识别和过滤低质量数据。

Method: 将模型评估分解为两个独立组件：(1) 平行性评估——使用多语言嵌入模型检索任务；(2) 无参考质量估计（QE）。在FLORES-200和BOUQuET数据集上评估四种嵌入模型（覆盖6,654个源-目标方向），以及九种无参考评估器（覆盖41,412个有序源-目标方向）。

Result: 没有模型在所有翻译方向上表现一致可靠；简单的QE集成会稀释强模型信号；文档化目标语言覆盖率与更高的QE分数强相关。

Conclusion: 多语言平行数据评估应被看作一个方向感知的路由与校准问题，而不是依赖单一通用指标。

Abstract: Large-scale multilingual bitext often contains two distinct problems: non-parallel sentence pairs and low-quality translations. We decompose model-based assessment for such data into two independent components: parallelism assessment with multilingual embeddings and reference-free quality estimation (QE). For parallelism, we benchmark four embedding models on FLORES-200 and BOUQuET retrieval tasks, covering 6,654 source--target directions in our target language-pair inventory. For QE, we evaluate nine reference-free evaluators on professional FLORES-200 translations across 41,412 ordered source--target directions. Results show that no model is universally reliable across translation directions. Naive QE ensembles dilute strong model signals, while documented target-language coverage is strongly associated with higher QE scores. Overall, these findings suggest that multilingual parallel-data assessment is best approached as a direction-aware routing and calibration problem, where no single universal metric is expected to suffice across all languages.

</details>


### [185] [Uncovering Temporal Framing in the News](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00294)
*Tarek Mahmoud,Veronika Solopova,Premtim Sahitaj,Ariana Sahitaj,Max Upravitelev,Mervat Abassy,Hana Fatima Shaikh,Neda Foroutan,Vera Schmitt,Preslav Nakov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种时间框架的八类分类法，通过对458篇英德双语新闻文章（2K+时间框架句，3K+标注）进行专家标注，研究了新闻语篇中时间相关语言的修辞性使用（时间框架），并通过监督微调和零样本分类实验证明句子级时间框架检测是可学习的，监督模型显著优于零样本方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间语言在新闻语篇中不仅用于描述时间顺序，更可作为一种修辞手段塑造读者解读和说服效果。现有研究对时间框架（temporal framing）的系统化定义和数据集尚缺乏，因此需要对时间框架进行系统分类并构建多语言标注语料库，以支持计算分析。

Method: 基于已有时间性和框架研究，提出八类时间框架分类法；通过专家标注方式对458篇英语和德语新闻文章（共2万+句子）进行标注，获得2K+时间框架句和约3K标注实例；随后使用监督微调和零样本分类方法评估时间框架检测性能。

Result: 构建了包含458篇英德双语新闻文章、2K+时间框架句、约3K标注实例的数据集；实验表明监督微调模型在句子级时间框架检测上显著优于零样本分类方法。

Conclusion: 时间框架是可学习的句子级任务，监督方法效果更优；相关语料库已公开以支持后续研究。

Abstract: Temporal language does more than place events on a timeline. In news discourse, references to the past, present, and future can function as rhetorical devices that shape interpretation and persuasion. Here, we study temporal framing, defined as the persuasive use of time-related language to structure meaning rather than to report chronology. We propose a taxonomy of eight temporal frames grounded in prior work on temporality and framing, and we realize it through expert annotation of a multilingual news corpus. The resulting dataset includes 458 English and German news articles, with over 2K temporally framed sentences and approximately 3K temporal framing annotations identified from a corpus of more than 20K sentences. We analyze frame prevalence, co-occurrence patterns, and lexical cues, and evaluate temporal framing detection using supervised fine-tuning and zero-shot classification. Our experiments show that temporal framing is learnable at the sentence level, with supervised models substantially outperforming zero-shot approaches. We publicly release the corpus to support future research on temporal framing: https://mbzuai-nlp.github.io/temporal-framing/.

</details>


### [186] [Bridging Reasoning Trajectories in On-Policy Distillation via Near-Future Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00305)
*Yuxuan Jiang,Francis Ferraro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 标准的在线策略蒸馏（OPD）虽然基于轨迹采样，但学习信号仍停留在token级别，无法有效弥合学生与教师轨迹间的分歧。本文提出轨迹感知的TOPD，利用近未来轨迹信息识别真实分歧状态并跨多个未来token分配引导，在AIME24/25上分别提升3.3%和6.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OPD方法虽然基于轨迹采样，但其学习信号仍是token级别的：通过高loss token识别偏差并用局部逆向KL散度修正。但这种"轨迹采样但token学习"的机制无法可靠地将学生轨迹导向教师轨迹，因为约30%的高loss token属于低散度区域（表面形式不匹配而非真正推理分叉），且即使真正分歧的token也难通过孤立token级监督修复。

Method: 提出TOPD（Trajectory-aware OPD），利用近未来轨迹信息识别真正的分歧状态，并将引导信号跨多个未来token分配。具体包括：抑制非分歧的高loss token，以及通过未来轨迹信息增强对真正分歧token的监督。

Result: 抑制非分歧高loss token使标准OPD从47.8%提升至48.2%；TOPD进一步将平均准确率提升至52.2%，其中AIME24从60.0%提升至63.3%，AIME25从46.7%提升至53.3%。

Conclusion: token级监督无法有效弥合学生与教师轨迹间的分歧，利用轨迹级信息识别真实分歧并跨token分配引导能显著提升大模型推理能力。

Abstract: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) improves large language model reasoning by training a student model on trajectories sampled from its own policy under teacher supervision. Although OPD operates on trajectories, its learning signal remains token-level: it identifies deviations through high-loss tokens and repairs them through local reverse-KL correction. We show that this "trajectory-sampled but token-learned" mechanism cannot reliably bridge student trajectories toward teacher trajectories. About 30% of high-loss tokens fall into the low-divergence regime, indicating that many are surface-form mismatches rather than real reasoning forks. Moreover, even truly divergent tokens are difficult to repair with isolated token-level supervision, since reasoning failures often unfold as short-horizon distributional drift. We propose Trajectory-aware OPD (TOPD), which uses near-future trajectory information to identify real divergent states and distribute guidance across multiple future tokens. Experiments show that suppressing non-divergent high-loss tokens improves standard OPD from 47.8% to 48.2% average accuracy, while TOPD further improves performance to 52.2%, with gains on AIME24 from 60.0% to 63.3% and AIME25 from 46.7% to 53.3%.

</details>


### [187] [Which Institutional Frameworks Do Chatbots Assume? Auditing Jurisdictional Defaults in Multilingual LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00333)
*Zhizhi Wang,Harini Suresh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现，当用户使用英语或中文提出法律行政问题时，已部署的LLM会默认根据输入语言选择相应的司法管辖区（英语→美国框架，中文→中国框架），导致"制度框架错配风险"，即模型可能提供用户无意适用的司法管辖区的答案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言用户可能使用自己最熟悉的语言而非与相关国家/地区对应的语言提问，而现有研究缺乏对LLM如何处理司法管辖权未明确指定时的法律行政问题探究。作者希望检验模型是否将输入语言作为默认司法管辖信号。

Method: 评估7个来自美国或中国的LLM，使用60个未指定管辖权的法律行政提示词（英语和中文），在三种系统提示条件下进行测试，共得到2,520条人工标注的回答。

Result: 中文输入更常产生针对中国的答案，英文输入更常产生美国、比较性或通用答案。在需要单一答案的提示下，74.5%的英文输入回答采用美国框架，53.3%的中文输入回答采用中国框架。所有7个模型均表现出此方向性模式。

Conclusion: LLM界面不应仅凭输入语言路由制度建议；当位置信息缺失时，应主动询问或明确说明答案的管辖范围，以降低制度框架错配风险。

Abstract: LLMs increasingly answer questions about taxes, labor protections, healthcare, education, pensions, and administrative procedures, where usefulness often depends on the applicable jurisdiction. Multilingual users may write in their most comfortable language rather than one associated with the country or region whose rules apply. We ask whether deployed LLMs use input language as a default jurisdictional signal when prompts omit any country or region. Prior multilingual audits show that prompt language can shift cultural, political, or normative outputs; we examine which legal-administrative framework models supply when jurisdiction is underspecified. We evaluate seven LLMs developed in the United States or China on 60 underspecified legal-administrative prompts in English and Mandarin Chinese under three system-prompt conditions, yielding 2,520 manually annotated responses. Across models and conditions, Chinese input more often produces China-specific answers, while English input more often produces U.S.-specific, comparative, or generic answers. Prompts requiring a single answer further increase jurisdiction selection: pooled across models, 74.5% of English-input responses adopt a U.S. framework, while 53.3% of Chinese-input responses adopt a China framework. This directional pattern appears in all seven models. We describe this deployment-level pattern as institutional-framework misselection risk: a fluent answer may rely on a legal-administrative context the user did not intend, especially when their preferred language differs from the relevant jurisdiction. LLM interfaces should not route institutional advice by input language alone; when location is absent, they should request it or state the jurisdictional scope of the answer.

</details>


### [188] [Isolating LLM Lexical Bias: A Curation-Free Triangulated Metric for Preference-Stage Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00334)
*Xiaoyang Ming,Jose Hernandez,Thomas Stephan Juzek*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Triangulated Preference Shift (TPS)指标，通过三角化人类金标准、基础模型和指令微调变体，无需人工标注即可量化偏好学习阶段（如RLHF）导致的词汇偏差，并在六个模型家族上验证了该方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究依赖人工标注来识别偏好训练导致的词汇偏差，缺乏自动化方法，难以系统性地量化这种词汇失调问题。

Method: 提出Triangulated Preference Shift (TPS)分数，通过对比人类金标准、基础模型和指令微调变体三者之间的差异，三角化隔离出偏好学习带来的词汇偏移。

Result: 在六个模型家族上验证了TPS指标的有效性，并将结果锚定在现有文献中，同时展示了该方法可用于分析偏好学习是否将模型推向"声望语言"。

Conclusion: TPS提供了一种自动化的初始方法量化偏好调优带来的行为偏移，有助于模型对齐和可信AI的开发。

Abstract: Various language domains have undergone remarkable changes in recent years; these shifts are largely attributed to the advent of Large Language Models and their misalignment with natural language usage. These misalignments are thought to partly originate in the preference-learning stage, e.g. Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback, which generally makes models more useful but simultaneously may introduce systematic lexical bias. In terms of lexical behavior, this is visible in a model's preference for certain formats or the overuse of words (delve, furthermore), even when such patterns are not present in base model outputs. Research on lexical misalignment induced during preference training is constrained by reliance on manual curation. We address this, by introducing the Triangulated Preference Shift score, a metric that triangulates between human gold standards, base models, and instruct variants to isolate shifts induced specifically by preference learning, without manual curation. We provide data across six model families, anchor the results in the literature, and illustrate the general approach's utility by analyzing whether preference learning shifts models toward what could be interpreted as a "language of prestige". The metric provides an initial automated method to quantify behavioral shifts attributable to preference tuning, and thus, may help inform model alignment and development of trustworthy AI.

</details>


### [189] [How Far Do Auto-Interpretation Labels Generalize: A Controlled Study Across Languages, Scripts, and Rewordings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00356)
*Sripad Karne*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征自动生成的自然语言标签的泛化能力。以塞尔维亚语双文字系统（西里尔字母与拉丁字母）为受控实验平台，发现SAE特征集在不同语言/文字间存在显著重叠（峰值Jaccard相似度0.57 vs 随机基线0.13），表明存在跨语言语义特征。但自动解释标签未能跟上：语义标签在塞尔维亚语中漏检同一含义的频率比英语高4倍，且对西里尔字母的漏检率高于拉丁字母——尽管两者是确定性音译关系。这种差距随网络深度增加，但标签无任何失败指示。结论：自动解释标签反映的是特征在充分表征输入上的行为，而非概念本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究广泛使用SAE特征和自动生成的自然语言标签来解释语言模型，但这些标签是否真正泛化到不同语言和文字系统尚不清楚。作者通过塞尔维亚语双文字系统这一独特受控实验，检验标签是否忠实反映特征所跟踪的概念。

Method: 以塞尔维亚语双文字系统（西里尔字母与拉丁字母的确定性音译关系）作为受控测试平台。首先计算不同语言、文字、措辞下SAE特征集的Jaccard相似度；然后比较自动解释标签在英语、塞尔维亚拉丁字母、塞尔维亚西里尔字母条件下识别同一语义内容的成功率。

Result: (1) 跨语言/文字SAE特征集存在显著重叠（Jaccard相似度0.57 vs 随机基线0.13）。(2) 语义标签在塞尔维亚语中漏检同一含义的频率比英语高4倍。(3) 塞尔维亚西里尔字母的漏检率高于拉丁字母。(4) 差距随网络深度增加而扩大，但标签未提供任何失败指示。

Conclusion: 自动解释标签可能反映的是特征在训练数据中充分表征的输入上的行为，而非特征所对应的概念本身。这意味着基于这些标签的模型解释可能具有系统性偏差，需要谨慎对待。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoder (SAE) features are increasingly used to interpret language models, with auto-generated natural-language labels serving as the primary interface for understanding what each feature represents. We ask whether these labels generalize: does a feature labeled for a concept actually track that concept across languages and scripts? Using Serbian digraphia as a controlled testbed -- the same language written in both Latin and Cyrillic via deterministic transliteration -- we first find that SAE feature sets activated by the same content in different languages, scripts, and wordings share substantial overlap (peak Jaccard similarity 0.57 vs.\ 0.13 random baseline), suggesting genuine cross-lingual semantic features. We then test whether auto-interpretation labels keep pace. They often do not: features whose labels describe semantic content miss the same meaning in Serbian up to $4\times$ more often than within English, and miss Serbian Cyrillic more than Serbian Latin -- two scripts that are deterministic transliterations of each other -- suggesting the failures track how well each form is represented in training. The gap grows with network depth, yet the labels give no indication that they fail. These results suggest that auto-interpretation labels may reflect a feature's behavior on well-represented inputs rather than the concept itself.

</details>


### [190] [Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00408)
*Haoxiang Zhang,Qixin Xu,Zhuofeng Li,Lei Zhang,Pengcheng Jiang,Yu Zhang,Julian McAuley*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了长程搜索智能体中的观测掩蔽（observation masking）策略，发现其准确率增益与模型的基线能力呈非对称倒U型关系：弱检索器下平台期，强检索器+中等模型达到峰值，模型饱和时急剧下降。这种模式源于检索器召回率与模型隐式过滤能力的交互，而非单一因素。掩蔽机制实现了token-for-turn的权衡，移除模型已停止关注的陈旧观测，但有时也会移除有用证据。研究将上下文管理重新定义为依赖所处阶段（regime-dependent）的干预，并在多种模型规模（4B-284B）和检索器上验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长程搜索智能体在多轮工具调用中会积累大量检索内容，上下文预算效率越来越重要。观测掩蔽是一种最小干预方式，但其何时有效、为何有效尚不清楚。

Method: 在多种智能体骨干模型（4B至284B参数）和三种检索器上，对离线与实时网页搜索基准进行系统性的观测掩蔽实验扫描。

Result: 准确率增益呈非对称倒U型：弱检索器下增益平缓（平台期），强检索器与中等容量模型相遇时达到峰值，模型能力饱和时增益急剧下降（崩塌）。这种模式由检索器召回率与模型隐式过滤能力的交互决定。掩蔽机制移除模型已停止关注的观测和很少重新打开的页面，实现了token-for-turn的权衡。

Conclusion: 上下文管理应被视为一种依赖所处阶段（regime-dependent）的干预策略，需要根据检索器性能与模型能力的匹配关系来设计，不能一刀切地使用屏蔽陈旧观测的方法。

Abstract: Long-horizon search agents accumulate large amounts of retrieved content across many tool calls, making context-budget efficiency increasingly important. A minimal intervention is to mask stale observations from the context as the trajectory progresses, but it remains unclear when this form of context management helps and why. We study observation masking through a systematic sweep over various agent backbones (4B to 284B parameters) and three retrievers on offline and live-web agentic search benchmarks. We find that the accuracy gain from masking follows an asymmetric inverted-U shape when plotted against the model's accuracy without context management: a plateau under weak retrievers, a peak when a strong retriever meets a mid-capacity model, and a sharp collapse when the model is saturated. This pattern reflects the interaction between retriever recall and the model's implicit filtering capacity, rather than either factor in isolation. Mechanistically, masking implements a token-for-turn trade-off: it removes observations the model has largely stopped attending to and pages the agent rarely re-opens. The added turns help when they convert failures into successes, but they fail when masking removes evidence the model would otherwise have used. We therefore reframe context management as a regime-dependent intervention and provide a holistic perspective for analyzing context use in agentic deep search. We release our scaffold and trajectories here (https://github.com/i-DeepSearch/observation-masking) to support future research.

</details>


### [191] [ProtStructQA: A Denotation Threshold in Protein Structural Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00451)
*Aravind Mandiga,Guoming Li,Jin Lu,Ismailcem Budak Arpinar,Khaled Rasheed,Samuel E. Aggrey*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ProtStructQA，一个基于可执行DSL的蛋白质结构问答基准（382.2K问题），发现模型在1.7B到4B之间存在指称阈值：低于此阈值时工具介导的ReAct策略占优，高于此阈值时思维链成为最强策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有蛋白质语言系统评估多关注文本合理性，但结构问题具有严格的3D坐标语义。缺乏一个能将自然语言问题转化为可执行结构测量的诊断性基准。

Method: 构建ProtStructQA基准，每个自然语言问题从隐藏的类型化DSL程序生成，答案通过在AlphaFold预测结构上执行该程序获得。涵盖置信度、距离、PAE、溶剂暴露、二级结构、拓扑和接触等7类问题，包含33万活跃基准和5.22万难负样本池。评估Qwen3（0.6B-8B）和Gemma-3在多种策略下的表现。

Result: 发现能力依赖的指称阈值存在于1.7B-4B之间：低于阈值时ReAct主导（模型无法生成可执行指称），高于阈值时思维链从有害变为有益并成为最强策略。语法约束和执行在PAE和二级结构查询中仍有选择价值。

Conclusion: ProtStructQA将科学QA重构为从语言到测量的编译过程，为语言模型能否将词语映射到可执行的3D结构测量提供了诊断测试平台。

Abstract: Protein-language systems are often evaluated by whether they generate plausible biological text, but a structural question has a sharper semantics: it denotes a measurement in a 3D coordinate system. We introduce ProtStructQA, an executable benchmark for protein structural question answering in which each natural-language question is generated from a hidden typed domain-specific language (DSL) program and the answer is obtained by executing that program on an AlphaFold-predicted structure. ProtStructQA releases 382.2K questions covering confidence, distances, predicted aligned error (PAE), solvent exposure, secondary structure, topology and contacts, and held-out compositions: a 330K active benchmark over 10K proteins from four species, plus a 52.2K hard-negative robustness pool. Without fine-tuning, we evaluate Qwen3 models from 0.6B to 8B under direct prompting, chain-of-thought, grammar-constrained executable voting, executable voting with chain-of-thought, and multi-turn ReAct-style tool use, and replicate the headline finding on Gemma-3-1B and Gemma-3-12B. We find a capability-dependent denotation threshold between Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-4B: below it, tool-mediated ReAct dominates because models often fail to produce executable denotations; above it, chain-of-thought flips from mostly harmful to strongly beneficial and becomes the strongest strategy on most splits. Parse-failure and family-level analyses show that the threshold is a transition from unparseable language to executable structural denotation, while grammar and execution remain selectively valuable for PAE and secondary-structure queries. ProtStructQA reframes scientific QA as compilation from language to measurement and provides a diagnostic testbed for when language models can map words to executable 3D structural measurements.

</details>


### [192] [SALSA: Speech Aware LLM Adaptation via Learned Steering Activation Vectors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00460)
*Yekaterina Yegorova,Argyrios Gerogiannis,Haolong Zheng,Julia Hockenmaier,Chang D. Yoo,Mark A. Hasegawa-Johnson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SALSA方法，通过学习层级引导向量来优化语音感知大语言模型，在儿童语音、多语言语音和代码混合语音等跨领域场景中取得显著改进（最高相对提升46.8%），并发现引导编码器（尤其是后层）比引导LLM骨干更有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语音感知大语言模型在跨领域场景（域外数据）中泛化能力差，需要一种轻量级的适配方法来提升其鲁棒性和泛化性能。

Method: 提出SALSA（Speech-Aware LLM Adaptation via Learned Steering Activations），该方法学习层级的引导向量（steering vectors），并使用监督目标直接优化这些向量，而非依赖传统的对比激活差异方法。

Result: 在儿童语音、多语言语音和普通话-英语代码混合语音基准上，SALSA相比零样本推理和语音上下文内学习基线有显著提升，最高相对改进达46.8%。

Conclusion: 引导编码器（尤其是后层）比引导LLM骨干更有效；引导通过适配高层声学和语音表征使其更好地对齐预训练语言模型表征空间来提升下游ASR性能，而非通过修改解码器本身。

Abstract: Speech-aware large language models often generalize poorly to out-of-domain settings. We propose SALSA (Speech-Aware LLM Adaptation via Learned Steering Activations), a lightweight adaptation method that learns layer-wise steering vectors. Unlike commonly used steering approaches that rely on contrastive activation differences, SALSA directly optimizes steering vectors using a supervised objective. Across children's speech, multilingual speech, and Mandarin-English code-switching benchmarks, SALSA substantially improves performance over zero-shot inference and speech in-context learning baselines, achieving up to 46.8% relative improvements over zero-shot. Analysis further demonstrates that steering the encoder, particularly the later layers, is more effective than steering the LLM backbone. These findings suggest that steering improves downstream ASR performance by adapting higher-level acoustic and phonetic representations to better align with the pretrained language model representation space, rather than by modifying the decoder itself.

</details>


### [193] [Short-form Text Rewriting with Phi Silica](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00462)
*Divya Tadimeti,Shawn Pan,Sameera Lanka,Chenghui Zhou,Sadid Hasan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究如何通过数据集构建、提示蒸馏、参数高效微调和评估，使小型语言模型（Phi Silica）适应短文本改写任务。实验表明，微调显著提升了语义忠实度，减少了幻觉，并提高了对GPT-5-chat改写的偏好胜率，缩小了小模型与云端大模型的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 短文本改写是一种受约束的释义变体，上下文有限且语义密度高，少有变化空间。大语言模型在通用改写上表现良好，但小语言模型在短文本场景中常在语义忠实度和幻觉鲁棒性方面存在困难，因此需要研究如何针对性地适配小模型。

Method: 以Phi Silica为基座模型，通过从公开幻灯片中整理短演示文本数据集，利用GPT-5-chat生成改写监督信号并进行模型评估（LLM-as-a-judge），结合提示蒸馏和参数高效微调（PEFT）进行模型适配。

Result: 微调后的Phi Silica在语义忠实度上显著提升，幻觉减少，且在偏好胜率上超过GPT-5-chat的改写结果。

Conclusion: 针对性的小模型适配可以大幅缩小与云端大模型的差距，为将小语言模型适配到精度关键的改写任务提供了实践指导。

Abstract: Short-form text rewriting is a constrained variant of paraphrasing in which limited context and high semantic density leave little room for variation. While large language models perform well on general paraphrasing, small language models (SLMs) often struggle with semantic fidelity and hallucination robustness in short-form settings. In this work, we present an empirical study of adapting an SLM, Phi Silica, for short-form rewrite through dataset curation, prompt distillation, parameter-efficient fine-tuning, and evaluation. We curate a dataset of short presentation-style text from public slide decks and use GPT-5-chat both to generate rewrite supervision and to conduct LLM-as-a-judge evaluation. Our results show that finetuning improves semantic fidelity, reduces hallucinations, and increases preference win rate against GPT-5-chat rewrites. The findings suggest that targeted adaptation for SLMs can substantially narrow the gap to cloud models and provide practical guidance for adapting SLMs to precision-critical rewrite tasks.

</details>


### [194] [On the Limits of LLM Adaptability: Impact of Model-Internalized Priors on Annotation Task Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00467)
*Etienne Casanova,Rafal Kocielnik,R. Michael Alvarez*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LLM在零样本标注和评判任务中，近三分之二的错误无法通过提示修正（拯救率仅34.8%），高置信度错误尤其顽固；模型会盲目跟随错误的任务定义而保持置信度不变。本文提出定义特定熟悉度（DSF）指标，衡量模型内部概念与任务定义的对齐程度，发现DSF与性能正相关（偏相关系数+0.41），而三种文本级记忆化指标均无此关联。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM内化先验与用户提供的指令之间的相互作用如何影响零样本标注和LLM-as-a-judge任务的可靠性，特别是在错误修正和任务定义对齐方面的局限性。

Method: 在毒性检测任务上，跨社交媒体、游戏、新闻和论坛等多个数据集，使用密集模型和混合专家模型进行实验。提出DSF指标衡量模型内部概念与任务定义的对齐，并通过偏相关分析比较DSF与三种记忆化指标（ROUGE-L、BERTScore、嵌入余弦相似度）对性能的解释力。

Result: 近三分之二零样本错误无法通过提示修正，整体拯救率仅34.8%；高置信度错误更顽固；模型会遵循错误定义且置信度不变；DSF与性能正相关（partial r=+0.41），而三种记忆化指标均无正相关。

Conclusion: 提示修正方法在标注任务中效果有限，定义对齐比文本级记忆化更关键。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for zero-shot annotation and LLM-as-a-judge tasks, yet their reliability hinges on how model-internalized priors interact with user-provided instructions. We investigate three dimensions of this interaction: (1) how an LLM's familiarity with data and task definitions affects performance, (2) the extent to which additional information in prompts can correct zero-shot errors ("decision stickiness"), and (3) model susceptibility to misaligned task definitions. Through experiments on toxicity detection across diverse datasets (spanning social media, gaming, news, and forums) using both dense and mixture-of-experts models, we find that nearly two-thirds of zero-shot errors are resistant to correction, with an overall rescue rate (fraction of initial errors corrected by prompting) of only 34.8%. High-confidence errors prove especially resistant to correction. When given misaligned definitions, LLMs follow them while maintaining confidence levels unchanged from the aligned condition. Crucially, we introduce Definition-Specific Familiarity (DSF), which measures alignment between a model's internal concept and the task definition. After controlling for dataset-level confounds, DSF shows a positive association with model performance (partial r = +0.41), while three distinct memorization metrics (ROUGE-L, BERTScore, and embedding cosine similarity) all fail to show a positive association. These findings show the limitations of prompt-based correction in annotation tasks, highlighting the importance of definition alignment over text-level memorization.

</details>


### [195] [Do Text Edits Generalize to Visual Generation? Benchmarking Cross-Modal Knowledge Editing in UMMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00477)
*Xin Gao,Cheng Yang,Chufan Shi,Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出UniKE基准，研究统一多模态模型中跨模态知识编辑问题，发现文本编辑成功（约92%）无法有效迁移到图像生成（最高仅18.5%），并提出推理增强参数编辑方法提升跨模态编辑效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识编辑方法主要针对纯文本模型，但统一多模态模型（UMMs）同时支持文本生成和图像生成。尚不清楚文本侧的知识编辑能否成功迁移到图像生成任务中，缺乏跨模态知识编辑的评估基准。

Method: 构建UniKE基准（含2,971个编辑主题，涵盖属性和关系编辑），采用VQA视觉验证评估跨模态编辑效果。提出推理增强参数编辑（Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing），在生成前显式激活编辑知识。

Result: 文本侧编辑效力约92%，但直接图像生成的最佳总体VQA准确率仅18.5%。所提方法提升所有评估模型-编辑器组合的VQA准确率，最高提升18.6个百分点。机制分析表明跨模态差距源于编辑的文本表示与视觉生成的调节路径仅部分对齐。

Conclusion: 文本知识编辑无法保证可靠的跨模态迁移，需要发展模态感知的编辑方法。

Abstract: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for general-purpose multimodal intelligence. As they are deployed in real-world applications, effectively updating internal knowledge becomes critical. While knowledge editing has matured for text-only models, it remains unclear whether edits that successfully modify textual outputs also transfer to image generation in UMMs. To study this question, we introduce UniKE, the first benchmark for cross-modality knowledge editing in UMMs, comprising 2,971 edit subjects spanning attribute and relation edits. Using VQA-based visual verification, we reveal a striking modality gap: text-side efficacy can reach approximately 92%, whereas the best overall VQA accuracy under direct image generation is only 18.5%. We further propose Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing, which explicitly activates edited knowledge before generation and improves overall VQA accuracy for all evaluated model-editor pairs, with gains up to 18.6 percentage points. Mechanistic analysis shows that this gap is associated with partial alignment between edited textual representations and the conditioning pathways for visual generation, where edits sufficient for text outputs may remain too weak or misaligned to steer image synthesis. These findings show that textual knowledge edits do not guarantee reliable cross-modality transfer and motivate modality-aware editing methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/gxx27/UniKE.

</details>


### [196] [LaSR: Context-Aware Speech Recognition via Latent Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00507)
*Heyang Liu,Ziyang Cheng,Jiayi Huang,Wenyang Xiao,Ronghua Wu,Qunshan Gu,Yanfeng Wang,Yu Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LaSR通过潜在推理轨迹提升语音大语言模型的上下文感知能力，在不增加延迟的情况下显著提高了术语识别准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语音大语言模型在上下文感知方面存在局限，难以根据说话者意图和主题上下文进行有效的语音识别，尤其是在专业术语场景下表现不佳。

Method: 提出LaSR训练范式，利用潜在推理过程实现上下文感知推理轨迹。具体包括：(1) 在目标词汇的声学特征区域对齐思维链(CoT)监督信号；(2) 引入潜在推理阶段用于上下文信息锚定和转录转换。同时构建了Spoken Darwin-Science专业术语语料库。

Result: 在Fun-Audio-Chat上的实验表明，LaSR在不引入额外延迟的前提下显著提升了术语识别性能，并且持续优于标准监督微调基线方法。

Conclusion: 潜在推理在构建高效、上下文感知的语音助手上具有重要潜力，为Speech LLMs的上下文理解提供了新的范式。

Abstract: Recent advances in Speech Large Language Models (Speech LLMs) have significantly enhanced spoken language understanding and reasoning. However, their contextual awareness is limited, struggling to perform speech recognition that effectively reflects the speaker's intent and topical context. In this paper, we propose LaSR (Latent Speech Reasoning), a novel training paradigm featuring a context-aware reasoning trajectory that leverages the latent reasoning process. Instead of generating explicit intermediate tokens, LaSR aligns chain-of-thought (CoT) supervision around the acoustic feature region of the targeted word, and introduces latent reasoning periods for context information grounding and transcriptional transition. Furthermore, to effectively benchmark contextual recognition on specialized vocabulary, we propose Spoken Darwin-Science, a large-scale corpus focusing on academic terminologies. Preliminary experiments on Fun-Audio-Chat demonstrate that LaSR significantly improves terminology recognition without introducing additional latency and consistently outperforms standard supervised fine-tuning baselines. Our findings highlight the potential of latent reasoning in building efficient, context-aware speech assistants.

</details>


### [197] [Skill or Skip? Learning Selective Skill Invocation in Agentic Tasks via Dual-Granularity Preference Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00510)
*Chishui Chen,Jiaye Lin,Te Sun,Junxi Wang,Yi Yang,Cong Qin,Yangen Hu,Lu Pan,Ke Zeng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SelSkill是一个双粒度偏好学习框架，用于选择性技能调用，通过技能-跳过决策、预测不确定性优先排序、可控调用-跳过偏好对构建以及双粒度偏好学习（回合级+步骤级），在ALFWorld和BFCL上显著提升任务成功率和执行精度，并展现出跨域迁移能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法主要关注选择相关技能或改进技能本身，而忽略了在决策点是否应该实际调用该技能。不恰当的调用会引入无关上下文，干扰原本正确的执行流程。

Method: 提出SelSkill双粒度偏好学习框架：(1) 将技能使用形式化为技能-跳过决策；(2) 利用预测不确定性对候选决策点进行优先级排序；(3) 从共享轨迹前缀构建受控的调用-跳过偏好对；(4) 结合回合级结果偏好与步骤级调用偏好，同时捕捉整体轨迹质量和局部调用有效性。

Result: 在ALFWorld (Qwen3-8B)上：任务成功率提升10.9个百分点，执行精度提升29.1个百分点。在BFCL上：任务成功率提升5.7个百分点，执行精度提升29.5个百分点。在Tau-bench和PopQA上的零样本结果表明学习到的调用策略可迁移到包含未见技能的新领域。

Conclusion: 选择性技能调用（即判断何时不调用技能）与技能选择同样重要，SelSkill通过双粒度偏好学习有效解决了这一问题，并展现出良好的跨域泛化能力。

Abstract: Agent skills are callable procedural modules that provide reusable knowledge and execution policies for complex agentic tasks. However, existing methods mainly focus on selecting relevant skills or improving the skills themselves, while overlooking whether a relevant skill should actually be invoked at the current decision point. Unhelpful invocations may introduce irrelevant context and disrupt an otherwise correct execution process. To address this issue, we propose SelSkill, a dual-granularity preference-learning framework for selective skill invocation. SelSkill formulates skill use as a skill-or-skip decision, uses predictive uncertainty to prioritize candidate decision points, and constructs controlled invoke-skip preference pairs from shared trajectory prefixes. It further combines episode-level outcome preferences with step-level invocation preferences to capture both overall trajectory quality and the local effectiveness of skill invocation. On ALFWorld with Qwen3-8B, SelSkill improves task success by 10.9 percentage points and execution precision by 29.1 percentage points. On BFCL, it improves task success by 5.7 percentage points and execution precision by 29.5 percentage points. Zero-shot results on Tau-bench and PopQA further suggest that the learned invocation policy transfers to new domains with previously unseen skills.

</details>


### [198] [ProactiveLLM: Learning Active Interaction for Streaming Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00523)
*Junlong Tong,Yao Zhang,Anhao Zhao,Yingqi Fan,Yunpu Ma,Xiaoyu Shen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ProactiveLLM，通过利用模型内生状态（掩码流式建模+同步特权自蒸馏）引导交互决策，在不依赖外部标注或强教师信号的情况下，实现流式场景下低延迟、高质量的主动交互，在文本和语音任务上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流式LLM能边接收输入边生成，但难以自主决定何时与输入流交互；现有方法要么硬编码交互时机，要么依赖昂贵的外部对齐信号（如时序标签、推理轨迹或强教师模型），缺乏轻量、自主的交互决策机制。

Method: 提出两种互补训练机制：(1) 掩码流式建模：对输入施加单调随机掩码，模拟渐进式流式输入，使模型从局部输入中学习语义依赖；(2) 同步特权自蒸馏（SPSD）：将部分上下文的student视图与同一模型生成的全上下文teacher视图对齐，让特权全上下文证据指导学生的不完整观察理解。两者共同诱导内生充分性线索，无需外部教师或标注，可即插即用地集成多种决策头。

Result: 在文本和语音流式任务上的广泛评估表明，ProactiveLLM显著降低了交互延迟，同时保持了输出质量，验证了其动态主动交互的能力。

Conclusion: ProactiveLLM通过内生状态驱动交互决策，为流式LLM提供了无需外部信号的主动交互方案，具有即插即用的灵活性和良好的跨模态泛化能力。

Abstract: Standard Large Language Models (LLMs) follow a read-then-generate paradigm, causing unnecessary latency and computation. Streaming LLMs alleviate this issue by generating while receiving inputs, but still struggle to decide when to interact with the stream. Existing methods either hard-code interaction timing or rely on costly external alignment signals, such as timing labels, reasoning trajectories, or stronger teachers. In this paper, we propose ProactiveLLM, which achieves active interaction by leveraging the model's endogenous states to guide interaction decisions. The model first learns to perceive semantic sufficiency from partial inputs through two complementary training mechanisms: mask-based streaming modeling and synchronized privileged self-distillation (SPSD). The former applies monotonic random masking to the input during training, simulating progressively revealed streaming inputs and enabling the model to learn local semantic dependencies from partial-input views. The latter aligns the partial-context student view with a full-context teacher view generated by the same evolving model, allowing privileged full-context evidence to guide the student's understanding under incomplete observations. Together, these mechanisms induce endogenous sufficiency cues without requiring external teachers or annotations, providing a versatile foundation for the plug-and-play integration of diverse decision heads. Extensive evaluation across text and speech streaming tasks confirms that ProactiveLLM significantly reduces interaction latency while maintaining quality, validating its capacity for dynamic and active interaction. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/StreamingLLM/tree/main/ProactiveLLM.

</details>


### [199] [Learning to Retrieve: Dual-Level Long-Term Memory for Text-to-SQL Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00547)
*Yibo Wang,Nikki Lijing Kuang,Philip S. Yu,Zhewei Yao,Yuxiong He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MERIT 是一个面向交互式 Text-to-SQL 智能体的多层级记忆检索框架，通过强化学习优化全局策略和局部决策的记忆检索策略，并利用过程奖励模型解决中间监督稀疏问题，在 BIRD-Interact 和 Spider2-Snow 上显著提升任务成功率并减少交互轮次。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有记忆检索方法存在局限性：静态方法依赖固定相似度启发式，无法优化下游效用；动态方法仅从稀疏的最终结果学习，且只在单一决策层面检索记忆。然而记忆在不同交互阶段（如初始规划 vs. 局部状态条件执行）的有效性不同，现有方法无法适应这种变化。

Method: MERIT 提出双层级记忆架构：1) episode-level 记忆提供全局策略指导；2) turn-level 记忆提供局部决策支持。两个层级均使用通过强化学习（REINFORCE）优化的可学习检索策略。针对 turn-level 训练中中间监督信号稀疏的问题，引入轻量级 Process Reward Model 生成密集代理奖励来指导局部记忆选择。

Result: 在 BIRD-Interact 上，MERIT 在成功率上超越无记忆、静态检索和动态检索基线，并减少了平均交互轮次。在 Spider2-Snow 上的迁移实验表明，无需基准特定调参即可实现跨基准的正向迁移。

Conclusion: 多层级（多时间跨度）的检索策略能够有效提升交互式 Text-to-SQL 智能体的经验复用能力，证明了在不同决策层级分别优化记忆检索的有效性。

Abstract: Interactive text-to-SQL agents solve database tasks through multi-turn interactions involving schema exploration, query execution, feedback interpretation, and decision revision. Long-term memory helps agents reuse past experiences, but existing retrieval methods remain limited. Static methods rely on fixed similarity heuristics that do not optimize downstream utility, while dynamic methods often learn from sparse final outcomes and retrieve memories at a single decision horizon. This is insufficient when memory usefulness changes across interaction stages, since memories useful for initial planning may differ from those needed for local, state-conditioned execution. We propose MERIT, a dynamic multi-horizon memory retrieval framework. MERIT maintains episode-level memory for global strategic guidance and turn-level memory for local decision support. Both levels use learned retrieval policies optimized with reinforcement learning. To train turn-level retrieval despite limited intermediate supervision, MERIT uses a lightweight Process Reward Model to provide dense proxy rewards for local memory selection. Experiments on BIRD-Interact show that MERIT outperforms no-memory, static-retrieval, and dynamic-retrieval baselines in success rate while reducing average interaction turns. Transfer results on Spider2-Snow further show positive cross-benchmark transfer without benchmark-specific tuning. These results suggest that multi-horizon retrieval improves experience reuse in interactive text-to-SQL agents.

</details>


### [200] [Revisiting Parameter-Based Knowledge Editing in Large Language Models: Theoretical Limits and Empirical Evidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00570)
*Wanying Ren,Xin Song,Futing Wang,Guoxiu He,Aixin Sun*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过理论分析（维度坍缩假说）和全面实验评估，证明基于参数的知識编辑方法会破坏大语言模型的核心能力，而简单的检索式基线方法在所有评估条件下表现更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有参数编辑方法忽略了理论基础限制，缺乏面向实际场景的评估，作者希望通过理论分析揭示编辑方法的根本缺陷并提供可靠评估。

Method: 首先提出基于维度坍缩假说的理论分析，解释局部参数编辑如何沿脆弱方向传播导致全局干扰和推理崩溃；然后系统改变知识复杂度、编辑数量、评估维度和基线方法进行全面实验评估。

Result: 参数编辑方法持续损害LLM核心能力，而简单的检索式基线在所有实验条件下一致优于所有参数编辑方法。

Conclusion: 知识编辑后保持LLM基本能力应是未来研究的核心关注点。

Abstract: Parameter-based knowledge editing updates the internal knowledge of large language models (LLMs) via localized weight modifications and has attracted significant attention. However, most existing methods overlook fundamental theoretical limitations and are rarely evaluated under realistic, practice-oriented settings. In this paper, we first present a theoretical analysis based on the dimensional Collapse Hypothesis, explaining how localized parameter edits can propagate along fragile directions in the representation space, inducing global interference and ultimately causing reasoning collapse. Building on this insight, we conduct a comprehensive empirical evaluation by systematically varying knowledge complexity, number of edits, evaluation dimensions, and baseline methods. Our results show that parameter-based editing methods consistently damage core LLM capabilities. In contrast, a simple retrieval-based baseline achieves consistently stronger performance than all parameter-editing methods across all evaluated conditions. These findings highlight that preserving the fundamental capabilities of LLMs after knowledge editing should be a central concern for future research.

</details>


### [201] [Sandboxed Coding Agents are Competitive Omni-modal Task Solvers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00579)
*Dongping Chen,Xuanao Huang,Zhihan Hu,Qingyuan Shi,Dianqi Li,Tianyi Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文证明仅具备文本+图像访问能力的编码代理（coding agents）通过沙盒工具接口，在多个音频-视频基准测试中能够匹配甚至超越原生全模态模型及预定义多模态代理脚手架。其优势来源于将全模态任务转化为检索与信息处理问题，而非直接处理整个媒体流。研究通过失败分类、过程级追踪分析、技能注入等方法进一步提升了性能，并提出了训练方案Code-X及新基准TerminalBench-O。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战"全模态任务必须依赖原生全模态模型"的普遍假设，探索是否可以通过编码代理+工具接口的方式，以更简洁的文本+图像能力实现甚至超越原生全模态模型的效果。

Method: 使用仅有文本+图像访问权限的编码代理（coding agents），配合沙盒工具接口；通过轨迹分析研究其工作机制；提出失败分类法和过程级追踪分析；引入技能注入（人工编写+自蒸馏）；提出Code-X训练方案（含OmniCoding轨迹数据集和可验证奖励）；构建TerminalBench-O基准。

Result: 编码代理在多个音频-视频基准测试中匹配或超越SOTA原生全模态模型和预定义多模态代理脚手架；技能注入显著提升性能；在Qwen-3.5-9B和Qwen-3.6-27B上提供了基线结果。

Conclusion: 全模态任务不一定需要原生全模态模型，编码代理通过代码编写和工具编排可将任务转化为检索与信息处理问题；未来方向是"多模态处理"（many-modality processing）。

Abstract: As multimodal LLMs increasingly target video and audio, it is often assumed that such tasks require native omnimodal models. We show that this is not always the case: coding agents with only text+image access and a sandboxed tool-use interface can match, and in several settings outperform, SOTA native omnimodal models and predefined multimodal agent scaffolds across multiple audio-video benchmarks. Our trajectory analysis suggests that their strength comes from writing code and orchestrating tools to extract relevant evidence from transcripts, frames, and other modality signals, thereby converting omnimodal tasks into retrieval and information-processing problems rather than ingesting entire media streams. We further characterize their limitations through a failure taxonomy and process-level trace analysis, and show that simple skill injection, including human-written and self-distilled skills, substantially improves performance. To explore open-source elicitation, we introduce Code-X, a training recipe with the OmniCoding trajectory dataset and verifiable reward, and provide baselines on Qwen-3.5-9B and Qwen-3.6-27B. Finally, we argue that the next frontier is many-modality processing, and introduce TerminalBench-O, a process-level benchmark for real-world omnimodal processing tasks. Code will be available at https://github.com/Dongping-Chen/OmniCoding.

</details>


### [202] [SPADER: Step-wise Peer Advantage with Diversity-Aware Exploration Rewards for Multi-Answer Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00593)
*Qiming Shi,Zhaolu Kang,Yunfan Zhou,Di Weng,Yingcai Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SPADER是一个针对多答案问答场景中长程工具使用问题的强化学习框架，通过无评论家的步骤级信用分配机制（SPA）和多样性感知探索奖励，显著提升了召回率和综合F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型工具增强代理主要关注单一正确答案的任务，而现实世界中许多查询需要发现全面的有效答案集（多答案问答）。该场景面临两个挑战：长搜索轨迹上的细粒度信用分配，以及超越高频实体的持续探索的奖励对齐问题。

Method: 提出SPADER框架，包含两个核心组件：1) Step-wise Peer Advantage (SPA)——无评论家的步骤级信用分配机制，通过对齐并行轨迹的决策步骤并从同伴回报中估计优势值；2) 多样性感知探索奖励——通过提高稀有发现的权重并降低冗余发现的权重，促进长尾实体发现。

Result: 在QAMPARI、Mintaka、WebQSP和QUEST四个数据集上，SPADER在召回率和综合F1分数上普遍优于基于提示的智能体、结果监督强化学习方法以及最近的步骤级监督方法。

Conclusion: SPADER通过步骤级信用分配和多样性奖励机制，有效解决了多答案问答中长程工具使用的探索与信用分配难题，证明了强化学习在该场景下的有效性。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as tool-augmented agents to acquire information beyond parametric knowledge. While recent work has improved long-horizon tool-use reasoning, most approaches focus on tasks with a single correct answer. In contrast, many real-world queries require discovering a comprehensive set of valid answers, a setting known as Multi-Answer QA. This setting raises two challenges: fine-grained credit assignment over long search trajectories and reward alignment for sustained exploration beyond easy high-frequency entities. We propose SPADER, a reinforcement learning framework for long-horizon tool use in Multi-Answer QA. SPADER includes Step-wise Peer Advantage (SPA), a critic-free step-level credit assignment mechanism that aligns parallel trajectories by decision step and estimates advantages from peer returns. It also includes a diversity-aware exploration reward that promotes long-tail entity discovery by upweighting rare findings and downweighting redundant ones. Experiments on QAMPARI, Mintaka, WebQSP, and QUEST show that SPADER generally improves recall and overall F1 over prompting-based agents, outcome-supervised RL methods, and recent step-level supervision approaches. Our code and model weights are available at https://github.com/KhanCold/spader.

</details>


### [203] [Toward Responsible and Epistemically Grounded Multilingual LLMs for Computational Social Science and Humanities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00596)
*Wajdi Zaghouani*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文重新概念化多语言推理大语言模型为诠释学工具，并提出了一个基于诠释学、技术哲学、STS等多学科理论框架的评估方法，通过文化对齐、跨语言稳定性和推理忠实度等操作化指标，为社会科学与人文学科研究中的多语言推理LLM负责任整合提供了方法论基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估范式局限于基于任务的NLP基准，无法解决解释有效性、文化处境性和 epistemic mediation（认识中介）问题，缺乏适用于社会科学与人文学科研究的多语言推理LLM评估框架。

Method: 跨学科理论融合（诠释学、技术哲学、STS、多语言NLP研究、计算社会科学方法论），构建理论驱动的评估框架，设计包含文化对齐、跨语言稳定性、推理忠实度等可操作化指标的严格实验协议，并配套针对解释性研究任务的透明度要求。

Result: 提出了一个概念性和方法论基础，通过多语言政治话语分析的具体应用场景进行了框架示例化说明。

Conclusion: 该框架为将多语言推理LLM负责任地集成到计算社会科学基础设施中提供了概念和方法论基础，弥合了NLP技术评估与SSH研究范式之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Large language models have rapidly evolved in multilingual competence and reasoning capacity, enabling their integration into Social Sciences and Humanities research workflows. Yet existing evaluation paradigms remain anchored in task-based NLP benchmarks and fail to address interpretive validity, cultural situatedness, and epistemic mediation. This paper reconceptualizes multilingual reasoning LLMs as hermeneutic instruments that actively structure meaning production across linguistic and cultural contexts. Drawing on hermeneutics, philosophy of technology, science and technology studies, multilingual NLP research, and computational social science methodology, we develop a theoretically grounded framework for evaluating multilingual reasoning in Social Sciences and Humanities (SSH) research. We articulate a rigorous experimental protocol with operationalized metrics for cultural alignment, cross-lingual stability, and reasoning faithfulness, along with transparency requirements tailored to interpretive research tasks. We illustrate the framework through a concrete application scenario involving multilingual political discourse analysis. The paper contributes a conceptual and methodological foundation for responsible integration of multilingual reasoning LLMs into computational social science infrastructures.

</details>


### [204] [Linguistics-Aware Non-Distortionary LLM Watermarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00613)
*Shinwoo Park,Hyejin Park,Hyeseon An,Yo-Sub Han*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LUNA是一种语言自适应水印方法，通过词性标注上下文估计归一化标记熵，结合无模型检测与单令牌非失真特性，在6种语言和两个领域的实验中达到AUROC 0.9959，平均中位困惑度偏移仅0.045，优于8种基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有水印技术在多语言部署中面临形态学、分词和文字系统差异带来的挑战，且往往需要在质量与检测能力之间权衡。需要一种既能保证生成质量、不限制于模型提供者验证、又能适应多语言特性的水印方法。

Method: LUNA从外部语料库中基于词性标注上下文估计归一化的下一标记熵，据此设置非失真二元锦标赛采样器的深度；检测器利用文本、分词器、词性标注器和密钥重建相同调度，实现无模型检测。

Result: 在6种类型多样的语言和2个领域上，LUNA达到AUROC 0.9959，平均中位困惑度偏移0.045（95% Bootstrap区间[0.022, 0.073]），最低的Self-BLEU、Distinct-1、surprisal和熵偏移。在12个设置中9个达到AUROC>0.99且困惑度偏移<0.1，而基线最多仅2个。

Conclusion: LUNA在多语言场景下同时实现了高检测性能与极低文本质量损失，是唯一能在多数设置中同时达到AUROC>0.99和困惑度偏移<0.1的方法，验证了语言自适应策略对多语言水印的有效性。

Abstract: Watermarking should identify language-model output without degrading quality or limiting verification to the model provider. Multilingual deployment makes this harder because morphology, segmentation, and script change where watermark evidence can enter naturally. We introduce LUNA, a linguistically adaptive watermark that combines model-free detection with single-token non-distortion under the standard random-key model. LUNA estimates normalized next-tag entropy from part-of-speech contexts in an external corpus and uses it to set the depth of a non-distortionary binary tournament sampler; the detector reconstructs the same schedule from text, a tokenizer, a tagger, and a secret key. We evaluate six typologically diverse languages and two domains against eight primary baselines. LUNA attains an AUROC of 0.9959 and the lowest mean absolute median perplexity shift of 0.045 across the twelve settings; its 95% bootstrap interval [0.022, 0.073] lies below all baseline intervals. LUNA also records the lowest mean Self-BLEU, Distinct-1, surprisal, and entropy shifts. It is the only method that simultaneously achieves AUROC > 0.99 and an absolute median perplexity shift below 0.1 in a majority of settings, reaching this regime in 9 of the 12 settings while no baseline reaches it in more than 2. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Shinwoo-Park/luna_watermark

</details>


### [205] [MemPro: Agentic Memory Systems as Evolvable Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00619)
*Qingshan Liu,Guoqing Wang,Wen Wu,Jingqi Huang,Xinqi Tao,Dejia Song,Jie Zhou,Liang He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MemPro提出了一种系统级演化框架，将整个记忆构造-检索（MCR）流水线视为可演化程序，通过版本树管理和故障模式引导的迭代改进，在多个长时推理基准上显著优于静态和提示级演化基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体记忆系统通常采用固定的MCR流水线设计，仅调整记忆库而保持流水线其余部分不变。这种设计难以处理异构的任务特定故障模式，且随着记忆库规模和结构演化，固定流水线会与记忆库产生不一致，导致性能受限。

Method: MemPro将整个MCR流水线视为可演化程序，维护一个可运行记忆系统实现的版本树。演化代理迭代选择有潜力的版本，诊断重复故障，并通过故障模式引导的编辑-调试改进创建子版本，实现系统级自适应优化。

Result: 在LongMemEval、LoCoMo、HotpotQA和NarrativeQA四个基准上，MemPro在少量迭代内一致优于强静态基线和提示级演化基线，性能随演化持续提升，并实现了良好的性能-成本权衡。

Conclusion: MemPro通过将流水线本身纳入演化过程，有效解决了固定流水线与演化记忆库之间的不匹配问题，为长时自主智能体提供了一种更灵活、更高效的记忆系统优化范式。

Abstract: Long-horizon autonomous agents require memory systems to retain historical information, track evolving states, and reuse relevant knowledge beyond finite context windows. Existing agentic memory systems typically follow a memory construction-retrieval (MCR) pipeline, but often adapt mainly the memory bank while keeping the surrounding pipeline fixed after deployment. This fixed-pipeline design struggles to handle heterogeneous task-specific failure modes and can become misaligned with memory banks that evolve in scale and structure over time. To address these limitations, we propose MemPro, a system-level evolution framework that treats the entire MCR pipeline as an evolvable program rather than adapting only the memory bank or prompt text. MemPro maintains a version tree of runnable memory-system implementations, where an Evolving Agent iteratively selects promising versions, diagnoses recurring failures, and creates improved child versions through failure-mode-guided edit-debug refinement. Experiments on LongMemEval, LoCoMo, HotpotQA, and NarrativeQA show that MemPro consistently outperforms strong static and prompt-level evolving baselines within a few iterations, continues to improve with evolution, and achieves a favorable performance-cost trade-off. Code is available at https://github.com/wanghai673/MemPro.

</details>


### [206] [Robust Reasoning via Dynamic Token Selection for Distribution-Aligned Self-Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00628)
*Ruiqi Zhang,Lingxiang Wang,Hainan Zhang Zhiming Zheng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出分布对齐自蒸馏（DASD）方法，通过感知答案的参考模型生成候选token，并根据基础模型置信度动态过滤，解决自蒸馏中参考答案引起的风格偏差问题，在数学、代码和常识推理任务上优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自蒸馏过程中，参考答案引入强风格偏差，使生成模型模仿表面形式而非学习有用推理模式；重写数据中高困惑度token包含有益的逻辑修正和有害的风格漂移，现有方法同等对待所有高PPL token会破坏基础模型原始分布，降低困难推理任务的性能。

Method: 提出分布对齐自蒸馏（DASD）：使用感知答案的参考模型生成候选token，根据基础模型置信度动态过滤，保留编码有用逻辑知识的token，抑制分布不对齐的风格噪声。

Result: 在数学、代码和常识推理基准上，DASD一致优于竞争基线，减少了高PPL token，提升了不同难度任务的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DASD有效缓解了自蒸馏中的风格偏差问题，通过分布对齐的token过滤策略，在保留有益逻辑知识的同时抑制风格噪声，提升了模型在多种推理任务上的表现和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Self-distillation improves learning efficiency by rewriting reference answers as training data that better matches the model's own distribution. However, reference answers also introduce strong stylistic biases, causing the generative model to imitate surface forms rather than learn useful reasoning patterns. We observe that the rewriting data contains a large number of high-perplexity (PPL) tokens, coming from two distinct sources: beneficial knowledge-enhancing logical corrections, and harmful stylistic drift induced by reference imitation. Treating all such tokens equally can disrupt the base model's original distribution and degrade performance, especially on difficult reasoning tasks. To address this, we propose Distribution-Aligned Self-Distillation (DASD), which uses an answer-aware reference model to generate candidate tokens and dynamically filters them according to the base model's confidence. DASD preserves tokens that encode useful logical knowledge while suppressing distributionally misaligned style noise. Experiments on math, code, and commonsense reasoning benchmarks show that DASD consistently outperforms competitive baselines, reduces high-PPL tokens, and improves robustness across tasks of varying difficulty.

</details>


### [207] [French parsing enhanced with a word clustering method based on a syntactic lexicon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00634)
*Anthony Sigogne,Matthieu Constant,Eric Laporte*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文评估了将法语句法词典（Lexicon-Grammar）的数据整合到概率解析器中的效果，通过对法语树库中的动词应用聚类方法，基于概率上下文无关文法解析器在法语上获得了准确的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在利用法语Lexicon-Grammar词典的结构化句法信息来改进概率解析器性能，解决法语解析中数据稀疏和泛化问题。

Method: 将法语Lexicon-Grammar词典提取的句法数据整合到基于概率上下文无关文法（PCFG）的解析器中，并对法语树库中的动词应用聚类方法。

Result: 通过动词聚类方法，基于PCFG的解析器在法语上取得了准确的解析性能。

Conclusion: Lexicon-Grammar词典数据与聚类方法的结合能有效提升法语概率解析器的性能。

Abstract: This article evaluates the integration of data extracted from a French syntactic lexicon, the Lexicon-Grammar (Gross, 1994), into a probabilistic parser. We show that by applying clustering methods on verbs of the French Treebank (Abeillé et al., 2003), we obtain accurate performances on French with a parser based on a Probabilistic Context-Free Grammar (Petrov et al., 2006).

</details>


### [208] [LinguIUTics at PsyDefDetect: Iterative Imbalance-Aware Fine-tuning of Qwen3-8B for Psychological Defense Mechanism Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00647)
*Shefayat E Shams Adib,Ahmed Alfey Sani,Md Hasibur Rahman Alif,Ajwad Abrar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文针对PsyDefDetect 2026共享任务中的心理防御机制检测问题，提出基于QLoRA微调Qwen3-8B的方法，结合分组分层交叉验证、少数类轮询词汇增强和后处理流水线（logit偏置调优与集成融合），在九类话语分类任务上取得0.3917 macro F1，排名第4，较基线提升7.7个绝对点，并将罕见的"Unclear"类F1提升至0.797。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对话文本中检测心理防御机制是一个具有挑战性的临床NLP问题，现有BERT族编码器和零样本LLM因严重的类别不平衡在稀有类别上效果不佳。

Method: 采用QLoRA微调Qwen3-8B作为核心模型，结合三种关键策略：分组分层交叉验证（防止数据泄露）、少数类轮询词汇增强（缓解类别不平衡）、后处理流水线（包括logit偏置调优和集成融合）。

Result: 在PsyDefDetect 2026共享任务中，macro F1达到0.3917，排名第4（共21支队伍），较Ministral-8B基线（31.48 macro F1）提升7.7个绝对点（24.4%相对提升）。关键突破是将"Unclear"类（Level 8）F1从接近零提升至0.797。

Conclusion: 通过QLoRA微调与针对性增强策略的组合，有效缩小了验证集与排行榜之间的差距，显著提升了少数类别的召回率，验证了该框架在心理防御机制检测任务中的有效性。

Abstract: Detecting psychological defense mechanisms in conversational text remains a challenging clinical NLP problem. For the PsyDefDetect 2026 shared task (nine-class utterance classification evaluated via macro F1), our team LinguIUTics achieves a macro F1-score of 0.3917 on the official positive-class leaderboard, ranking 4th out of 21 registered teams and improving over the Ministral-8B task baseline (31.48 macro F1) by 7.7 absolute points (24.4 percent relative). BERT-family encoders and zero-shot LLMs proved ineffective on rare classes due to severe class imbalance, leading us to QLoRA fine-tuning of Qwen3-8B. We leverage three key strategies: grouped stratified cross-validation (preventing leakage), minority-class round-robin lexical augmentation, and a post-processing pipeline with logit bias tuning and ensemble blending. Together, these components close much of the validation-to-leaderboard gap and substantially improve minority-class recall, driving the critical "Unclear" class (Level 8) from near-zero performance to an F1 score of 0.797.

</details>


### [209] [FineVerify: Scaling Test-Time Compute with Fine-Grained Self-Verification for Agentic Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00660)
*James Xu Zhao,Hui Chen,Bryan Hooi,See-Kiong Ng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FineVerify通过将复杂搜索问题分解为可验证的子问题，对每个候选答案进行细粒度自验证，从而提升智能体搜索的性能。仅用4条轨迹即可在多个基准上显著提升准确率，且能生成可解释的验证轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前测试时计算扩展方法因正确答案稀疏且基于分数的选择依赖于模型校准而易失败，因此需要一种更可靠的细粒度验证机制来提升智能体搜索的准确性和鲁棒性。

Method: FineVerify将每个原始问题分解为可检查的子问题，对采样候选答案逐一验证每个子问题，并根据聚合得分选择最佳候选。这种逐项检查结构将全局选择简化为局部判断，并确保评分基于统一显式标准。

Result: 在四个智能体搜索基准和两个模型上，FineVerify一致优于标准扩展基线。仅用4条采样轨迹，GPT-5-mini平均提升8.2个准确率点，Gemini-3-flash平均提升5.6%。12条轨迹下，GPT-5-mini在BrowseComp-Plus上超越前沿模型GPT-5。

Conclusion: FineVerify不仅提升了准确性，还生成了可解释的验证轨迹，有助于审计基准测试错误，在检测智能体搜索系统方面具有更广泛的应用前景。

Abstract: Agentic search requires language model agents to explore many sources and answer complex information-seeking questions. Scaling test-time compute is a promising way to improve these agents, but current approaches can fail, because correct answers are often sparse and score-based selection depends on model calibration. We propose FineVerify, a fine-grained self-verification framework that decomposes each question into checkable sub-questions, verifies sampled candidates against each sub-question, and selects the candidate with the highest aggregated score. This per-check structure turns selection into simpler local judgments and produces scores under the same explicit criteria. Across four agentic search benchmarks and two models, FineVerify consistently outperforms standard scaling baselines. With only four sampled trajectories, it improves GPT-5-mini by 8.2 accuracy points and Gemini-3-flash by 5.6% on average. With 12 samples, FineVerify enables GPT-5-mini to surpass frontier GPT-5 on BrowseComp-Plus. Beyond accuracy, FineVerify produces interpretable verification traces that help audit benchmark errors, suggesting broader applications for inspecting agentic search systems. Code and data are available at https://github.com/XuZhao0/fineverify

</details>


### [210] [OCC-RAG: Optimal Cognitive Core for Faithful Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00683)
*Maksim Savkin,Mikhail Goncharov,Alexander Gambashidze,Alla Chepurova,Dmitrii Tarasov,Nikita Andriianov,Daria Pugacheva,Vasily Konovalov,Andrey Galichin,Ivan Oseledets*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出 Optimal Cognitive Core (OCC) 系列小语言模型，其中 OCC-RAG 变体专门用于基于上下文的忠实问答，通过合成超300万条多上下文多跳推理数据训练，在多项基准上以较小参数规模匹配或超越大2-6倍的通用模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在许多实际应用中，鲁棒推理能力比大量参数化知识更为关键，因此任务专用的小语言模型是更合理的设计选择。

Method: 构建 OCC-RAG 模型，设计新颖的流水线合成大规模多上下文、多跳问答数据（超300万条），训练模型生成带有来源引用的结构化推理轨迹，并强调严格上下文忠实性和校准化拒绝机制。

Result: OCC-RAG-0.6B 和 OCC-RAG-1.7B 在多跳推理（HotpotQA、MuSiQue、TAT-QA）、忠实性（ConFiQA）和拒绝（MuSiQue-Un）基准上，以2-6倍小的参数规模匹配或超越通用模型。

Conclusion: 紧凑的任务专用小语言模型能够在特定任务上以更高效的方式达到与大规模通用模型相当甚至更优的性能。

Abstract: Recent progress in the development of language models has been defined by scale, with each generation absorbing more of the world's knowledge into its weights. However, many practical applications benefit more from robust reasoning than from extensive parametric knowledge. In this setting, task-specialized small language models (SLMs) offer a principled design choice. We introduce Optimal Cognitive Core (OCC), a family of SLMs built around this premise. As a variant of OCC, we present OCC-RAG, optimized for faithful question answering (QA) grounded in the provided context. This task directly aligns with the OCC design approach, requiring multi-hop reasoning over supplied passages while ignoring memorized knowledge. To train OCC-RAG, we implement a novel pipeline for synthesizing multi-context, multi-hop QA data at scale, producing a corpus of over three million examples targeting multi-hop reasoning, strict context faithfulness, and calibrated abstention. We release OCC-RAG-0.6B and OCC-RAG-1.7B, both mid-trained on this corpus. The models produce structured reasoning traces with source citations grounded in literal quotes from the context. Through OCC-RAG, we demonstrate that compact, task-specialized SLMs can match or exceed general-purpose models 2 -- 6x their size across multi-hop reasoning (HotpotQA, MuSiQue, TAT-QA), faithfulness (ConFiQA), and refusal (MuSiQue-Un) benchmarks.

</details>


### [211] [EPIC: Efficient and Parallel Inference under CFG Constraints for Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00722)
*Hyundong Jin,Yo-Sub Han*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出EPIC框架，通过词法记忆化、Earley解析和松弛兼容子集选择，在扩散语言模型中实现高效的上下文无关文法约束解码，相比现有方法推理时间减少67.5%，额外开销降低90.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CFG约束解码方法在扩散语言模型上速度比无约束解码慢4倍，且破坏了扩散模型的并行解码优势，因为顺序有效性检查带来了显著的开销。

Method: 提出EPIC框架，包含三个关键技术：1) 词法记忆化(Lexing Memoization)减少重复词法分析；2) 使用Earley风格解析替代确定性自动机进行有效性验证；3) 松弛兼容子集选择(Relaxed Compatible Subset Selection)允许多个兼容token并行提交。

Result: 在三个基准测试上使用四个模型进行实验，推理时间减少67.5%，额外开销降低90.5%。

Conclusion: EPIC框架有效解决了扩散语言模型中CFG约束解码的效率瓶颈，恢复了并行解码能力，显著降低了计算开销。

Abstract: Controlling language model outputs is essential for ensuring structural validity, reliability, and downstream usability, and diffusion language models are no exception. Recent advances in diffusion language model decoding have extended output control beyond regular constraints to context-free grammar (CFG) constraints. Existing methods, however, can be up to four times slower than unconstrained decoding. More importantly, they substantially diminish one of the key advantages of diffusion language models over autoregressive models, namely parallel decoding. This slowdown arises because sequential validity checking introduces significant overhead during parallel generation. We propose an efficient CFG-constrained decoding framework, EPIC, that addresses this limitation. Our method improves decoding efficiency by combining lexing memoization, validation using Earley-style parsing instead of deterministic automata, and relaxed compatible subset selection for parallel commit. It reduces repeated lexing and validation overhead while allowing multiple compatible tokens to be committed together. Experiments on three benchmarks using four models show that our method reduces inference time by up to 67.5% and decreases the additional overhead by up to 90.5% compared with existing CFG-constrained decoding methods. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/hyundong98/EPIC-Decoding.git .

</details>


### [212] [WaveFilter: Enhancing the Long-Context Capability of Diffusion LLMs via Wavelet-Guided KV Cache Filtering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00724)
*Jinnan Yang,Yan Wang,Zhen Bi,Kehao Wu,Xiaojie Li,Jungang Lou,Zechao Li,Jing Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出WaveFilter，一种受人类阅读过程启发的无训练缓存框架，通过小波变换分解长序列以精准识别关键Token，构建稀疏KV Cache，提升现有主流KV Cache方法在长上下文任务中的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散大语言模型的多步迭代推理导致长上下文任务中计算开销和推理延迟严重，现有KV缓存机制在处理长序列时面临生成质量急剧下降的问题，核心挑战在于如何在超长上下文中精准高效地过滤关键Token。

Method: 提出WaveFilter框架，引入小波变换对长序列进行分解，实现关键Token的精准识别，基于此构建稀疏KV Cache来计算最终上下文表示。该框架即插即用，无需训练。

Result: 实验结果表明，WaveFilter作为通用即插即用框架，显著提升了现有主流KV Cache方法在复杂长上下文任务中的性能。

Conclusion: WaveFilter通过小波变换驱动的稀疏化策略有效解决了长上下文场景下KV缓存的质量退化问题，为扩散大语言模型在大规模部署中提供了高效推理方案。

Abstract: Diffusion Large Language Models (DLMs) have demonstrated significant advantages across various tasks. However, constrained by their multi-step iterative inference mechanism, their computational overhead and inference latency in long-context tasks have become core bottlenecks restricting their large-scale deployment. When processing long sequences, existing Key-Value (KV) caching mechanisms often face a dilemma where generation quality degrades drastically, where the core challenge lies in precisely and efficiently filtering critical tokens within ultra-long contexts. Inspired by the human reading process, we propose \textbf{WaveFilter}, a universal and training-free caching framework. This framework innovatively introduces the wavelet transform for decomposition of long sequences to achieve precise identification of key tokens, based on which a sparse KV Cache is constructed to compute the final contextual representation. Experimental results demonstrate that WaveFilter, as a plug-and-play generic framework, significantly enhances the performance of existing mainstream KV Cache methods in complex long-context tasks.

</details>


### [213] [From Empathy to Personalized Empathy: Adapting Empathetic Strategies to Individual Users](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00728)
*Wuqiang Zheng,Chengbing Wang,Yilin Yang,Junyi Cheng,Jianfei Xiao,Hu Sun,Yi Xie,Yangyang Li,Wenjie Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出个性化共情任务，构建了PersonaEmp数据集和PereGRM奖励建模框架，通过结合共情评估结构和动态评估标准生成，显著提升了大语言模型在长期交互中的个性化共情能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究忽略了长期交互中用户个性特征对共情策略的影响，缺乏根据用户历史个性化特征调整共情策略的方法。

Method: 构建PersonaEmp个性化共情数据集（包含用户历史、人物画像和共情查询），提出PereGRM奖励建模框架，将共情评估结构与动态评估标准生成相结合，实现细粒度奖励建模。

Result: 在多种设置和多个评判模型上的实验结果表明，PereGRM一致性地取得了最强性能提升。

Conclusion: 所提出的PereGRM框架能有效增强大语言模型的个性化共情能力，填补了长期交互中基于用户个性的共情策略研究的空白。

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in long-term interactions with users, empathy has become an increasingly important capability. However, existing research overlooks the influence of users' personality traits on empathetic strategies during long-term interactions. To address this gap, we introduce the task of personalized empathy, which focuses on adapting empathetic strategies according to users' personalized characteristics derived from history. To study and enhance this capability, we construct PersonaEmp, a personalized empathy dataset built from long-term user-AI interactions, featuring rich user histories, persona information, and empathy-seeking queries. We further propose PereGRM, a reward modeling framework that combines the empathy evaluation structure with dynamic evaluation criteria generation for fine-grained reward modeling. Experimental results across different settings and multiple judge models show that PereGRM consistently achieves the strongest performance improvements, indicating its effectiveness for enhancing personalized empathetic capabilities.

</details>


### [214] [I-WebGenBench : Evaluating Interactivity in LLM-Generated Scientific Web Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00750)
*Dasen Dai,Biao Wu,Meng Fang,Shuoqi Li,Wenhao Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出PaperVoyager框架，可将科研论文PDF自动转化为可交互的Web系统，用户能操作输入并观察动态行为。基于19篇论文+专家构建系统的基准测试，验证了该方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文档智能体将论文转化为静态摘要、网页或幻灯片，无法满足涉及动态机制和状态变迁的技术论文的理解需求。

Method: 提出Paper-to-Interactive-System Agent，端到端处理PDF论文（含理解、系统建模、交互网页合成）；提出PaperVoyager结构化生成框架，在合成过程中显式建模机制与交互逻辑。

Result: 构建19篇论文+专家构建系统的基准测试，实验表明PaperVoyager显著提升了生成交互系统的质量。

Conclusion: PaperVoyager为交互式科学论文理解提供了新范式，将论文从静态制品转变为可操作、可观察动态行为的交互系统。

Abstract: Recent advances in visual language models have enabled autonomous agents for complex reasoning, tool use, and document understanding. However, existing document agents mainly transform papers into static artifacts such as summaries, webpages, or slides, which are insufficient for technical papers involving dynamic mechanisms and state transitions. In this work, we propose a Paper-to-Interactive-System Agent that converts research papers into executable interactive web systems. Given a PDF paper, the agent performs end-to-end processing without human intervention, including paper understanding, system modeling, and interactive webpage synthesis, enabling users to manipulate inputs and observe dynamic behaviors.
