TL;DR: 本文提出一种结合BERT和GNN的高层架构，用于从历史文本中提取实体和关系并构建知识图谱，同时开发了基于FastRQNet和Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet的图像检索系统。实验表明，该联合系统在精确率、召回率和F1分数上优于传统规则方法和深度学习基线，能够有效处理嵌套结构和隐式指代问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通过数字人文研究和规模化历史数据分析，将大量传统历史文本转化为结构化知识图谱，以解决历史文本中的语言歧义、上下文受限引用以及缺乏规范语法等问题。

Method: 提出高层架构，结合BERT（双向编码器表示）和GNN（图神经网络）从历史文本中提取实体和关系；同时开发基于FastRQNet和预训练视觉-语言模型Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet的图像检索系统。

Result: 联合BERT-GNN系统在精确率、召回率和F1分数上均优于传统规则方法和其他深度学习基线（见表2），能够准确处理复杂嵌套结构和隐式指代问题。

Conclusion: 结合关系图学习算法与上下文敏感语义表示技术，可以自动从历史数据中提取信息，为知识库积累智慧。

Abstract: Through digital humanities research and scale-up historical data analysis, a significant amount of traditional historical text is converted into structured knowledge graphs. This paper provides a high-level architecture that combines bidirectional encoder representations of transformers (BERT) and graph neural networks (GNN) to extract the entities and relationships from various types of historical texts. The texts of traditional history resolve linguistic ambiguities, references limited by context, and a lack of established grammatical norms in a systematic way. This study develops a new image retrieval system based on FastRQNet and pre-trained vision-language model Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet in accordance with the aforementioned recommendations. The experiments make full use of a comprehensive collection of municipal records, parliamentary documents, and historical correspondence. When compared to conventional rule-based techniques and other popular deep-learning baselines, the joint BERT-GNN system obtains greater Precision, Recall, and F1-score (Table 2). Complex nested structures and implicit reference issues can be handled by this structure with sufficient accuracy and thoroughness when creating knowledge graphs. The aforementioned experiments show that combining relational graph learning algorithms with context-sensitive semantic representation techniques can automatically extract historical data to add accumulated wisdom to the knowledge repository.

</details>


### [288] [HarnessForge: Joint Harness and Policy Evolution for Adaptive Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01779)
*Mingju Chen,Can Lv,Guibin Zhang,Heng Chang,Shiji Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出HarnessForge框架，通过harness（执行结构）与policy（推理策略）的协同进化实现LLM智能体系统的元自适应，在5个基准上相比基线提升最高12.0%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体系统在跨异构任务场景时缺乏系统级元自适应能力，仅依赖外部框架调整或底层策略微调，但完整系统自适应空间未明确，harness与policy之间的兼容性未得到联合优化。

Method: 将智能体系统形式化为harness-policy对，定义稳定的自适应空间分离执行结构与推理行为；通过故障引导的harness剪裁和harness条件化的策略对齐，实现harness-policy协同进化。

Result: 在5个跨领域基准上，Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B均一致提升，超过仅调harness或仅调policy的基线，最高比最强基线提升12.0%，并实现有利的部署效率权衡。

Conclusion: harness-policy协同进化是有效的，执行框架与推理策略之间的可执行兼容性对智能体系统自适应至关重要。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly expected to operate across heterogeneous task regimes that require distinct execution paradigms. This challenges fixed agent systems and motivates system-level meta-adaptation beyond isolated component updates. While existing works have adapted external harness or trained underlying reasoning policies, full-system adaptation remains insufficiently characterized. The adaptation space between structure and execution is rarely made explicit, and the compatibility between the external harness and the internal reasoner is not optimized jointly. We propose HarnessForge, a meta-adaptive framework for evolving LLM agent systems. HarnessForge formulates an agent system as a harness--policy pair, defining a stable adaptation space that separates harness-level execution structure from policy-level reasoning behavior. It then performs harness--policy co-evolution through fault-guided harness tailoring and harness-conditioned policy alignment. Experiments across five benchmarks from diverse domains show that HarnessForge consistently improves both Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B backbones, outperforming harness-only and policy-only baselines with gains of up to 12.0\% over the strongest baseline and achieving favorable rollout-efficiency tradeoffs, demonstrating that harness--policy co-evolution is effective, and that executable compatibility between the harness and reasoning policy is essential for agent-system adaptation. The code is available at https://github.com/mingju-c/HarnessForge.

</details>


### [289] [Multilinguality of Large Language Models From a Structural Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01800)
*Haruki Sakajo,Yusuke Sakai,Hidetaka Kamigaito,Taro Watanabe*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 通过表征结构分析探究LLM的多语言性，发现低资源语言与英语的结构差异大于高/中资源语言，且语言特定后训练会改变结构但保留语言间关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究仅关注token表示层面对LLM处理非英语文本的分析，缺乏结构视角的考察，而结构是语言的内在属性。

Method: 采用表征结构分析（representational structural analysis）方法，对比不同资源量语言与英语的结构相似性，并考察语言特定后训练对结构的影响。

Result: 低资源语言与英语的结构差异显著大于高资源和中等资源语言；语言特定后训练会改变模型的语言结构，但语言间的结构关系保持稳定。

Conclusion: 结构分析为理解LLM的多语言处理提供了新的视角，揭示了资源量对语言表征结构的影响，以及后训练对语言结构的影响具有保持语言间关系的特点。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have excelled in processing multiple languages through pre- and post-training on multilingual data, even though English dominates the training data. Prior work focusing on token representations has revealed how those LLMs process non-English text. Although these analyses have provided insightful findings, they fail to capture a structural view, which is an inherent property of language. In this study, we explore the multilinguality of LLMs through representational structural analysis. Our findings reveal that low-resource languages are structurally more different from English than high- and mid-resource languages, and that language-specific post-training alters their structures while preserving inter-language relationships.

</details>


### [290] [ProbeScale: Probing Analysis to Optimize Neural Scaling Laws for Efficient Small Language Model Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01806)
*Sourav Das*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出ProbScale框架，通过探针方法从预训练小语言模型中提取参数高效的子网络，在保持95-98%原始性能的同时实现5-10倍参数压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小语言模型虽在能力与计算可行性间取得平衡，但在严格资源约束下部署仍有挑战，现有方法缺乏系统性选择模型子网络的理论指导。

Method: 利用神经缩放定律与小语言模型的高质量内部表征，通过任务特定探针数学量化每层对目标能力的贡献，将子网络选择形式化为在参数预算约束下最大化聚合任务加权探针性能的层子集优化问题。

Result: 在RoBERTa-Large和T5-Base上实现5-10倍参数压缩，保持原始模型95%-98%的性能，优于启发式基线方法。

Conclusion: ProbScale有效统一了缩放定律与探针分析，为资源受限场景下小语言模型的高效部署提供了系统性的子网络选择方法。

Abstract: Small Language Models (SLMs) offer a balance between capability and computational feasibility. Neural scaling laws inform their optimal training, suggesting that they possess rich internal representations that scale with their size. However, deploying even these SLMs can be challenging under strict resource constraints. Language model probing provides methods for analyzing the linguistic knowledge encoded in a model's internals. We propose ProbScale, a framework that unifies insights from scaling laws and probing to identify parameter-efficient subnetworks within pre-trained SLMs. ProbScale utilizes the high-quality representations of well-scaled SLMs and uses task-specific probes to mathematically quantify the relevance of each layer for target downstream capabilities. This allows selecting subnetworks that optimally trade off performance against parameter size. We formulate the subnetwork selection as finding a layer subset maximizing aggregated, task-weighted probe performance under a parameter budget. Experiments on representative SLMs such as RoBERTa-Large and T5-Base demonstrate that ProbScale identifies subnetworks achieving significant parameter reduction, from 5 to 10 times, while maintaining high performance (95% to 98% of the original SLMs) on targeted tasks, outperforming heuristic baselines.

</details>


### [291] ["I've Seen How This Goes": Characterizing Diversity via Progressive Conditional Surprise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01811)
*Matthew Khoriaty,David Williams-King,Shi Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于上下文学习的新颖多样性度量方法Decan（DCa_n），通过单次前向传递读取基础模型的对数概率计算逐字节得分，无需嵌入模型、参考语料库或人工标注，即可评估AI与人类写作的多样性，并在McDiv基准和OLMo-2-7B后训练流程中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多样性度量方法依赖嵌入模型、参考语料库或人工标注，成本高且泛化性差。需要一种轻量、通用、无需额外训练的多样性评估方案，以衡量AI和人类文本的创造性输出。

Method: 提出Decan度量（DCa_n = C × a_n），基于信息论，利用基础语言模型的上下文学习能力，通过单次前向传递读取每个标记的对数概率，计算逐字节得分。同一流程可直接应用于AI样本和人类写作，无需训练专用模型。

Result: 在McDiv prompt_gen子集上取得OCA 0.846，仅次于最强神经基线SentBERT（0.897）；在OLMo-2-7B后训练流程中，DCa_n沿 base→SFT→DPO→RLVR 阶段单调下降，有效检测出创意写作关注的多樣性损失。

Conclusion: Decan提供了一种无需嵌入模型、参考语料或人工标注的高效多样性度量方案，兼顾理论基础与实用性能，能可靠捕捉AI后训练和人类写作中的多样性变化。

Abstract: Measuring the diversity of creative outputs is central to evaluating post-training mode collapse, comparing decoding strategies, and quantifying creative behavior in both AI and human writing. We propose a new approach to measuring diversity using in-context learning, of which the ``Decan'' metric, $D_{Ca_n} = C \times a_n$, is the working instance we evaluate: a per-byte score read off the per-token log-probabilities of a base model $θ$ in a \emph{single forward pass} per permutation, with no embedding model, no reference corpus, and no human labels. This approach is grounded in information theory, makes use of language model in-context learning to detect a wide range of similarities between any number of inputs, and obviates the need to train a special-purpose model. The same pipeline scores AI samples and human-written response sets, with diversity treated as a property of (responses, prompt, scoring model). On Tevet and Berant's human-grounded McDiv benchmark, $D_{Ca_n}$ reaches OCA 0.846 on the McDiv prompt\_gen set where it performs best, behind the strongest neural baseline reported in Tevet and Berant (SentBERT, 0.897). On the OLMo-2-7B post-training pipeline, $D_{Ca_n}$ drops monotonically across the base $\to$ SFT $\to$ DPO $\to$ RLVR stages, detecting the type of diversity loss that creative-writing applications care about.

</details>


### [292] [Cost-Aware Diffusion Draft Trees for Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01813)
*Shuai Zhang,Huachuan Qiu,Hongliang He,Yong Dai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出CaDDTree方法，通过联合选择树结构和节点预算直接优化令牌吞吐量，无需离线预算搜索，在多项基准测试中匹配或超越使用oracle预算选择的DDTree。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DDTree方法中，接受长度关于预算非递减，倾向于更大树结构而不考虑验证成本，缺乏预算选择的原理性依据。

Method: CaDDTree直接优化令牌吞吐量（单位时间预期生成令牌数），显式建模草稿和验证延迟，将吞吐量目标分解为每轮预算的一维搜索，并证明在凸验证成本下吞吐量函数为单峰函数，从而可进行高效贪心停止规则。

Result: 在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B上覆盖推理、编程和指令遵循任务的八个基准测试中，CaDDTree在几乎所有任务上匹配或超越使用oracle预算选择的DDTree。

Conclusion: CaDDTree通过成本感知的预算自适应选择，在不需离线搜索的情况下实现了与oracle预算选择相当或更优的性能。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates inference by having a lightweight drafter propose tokens verified in parallel by the target language model. Block diffusion drafters such as DFlash generate an entire draft block in one pass, yielding per-position marginals; DDTree uses these to build a candidate tree that maximizes expected acceptance length under a fixed node budget. We observe, however, that acceptance length is non-decreasing in budget: it always favors larger trees regardless of verification cost, offering no principled basis for budget selection. We introduce \textbf{CaDDTree} (Cost-aware Diffusion Draft Tree), a method that directly optimizes token throughput (expected tokens generated per unit time) by jointly selecting the tree structure and node budget. We model draft and verification latencies explicitly, show that the throughput objective decomposes into a per-round one-dimensional search over the budget, and prove that under a convex verification cost the throughput function is \emph{unimodal}, enabling an efficient greedy stopping rule. CaDDTree requires no offline budget search, adapting the budget each round from the current per-position distributions and verification cost. Experiments on Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B across eight benchmarks spanning reasoning, coding, and instruction-following tasks show that \caDDTree{} matches or surpasses DDTree with oracle budget selection on nearly all tasks.

</details>


### [293] [CRAB-Bench: Evaluating LLM Agents under Complex Task Dependencies and Human-aligned User Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01815)
*Danqing Wang,Akshay Sivaraman,Lei Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出CRAB-Bench（基于约束图的真实代理基准）和RUSE（基于人类行为研究的用户模拟引擎），用于评估LLM代理在复杂服务场景中的表现。实验表明，最先进模型在CRAB-Bench上仅达61% pass@1，切换至RUSE时性能进一步下降最多57%，主要影响任务解决能力而非对话质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代理评估缺乏对真实服务场景中复杂任务依赖、非完美用户行为和多有效解的考量，亟需更贴近实际的基准测试和用户模拟框架。

Method: CRAB-Bench通过约束图在多个相互依赖实体上生成任务，并结合结构化干扰项；RUSE基于人类行为研究构建具有多种人设和四个行为维度的现实用户模拟器。

Result: 最佳模型在CRAB-Bench上pass@1为61%；使用RUSE后性能下降高达57%，信息泄露是最具破坏性的行为维度；代理与RUSE交互时更倾向于通过隐式修正掩盖错误而非承认错误。

Conclusion: 现有LLM代理在处理复杂约束任务和应对现实用户行为时存在显著不足，尤其在信息管理、错误认知方面表现脆弱，需要进一步改进。

Abstract: Evaluating LLM agents in realistic service scenarios requires complex task dependencies, imperfect user behavior, and an evaluation that accommodates multiple valid solutions. We introduce CRAB-Bench (Constraint-based Realistic Agent Benchmark) and RUSE (Realistic User Simulation Engine) to address this gap. CRAB-Bench generates tasks via a constraint graph over multiple interdependent entities with structured distractors, requiring agents to reason carefully over thousands of misleading candidates where only a tiny fraction of solutions are valid. RUSE replaces cooperative, template-like simulators with realistic users grounded in human behavioral studies, instantiated across diverse personas and four behavioral dimensions. Experiments on four frontier LLM agents show that the best model achieves only 61% pass@1 on CRAB-Bench, and switching to RUSE causes further drops of up to 57%, concentrated in task-solving ability rather than conversational quality. Information Disclosure is the most damaging behavioral dimension, and agents interacting with RUSE are less likely to admit mistakes, instead masking errors through implicit corrections.

</details>


### [294] [TalkTag: Fine-Grained Morphosyntactic Error Annotation for Transcribed Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01820)
*Shamira Venturini,Oliver Hennhöfer,Steffen Kinkel,Jannik Strötgen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TalkTag是一个基于LLM的轻量级工具，通过微调实现CHAT风格形态句法错误自动标注，在低资源儿童叙事数据上展现出高精度和可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 细粒度形态句法错误标注在临床和发育语言学研究中至关重要，但传统人工标注劳动密集、依赖专家且难以规模化。

Method: 基于LLM微调的轻量级工具TalkTag，在极端数据稀缺条件下利用儿童叙事数据进行训练，实现CHAT风格口语转录文本的自动错误标注。

Result: TalkTag能够产生精确的标注结果，并有效识别语言歧义带来的复杂标注情况。

Conclusion: TalkTag为人工错误标注提供了可扩展的替代方案，为形态句法错误标注提供了切实可行的支持。

Abstract: Fine-grained morphosyntactic error annotation is important in clinical and developmental language research, yet it is labour-intensive, expert-dependent, and difficult to scale. We present TalkTag, an LLM-based lightweight tool fine-tuned to automate CHAT-style error annotation in spoken-language transcripts. Developed under conditions of extreme data scarcity using children's narrative data, the system shows the feasibility of linguistic analysis in low-resource settings. Our evaluation demonstrates that TalkTag produces encouragingly precise annotation while effectively identifying instances where linguistic ambiguity makes automated tagging genuinely complex. In summary, with TalkTag, we provide a scalable alternative to manual error annotation and practically viable support for morphosyntactic error annotation.

</details>


### [295] [LayerRoute: Input-Conditioned Adaptive Layer Skipping via LoRA Fine-Tuning for Agentic Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01838)
*Prateek Kumar Sikdar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LayerRoute是一个轻量级适配器，通过为每个Transformer块添加路由器（~897参数）和LoRA适配器（rank 8），学习基于输入类型选择性跳过块。在Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct上训练3000步（6.4分钟），工具调用步骤跳过15.25% FLOPs，规划步骤仅跳过2.34%，仅用1.10M可训练参数（骨干网络的0.22%），同时因LoRA适应提升了质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前推理系统对agentic语言模型系统中的两种异质步骤（结构化工具调用和开放式规划/推理）施加相同的计算量，未能根据步骤类型差异化分配计算资源，导致效率低下。

Method: LayerRoute为每个Transformer块添加：(1) 每层路由器（Linear(896,1)，~897参数），通过直通估计器输出硬二值门；(2) LoRA适配器（rank 8，~1.08M参数）作用于Q/K/V/O注意力投影。骨干权重冻结，在agentic数据上以端到端方式训练，加入门控正则化项，使模型学习每类输入可跳过的块。

Result: 训练3000步（6.4分钟，A100 40GB）后，LayerRoute实现12.91%的跳过差异：工具调用跳过15.25% FLOPs，规划步骤仅跳过2.34%，仅使用1.10M可训练参数（骨干494M参数的0.22%）。质量提升：工具调用perplexity改善-1.29，规划步骤改善-1.30。

Conclusion: LayerRoute证明了通过极少量可训练参数和极短训练时间，即可实现根据步骤类型差异化跳过Transformer块，在保证甚至提升质量的同时显著降低推理计算开销。

Abstract: Agentic language model systems alternate between two structurally distinct step types: structured tool calls (short, deterministic, low perplexity) and open-ended planning/reasoning steps (long, complex, high perplexity). Despite this heterogeneity, current inference systems apply identical compute to every step. We introduce LayerRoute, a lightweight adapter that learns to selectively skip transformer blocks on a per-input basis. LayerRoute augments each of the 24 transformer blocks in Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct with: (1) a per-layer router (~897 parameters, Linear(896,1)) that outputs a hard binary gate via the straight-through estimator, and (2) LoRA adapters (rank 8, ~1.08M parameters) on the Q/K/V/O attention projections. The backbone weights remain frozen. A single end-to-end training pass on agentic data (Hermes, Glaive, GSM8K, Turing) with a gate regularisation term forces the system to discover which blocks are skippable per input type. After 3,000 steps (6.4 minutes on an A100 40GB), LayerRoute achieves a 12.91% skip differential: tool calls skip 15.25% of FLOPs while planning steps skip only 2.34%, using only 1.10M trainable parameters (0.22% of the 494M backbone). Quality improves over the base model due to LoRA adaptation, with perplexity delta of -1.29 on tool calls and -1.30 on planning.

</details>


### [296] [Unveiling the Limits of Large Language Models in Inferring Pragmatic Meaning from Non-Verbal Responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01845)
*Sugyeong Eo,Heuiseok Lim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文首次系统评估了大语言模型（LLMs）在纯非言语回应对话中推断语用含义的能力。实验发现，LLMs在理解非言语行为传达的间接意图时表现不佳，准确率相比言语回应下降高达60%。通过深入分析，论文揭示了LLMs解释非言语行为的行为模式，并证明上下文学习（in-context learning）有助于提升其语用推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究主要关注LLMs对言语行为的理解，但非言语行为是人类交流的基本组成部分，尤其是在刻意单独使用以传达间接含义时。目前缺乏对LLMs在纯非言语对话中语用推理能力的系统评估。

Method: 设计了三个研究问题，通过对比LLMs在纯非言语回应与言语回应场景下的表现，系统评估其推断间接意图的能力，并对失败模式进行深入分析，同时探索上下文学习对推理能力的提升作用。

Result: LLMs在非言语回应场景下准确率下降高达60%；揭示了LLMs解释非言语行为时的特定行为模式；上下文学习能有效促进语用推理。

Conclusion: 当前LLMs在理解非言语行为传达的间接语用意方面存在显著短板，但通过上下文学习可部分改善。该工作为未来提升多模态语用理解能力提供了方向。

Abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) have shown considerable progress in pragmatic language understanding, prior research has focused mainly on their comprehension of verbal behavior. Nonetheless, non-verbal behavior remains a fundamental component of human communication, especially when deliberately utilized in isolation to convey indirect meanings. In this work, we present the first systematic evaluation of LLMs' ability to infer pragmatic meaning in dialogue consisting solely of non-verbal responses. We explore three research questions: (1) Can LLMs recognize indirect intent conveyed through non-verbal responses? (2) When and how do LLMs fail to capture non-verbal intent? (3) How can we improve LLMs' ability to interpret non-verbal intent?. Through the evaluation, we observe that LLMs struggle to infer underlying meaning from non-verbal responses, with accuracy dropping by up to 60% points compared to verbal ones. Further extensive analysis reveals a behavioral pattern in LLMs' interpretations of non-verbal behavior and demonstrates that in-context learning facilitates pragmatic inference.

</details>


### [297] [CultureForest: Understanding and Evaluating Cultural Norm Grounded Reasoning in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01879)
*Yangfan Ye,Xiaocheng Feng,Jialong Tang,Xiayu Cao,Zihan Zhang,Xiachong Feng,Baosong Yang,Bing Qin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 现有研究将LLM的文化智能简化为知识层面的问题，忽视了模型在真实场景中有效利用知识的能力。本文提出CultureForest基准，基于文化规范推进行推理评估，发现即使顶尖模型在开放性设置中表现大幅下降，并揭示知识获取与知识运用之间存在关键差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究将文化智能简化为知识获取问题，缺乏对模型能否在真实场景中有效运用文化知识进行评估的基准。

Method: 构建CultureForest基准，包含5,378个基于文化规范推理的样本，覆盖8个领域和53个国家/地区，支持从多项选择到开放生成的渐进式评估。

Result: 顶尖模型在开放性设置中表现大幅下降，存在显著的跨区域差异；测试时推理收益有限且可能加剧不公平；模型存在高度共享的区域偏好结构；模型回答趋于保守，尤其在严格文化约束下；文化知识获取与文化推理能力可解耦，LLM具备充足文化知识但瓶颈在于有效运用。

Conclusion: 文化智能评估应从知识为中心转向衡量知识推理能力，模型的核心瓶颈不在于知识获取而在于知识的有效运用。

Abstract: Existing research largely reduces cultural intelligence in LLMs to a knowledge-level problem, overlooking whether models can effectively utilize their acquired knowledge in realistic scenarios. To bridge this gap, we introduce CultureForest, a benchmark for \textit{Cultural Norm Grounded Reasoning}. Each question is grounded in a small set of atomic norms, enabling verifiable and attributable evaluation. CultureForest comprises 5,378 examples across 8 domains and 53 countries/regions, and supports a progressive evaluation from multiple-choice to open-ended generation. Extensive experiments reveal that even top-tier models degrade substantially in open-ended settings, accompanied by pronounced cross-region disparities. Through targeted analysis, we uncover several consistent patterns: (1) test-time reasoning yields limited gains and may exacerbate inequity; (2) models exhibit highly shared regional preference structures; (3) model responses are markedly conservative, especially under stricter cultural constraints; and (4) by disentangling cultural knowledge acquisition from cultural reasoning, we show that while LLMs possess substantial cultural knowledge, their performance is further bottlenecked by its effective use. These findings point to a necessary shift from knowledge-centric evaluation toward measuring knowledge-grounded reasoning.

</details>


### [298] [KliniskVestBERT: BERT Model Specialised to Norwegian Clinical Texts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01904)
*Christian Autenried,Cosimo Persia*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了KliniskVestBERT——基于挪威临床文本预训练的三个BERT模型（Nb-BERT-large、NorBERT3-large、ModernBERT的继续预训练版本），在合成基准和真实临床任务上均优于基线模型，验证了领域特定预训练在医疗NLP中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗领域NLP应用日益增长，但通用语言模型难以充分捕捉临床语言的复杂性，尤其是挪威语医疗场景。现有模型缺乏针对挪威临床文本的专门优化，需要构建适应挪威医疗语言特点的专用模型。

Method: 基于Helse Vest大型去标识化的真实挪威临床文本语料（涵盖博克mål语和新挪威语的出院小结、手术报告、护理记录等多种文档类型），对三个现有BERT模型（Nb-BERT-large、NorBERT3-large、ModernBERT）进行继续预训练，得到KliniskVestBERT模型套件。

Result: 在三个合成挪威临床基准数据集和两个真实临床任务上的评估表明，每个临床专用模型均持续优于对应的基线模型，证明了领域特定预训练带来显著性能提升。

Conclusion: 领域特定的继续预训练能有效提升NLP模型在挪威临床文本处理中的表现，KliniskVestBERT系列为挪威医疗NLP提供了更优的基础工具，该工作由Helse Vest下属所有医疗机构与DIPS联合完成。

Abstract: The increasing application of Natural Language Processing (NLP) in healthcare demands language models specifically attuned to the complexities of clinical language. This work introduces KliniskVestBERT, a suite of three BERT-based encoder models pre-trained on a substantial corpus of real-world, de-identified Norwegian clinical texts from Helse Vest. We continue pretraining existing language models Nb-BERT-large, NorBERT3-large, and ModernBERT on our specialized clinical dataset. This dataset is based on a representative population of Helse Vest patients. The included document types are carefully curated to encompass a broad clinical spectrum in bokmål and nynorsk including discharge summaries, surgical reports, nursing notes etc. ensuring comprehensive representation of the linguistic landscape within Norwegian healthcare settings. Evaluation on three synthtetic Norwegian clinical benchmark datasets and two real-world problems demonstrates that each of our clinically specialized models consistently outperforms their baseline counterparts, highlighting the significant benefit of domain-specific pre-training for NLP tasks within the clinical domain. The project was a joint effort by all Helse Vest entities (Helse Bergen, Helse Fonna, Helse Førde and Helse Stavanger) with DIPS under the project lead of Helse Vest ICT.

</details>


### [299] [Mechanistic Diagnostics of Spatial Lexical Bias in Multimodal Large Language Model Spatial Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01914)
*Chuang Ma,Qianying Liu,Tomoyuki Obuchi,Fei Cheng,Wang Yang,Sudong Cai,Shuyuan Zheng,Akiko Aizawa,Sadao Kurohashi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 多模态大模型在空间多选题中存在一种"空间词汇偏差"：添加空间关系词到选项会吸引模型选择该选项。通过归因分析发现该偏差主要源于语言侧而非视觉侧，并提出了轻量级LLM-only DPO微调方法有效缓解该偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大模型在空间多选题上表现不可靠，以往研究将失败归因于视觉信息关注不足，本文发现了一种互补的失败模式——空间词汇偏差，即选项文本中空间关系词的存在本身就会误导模型决策。

Method: 使用9个开源多模态大模型进行系统性实验，识别"二元稳定但三元脆弱"的诊断样例；运用 mechanistic interpretability 工具（视觉注意力分析、残差流探针、无关选项控制、激活修补、稀疏组件干预）定位偏差来源；提出轻量级LLM-only DPO微调方法，仅使用单对象对合成数据进行训练。

Result: 空间词汇偏差在多个模型中广泛存在，且偏差主要源于语言侧而非视觉侧。LLM-only DPO微调在合成数据上将四路准确率提升最多100个百分点，在WhatsUp、SpatialMQA-Direct和VSR真实数据集上分别提升68.0、32.6和20.1个百分点。

Conclusion: 多模态大模型的空间推理失败不完全源于视觉感知缺陷，语言侧的空间词汇偏差是重要原因。仅对语言模型部分进行轻量级微调即可有效纠正该偏差，表明视觉信息本身是充分可用的。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remain unreliable on spatial multiple-choice questions, and their failures are often attributed to poorly attended visual information. In this work, we identify a complementary failure mode, spatial lexical bias: adding a spatial relation word to the answer options can attract the model's decision and make the newly added option likely to be selected. Using nine open-weight MLLMs, we show that this phenomenon is widely observed. In particular, models can answer a binary spatial question correctly, yet consistently select an incorrect third spatial option once it is added to the answer set. We isolate such binary-stable but ternary-fragile cases as diagnostic examples and leverage mechanistic interpretability tools, revealing that a substantial part of the failure instead originates on the language side rather than the visual side: visual attention analyses and residual-stream probes show the correct spatial relation remains internally available on these failures, while irrelevant-option controls, activation patching, and sparse component interventions trace the bias to specific LLM-side channels and neurons. Based on this finding, we show that a lightweight LLM-only DPO update on tiny single-object-pair synthetic data mitigates the bias, lifting four-way robust accuracy by up to 100 points on synthetic data, and by 68.0, 32.6, and 20.1 points on broader evaluation datasets WhatsUp, SpatialMQA-Direct, and VSR.

</details>


### [300] [Resonant Context Anchoring: Decoupling Attention Routing and Signal Gain at Inference Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01923)
*Mingkuan Zhao,Yide Gao,Wentao Hu,Suquan Chen,Tianchen Huang,Zhenhua An,Zetao Chang,Xiayu Sun,Yuheng Min*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种轻量级推理时干预方法——共振上下文锚定（RCA），通过正交解耦自注意力模块中的路由逻辑与信息幅度，利用非线性整流构造动态增益场放大上下文token的值向量范数，在不改变注意力概率分布的情况下提升残差流中外部证据的信噪比，有效抑制大语言模型的参数化幻觉，实现忠实性与流畅性的帕累托改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在面临与内部参数记忆冲突的外部输入证据时，常表现出"上下文忽视"现象，导致事实性幻觉持续存在。现有缓解策略（抑制特定神经元激活或对比解码）计算成本高，且会增加困惑度或推理延迟。

Method: 提出共振上下文锚定（RCA），一种轻量级推理时干预方法。核心机制是正交解耦自注意力模块中的路由逻辑（注意力分数）与信息幅度（值向量范数），利用原始softmax前的注意力分数作为语义对齐的即时度量，通过非线性整流构造动态增益场，选择性放大上下文token对应的值向量范数，而不改变注意力概率分布。

Result: 在Llama-3模型系列上的实验表明，RCA在多个事实一致性和知识冲突任务中显著提升了上下文忠实性，有效抑制参数化幻觉。作为无需训练且计算开销可忽略的即插即用模块，RCA实现了忠实性与流畅性的帕累托改进，同时保持模型通用语言理解能力。

Conclusion: RCA通过提升残差流中外部输入证据的信噪比，将生成轨迹稳健锚定于真实上下文，是一种训练免费、计算高效的幻觉抑制方法，能够在不牺牲模型泛化能力的前提下实现事实忠实性的提升。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently exhibit "contextual disregard" when faced with input evidence that conflicts with their internal parametric memory, leading to persistent factual hallucinations. Existing mitigation strategies primarily rely on suppressing specific neuron activations or employing computationally expensive contrastive decoding mechanisms, which often result in increased perplexity or significantly elevated inference latency. To address these limitations, we propose Resonant Context Anchoring (RCA), a lightweight inference-time intervention method grounded in the perspective of residual stream signal dynamics. RCA aims to resolve the signal attenuation of external evidence during its propagation through deep networks. The core mechanism involves the orthogonal decoupling of routing logic and information magnitude within the self-attention module. By utilizing raw pre-softmax attention scores as an instantaneous metric of semantic alignment, we construct a dynamic gain field via non-linear rectification to selectively amplify the norms of value vectors corresponding to context tokens, without altering the attention probability distribution. This mechanism effectively elevates the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of input evidence within the residual stream mixture, thereby robustly anchoring the generation trajectory to the truthful context during inference. Extensive experiments on the Llama-3 model series demonstrate that RCA significantly improves contextual faithfulness across multiple factual consistency and strong knowledge-conflict tasks, effectively suppressing parametric hallucinations. Furthermore, results confirm that as a training-free and computationally negligible plug-and-play module, RCA achieves a Pareto improvement in faithfulness and fluency while maintaining the model's general language understanding capabilities.

</details>


### [301] [Mitigating Bias in Locally Constrained Decoding via Tractable Proposals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01926)
*Meihua Dang,Linxin Song,Honghua Zhang,Jieyu Zhao,Guy Van den Broeck,Stefano Ermon*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于张量化有限自动机的全局约束解码方法 (P-)GCD，用于在序列蒙特卡洛采样中构建更优的提议分布和势函数，从而在函数调用、关键词生成和SQL生成等任务中比现有局部约束解码方法更快收敛到目标分布，且所需粒子数更少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有局部约束解码（LCD）方法通过短视地屏蔽下一个token来强制执行约束，导致采样存在偏差和性能下降。虽然序列蒙特卡洛（SMC）方法可缓解此类偏差，但设计有效的提议分布或势函数仍是一大挑战。

Method: 提出将有限自动机约束张量化以在GPU上高效执行，从而构建全局约束解码（GCD）提议；进一步利用张量化有限自动机与隐马尔可夫模型共享电路结构的特点，通过电路乘法获得概率化的P-GCD提议，同时编码目标分布的逻辑和概率信息。

Result: 在函数调用、关键词生成和SQL生成任务上，与LCD提议相比，在相同SMC采样设置下，(P-)GCD收敛到目标分布的速度更快，且所需粒子数显著更少。

Conclusion: (P-)GCD提供了一种通用的、更优的约束解码方案，有效缓解了LCD的偏差问题，提升了采样效率和解码质量。

Abstract: Generations from large language models often fail to conform to desired constraints such as JSON schema. Existing locally constrained decoding (LCD) approaches enforce constraints by myopically masking out next tokens, resulting in biased sampling and degradation in performance. Recent work uses sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) methods to mitigate such biases, but designing effective proposal distributions or potential functions remains a key challenge. In this work, we propose a generic approach to construct proposals and potentials for SMC sampling from $p_{\mathrm{lm}}( \cdot \mid \mathrm{constraint})$. First, we show that constraints specified as finite automata can be tensorized for efficient execution on GPUs, which we use to construct globally constrained decoding (GCD) proposals. In addition, leveraging the fact that tensorized finite automata share the same circuit structure as hidden Markov models, we circuit-multiply them to obtain the probabilistic GCD (P-GCD) proposals encoding both logical and probabilistic information about the target distributions. We evaluate (P-)GCD on the tasks of function calling, keyword-based generation, and SQL generation. Experiments show that under the same SMC sampling setup, compared to LCD proposals, (P-)GCD converges faster to the target distribution with significantly fewer particles.

</details>


### [302] [What to Format and How: A Benchmark and Workflow Approach for Document Formatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01936)
*Shihao Rao,Liang Li,Jiapeng Liu,Tong Lin,Bing Li,Xiyan Gao,Peng Fu,Jing Huang,Can Ma*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了DocFormBench基准和DocFormFlow方法，用于解决内容感知的文档格式化问题。DocFormBench扩展了文本到格式的评估，DocFormFlow通过解耦目标定位与修改执行（what to format和how），在多个大语言模型上提升了格式化准确率并减少了token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在自动文档格式化方面有了进展，但真实场景中的格式化往往需要基于文档内容识别目标（内容感知），这一领域缺乏专用的评估数据集，且现有方法在格式化过程中会冗余读取文档内容。

Method: 1) 提出DocFormBench基准，支持多样化的内容感知格式化需求评估，包含准确率和效率指标。2) 提出DocFormFlow工作流方法，将格式化过程解耦为"格式化什么"（目标定位）和"如何格式化"（修改执行）两个阶段，减少冗余文档读取。

Result: 在多组大语言模型和多模态模型上的实验表明，DocFormFlow相比代表性基线方法，持续提升了格式化准确率并降低了token消耗。进一步分析发现，精确的目标定位是影响格式化性能的主要因素。

Conclusion: DocFormBench和DocFormFlow为内容感知的文档格式化提供了评估基准和高效方法，有望推动该领域向更智能、更可靠的文档格式化方向发展。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened up new possibilities for automated document formatting. However, real-world formatting often requires identifying targets based on document content. This content-aware setting remains challenging and underexplored, primarily due to the lack of dedicated evaluation datasets.To enable evaluation in realistic content-aware scenarios, we introduce DocFormBench, a benchmark that extends Text-to-Format evaluation to diverse formatting requirements, along with metrics for both accuracy and efficiency.To mitigate redundant document reading in existing methods during formatting, we propose DocFormFlow, a workflow formatting method that decouples target localization from modification execution into what to format and how. Extensive experiments across multiple LLMs and multimodal models show that DocFormFlow consistently improves formatting accuracy while reducing token consumption compared to representative baselines. Further analysis reveals that precise target localization is the primary factor influencing formatting performance. We hope DocFormBench and DocFormFlow will facilitate future research toward more intelligent and reliable document formatting.

</details>


### [303] [Eyettention II: A Dual-Sequence Architecture for Modeling Fixation Location, Within-Word Landing Position, and Fixation Duration in Reading](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01964)
*Shuwen Deng,Cui Ding,David R. Reich,Paul Prasse,Lena A. Jäger*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Eyettention II，一种端到端训练的轻量级深度学习模型，用于生成阅读时的真实眼动扫描路径（包括注视位置、词内落点和注视时长），在数据稀缺条件下超越现有模型，并捕捉关键心理语言学现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 眼动追踪数据在语言模型增强和读者特征推断等应用中价值显著，但大规模眼动数据集因采集成本高昂而稀缺，现有数据驱动方法受限于数据不足。

Method: 提出Eyettention II，一种端到端训练的深度学习模型，可生成完整的扫描路径（注视位置、词内落点、注视时长），模型轻量、可在有限GPU资源上高效训练，且与认知理论紧密对齐。

Result: Eyettention II在扫描路径预测任务上超越现有最先进模型，并能模拟类人注视行为，捕捉关键心理语言学现象。

Conclusion: 该模型有潜力推动自然语言处理发展、辅助心理语言学实验材料预测试，并揭示超越现有理论认知模型的新见解。

Abstract: The way our eyes move while reading provides valuable insights into both the reader's cognitive processes and the properties of the text. In particular, eye-tracking-while-reading data has shown to be highly beneficial in various technological applications, such as enhancing and interpreting language models and inferring a reader's characteristics. However, these applications often rely on large-scale, data-driven models, which demand extensive eye-tracking datasets that are challenging to obtain due to the resource-intensive nature of data collection. To address the challenge of data scarcity, we develop Eyettention II, an end-to-end trained deep-learning model capable of generating realistic scanpaths consisting of a complete set of fixation attributes in chronological order, including fixation location, within-word landing position, and fixation duration. Our model is lightweight, efficiently trainable on limited GPU resources, and closely aligned with cognitive theories. We demonstrate that Eyettention II surpasses state-of-the-art models in scanpath prediction and mirrors human-like gaze behavior by capturing key psycholinguistic phenomena. With its robust performance, Eyettention II holds the potential to drive advancements in natural language processing, facilitate piloting the materials of psycholinguistic experiments, and uncover new insights beyond what is explicitly encoded in theoretical cognitive models.

</details>


### [304] [Training Prompt Matters: State-Adaptive Optimization for Robust Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01967)
*Wenhang Shi,Yiren Chen,Shuqing Bian,Zhe Zhao,Jinhao Dong,Pengfei Hu,Wei Lu,Xiaoyong Du*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文揭示训练中使用的提示词（prompt）并非语义等价的——即使在同一任务上表现相似，不同提示词会导致截然不同的跨任务灾难性遗忘和泛化能力。基于此发现，提出状态自适应提示优化（SAPO）方法，将提示从静态输入转变为动态、状态自适应的变量，有效缓解遗忘并提升泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前微调范式默认语义等价的提示词会产生相同的学习效果，但提示词在训练过程中的作用被严重忽视。作者发现这种等价性是欺骗性的，不同提示词虽在任务内表现相似，却对跨任务的灾难性遗忘和泛化产生截然不同的影响。

Method: 提出State-Adaptive Prompt Optimization (SAPO)，将提示词从静态输入转变为动态、状态自适应的变量，通过学习前任务损失即可鲁棒地识别出最优提示词，从而实现轻量级的训练策略。

Result: 在多种基准测试上，SAPO显著缓解了灾难性遗忘并提升了泛化能力，性能全面超越现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 训练提示词对学习动态有深远影响，SAPO提供了一种实用且鲁棒的微调策略；最优提示词可通过任务损失在训练前被识别。

Abstract: While prompt engineering is instrumental in maximizing the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) during inference, the role of prompts during training remains critically underexplored. Prevailing fine-tuning paradigms typically treat training prompts as mere surface forms, assuming that semantically equivalent instructions yield identical learning outcomes. However, we reveal that this equivalence is deceptive: while paraphrased prompts often lead to comparable in-task performance, they induce drastically different cross-task impacts regarding catastrophic forgetting and generalization. Crucially, these impacts are positively correlated across tasks, indicating the existence of superior prompts that consistently yield better performance. Furthermore, we discover that these superior prompts can be robustly identified by task loss prior to learning. Leveraging these insights, we introduce State-Adaptive Prompt Optimization (SAPO), a lightweight yet effective training strategy that shifts task formulation from a static input to a dynamic, state-adaptive variable. Comprehensive experiments on diverse benchmarks confirm its effectiveness, which significantly mitigates forgetting while improving generalization, achieving substantial performance gains over state-of-the-art methods. These results provide insights into how training prompts shape learning dynamics and offer a practical recipe for robust fine-tuning. Our code is available at https://github.com/Eric8932/SAPO.

</details>


### [305] [MMG2Skill: Can Agents Distill In-the-Wild Guides into Self-Evolving Skills?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01993)
*Xinyu Che,Junqi Xiong,Yunfei Ge,Xinping Lei,Shihao Li,Hang Yan,Han Li,Yuanxing Zhang,Zhiqi Bai,Jinhua Hao,Ming Sun,Han Li,Jiaheng Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出MMG2Skill-Bench基准和MMG2Skill框架，将网络上的多模态、异构、含噪声的人类导向指南转化为智能体可执行的技能，通过闭环流程实现技能编译、执行和轨迹级根因修订，在GUI控制、开放世界游戏和策略卡牌游戏等长时域任务中一致提升VLM智能体性能（宏平均+12.8%至+25.3%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络上的程序性知识（如指南、教程）虽丰富但多为多模态、异构、含噪声且面向人类执行者，难以直接被智能体用作可执行技能。现有方法无法有效弥合人类导向指南与智能体可执行技能之间的鸿沟，缺乏标准化的评估基准和系统化的转换框架。

Method: 提出MMG2Skill闭环框架：(1) 将指南编译为可编辑的结构化技能；(2) 固定VLM智能体在执行时依赖这些技能；(3) 基于轨迹级根因反馈（而非基准分数）修订技能。同时构建MMG2Skill-Bench基准，涵盖GUI控制、开放世界游戏和策略卡牌游戏三类任务。

Result: 在三种任务场景和六种VLM骨干上，MMG2Skill一致优于基线智能体，宏平均提升+12.8至+25.3个百分点。消融实验表明：直接使用原始指南会降低性能；结构化技能构建和轨迹驱动修订两者缺一不可。在可推断成功信号的任务中，分析器驱动的早停机制可防止后期性能退化并节省25%-53%的尝试次数。

Conclusion: 指南到技能学习（guide-to-skill learning）是连接人类导向知识与智能体执行能力的关键范式；结构化技能表示和闭环修订机制对于有效利用网络程序性知识至关重要。

Abstract: Abundant procedural knowledge on the Web holds great potential for helping agents solve long-horizon tasks. However, such knowledge is often multimodal, heterogeneous, noisy, and implicitly assumes human executors, making it difficult to use directly as the skills required by agents. To bridge the gap between human-oriented guides and agent-executable skills, we formalize this problem as guide-to-skill learning: converting in-the-wild guides into executable skills and continuously improving them from trajectories observable to the agent. To evaluate the capability of existing agents on this task, we introduce MMG2Skill-Bench, the first benchmark designed for this problem. We further propose MMG2Skill, a closed-loop framework that compiles guides into editable skills, conditions a fixed vision-language model (VLM) agent on these skills during execution, and revises the skills from trajectory-level root-cause feedback without using benchmark scores. Across GUI control, open-ended gameplay, and strategic card play with six VLM backbones, MMG2Skill consistently outperforms vanilla baseline agents in every model-domain setting, achieving macro-average gains of +12.8 to +25.3 percentage points across backbones. Ablation studies show that directly prompting agents with raw guides can degrade performance, while both structured skill construction and trajectory-driven revision are necessary for the observed improvements. On success-inferable tasks, analyzer-based early stopping further prevents late-stage performance regressions and saves 25%-53% of attempts when the success signal is properly calibrated.

</details>


### [306] [CARTE: A Benchmark for Mapping Language Model Knowledge Across France](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01995)
*Sarah Almeida Carneiro,Christos Xypolopoulos,Xiao Fei,Yang Zhang,Michalis Vazirgiannis*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了CARTE基准，一个包含2,431道多项选择题的评估框架，用于测试大语言模型对法国13个大区及14个主题领域的细粒度区域知识理解能力，并引入CARTE-LV子集聚焦语言变异。实验评估了27个1B-12B参数的LLM，发现模型在区域间存在性能差异且缺乏对国内变异的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准仅关注国家层面的文化理解，忽略了国内区域间差异以及区分相近区域上下文的能力，缺乏对细粒度地理知识推理的评估。

Method: 构建包含2,431道多项选择题的CARTE基准，覆盖法国13个大区和14个主题领域（文化、语言、人口、经济、环境、交通等），并设计CARTE-LV子集聚焦语言变异。在少样本设置下评估27个1B-12B参数的LLM。

Result: 不同区域和模型规模之间存在性能差异，表明预训练覆盖存在系统性缺陷，模型对国内区域变异的鲁棒性有限。

Conclusion: CARTE揭示了现有LLM在处理一国之内细粒度区域知识时存在显著不足，为改进模型的地理知识覆盖和跨区域推理能力提供了评估基准。

Abstract: We introduce CARTE 1 (Culturally Anchored Regional-Territorial Evaluation), a multiplechoice benchmark for evaluating the ability of large language models (LLMs) to perform fine-grained reasoning over geographically grounded and regionally differentiated knowledge within France. While prior benchmarks focus on national-level cultural understanding, they largely overlook intra-country variation and the need to distinguish between closely related regional contexts. CARTE addresses this gap by introducing 2,431 questions spanning the 13 metropolitan regions of France and covering 14 thematic domains, including culture, language, demographics, economy, environment, and mobility. We further introduce CARTE-LV, a subset targeting Linguistic Variation across French regions, enabling focused evaluation of language-related differences. We evaluate 27 LLMs ranging from 1B to 12B parameters under few-shot settings. Our experiments reveal performance disparities across regions and model scales, suggesting systematic gaps in pretraining coverage and limited robustness to intra-national variation.

</details>


### [307] [Scaling Agentic Capabilities via Grounded Interaction Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02001)
*Wenhang Shi,Jinhao Dong,Yiren Chen,Zhe Zhao,Shuqing Bian,Wei Lu,Xiaoyong Du*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GAIS是一个自动化框架，通过两阶段接地机制（协议锚定环境+结构引导规划）合成高质量智能体交互数据，在BFCL、τ²-Bench和ACEBench上超越SOTA，使基础模型性能匹配甚至超越官方指令微调版本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有依赖LLM合成智能体数据的方法存在退化问题：无约束生成导致对LLM内部先验的偏置随机采样，无法捕捉真实世界的多样性和难度，也无法构建高保真、长程任务。人工标注成本又过高。

Method: 两阶段接地机制：(1) 协议锚定环境——从真实MCP服务器派生环境，保证功能多样性和难度；(2) 结构引导规划——在环境中主动施加逻辑依赖和对抗策略，生成复杂任务。

Result: 在BFCL、τ²-Bench和ACEBench上显著超越SOTA基线；使基础模型匹配甚至超越官方指令微调版本；数据效率高，更少数据实现更强性能且持续增长，而基线停滞。

Conclusion: GAIS通过接地合成范式有效解决了智能体数据合成的退化问题，在数据效率、可扩展性和任务质量上均优于现有方法，为通用智能体智能的训练数据瓶颈提供了可行方案。

Abstract: General agentic intelligence hinges on the ability to interact with diverse real-world tools to complete complex tasks, a capability fundamentally tied to the quality of interaction data. To bypass the prohibitive costs of human annotation, prevailing paradigms depend entirely on Large Language Models (LLMs) to scale the synthesis of agentic environments and tasks. However, such unconstrained generation often degenerates into biased random sampling of LLMs' internal priors, failing to capture the diversity and difficulty of real-world domains or construct high-fidelity, long-horizon tasks. In this work, we introduce Grounded Agentic Interaction Synthesis (GAIS), a framework that automates the scalable construction of diverse environments and complex tasks via a two-phase grounding mechanism. Specifically, we construct protocol-anchored environments derived from real-world Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to ensure functional diversity and difficulty. Subsequently, we employ structure-guided planning to navigate these environments, actively enforcing logical dependencies and adversarial policies to generate complex tasks. Experiments on BFCL, $τ^2$-Bench, and ACEBench demonstrate that GAIS-synthesized data significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, enabling base models to match or even surpass their official instruction-tuned counterparts. Furthermore, GAIS exhibits superior data efficiency and scalability, achieving exceptional capabilities with significantly less data while maintaining continuous growth where baselines stagnate. Our code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/Eric8932/GAIS.

</details>


### [308] [Machine Learning for Coding Retail Product Names to Consumer-Price Categories: A Rule-plus-Bag-of-Words Pipeline with Reliability-Weighted Human-in-the-Loop Labeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02004)
*Vladimir Beskorovainyi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究将短文本、带噪声的商品描述自动映射到消费分类（如COICOP）的可复现方法，采用"前缀树规则预分类器+二元确认模型"两阶段流水线，实验表明词袋模型在该任务上已接近饱和（F1≈0.99），约67个标注样本即可满足需求，并讨论了标注协议和价格质量控制的经验教训。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 消费品价格测量越来越多地依赖扫描仪、网页抓取和交易/收据数据等替代数据源，但这些数据中的产品描述通常简短、有噪声且使用缩写，缺乏标准产品代码，因此需要先将每个商品映射到统一的消费分类体系（如UN COICOP）才能进行价格比较。现有方法缺乏通用性和可复现性。

Method: 提出两阶段流水线：(i) 文本归一化与分词；(ii) 基于前缀树（trie）的规则预分类器，使用各类别的关键词和停用词；(iii) 每类二元确认模型判断商品是否属于暂定类别。标注采用人机协同协议，注释者给出二元有效/拒绝判断，通过动态更新的可靠性权重聚合。实验采用受控、无泄漏设置，比较了词袋模型、MLP、n-gram特征等。

Result: 词袋模型在该任务上表现饱和（F1≈0.99），线性分类器与多层感知机性能相当，显式词序（n-gram）特征无增益，约67个标注样本即可满足需求。可靠性加权投票相比简单多数投票优势微弱（加性权重饱和），而Dawid-Skene方法恢复标签效果明显更好。

Conclusion: 该映射任务可被简单模型有效解决，对统计机构使用交易数据具有设计启示；同时指出了标注协议中不同聚合方法的性能差异。

Abstract: Consumer-price measurement increasingly draws on alternative data sources -- scanner, web-scraped, and transaction/receipt data. A recurring obstacle is that product descriptions in such sources are short, noisy, and abbreviated, with no standard product code, so each item must first be mapped to a consumption classification (e.g., the UN COICOP scheme) before prices can be compared. This paper studies that mapping as a general, reproducible method. The pipeline is: (i) text normalization and tokenization of noisy item names; (ii) a prefix-tree (trie) rule-based pre-classifier driven by per-category key-phrases and stop-phrases; and (iii) a per-category binary confirmation model deciding whether an item belongs to a tentatively assigned category. For labels at scale we use a human-in-the-loop protocol in which annotators give a binary valid/reject judgment, aggregated by a dynamically updated reliability weight; the model joins the same rule, enabling continual fine-tuning. Our empirical finding is deflationary: in a controlled, leakage-free study (one category, real positives vs. hard negatives, five seeds), bag-of-words models essentially saturate the task (F1 about 0.99) -- a linear classifier matches a multilayer perceptron, explicit word-order (n-gram) features add nothing, and about 67 labeled examples already suffice. A Monte-Carlo study of the labeling protocol shows the reliability-weighted vote barely beats plain majority (its additive weights saturate) while Dawid-Skene recovers labels markedly better. We also discuss price-level quality control and design lessons for statistical offices considering transaction data. All figures are illustrative; no confidential data, code, or documentation is reproduced.

</details>


### [309] [Automated Essay Scoring and Language Certification: Assessing Generalizability, Agreement and Validity for French](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02009)
*Rodrigo Wilkens,Rémi Cardon,Vincent Folny,Thomas François*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种增强版的基于论证的验证框架（ABV），用于自动作文评分（AES）的多维评估，包含公平性分析、 linguistic特征相关性、预测误差评估和与人类评分者的一致性比较。在法语AES任务中，对8种模型架构在27k篇考试作文（每篇2个评分者）和961篇通用作文（每篇至少9个评分者）上进行了实验，验证了该框架对理解AES模型能力与缺陷的有效性，并提升了法语AES的当前最优水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AES基准测试实践过于简化，与高 stakes语言测试场景下推荐的多维度评估框架（如ABV）存在差距，缺乏对模型公平性、语言特征相关性、预测误差及与人类评分者一致性等维度的综合评估。

Method: 在原始ABV框架基础上引入公平性分析、与语言特征的关联分析、预测误差评估以及与人类评分者的一致性检验；在27k篇考试作文（双评分者）和961篇通用作文（至少9评分者）的法语语料上，对比8种模型架构。

Result: 实验表明，应用ABV框架能够更全面地理解AES模型的能力与缺陷，同时推动了法语AES的最新技术水平。

Conclusion: 增强版ABV框架为AES系统提供了更全面、多维度的评估方式，有助于在高 stakes测试场景中更可靠地评估模型性能，并建议在未来AES评估中推广使用。

Abstract: In Automated Essay Scoring (AES), benchmarking practices have fostered minimalist evaluation practices, in contrast with the broader-view recommendations of evaluation frameworks, such as the argument-based validation framework (ABV), which argued in favor of a multidimensional assessment of systems, especially in the context of high-stakes language tests. In this paper, we introduce an enhanced and more practical version of the ABV framework, incorporating fairness analysis, correlations with linguistic features, prediction error evaluation, and model agreement compared with human raters. Applying this framework to French AES, we compare 8 model architectures on a corpus of 27k exam essays (2 raters each) and a generalization corpus of 961 essays (at least nine raters each). Our analyses illustrate the benefits of applying the ABV framework to better understand the capabilities and pitfalls of AES models, while also advancing the state-of-the-art for French AES.

</details>


### [310] [PlanarBench: Evaluating LLM Spatial Reasoning via Planar Graph Drawing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02010)
*Oleksandr Nikitin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PlanarBench是一个测试LLM是否能根据边列表将平面图绘制为ASCII艺术图的基准，包含91个模型和199个简单的非连通平面图。研究发现边数是决定难度的主要因素（r=-0.85），而此前只关注节点数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM图基准仅以节点数作为难度轴，忽略了边数对空间推理任务难度的影响。需要探索更准确的难度预测指标。

Method: 使用PlanarBench测试91个LLM在199个最简单的非同构连通平面图（2-7个顶点）上进行ASCII艺术绘制，分析边数与性能的相关性。

Result: 边数是主导难度预测因子（r=-0.85），这一发现是先前LLM图基准未报告的，因为它们只用节点数作为难度轴。

Conclusion: 在评估LLM的图推理能力时，应当将边数而非（或至少额外考虑）节点数作为难度指标，以获得更准确的评估。

Abstract: PlanarBench tests whether LLMs can draw planar graphs as ASCII art given only an edge list -- a spatial reasoning task that resists memorization because edge order, edge orientation, and node labels are all permutable.
  We evaluate 91 models on the 199 simplest non-isomorphic connected planar graphs (2 - 7 vertices).
  Edge count is the dominant difficulty predictor ($r = -0.85$) -- a finding not reported in prior LLM graph benchmarks, which use only node count as the difficulty axis.

</details>


### [311] [Unveiling the Entropy Dynamics of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02020)
*Ting Xu,Xu He,Yupu Lu,Jiankai Sun,Dong Li,Wai Lam,Jianye Hao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文揭示了Chain-of-Thought（CoT）推理中的熵动态存在两阶段结构：探索性的不确定性区域→收敛性的置信区域。置信区域具有高可靠性和高冗余性两个关键特性，据此提出基于CUSUM算法的无训练推理控制框架，在早期退出和测试时扩展任务中均取得更优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索CoT推理过程中的熵动态模式，识别其内在结构特征，并利用这些特征设计更高效、更可靠的推理策略。

Method: 将置信区域检测建模为序列变化点检测问题，首次将经典变化点检测方法（CUSUM算法）应用于CoT推理监控，构建无训练框架实现实时推理控制。基于置信区域的高可靠性和高冗余性，提出早期退出（Early Exit）和测试时扩展（Test-Time Scaling）两种策略。

Result: 早期退出任务中，CUSUM以11.1%的token缩减达到63.06%准确率，相比DEER和Dynasor分别高出3.28%和4.36%准确率；测试时扩展任务中，CUSUM加权投票一致优于自一致性方法。

Conclusion: CoT的熵动态存在明确的两阶段结构，基于CUSUM的变化点检测方法可有效识别置信区域，从而实现无需额外训练的高效推理控制，在准确率和计算效率之间建立了更优的帕累托前沿。

Abstract: This paper investigates the entropy dynamics of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and uncovers a consistent two-phase structure: an Uncertainty Region of exploration transitioning sharply to a Confidence Region of convergence. We demonstrate that the Confidence Region possesses two critical properties: 1) High Reliability -- answers in the confidence region become highly accurate and stable, and 2) High Redundancy -- models generate unnecessary tokens long after reaching the correct answer. These properties unlock more efficient and reliable inference strategies: 1) Early Exit leverages reliability and redundancy to terminate computation safely when returns diminish, and 2)Test-Time Scaling uses the Confidence Region signal to prioritize converged trajectories. To operationalize these insights, we formulate Confidence Region detection as a sequential change-point detection problem, being the first to apply classical change-point methods to monitor CoT reasoning. Using the Cumulative Sum (CUSUM) algorithm, a statistically optimal change-point detector, we develop a training-free framework for real-time inference control. Experiments show our approach establishes a superior Pareto-frontier for early exit. CUSUM achieves 63.06% accuracy with 11.1% token reduction, outperforming DEER and Dynasor by 3.28% and 4.36% in accuracy respectively. For test-time scaling, CUSUM-weighted voting consistently outperforms self-consistency.

</details>


### [312] [SentGuard: Sentence-Level Streaming Guardrails for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02041)
*Jiaqi Yu,Xin Wang,Yixu Wang,Jie Li,Yan Teng,Xingjun Ma,Yingchun Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SentGuard，一种句子级别的流式安全护栏，通过轻量级等待缓冲区将流式token分组为句子块，与目标LLM并行工作，在句子边界检测不安全内容。构建了StreamSafe基准数据集，采用粗到细的训练目标。实验显示SentGuard在5个安全基准上优于现有方法，能在两个句子内检测90.5%的不安全案例，流式假阳性率仅7.41%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全护栏存在两种极端：响应级方法需等待完整输出才能干预，延迟过高；token级方法基于不完整语义做出不稳定决策，导致过度防护调用。亟需一种在流式生成过程中能及时、准确检测不安全内容的中间方案。

Method: 1) 提出SentGuard句子级流式护栏，采用轻量级等待缓冲区将流式token分组为句子块，仅将验证通过的句子释放给用户；2) 构建StreamSafe基准数据集，包含8个危害类别、结构化逐句标注；3) 采用粗到细(coarse-to-fine)训练目标，在句子边界检测不安全意图。

Result: 在5个安全基准上，SentGuard优于现有基线方法：能在两个句子内检测90.5%的不安全案例，流式假阳性率仅7.41%。

Conclusion: 句子级别的流式护栏在延迟和准确性之间取得了有效平衡，能够及时检测新出现的不安全内容，同时保持较低的误报率。

Abstract: Large language models increasingly stream long, reasoning-intensive responses in real time, making when to moderate as critical as whether to moderate. Existing guardrails fall into two unsatisfactory extremes: response-level methods delay intervention until the full output is generated, whereas token-level methods act on incomplete semantics, often producing unstable decisions and excessive guard invocations. To address this challenge, we propose SentGuard, a sentence-level streaming guardrail that operates in parallel with generation. A lightweight waiting buffer groups streamed tokens into sentence chunks and releases only verified chunks to the user, introducing a small offset that enables SentGuard to assess the current prefix while the target LLM decodes subsequent content. To support this, we construct StreamSafe, a benchmark with structured per-sentence annotations across 8 harm categories, capturing the evolution of safety risks across both reasoning and response segments. We further train SentGuard with a coarse-to-fine objective to detect unsafe intent as soon as it emerges at sentence boundaries. Experiments on 5 safety benchmarks show that SentGuard outperforms existing baselines, detecting 90.5% of unsafe cases within two sentences while maintaining a low streaming false-positive rate of 7.41%.

</details>


### [313] [DFlare: Scaling Up Draft Capacity for Block Diffusion Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02091)
*Jiebin Zhang,Zhenghan Yu,Song Liu,Eugene J. Yu,Zheng Li,Dawei Zhu,Jiangshan Duo,Weimin Xiong,Yifan Song,Guanghua Yu,Jianchen Zhu,Sujian Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出LayerFusion方法，通过轻量级逐层融合机制，让每个草稿层关注目标模型宽泛层的可学习组合，突破DFlash的狭窄瓶颈，支持更深草稿架构，在Qwen3-4B/8B和GPT-OSS-20B上分别实现5.52x、5.46x和3.91x加速，较DFlash提升约11%、8%和5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DFlash方法约束所有草稿层共享单一融合表示（仅来自少量目标层），限制了逐层表达能力和草稿容量扩展。

Method: 提出LayerFusion：每个草稿层通过轻量级注意力机制关注自身可学习的目标层宽泛组合，为每层注入丰富的目标知识并提供独特输入，同时将训练数据从80万扩至240万样本。

Result: 在数学推理、代码生成、对话等6个基准上，Qwen3-4B加速5.52x，Qwen3-8B加速5.46x，GPT-OSS-20B加速3.91x，较DFlash分别提升约11%、8%和5%。

Conclusion: 通过逐层融合机制增强草稿模型表达能力，有效扩展草稿架构深度，显著提升块扩散推测解码的推理加速效果。

Abstract: Block diffusion speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by predicting all tokens within a block simultaneously for the target model to verify in parallel. Predicting an entire block at once requires a sufficiently capable draft model and effective utilization of the target model's internal knowledge. However, the state-of-the-art method DFlash constrains all draft layers to share a single fused representation derived from only a few target layers, limiting per-layer expressiveness and hindering further scaling of draft capacity. In this paper, we present \modelname, which flares out the narrow conditioning bottleneck of DFlash through a lightweight layer-wise fusion mechanism: each draft layer attends to its own learnable combination of a broad set of target layers at negligible overhead, simultaneously injecting richer target knowledge and providing every draft layer with a distinct input. This enhanced per-layer expressiveness enables scaling the draft model to deeper architectures with consistent gains. We further scale training data from 800K to 2.4M samples to fully exploit the enlarged capacity. On six benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, code generation, and conversation, \modelname attains average wall-clock speedups of 5.52x on Qwen3-4B, 5.46x on Qwen3-8B, and 3.91x on GPT-OSS-20B, improving over DFlash by roughly 11\%, 8\%, and 5\% respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tencent/AngelSlim.

</details>


### [314] [The Role of Ambiguity in Error Prediction via Uncertainty Quantification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02093)
*Ieva Raminta Staliūnaitė,James Bishop,Andreas Vlachos*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出通过解耦输入歧义与不确定性量化信号来改进大语言模型的错误预测，实验表明歧义信息能显著提升错误预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法在错误预测中混入了数据固有的偶然不确定性（如输入歧义），导致预测准确率受限，需要将歧义信号从UQ信号中分离以提升错误预测效果。

Method: 在问答任务中使用六种UQ指标，引入门控专家（Gated Experts）和选择性预测（Selective Prediction）方法，将金标准和预测的歧义标签整合到错误预测流程中。

Result: 歧义信息在不同模型族、训练/评估范式、数据集（包括声称无歧义的数据集）和偶然不确定性来源上均提升了错误预测得分，部分UQ指标在标准数据集上的PRR提升超过10个百分点。

Conclusion: 解耦输入歧义与UQ信号能有效改进LLM的错误预测能力，歧义信息对错误预测具有广泛且显著的增益。

Abstract: The task of Error Prediction, namely predicting whether a model output is correct, is commonly tackled with Uncertainty Quantification (UQ). However, while uncertainty metrics capture when models lack knowledge or capacity to make a prediction, they also reflect aleatoric uncertainty, which is inherent in the model input and context. This paper presents a method for improving error prediction for Large Language Models (LLMs), by disentangling input ambiguity from UQ signal. We conduct experiments on the task of Question Answering (QA) with six UQ metrics and show that UQ metrics are more predictive of errors on unambiguous instances than on questions with multiple plausible answers. We use Gated Experts and Selective Prediction to incorporate gold and predicted ambiguity labels into the error prediction pipeline. We find that ambiguity information improves error prediction scores across model families, training and evaluation paradigms, datasets (including allegedly unambiguous ones), and sources of aleatoric uncertainty, yielding improvements of over 10 points of PRR for individual UQ metrics on standard datasets.

</details>


### [315] [PortBERT: Navigating the Depths of Portuguese Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02100)
*Raphael Scheible-Schmitt,Henry He,Armando B. Mendes*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PortBERT，一个面向葡萄牙语的RoBERTa系列语言模型，在450+GB数据上从头训练，平衡性能与效率，在ExtraGLUE上表现竞争力，并公开模型权重与训练细节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 葡萄牙语NLP领域缺乏同时兼顾性能与训练/推理效率的语言模型，现有工作多关注规模或准确率，忽略了计算-性能权衡这一维度。

Method: 基于RoBERTa架构，使用byte-level BPE分词，在450+GB的mC4和OSCAR23（经CulturaX去重过滤）数据上，利用fairseq框架在GPU和TPU上稳定预训练，发布base和large两个版本。

Result: 在ExtraGLUE（翻译版GLUE和SuperGLUE）基准上，PortBERT base和large与现有单语和多语模型相比表现竞争力，匹配或超越已有方法。

Conclusion: PortBERT填补了葡萄牙语NLP中计算-性能权衡的研究空白，提供了高效的模型变体及训练/推理效率的实用洞察，开源模型和checkpoint以支持后续研究。

Abstract: Transformer models dominate modern NLP, but efficient, language-specific models remain scarce. In Portuguese, most focus on scale or accuracy, often neglecting training and deployment efficiency. In the present work, we introduce PortBERT, a family of RoBERTa-based language models for Portuguese, designed to balance performance and efficiency. Trained from scratch on over 450 GB of deduplicated and filtered mC4 and OSCAR23 from CulturaX using fairseq, PortBERT leverages byte-level BPE tokenization and stable pre-training routines across both GPU and TPU processors. We release two variants, PortBERT base and PortBERT large, and evaluate them on ExtraGLUE, a suite of translated GLUE and SuperGLUE tasks. Both models perform competitively, matching or surpassing existing monolingual and multilingual models. Beyond accuracy, we report training and inference times as well as fine-tuning throughput, providing practical insights into model efficiency. PortBERT thus complements prior work by addressing the underexplored dimension of compute-performance tradeoffs in Portuguese NLP. We release all models on Huggingface and provide fairseq checkpoints to support further research and applications.

</details>


### [316] [A Primer in Post-Training Reasoning Data: What We Know About How It Works](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02113)
*Yaoming Li,Guangxiang Zhao,Qilong Shi,Lin Sun,Xiangzheng Zhang,Tong Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文是首篇系统综述后训练推理数据的综述文章，整合了超过150项相关研究，围绕数据对象、效用、构建方法和扩展方式四个核心问题组织论述，为未来推理数据发布和后训练方案提供了归因框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 后训练已成为大型推理模型进步的主要驱动力，而推理数据是决定成功与否的关键变量。然而相关研究分散在数据集论文、强化学习方案、奖励模型研究、基准测试和前沿系统报告中，缺乏系统性整合，亟需一份统一综述来梳理该领域。

Method: 综述了超过150项关键公开研究和系统报告，提出以四个核心问题（数据对象是什么、数据的效用、构建方法、扩展方式）为组织框架，对后训练推理数据进行系统化分类和归纳。

Result: 提供了一个结构化的归因框架，将分散的后训练推理数据研究统一到四个核心维度下，明确了该领域的整体图景和关键研究方向。

Conclusion: 该综述为推理数据的发布和后训练方法设计提供了系统的归因框架，有助于推动后训练推理数据的标准化和后续研究的有序发展。

Abstract: Post-training has become a primary driver of recent progress in large reasoning models, and reasoning data are often the key variable determining whether this stage succeeds. Work on post-training reasoning data has grown rapidly, yet this literature remains scattered across dataset papers, reinforcement-learning recipes, reward-model studies, benchmarks, and frontier system reports. This paper is the first primer to synthesize over 150 key public studies and system reports on post-training reasoning data. We organize the field around four questions: what data objects exist, what makes them useful, how they are constructed, and how they scale. Together, this organization provides an attribution framework for future reasoning-data releases and post-training recipes.

</details>


### [317] [Multilingual Idioms in Sentences and Conversations Across High-, Medium-, and Low-Resource Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02147)
*Saeed Almheiri,Bilal Elbouardi,Salsabila Zahirah Pranida,Irina Nikishina,Ashwath Rao B,Parameswari Krishnamurthy,Muhammad Cendekia Airlangga,Rifo Ahmad Genadi,Nguyen Phan Gia Bao,Amir Hossein Yari,Hawau Olamide Toyin,Nurdaulet Mukhituly,Mena Attia,Besher Hassan,Ahmad Fathan Hidayatullah,Tatsuki Kuribayashi,Haonan Li,Suma Bhat,Fajri Koto*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出MIDI，一个覆盖3种高资源、3种中资源和12种低资源语言的多语习语数据集，包含句子级和对话级语境下的字面与比喻用法。评估表明现有模型在低资源语言上表现较差，字面义理解比比喻义更困难，对话语境能提升性能但无法消除差距，并通过控制实验揭示模型在记忆与推理上的局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 习语表达的字面义与比喻义切换对多语言NLP构成重大挑战，现有工作多聚焦高资源语言且仅在孤立问句层面评估，忽视了真实语篇中的习语理解问题。

Method: 构建MIDI数据集，由母语者筛选18种语言（3高/3中/12低资源）的习语，提供句子级和对话级两种上下文，涵盖字面与比喻阅读。在多种SOTA模型上进行benchmark评估，并通过隐藏表示干预与控制实验分离记忆与推理。

Result: 1）低资源语言习语理解性能显著下降；2）所有资源层级中，字面义理解均比比喻义更困难；3）对话上下文可提升性能但无法消除资源层级间的差距；4）模型存在记忆与推理上的根本局限。

Conclusion: 当前多语言模型在习语理解上仍存在显著不足，尤其低资源语言和字面义理解是主要瓶颈，对话语境只能部分缓解问题，模型依赖记忆而非真正推理。

Abstract: Idiomatic expressions pose a major challenge for multilingual NLP because their meanings shift between figurative and literal usage, often requiring context for accurate interpretation. Prior work has focused on high-resource languages typically evaluates isolated idiom-meaning questions, overlooking realistic discourse. We introduce MIDI, a multilingual idiom dataset spanning 3 high-, 3 medium-, and 12 low-resource languages, curated by native speakers. Unlike previous datasets, MIDI provides idioms embedded in both sentence-level and conversational contexts, capturing both literal and figurative readings. Benchmarking state-of-the-art models shows that idiom comprehension degrades in low-resource languages and that, in all resource tiers, literal interpretations are substantially harder than figurative ones. Conversational context improves performance but does not eliminate these disparities. Through controlled tests and interventions on hidden representations, we further separate memorization from reasoning, exposing core limitations of current models.

</details>


### [318] [On the Salience of Low-Probability Tokens for AI-Generated Text Detection: A Multiscale Uncertainty Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02158)
*Yikai Guo,Bin Wang,Xilai Fan,Wenjun Ke,Haoran Luo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Uncertainty方法，通过多尺度不确定性估计（局部低概率token平均对数概率 + 全局Rényi熵）改进AI文本检测，缓解模板占优和点估计脆弱问题，Uncertainty++通过条件独立采样进一步提升稳定性，在7个数据集和16个LLM上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有统计检测器存在两个关键局限：(i) 模板占优——人类和LLM共享的模板token会淹没判别信号；(ii) 脆弱的点估计——依赖单一概率分数容易受到对抗性操纵的不稳定影响。

Method: 提出Uncertainty，一个多尺度不确定性估计器：局部上，通过平均低概率token的对数概率来缓解模板占优；全局上，通过Rényi熵捕获低概率区域的分布形状来降低点估计脆弱性。进一步扩展为Uncertainty++，使用条件独立采样以获得更稳定的不确定性估计。

Result: 在7个数据集和16个LLM上的实验表明，该方法具有高有效性、强泛化能力和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 多尺度不确定性估计能有效解决统计检测器在模板占优和点估计脆弱方面的不足，提升AI文本检测的准确性和稳健性。

Abstract: AI-generated text increasingly blends with human writing, raising practical risks such as misinformation, academic misuse, and corpora contamination. While statistical detectors are appealing for efficiency and generalization, they suffer from two key limitations. (i) Boilerplate dominance, boilerplate tokens shared across human and LLM writing can overwhelm discriminative signals. (ii) Brittle point estimates, relying on a single probability score yields unstable decisions under adversarial manipulations. To address these issues, we propose Uncertainty, a multiscale uncertainty estimator that focuses on informative low-probability tokens, which more clearly expose distributional discrepancies. Locally, it alleviates boilerplate dominance by averaging the log-probabilities of low-probability tokens; globally, it reduces brittleness by capturing the distributional shape of this low-probability region via Rényi entropy. We further extend the detector to Uncertainty++ via conditional independent sampling, yielding a more stable uncertainty estimation. Experiments across seven datasets and sixteen LLMs demonstrate high effectiveness, generalization, and robustness. Our code is available at https://github.com/guoyikai2000/Uncertainty-AIGT.

</details>


### [319] [CRAFTQA: A Code-Driven Adaptive Framework for Complex Structured Data Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02170)
*Chengtao Gan,Zhiqiang Liu,Long Jin,Yushan Zhu,Lei Liang,Wen Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CRAFTQA提出了一种自适应代码驱动框架，通过CodeSTEP生成完整可执行Python代码序列、CRAFT动态生成自定义函数，突破了现有统一方法依赖预定义函数集的限制，在复杂结构化数据推理任务上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有统一结构化数据问答方法依赖预定义函数集，无法处理超出预定义操作范围的复杂推理任务，存在根本性局限。

Method: 提出CRAFTQA框架，包含两个核心模块：CodeSTEP（生成基于问题的逐步代码推理操作的完整可执行Python代码序列）和CRAFT（动态生成预定义函数集之外的自定义代码函数，与CodeSTEP无缝集成）。

Result: 在多个结构化数据集上的实验表明，CRAFTQA在复杂推理场景下相比现有统一方法取得了显著改进。

Conclusion: 通过代码驱动的自适应框架，CRAFTQA有效解决了统一结构化数据问答中预定义函数集受限的问题，显著增强了复杂推理的灵活性。

Abstract: Real-world scenarios involve massive heterogeneous structured data (e.g., tables, knowledge graphs), making effective reasoning over such diverse data increasingly important. Unified structured data question answering has emerged as a prominent research trend, aiming to answer natural language questions across different structured data types within a single framework. However, existing unified methods share a common limitation: they rely on a set of predefined functions, which restricts their ability to perform complex reasoning beyond these predefined operations. To overcome this fundamental limitation, we propose CRAFTQA, a novel adaptive code-driven framework comprising two core modules, CodeSTEP and CRAFT. The CodeSTEP module is a paradigm that generates a complete executable Python code sequence, which contains step-by-step code-based reasoning operations based on the question. The CRAFT module dynamically generates custom code functions for operations beyond the predefined function set, and seamlessly integrates with CodeSTEP to significantly enhance flexibility in handling complex reasoning. Comprehensive experiments on multiple structured datasets demonstrate that CRAFTQA achieves remarkable improvements in complex reasoning scenarios compared to existing unified methods.

</details>


### [320] [Cross-Environment Neural Reranking for Sample-Efficient Action Selection in Text-Based Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02204)
*Kan Shao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究能否用一个轻量级神经网络重排序器（DeBERTa-v3）在多个异构文本环境（ALFWorld、WebShop、ScienceWorld）中统一进行动作选择。联合训练+少数类上采样明显提升性能，三环境联合训练的平均净收益达+0.551，接近专用单环境模型；数据多样性比模型容量更重要；环境感知的LoRA路由+PCGrad虽有潜力但尚不稳定。将发布包含51,580条训练实例的三环境基准数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型智能体在文本基准上表现出色但推理成本过高，促使使用轻量级神经重排序器进行动作选择。现有方法通常为每个环境单独维护模型，成本高昂。研究目标是探索单一轻量模型能否在多个异构环境中同时进行有效的动作选择，从而消除按环境维护模型的负担。

Method: 使用DeBERTa-v3（184M-434M参数），在ALFWorld、WebShop、ScienceWorld三个环境上进行联合训练，采用少数类上采样（minority-class upsampling）处理类别不平衡。实验包括：单环境训练、两环境联合训练、三环境联合训练，以及环境感知的LoRA适配器路由结合PCGrad进行多任务学习。

Result: 两环境联合训练相比单环境ALFWorld显著提升（净收益+0.412），WebShop保持竞争力（+0.214 vs +0.249）。三环境联合训练在4个种子上的平均净收益为+0.551±0.024。仅用9.2%的目标域数据微调即可恢复93%的全数据性能。LoRA路由+PCGrad在种子42上达+0.611，但种子123坍缩至+0.263，均值+0.497±0.158，高方差不稳定。

Conclusion: 单一轻量级重排序器通过联合训练和少数类上采样可以在多个异构环境中实现接近专用模型的性能，数据多样性是主要驱动因素而非模型容量。环境感知的LoRA路由有潜力但尚不稳定。干净的划分和数据重平衡是联合训练的关键要素。

Abstract: Large language model agents achieve strong performance on text-based benchmarks but incur prohibitive inference costs, motivating the use of compact neural rerankers for action selection. We investigate whether a single lightweight model can perform action selection across multiple diverse environments, a capability that would eliminate per-environment model maintenance. Training DeBERTa-v3 (184M-434M parameters) jointly on ALFWorld, WebShop, and ScienceWorld with minority-class upsampling, we find that rebalanced two-environment joint training substantially improves over single-environment ALFWorld performance (net gain +0.412) while maintaining competitive WebShop performance (+0.214 vs. +0.249 single-environment). Three-environment training yields a mean combined net gain of +0.551 +/- 0.024 across 4 seeds, with per-environment results approaching specialized single-environment models while providing positive cross-domain transfer. Cross-environment adaptation is highly sample-efficient: fine-tuning on only 9.2% of target-domain data recovers 93% of full-data performance, and scaling model capacity yields limited benefits, indicating data diversity is the primary driver. Environment-aware LoRA adapter routing with PCGrad achieves a best-seed result of +0.611 (seed 42), with seeds 456 and 789 at +0.554 and +0.559, but exhibits high variance due to seed 123 collapsing to +0.263 (4-seed mean +0.497 +/- 0.158), representing a promising but currently unstable direction. Joint training with clean splits and data rebalancing is a key ingredient. We will release our three-environment benchmark of 51,580 training instances (41,740 raw unique states with minority-class upsampling) and all model checkpoints upon acceptance.

</details>


### [321] [Consistency Training while Mitigating Obfuscation via Rate Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02211)
*Sohaib Imran,Prakhar Gupta,Jannes Elstner,David Demitri Africa*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出速率匹配一致性训练（RMCT），通过匹配目标行为的发生率而非约束表达方式，解决了传统一致性训练导致模型隐藏（而非消除）外部特征影响的问题，在减少谄媚行为的同时保留模型提及偏见的可监控性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统一致性训练通过要求模型在有无外部特征（如用户偏好线索）的输入上表现一致来减少外部特征影响，但该方法约束了模型对特征的言语表达，导致模型学会隐藏（obfuscation）而非真正消除偏见的内部影响，损害了可监控性。

Method: RMCT不要求配对输入（有无外部特征），而是匹配模型在扰动输入上表现目标行为（如跟随偏见线索）的速率，从而仅约束行为发生率而不约束行为如何表达。该方法可扩展至无法移除外部特征的场景。

Result: 在开源语言模型上，RMCT在减少偏见的跟随行为上与基线方法相当，同时更好保留了模型提及偏见线索的能力。RMCT在数据效率上更优，但计算效率较低。

Conclusion: RMCT表明一致性训练可以在不牺牲可监控性的情况下提升行为鲁棒性。

Abstract: Large language models are often influenced by extraneous input features, such as cues revealing a user's preferred answer. Consistency training reduces this influence by training models to behave similarly across inputs with and without the extraneous feature. However, existing methods train for consistency over entire responses or internal activations, which also constrains whether the model verbalises said extraneous features. We show this leads to obfuscation, where the model learns not to mention a cue while remaining influenced by it, which may undermine monitorability. To address this, we introduce Rate Matching Consistency Training (RMCT), which trains for consistency over selected behavioural properties without constraining how this behaviour is expressed. RMCT matches the rate at which the model exhibits a target behaviour (e.g., following a bias cue) across input perturbations, rather than requiring paired inputs with and without the extraneous feature, extending consistency training to settings where the extraneous features cannot be removed. We evaluate RMCT on sycophancy reduction in two open-weight language models, achieving reductions in bias-following comparable to a standard consistency-training baseline on held-out bias types, while largely preserving the model's tendency to verbalise the bias cue. Further, we find that RMCT is more data-efficient at the expense of being less compute-efficient in our experiments. Overall, RMCT shows that consistency training can improve behavioural robustness without directly trading off against monitorability.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [322] [Position Paper: Post-Solve Robustness in Decision Engines: Feasible Regions and Smoothness Under Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00002)
*Yi-Xiang Hu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出混合整数线性规划（MILP）决策引擎输出的名义最优解在实际部署中常因微小扰动而失效，提出在求解后增加一个鲁棒性审计层，用于评估解在参数扰动下保持可行性和近最优性的能力，并定义了ε-近最优可行邻域和解平滑度两个核心概念，综合了敏感性分析、鲁棒优化、邻域搜索、对抗测试和基于学习的增强方法，最后呼吁将鲁棒性作为决策引擎的一等输出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际部署中MILP求解器输出的名义最优解常因成本、需求或资源可用性等微小扰动而失效，导致不可行或解发生不连续跳变，而现有优化流程缺乏对解后鲁棒性的系统评估。

Method: 提出一个求解后鲁棒性审计层，定义ε-近最优可行邻域（参数空间中的鲁棒区域）和解平滑度（决策空间中组合编辑下的竞争力），并综合敏感性分析、稳定分析、鲁棒优化、邻域搜索、对抗测试及学习增强方法的已有成果，构建统一的审计框架。

Result: 提出了四个具体方向：围绕当前解的认证内部近似、带校准不确定性的概率鲁棒性估计、对抗鲁棒性边界、以及基于学习的预测和解释与求解器验证对齐。

Conclusion: 提出一个简洁的报告模板和评估协议，倡导将鲁棒性作为决策引擎的一等输出，填补当前优化流程中缺少的鲁棒性评估维度。

Abstract: Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) decision engines routinely output nominally optimal plans for high-stakes industrial systems. Yet deployment rarely matches solve-time assumptions: small perturbations in costs, demands, or resource availability can invalidate feasibility or trigger discontinuous shifts to qualitatively different solutions. We argue that this post-solve robustness gap is a missing layer in today's optimization pipelines and a missing evaluation dimension for learning-enabled decision systems. Rather than replacing robust optimization or stochastic programming, the proposed layer audits a solved incumbent and returns solver-backed evidence about how far that solution can be trusted. We formalize two central objects: (i) an $ε$-near-optimal feasible neighborhood in parameter space, capturing when an incumbent remains feasible and near-optimal under perturbations, and (ii) solution smoothness in decision space, capturing whether nearby alternatives with small combinatorial edits remain competitive. We then synthesize the most relevant partial answers from sensitivity and stability analysis, robust optimization, neighborhood search, adversarial testing, and learning-based enhancements, and articulate an agenda for a unified post-solve robustness layer. Concretely, we call for certified inner approximations around the incumbent, probabilistic robustness estimation with calibrated uncertainty, adversarial robustness margins, and learning-based prediction and explanation aligned with solver-backed verification. We conclude with a compact reporting template and evaluation protocol that would make robustness a first-class output of decision engines.

</details>


### [323] [Emergent Collaborative Deliberation in Multi-Model AI Systems: A BFT-Derived Protocol for Epistemic Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00005)
*VD Doske*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Consilium协议是一种基于拜占庭容错的架构，通过为语言模型分配认知角色并引入样本内/样本外验证框架，实现结构化多模型AI deliberation。实验表明：认知角色而非底层模型决定认知行为（0.0002美元的开源模型与10.69美元的顶尖模型输出质量相当）；RLHF对齐训练导致领域特定认知盲点；协议本身无方向性偏差；样本外证据检索发现239个经完全验证的声明和167个盲点。全成本217美元。协议以MIT许可证开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI deliberation方法将模型间分歧视为错误或噪声，缺乏将分歧作为认知信号进行结构化利用的框架；同时RLHF对齐训练可能导致模型产生系统性认知盲点，需要一种独立于具体模型的方法来评估和缓解此类偏差。

Method: 基于拜占庭容错（BFT）的Consilium协议，包含：(1) 为模型分配工程化认知角色（区分模型能力与推理方式）；(2) 借鉴量化金融的样本内/样本外验证框架，区分训练数据共识与经验结论；(3) 跨1,478轮deliberation、32个主题、10个领域类别进行系统评估。

Result: (1) 认知角色决定认知行为，而非底层模型：0.0002美元/批次的边缘模型与10.69美元/批次的顶尖模型分析质量相当；(2) RLHF训练导致领域特定盲点：争议政策主题的对抗性挑战比科学共识主题低12.3个百分点，AI安全主题呈现不对称偏差（Δ=11.6%）；(3) 协议自身无方向性偏差（移民Δ=2.3%，可再生能源Δ=1.2%）；(4) 样本外证据检索验证239个声明（100%证据检索），发现167个训练数据不可见的盲点。运行间可重复性标准差±2.2%。

Conclusion: Consilium协议通过将模型间分歧视为认知信号而非错误，提供了一种低成本的、模型无关的结构化AI deliberation方法。该方法能有效揭示RLHF对齐训练导致的系统性认知盲点，且自身无方向性偏差。开源协议的发布使得独立验证成为可能。

Abstract: We present the Consilium Protocol, a Byzantine Fault Tolerance-derived architecture for structured multi-model AI deliberation that treats inter-model disagreement as epistemic signal rather than error. The protocol assigns engineered cognitive personas to language models -- separating what a model is from how it reasons -- and introduces an In-Sample/Out-of-Sample validation framework adapted from quantitative finance to distinguish training-data consensus from empirically grounded conclusions. Across 1,478 deliberation sessions spanning 32 topics in 10 domain categories, we demonstrate that (1) the cognitive persona, not the underlying model, determines epistemic behavior: free edge-inference models costing 0.0002 USD per batch produced comparable analytical output to frontier models costing 10.69 USD; (2) RLHF alignment training creates measurable, domain-specific epistemic blind spots -- contested policy topics exhibit 12.3 percentage points less adversarial challenge than settled science topics, and AI safety topics show asymmetric bias ($Δ$=11.6%) where models challenge claims that AI is dangerous far more vigorously than claims that AI risk is overstated; (3) the protocol exhibits no directional bias of its own (immigration $Δ$=2.3%, renewables $Δ$=1.2%); and (4) out-of-sample evidence retrieval validated 239 claims with 100% evidence retrieval and surfaced 167 blind-spot discoveries invisible to training-data deliberation. Run-to-run reproducibility across randomized model$\times$persona assignments averages $\pm$2.2% standard deviation. Total cost for the complete battery including all overhead: 217 USD. We release the protocol specification under MIT license to enable independent verification.

</details>


### [324] [Deliberative Curation: A Protocol for Multi-Agent Knowledge Bases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00007)
*Steven Johnson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对AI代理的 deliberative curation protocol，结合生命周期管理、声誉加权投票和分级制裁，在对抗场景下显著优于多数投票机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI代理从孤立工具转向协作知识生态系统时，人类平台治理机制（威慑制裁、独立性假设、协商共识）因代理无状态性、模型同质性和谄媚行为而失效，亟需新的集体知识策展治理协议。

Method: 提出三层治理协议：(1) 知识制品生命周期标记转换系统；(2) 声誉加权 deliberative 投票（Beta声誉+EigenTrust放大）；(3) 针对无状态代理的分级制裁（区分故障与对抗行为）。通过100代理、7种行为原型、2种对抗场景的基于智能体的仿真评估。

Result: 良性条件下精度略有牺牲，但对抗条件下显著优于多数投票：中等对抗0.826 vs 0.791（p<0.001），高压对抗0.807 vs 0.740（p<0.001），退化速度约为多数投票的1/3。消融分析显示commit-reveal投票隐藏是最关键组件（精度提升8.2-8.6pp，p<0.001）。分级制裁在仿真中未被触发，仍缺乏实证验证。

Conclusion: 该协议在对抗环境下具有显著韧性优势，但分级制裁机制有待进一步实证验证，良性场景下的精度-韧性权衡需根据应用场景调整。
