In highly non-linear scenarios, S3TS significantly outperforms baseline methods, achieving cost reductions of up to 51% and 5.4% compared to a myopic algorithm and deterministic MCTS, respectively.

</details>


### [468] [An Abstract Worlds Semantic Framework for Belief Change Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02163)
*Daniel Grimaldi,M. Vanina Martinez,Ricardo O. Rodriguez*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种称为抽象世界语义学(AWS)的集合论信念变化框架，将世界视为原始元素，定义世界收缩和世界修正算子，统一了经典和非优先信念变化模型，并在经典命题逻辑下为AGM、KM和多重变化模型提供了同质化解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有信念变化理论依赖于逻辑语法，不同模型（AGM、KM、多重变化）之间缺乏统一的语义基础，难以进行系统化比较和统一分析。

Method: 借鉴Grove的成果，提出以世界为原始元素的集合论语义框架，定义世界收缩和世界修正算子，构造通用算子统一经典和非优先信念变化建构。

Result: 在经典命题逻辑下，该框架为AGM、KM和多重变化模型提供了统一的同质化解释；AWS系统化了信念变化框架和算子，简化并推广了基于信念集的信念变化理论。

Conclusion: 抽象世界语义学(AWS)通过去语法化的语义视角，成功统一了多种信念变化模型，为信念变化理论提供了更简洁、更通用的理论框架。

Abstract: This article proposes a set-theoretic framework for belief change, called Abstract Worlds Semantics, in which no logical syntax is assumed. Inspired by Grove's (1988) results, our approach treats worlds as primitive elements, over which world contraction and world revision operators are defined. This semantic framework enables a unified analysis of belief change models. Within this framework, we unify classical and non-prioritized belief change constructions by defining versatile operators. When classical propositional logic is considered, our framework provides a homogeneous account of AGM, KM, and Multiple Change models. In summary, AWS systematizes belief change frameworks and operators, simplifying and generalizing belief change theory over belief sets.

</details>


### [469] [From Capability Models to Automated Planning: An AAS-Native Approach for Automatic PDDL Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02167)
*Hamied Nabizada,Thomas Wirt,Luis Miguel Vieira da Silva,Felix Gehlhoff,Alexander Fay*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种方法，利用资产管理壳（AAS）能力模型自动生成完整的PDDL规划问题，使生产工程师无需掌握PDDL专业知识即可验证生产布局是否支持所需生产序列。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生产工程师需要验证布局是否支持所有生产序列，但使用PDDL进行自动化规划需要专业经验，而工程师通常缺乏这些知识。

Method: 基于AAS能力模型，结合VDI 3682、IEC 61360-1、IDTA 02011和IDTA 02016四个工业4.0标准，从资源功能的领域级描述（能力）中提取所有规划元素，自动生成PDDL问题，无需引入特定于PDDL的子模型。

Result: 在实验室生产系统的AAS模型上进行了验证，通过比较四种布局变体的最优规划，展示了工程师如何通过修改AAS模型并重新生成规划域来系统性地探索设计权衡。

Conclusion: 该方法有效弥合了工业4.0数字孪生与自动化规划之间的鸿沟，使生产工程师能够在熟悉的AAS框架内完成布局验证，无需学习PDDL语法。

Abstract: Engineers designing production systems need to verify that a given layout supports all required production sequences. Automated planning techniques can answer such questions, but formulating the required planning problems in the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) demands specialized expertise that production engineers typically lack. Asset Administration Shells (AAS) have emerged as the standardized Digital Twin for industrial assets in Industry 4.0. We show that AAS capability models, structured using four established Industry 4.0 standards (VDI 3682 for process descriptions, IEC 61360-1 for semantic property qualification, IDTA 02011 for type hierarchies, and IDTA 02016 for instance descriptions), contain sufficient information to generate complete PDDL problems automatically. Unlike prior work that introduced PDDL-specific submodels, our approach derives all planning elements from domain-level descriptions of resource functions, so-called capabilities, allowing engineers to model capabilities without any exposure to PDDL syntax or planning concepts. Our extraction algorithm transforms distributed Multi-AAS architectures into complete PDDL planning problems. We validate the approach on AAS models of a laboratory production system, comparing four layout variants using optimal planning to demonstrate how engineers can systematically explore design trade-offs by modifying the AAS model and regenerating the planning domain

</details>


### [470] [CEON: Circular Economy Ontology Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02253)
*Huanyu Li,Els de Vleeschauwer,Robin Keskisärkkä,Mikael Lindecrantz,Mina Abd Nikooie Pour,Ying Li,Ben De Meester,Patrick Lambrix,Eva Blomqvist*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了循环经济本体网络（CEON），旨在通过跨行业语义互操作实现资源循环利用，并在建筑、电子和纺织领域验证了其数据文档化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现资源循环利用需要跨行业、跨产品生命周期的信息共享与通信，但循环经济领域的知识表示面临跨行业语义互操作挑战，现有方法难以填补这一空白。

Method: 在Onto-DESIDE项目中开发了循环经济本体网络（CEON），定义跨行业核心概念，支持语义感知的数据文档化。

Result: 通过建筑、电子和纺织三个行业的跨行业数据文档化场景，验证了CEON的有效性。

Conclusion: CEON能够填补循环经济领域跨行业概念定义的空白，实现语义互操作，为提升资源循环利用的信息共享提供基础支撑。

Abstract: Increasing the circularity of resource use in our society has been recognized as a path to sustainability, i.e., transitioning into a more circular economy. There are many different circular strategies to do so, such as reusing products and components, refurbishing and remanufacturing used products, or recycling left-over or used materials. To enable these strategies, it is necessary to share information at the infrastructure level and to communicate between industry sectors along the product life cycle. Enabling semantic interoperability in this information sharing and communication is therefore a key to increasing circularity. However, knowledge representation for the circular economy (CE) domain, which involves many relevant industry sectors related to product life cycles, remains challenging. To bridge this gap, we developed the Circular Economy Ontology Network (CEON) within the Onto-DESIDE project. This ontology network aims to fill gaps in CE by defining cross-sectorial concepts and to enable semantics-aware data documentation. We demonstrate CEON through cross-industry data documentation scenarios spanning construction, electronics, and textile sectors.

</details>


### [471] [POIROT: Interrogating Agents for Failure Detection in Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02282)
*Iñaki Dellibarda Varela,R. Sendra-Arranz,Pablo Romero-Sorozabal,J. M. Valverde-García,Annemarie F. Laudanski,Álvaro Gutiérrez,Eduardo Rocon,Manuel Cebrian*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: POIROT是一种利用多智能体系统自身智能体的认知多样性进行故障诊断的协议，在安全关键场景中优于单LLM评估基线，且效果随问题复杂性、智能体数量和故障维度增加而提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM-MAS评估范式依赖集中式评判，存在单点故障且需要领域专业知识，在安全关键领域部署面临法律和监管挑战，亟需可扩展的故障诊断方法。

Method: 提出POIROT协议，复用系统自身智能体作为诊断层，利用架构中已有的认知多样性进行故障归因分析。

Result: POIROT在所有评估设置中优于单LLM评估基线，优势随问题复杂性（OR=1.60, p=0.008）、智能体数量和故障维度增加而扩大，在复合故障条件下依然稳健。

Conclusion: 安全监督不必外部化：执行角色的智能体拥有足够的集体智能来进行自我审计。开源发布POIROT库及BLAME基准。

Abstract: Orchestrating Large Language Models into Multi-Agent Systems (LLM-MAS) has unlocked remarkable reasoning capabilities, yet emergent failures and hallucinations that resist characterisation block their deployment in safety-critical domains -- a gap made legally untenable by emerging AI regulation. Existing evaluation paradigms share a common flaw: centralised judgment creates single points of failure and demands domain-specific expertise. Here we present POIROT, a protocol that repurposes a system's own agents as its diagnostic layer, leveraging the epistemic diversity already present in the architecture. Across evaluated settings, POIROT outperforms single-LLM evaluator baselines, with gains that scale with problem complexity (OR = 1.60, $p = 0.008$), agent count, and fault dimensionality, persisting under compound fault conditions. These results demonstrate that safety oversight need not be externalised: the agents executing a role carry sufficient collective intelligence to audit it. We release POIROT as an open-source library alongside BLAME, a benchmark for fault attribution in safety-critical multi-agent systems.

</details>


### [472] [Repair Before Veto: Repair-Augmented Constraint Learning for Contextual Decisions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02326)
*Yifan Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出修复增强约束学习（RACL），将已知修复操作提升为分类器语义的一部分，实现"先修复再否决"的决策框架，显著降低误否决率并严格泛化传统无修复约束学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统硬约束学习将违反约束的候选直接否决，修复操作被排除在决策语义之外，无法利用系统已知的有限修改选项（如添加票务选项、更改配置等）。现有方法未学习是否应先修复再否决。

Method: 提出RACL框架，将已知修复操作符提升到分类器语义中：当存在可负担的修复使候选可行且足够偏好时接受候选；否则返回结构化否决信用及修复计划。该框架严格泛化无修复的HASSLE风格语义。

Result: 在DB1B数据集最难的原始数据层面，验证集选择的RACL将误否决降至10/4039（FVR 0.0025），而最强修复搜索黑箱基线约为1064/4039，同时显式展示了FVR/EDR权衡。

Conclusion: RACL揭示了终端否决规则的不可约误否决间隙，将二元标签不可识别性与决策规则可学习性分离，并在观察可行性共享权重设定下给出了容量和校准界限。

Abstract: Hard constraints are usually treated as terminal vetoes: once a candidate violates a requirement, the learned rule rejects it and any repair is handled outside the decision semantics. This misses a common deployed regime in which the system already knows a finite menu of modifications, such as adding a ticket option, changing a configuration, or requesting an available service upgrade. Existing constraint-learning, soft-relaxation, and recourse methods address nearby problems, but they do not learn whether an option should be repaired before being vetoed. We introduce Repair-Augmented Constraint Learning (RACL), a contextual decision framework that lifts known repair operators into the classifier semantics. A candidate is accepted when an affordable repair makes it feasible and preferred enough; otherwise the system returns a structured rejection credit and, when applicable, a repair plan. This repair-before-veto view strictly generalizes no-repair HASSLE-style semantics, reveals an irreducible false-veto gap for terminal-veto rules, separates binary-label non-identifiability from decision-rule learnability, and gives capacity and calibration bounds for the observed-feasibility shared-weight setting. Across controlled and DB1B-derived benchmarks, RACL recovers the intended credit and repair structure. On the hardest raw-data-derived tier, validation-selected RACL reduces false vetoes to 10/4039 (FVR 0.0025), versus about 1064/4039 for the strongest repair-search black-box baseline, while making the FVR/EDR trade-off explicit.

</details>


### [473] [Forget Attention: Importance-Aware Attention Is All You Need](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02332)
*Soohyeong Shin,Yeongwook Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出SISA（SSM通知的Softmax注意力）方法，通过在注意力分数内部直接加入SSM推导的重要性项，实现分数级别的SSM-注意力融合，用一个SDPA调用即可完成，无需循环状态或自定义内核。在152M参数规模下，LAMBADA-greedy达到17.3%，NIAH检索从第1000步起保持100%准确率，比Transformer快7倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合语言模型（如Jamba的块级别和Hymba的头级别）将注意力和SSM放在独立单元中，二者在注意力计算过程中无法相互影响。需要一种更细粒度的融合方式，既能发挥注意力的全局检索能力，又能利用SSM的顺序重要性信号。

Method: 将SSM推导的重要性项直接加入注意力分数（softmax之前的点积），通过对query和key向量进行增广处理，将完整运算转化为单个SDPA调用，无需循环状态或自定义CUDA内核。

Result: 152M/5B tokens：LAMBADA-greedy 17.3%（Transformer 13.9，Mamba-3 15.5）；NIAH从第1000步起100%准确率，比Transformer的检索收敛快7倍。369M规模：Mamba-3在LAMBADA领先，SISA保持完美NIAH和标准SDPA执行。

Conclusion: SISA定义了SSM-注意力混合的第三个设计轴——分数级别融合，超越了已有的块级别和头级别范式。

Abstract: Combining attention's global retrieval with the sequential importance signal of state space models (SSMs) is the open challenge of hybrid language modeling. Transformers see everywhere but cannot prioritize; SSMs know what matters but cannot revisit. Existing hybrids -- Jamba (block level) and Hymba (head level) -- place the two in separate compartments, so neither informs the other during the attention computation itself. We propose SISA (SSM-Informed Softmax Attention), which adds an SSM-derived importance term directly inside the attention score and realizes the full operation as a single SDPA call on augmented query/key vectors -- no recurrent state, no custom kernel. At 152M / 5B tokens, SISA reaches LAMBADA-greedy 17.3% (vs. Transformer 13.9 and Mamba-3 15.5) and attains NIAH 100% from step 1K, 7x faster than Transformer's retrieval convergence; at 369M, Mamba-3 leads LAMBADA while SISA preserves perfect NIAH and stock-SDPA execution. SISA thus defines a third design axis for SSM-attention hybrids -- score-level fusion -- beyond the block-level and head-level paradigms that have dominated the field.

</details>


### [474] [Coordination Graphs for Constrained Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02337)
*Santiago Amaya-Corredor,Miguel Calvo-Fullana,Anders Jonsson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出CG-CMARL框架，通过协调图与拉格朗日对偶结合，将CMARL问题分解为成对子问题，使得学习模型数量与智能体数量无关，并通过Max-Sum消息传递和拉格朗日乘子实现无需重训的帕累托前沿追踪。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CMARL面临两个交织的挑战：联合动作空间随智能体数量指数增长，且约束条件以奖励结构无法捕捉的方式耦合多个智能体。现有方法难以同时解决规模扩展性和约束耦合问题。

Method: 1) 使用协调图将联合问题分解为成对区域；2) 每个区域维护一组共享Q函数（主目标和每个约束各一个）；3) 执行时通过Max-Sum消息传递协调动作；4) 拉格朗日乘子控制目标-约束权衡，单模型可追踪帕累托前沿。

Result: 在合作导航任务（最多10个智能体）中，该方法产生的帕累托前沿优于固定奖励塑形比率的基线方法，且能扩展到集中式方法不可行的大规模团队。

Conclusion: CG-CMARL有效应对了CMARL的规模和耦合挑战，提供了收敛保证和可分解的组合误差界，各误差来源可追溯至特定设计选择并可独立控制。

Abstract: Constrained Multi-agent reinforcement learning (CMARL) faces two intertwined challenges: the joint action space grows exponentially with the number of agents, and additional requirements couple agents in ways that reward structure alone does not capture. We introduce Coordination Graphs for Constrained Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (CG-CMARL), a framework that addresses both challenges by combining coordination graphs with Lagrangian duality. The system decomposes the joint problem into pairwise regions, each served by a set of shared Q-functions, one for the primary objective and one for each of the constraints, so that the number of learned models is independent of the number of agents. At execution time, Max-Sum message passing coordinates actions across the factor graph, while a Lagrangian multiplier controls the objective--constraint tradeoff, allowing a single trained model to trace a Pareto front without retraining. We provide convergence guarantees under mild conditions, together with a compositional error bound that decomposes into separate interpretable sources, each traceable to a specific design choice and independently controllable. Experiments on cooperative navigation tasks (where teams of up to 10 agents must coordinate to reach target positions while satisfying pairwise constraints) show that our method produces Pareto fronts dominating established baselines trained at fixed reward-shaping ratios, while scaling to team sizes where centralized approaches become intractable.

</details>


### [475] [SIRI: Self-Internalizing Reinforcement Learning with Intrinsic Skills for LLM Agent Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02355)
*Zhongyu He,Yuanfan Li,Fei Huang,Tianyu Chen,Siyuan Chen,Xingyang Li,Meng Hsuan Yu,Xiangrong Liu,Leyi Wei,Lu Pan,Ke Zeng,Xunliang Cai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SIRI提出了一种三阶段框架，让LLM智能体通过自我内化技能来提升长程任务表现，无需外部技能生成器或推理时技能库，在ALFWorld和WebShop上取得了超越多种基线方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于技能的方法依赖外部技能生成器（训练时）或持久技能检索（推理时），增加了工程复杂度、上下文长度和部署延迟。为克服这些限制，作者希望设计一种能让智能体自主发现、验证并内化技能的方法。

Method: SIRI包含三个阶段：1) 使用GiGPO预热策略，获得基本交互能力并收集无技能轨迹；2) 自我技能挖掘：当前策略从自身成功的无技能轨迹中总结紧凑技能，并通过配对的有技能/无技能轨迹进行验证；3) 技能内化：利用轨迹级效用和动作级优势，只将有价值的技能引导动作蒸馏到无技能策略中。推理时仅使用原始提示。

Result: 在ALFWorld上，SIRI将GiGPO从0.908提升至0.930；在WebShop上，从0.728提升至0.813，优于基于提示、RL和记忆增强的基线方法。自我挖掘策略达到了与闭源大模型蒸馏相当的性能。

Conclusion: SIRI证明了通过自我内化技能，LLM智能体可以在不增加推理时外部依赖的情况下显著提升长程任务性能，为构建更自主、高效的智能体提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Long-horizon LLM agents can benefit from reusable skills, yet existing skill-based methods often rely on external skill generators during training or persistent skill retrieval at inference, increasing engineering complexity, context length, and deployment latency. We propose Self-Internalizing Reinforcement learning with Intrinsic skills (SIRI), a three-phase framework that enables agents to discover, validate, and internalize skills without external skill generators or inference-time skill banks. SIRI first warms up the policy with GiGPO to acquire basic interaction ability and collect successful skill-free trajectories. It then performs self-skill mining, where the current policy summarizes compact skills from its own successful plain rollouts and validates them through paired skill-augmented and skill-free rollouts. Finally, SIRI distills only beneficial skill-guided action tokens into the plain policy using trajectory-level utility and action-level advantage. At inference, the agent runs with the original prompt only. On ALFWorld and WebShop with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, SIRI improves GiGPO from 0.908 to 0.930 on ALFWorld and from 0.728 to 0.813 on WebShop, outperforming prompt-based, RL-based, and memory-augmented baselines. Further analysis shows that our self-mining strategy can achieve performance comparable to distillation with closed-source large model. Our code is available at https://github.com/kirito618/SIRI.

</details>


### [476] [MOC: Multi-Order Communication in LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02359)
*Yao Guan,Lin Wang,Zhihu Lu,Ziyi Wang,Wenzhu Yan,Qiang Duan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出多阶通信（MOC）方案，通过重构智能体间通信以捕获多跳依赖关系，并采用结构消息整合策略提升语义保真度，在多个数据集和不同规模LLM骨干上显著提升任务性能并降低通信成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统主要关注协调拓扑优化，而忽略了智能体间消息的有效传输与优化问题。当前通信方案通常直接拼接一阶邻居响应，导致证据感受野受限，关键信息在多跳路径中被稀释。

Method: 提出多阶通信（MOC）方案：(1) 重构通信机制以构建结构化多阶证据流，捕获多跳依赖关系；(2) 设计语义-拓扑融合算法（Semantic-Topological Merging），在token约束下优化语义保真度。

Result: 在六个不同数据集和不同参数规模的LLM骨干上，MOC一致提升了任务性能并降低了通信成本。

Conclusion: MOC方案有效解决了多智能体系统中消息传输的关键问题，通过多阶通信和结构化整合策略，在提升性能的同时降低了通信开销。

Abstract: Despite the remarkable progress of Large Language Model (LLM) based Multi-Agent Systems, most research focuses on optimizing coordination topology while largely underexploring the equally critical problem: how to transmit and optimize messages among agents effectively? Current communication schemes typically rely on the direct concatenation of first-order neighbor responses, which induces a restricted evidence receptive field and leads to the dilution of crucial insights over multi-hop paths. To address these limitations, we propose the Multi-Order Communication (MOC) scheme, which reconstructs the inter-agent communication to capture multi-hop dependencies and incorporates a structural message consolidation strategy to ensure efficiency. Specifically, we formalize the communication mechanism to construct a structured multi-order evidence stream, and subsequently design a Semantic-Topological Merging algorithm to optimize semantic fidelity within token constraints. Extensive experiments across six diverse datasets and LLM backbones of varying parameter scales demonstrate that MOC consistently improves task performance and reduces communication costs. The code is available at https://github.com/yao-guan/MOC.

</details>


### [477] [COMAP: Co-Evolving World Models and Agent Policies for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02372)
*Youwei Liu,Jian Wang,Hanlin Wang,Wenjie Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出COMAP框架，通过闭环交互协同进化文本世界模型和智能体策略，使世界模型能动态适应智能体不断变化的交互分布，从而提升智能体在长期决策任务中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本世界模型在训练后固定不变，无法适应由进化中的智能体导致的策略内状态-动作分布变化；而智能体改进方法通常依赖外部奖励或验证器，限制了其在真实交互环境中的适用性。

Method: COMAP框架在每个决策步骤中：（1）世界模型预测候选动作的未来状态反馈；（2）智能体通过估计反馈的可靠性进行未来感知反思并优化动作；（3）利用产生的策略内轨迹通过自蒸馏更新世界模型，使其更好地匹配智能体不断演化的交互分布。

Result: 在具身任务规划、网页导航和工具使用基准测试中，COMAP持续优于竞争基线（如使用Qwen3-4B时相对提升16.75%）。协同进化循环随时间推移提高了世界模型的预测准确性，并带来更有效的长期决策。

Conclusion: 通过闭环协同进化机制，世界模型和智能体策略能够相互促进、动态适应，有效解决了传统固定世界模型与进化中智能体之间的分布不匹配问题，为交互式环境中的智能体学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Equipping language agents with world models enables them to anticipate environment dynamics and evaluate candidate actions before execution. However, existing textual world models are typically fixed after training, preventing them from adapting to the on-policy state-action distributions induced by an evolving agent. Meanwhile, agent-improvement methods often rely on external rewards or verifiers, limiting their applicability in realistic interactive environments. In this paper, we propose COMAP, a novel framework that co-evolves textual world models and agent policies through closed-loop interaction. At each decision step, the world model predicts future state feedback for candidate actions, and the agent performs future-aware reflection by estimating the reliability of this feedback and refining its action accordingly. The resulting on-policy trajectories are then used to update the world model via self-distillation, allowing it to better match the agent's evolving interaction distribution. Across embodied task planning, Web navigation, and tool-use benchmarks, COMAP consistently outperforms competitive baselines, e.g., +16.75% relative improvement with Qwen3-4B. Further analyses show that the co-evolutionary loop improves the world model's prediction accuracy over time and leads to more effective long-horizon decision-making. Our code is available at: https://github.com/loyiv/CoMAP.

</details>


### [478] [Harness-1: Reinforcement Learning for Search Agents with State-Externalizing Harnesses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02373)
*Pengcheng Jiang,Zhiyi Shi,Kelly Hong,Xueqiang Xu,Jiashuo Sun,Jimeng Sun,Hammad Bashir,Jiawei Han*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了Harness-1，一个20B参数的搜索智能体，通过在状态化的搜索框架中用强化学习训练，将常规状态管理交由环境维护，策略仅负责语义决策。在8个检索基准上平均curated recall达0.730，比最强开源搜索子智能体高11.4个百分点，与更大规模的前沿模型搜索器相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统搜索智能体将策略训练为基于不断增长的对话记录，迫使强化学习同时优化语义搜索决策和可恢复的簿记任务，而后者可以在环境中更可靠地维护。论文认为这种范式将过多的常规状态管理放入了策略中。

Method: 提出了Harness-1（20B参数搜索子智能体），在状态化的搜索框架（harness）中用强化学习训练。框架维护环境侧的工作记忆，包括候选池、重要性标记的精选集、压缩证据链接、验证记录、压缩去重观察结果以及预算感知的上下文渲染。策略仅保留语义决策：搜索什么、保留或丢弃哪些文档、验证什么以及何时停止。

Result: 在8个检索基准（涵盖网页、金融、专利、多跳QA）上，平均curated recall为0.730，比最强开源搜索子智能体高11.4个百分点，与更大规模的前沿模型搜索器竞争。在保留的迁移基准上优势尤为明显。

Conclusion: 将常规状态管理从策略中分离到环境的显式搜索状态中，强化学习可以产生超越训练领域的检索行为泛化能力。

Abstract: Search agents are often trained as policies over growing transcripts: the model must decide how to search while also remembering what it has seen, which evidence is useful, which constraints remain open, and which claims have actually been checked. We argue that this formulation puts too much routine state management inside the policy: reinforcement learning is forced to optimize both semantic search decisions and recoverable bookkeeping that the environment can maintain more reliably. We introduce Harness-1, a 20B search agent (retrieval subagent) trained with reinforcement learning inside a stateful search harness. The harness maintains environment-side working memory, including a candidate pool, an importance-tagged curated set, compact evidence links, verification records, compressed and deduplicated observations, and budget-aware context rendering. The policy retains the semantic decisions: what to search, which documents to keep or discard, what to verify, and when to stop. Across eight retrieval benchmarks spanning web, finance, patents, and multi-hop QA, Harness-1 achieves 0.730 average curated recall, outperforming the next strongest open search subagent by +11.4 points and remaining competitive with much larger frontier-model searchers. Its gains are especially strong on held-out transfer benchmarks, suggesting that reinforcement learning over explicit search state can produce retrieval behaviors that generalize beyond the training domains. Our code is available at https://github.com/pat-jj/harness-1.

</details>


### [479] [Spatial Representation Learning Beyond Pixels: Unifying Raster Data and Vector Semantics for Human-Centric Geospatial Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02374)
*Steffen Knoblauch,Hao Li,Gengchen Mai,Konstantin Klemmer,Song Gao,WenWen Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文呼吁将地球观测基础模型从仅处理栅格数据扩展到联合学习栅格与矢量数据，在统一嵌入空间中实现空间表征学习，以推动下一代地理空间AI发展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有地球观测基础模型局限于栅格模态，忽略了矢量数据（如OpenStreetMap）中丰富的结构化信息（几何、拓扑、语义关系）。栅格和矢量数据互为补充，但目前被孤立处理，依赖有损转换来桥接。

Method: 提出联合空间表征学习（Spatial Representation Learning, SRL）范式，在统一嵌入空间中整合栅格感知与矢量推理，对齐异构空间数据源。

Result: 无实验性结果，本文为观点文章（perspective paper），提出了概念基础、技术挑战和未来方向。

Conclusion: 栅格-矢量联合学习对于构建更准确、可解释且语义更扎实的下一代地理空间AI系统至关重要。

Abstract: Earth Observation (EO) has fundamentally transformed the monitoring of environmental processes and human activities up to planetary scale. Recent advances in self-supervised learning have given rise to Earth Observation Foundation Models (EOFMs), which leverage petabyte-scale unlabeled EO data to learn transferable representations across a wide range of downstream geospatial tasks. Despite these advances, current EOFMs remain largely confined to raster modalities, overlooking the rich, structured information encoded in openly-accessible vector data sources such as OpenStreetMap and Overture. Vector data provides explicit and compact representations of geographic entities, including geometry, topology, and semantic relationships, offering critical contextual signals that are often ambiguous or inaccessible in imagery alone. Raster and vector data thus represent complementary views of geographic space: raster data captures continuous physical and spectral patterns, while vector data encodes discrete objects and their relational structure and often represents more of the human rather than the physical systems (e.g. social or demographic data). However, existing geospatial representation learning paradigms treat these modalities in isolation, relying on imperfect and often lossy transformations to bridge them. This perspective paper calls for a paradigm shift toward joint Spatial Representation Learning (SRL) in an unified embedding space that integrate raster perception with vector-based reasoning. Building on emerging efforts in multimodal geospatial learning, we highlight conceptual foundations, technical challenges, and promising directions for aligning heterogeneous spatial data sources. We contend that such integration is essential for developing next-generation geospatial AI systems capable of more accurate, interpretable, and semantically grounded understanding of the Earth.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [480] [The Representation-Rationalizability Tradeoff in Reward Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00291)
*Jing Dong,Yaoliang Yu,Pascal Pourpart*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文证明RLHF中的奖励建模存在表示与聚合的权衡：更丰富的表示φ能降低表示误差，但会暴露更多无法被标量奖励一致排序的比较，从而增加聚合误差。这一权衡在DPO中同样存在，且联合训练无法保证找到最优平衡点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典的社交选择理论指出，由于异质性标注者偏好可能存在Condorcet循环，无法用单一标量奖励一致地衡量所有成对比较。然而现代RLHF使用可学习的表示φ(x,y)来生成响应嵌入，这改变了问题的结构，使得社交选择中的不可能性转变为一种权衡，需要被定量分析。

Method: 论文推导了基于表示φ的奖励模型的超额交叉熵损失的精确分解，将其拆分为表示项（由φ的丰富度决定）和聚合项（由φ暴露的无法一致排序的比较决定）。该分析同样扩展到DPO，并讨论了联合训练嵌入与奖励的局限性。

Result: 更丰富的表示φ会降低表示项误差，但会增加聚合项误差，因为更多比较对暴露出来而无法被标量奖励一致排序。联合训练无法保证自动找到这一权衡的最优平衡点。合成数据和真实偏好数据集上的实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: RLHF中的奖励学习存在内在的表示-聚合权衡，这是社交选择理论在现代偏好学习框架下的具体体现。实践中需要谨慎选择表示φ的复杂度，而非一味追求更丰富的表示。

Abstract: In RLHF, each training example contains a prompt $x$ and two candidate responses $y,y'$, and annotators provide pairwise preferences between these responses. The learning problem is to convert these heterogeneous pairwise judgments into a single scalar reward $r(x,y)$ that measures response quality for each prompt. Classical social choice implies an impossibility because heterogeneous annotator samples can induce pooled preferences with Condorcet cycles, so no scalar reward can evaluate all compared response pairs consistently. A growing literature analyzes RLHF as a social-choice problem, but usually assumes a fixed finite set of alternatives, i.e., a pre-enumerated finite set of candidate responses for each prompt. Modern pipelines instead score responses through a learned representation $φ(x,y)$ before a scalar head, so $φ$ determines which responses are treated as distinguishable alternatives and which comparisons are visible to the reward model. Once this embedding is part of the problem, the impossibility results from social choice theory become a tradeoff. We show that the excess cross-entropy loss of any reward built on $φ$ decomposes exactly into a representational term, which a richer $φ$ shrinks, and an aggregation term, which a richer $φ$ enlarges by exposing more comparisons that no scalar can rank consistently. The same results extend to direct preference optimization (DPO), and jointly training the embedding and the reward cannot guarantee to recover the sweet spot of this tradeoff. Experiments on synthetic data and real preference datasets corroborate our results.

</details>


### [481] [From Talking Words to Sharing Thoughts: Scalable Multi-LLM Aggregation via Structured Message Passing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00405)
*Niloufar Mehrabi,Sayed Pedram Haeri Boroujeni,Abolfazl Razi*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出一种基于二分因子图的语义层集成框架，通过消息传递协议解决多LLM协作中的高计算成本和锚点污染问题，在MMLU等基准上实现97%的token使用减少和6倍API调用降低，推理时间从分钟级降至毫秒级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有领域特化LLM的集成方法（迭代重提示、交叉模型精炼）存在高计算成本和延迟，且朴素聚合会导致锚点污染——来自较弱模型的噪声降低了最准确专家模型的性能。

Method: 构建二分因子图，LLM作为变量节点，基于多种认知标准的一致性检查节点；设计受纠错系统启发的消息传递协议进行迭代消歧；引入非对称阻尼机制保护高可靠锚节点不被多数覆盖；在输出分布层面操作，无需额外LLM调用。

Result: 在MMLU、MMLU-Pro、GPQA、MedMCQA四个基准上，token使用减少97%，API调用最多降低6倍，推理时间从数分钟降至毫秒级，持续优于多智能体基线方法。

Conclusion: 基于图的置信传播是多智能体LLM系统的一种鲁棒、高速、可扩展的替代方案。

Abstract: The emergence of specialized, domain-tuned Large Language Models (LLMs) has demonstrated that smaller models can achieve expert-level performance in specific tasks, while struggling in out-of-domain settings. Current ensemble methods to combine their complementary expertise primarily rely on iterative re-prompting or cross-model refinement. These approaches suffer from high computational costs and latency because they require repeated LLM inference calls. Furthermore, naive aggregation often leads to anchor corruption, in which noise propagated from weaker models degrades the performance of the most accurate expert. To address these challenges, we propose a framework that integrates model predictions at the semantic layer using a bipartite factor graph. In this architecture, individual LLMs are represented as variable nodes, while a set of check nodes assess their consistency based on diverse epistemic criteria. We develop a message-passing protocol inspired by error-recovery systems to resolve disagreements iteratively. Furthermore, we introduce an asymmetric damping mechanism that protects high-reliability anchor nodes from being overridden by the ensemble majority. Unlike existing methods, our approach operates on output distributions and requires no additional LLM calls during the refinement phase. Evaluating on four benchmarks, including MMLU, MMLU-Pro, GPQA, and MedMCQA, our method demonstrates a 97% reduction in token usage and up to a 6X decrease in API calls, reducing inference time from several minutes to mere milliseconds while consistently outperforming leading multi-agent baselines. These results suggest that graph-based belief propagation is a robust, high-speed, and scalable alternative to the current multi-agent LLM systems. The full pipeline and code will be made public.

</details>


### [482] [Algorithms and Complexity of Influence Maximization on Directed Acyclic Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00585)
*Panfeng Liu,Biaoshuai Tao*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了独立级联（IC）和线性阈值（LT）模型下的影响力最大化问题。在有向无环图（DAG）上，LT模型下该问题仍是APX-hard的；但在更受限的树状结构（出树状图、入树状图）上，问题变得可解：出树状图上IC与LT等价且存在精确多项式算法，入树状图上LT可多项式求解，IC则存在FPTAS。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索影响力最大化问题在一般图（APX-hard）之外的精确计算极限，明确图结构限制（DAG、树）能否带来多项式时间近似方案或精确算法。

Method: 理论归约证明APX-hardness；基于动态规划设计出树状图上的精确多项式算法；为入树状图上的IC模型设计FPTAS。

Result: LT模型下DAG上影响力最大化仍是APX-hard；出树状图上IC与LT等价且可多项式精确求解；入树状图上LT可多项式求解，IC模型存在FPTAS。

Conclusion: 无环结构（DAG）不足以使问题易于求解，进一步限制为特定树状结构（出/入树状图）才能实现多项式时间算法或FPTAS。

Abstract: This paper investigates the influence maximization problem under the Independent Cascade(IC) and Linear Threshold (LT) models. While this problem is known to be APX-hard on general graphs, we explore its computational limits by focusing on Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) and more restricted tree structures. Our primary result demonstrates that influence maximization remains APX-hard on DAGs under the LT model, suggesting that the absence of cycles is insufficient to achieve a polynomial-time approximation scheme (PTAS). In contrast, we show that the problem becomes tractable when the topology is further restricted to out-arborescences and in-arborescences. Specifically, for out-arborescences, we show that the IC model and the LT model are equivalent, and we develop exact polynomial-time algorithms based on dynamic programming that leverage the unique path properties of these structures. For in-arborescences, it is known that the problem is polynomial-time solvable under the LT model, and it is NP-hard under the IC model. We complement these results by presenting a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme (FPTAS) for the IC model.

</details>


### [483] [Hardness of Approximate Hylland-Zeckhauser Equilibria](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00951)
*Mark Braverman,Jingyi Liu,Eric Xue,Chenghan Zhou*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了在单位需求玩家中寻找近似Hylland-Zeckhauser均衡（即允许玩家对市场价格有小常数误差响应）的计算复杂性。结果表明，若(ε,δ)-广义电路问题是PPAD困难的（即"PPAD的PCP"猜想成立），则寻找近似HZ均衡也是PPAD困难的。此外，论文引入了一种自然限制条件（玩家不能包含正价格但零效用的物品），并无条件证明了存在常数ε使得寻找这种受限ε-HZ均衡是PPAD困难的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解近似市场均衡（特别是近似HZ均衡）的计算复杂性，并为证明"PPAD的PCP"猜想提供额外的动机。

Method: 采用归约方法，将(ε,δ)-广义电路问题归约到近似HZ均衡问题，从而建立PPAD困难性。同时引入受限近似HZ均衡的定义并证明其无条件PPAD困难性。

Result: 1) 条件性结果：若PCP for PPAD猜想成立，则近似HZ均衡是PPAD困难的。2) 无条件结果：存在常数ε使得受限ε-HZ均衡是PPAD困难的。

Conclusion: 近似HZ均衡的计算很可能是PPAD困难的，这为市场均衡计算问题的复杂性提供了新的下限，同时表明PCP for PPAD猜想是获得稳健计算复杂性结果的重要工具。

Abstract: In this paper, we investigate the computational hardness of finding fractional allocations to unit-demand players using competitive equilibria from equal incomes (CEEI), where we allow a small constant error in players' response to market prices (also known as an approximate Hylland-Zeckhauser equilibrium). We show that assuming the $\mathbf{(\varepsilon,δ)}$-Generalized Circuits problem is PPAD-hard (the "PCP for PPAD" conjecture), finding an approximate HZ equilibrium is also PPAD-hard. This result provides additional motivation for trying to prove the PCP for PPAD conjecture as a tool for obtaining robust computational hardness results about markets. Further, we introduce a natural restriction on approximate HZ equilibria, where players' bundles may still only be approximately optimal given the prices, but may not contain positive-price items for which the player has zero utility. We show unconditionally that there exists a constant $ε$ such that finding a restricted $ε$-HZ equilibrium is PPAD-hard.

</details>


### [484] [Repeated Descent: A Framework for Online Budget-Feasible Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01142)
*Andreas Charalampopoulos,Dimitris Fotakis,Thanos Tolias*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究在线预算可行的采购拍卖问题，提出基于自适应线性定价的确定性框架Repeated Descent (RED)，在秘书到达模型下实现了子模 valuations 的1046-竞争比在线定价机制，并将结果扩展到非单调子模情形，同时给出了XOS valuations的下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线预算可行采购拍卖中，雇主需在预算约束下最大化子模估值函数，但面临代理私人成本未知且必须在线做出不可撤销定价决策的挑战。现有机制竞争比过高，且缺乏针对非单调子模 valuation 的常数竞争比机制。

Method: 提出RED确定性框架，采用自适应线性定价策略，通过动态调整定价水平并平衡每个定价层级考虑代理数量来确保预算可行性。结合随机子采样扩展至非单调子模情形。

Result: 获得1046-竞争比的在线 posted-price 机制，相比Charalampopoulos等人(EC 2025)的结果改进几个数量级；首次提出非单调子模 valuation 的常数竞争比机制；证明XOS valuations下竞争比下界为Ω(log n/(log log n)²)。

Conclusion: RED框架有效解决了在线预算可行拍卖中的定价与预算约束问题，显著改进了竞争比上界，并填补了非单调子模情形下的空白，但XOS估值下仍存在对数级下界。

Abstract: We study budget feasible procurement auctions, in which $n$ agents, each with a privately held service cost, offer their services to an employer. The employer seeks to maximize a public submodular valuation function over the set of hired agents, while facing a hard budget constraint. We consider an online posted-price setting, in which agents arrive in a uniformly random order (a.k.a. \emph{secretary arrivals}) and the employer must make irrevocable take-it-or-leave-it offers upon their arrival. The employer does not get any feedback about the agent service costs other than whether they accept the offer or not.
  We introduce Repeated Descent (a.k.a. \RED), a deterministic framework based on adaptive linear posted pricing. \RED enforces budget feasibility by adaptively adjusting its pricing and balancing each pricing level with the number of agents considered in it. Using \RED as the main building block, we obtain a $1046$-competitive posted-price mechanism for online budget feasible auctions with secretary agent arrivals and submodular valuations, thus improving on the previously best known ratio of (Charalampopoulos et al., EC 2025) by several orders of magnitude. Combining \RED with random subsampling, we obtain the first constant-competitive posted-price budget feasible mechanism for non-monotone submodular valuations. On the negative side, we show that every online budget feasible mechanism with XOS valuations has a competitive ratio of $Ω\!\left(\tfrac{\log n}{(\log\log n)^2}\right)$.

</details>


### [485] [Domination-Avoiding Learning Agents Cannot Collude](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01275)
*Noam Nisan,Emmanuel Zerah*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文理论证明了外部遗憾最小化等代理在价格竞争市场中会自发形成合谋（勾结），并提出了一类名为“支配避免”的代理，该代理保证不会在市场中合谋，并能学会几乎从不执行被纯支配策略迭代剔除的策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有实证研究发现Q-learning代理和商业大语言模型在价格竞争市场中会自发合谋，但尚缺乏严格的理论证明，且对何种代理能够避免合谋缺乏系统性理解。

Method: 通过形式化理论证明的方法，证明外部遗憾最小化代理也会合谋，并定义“支配避免”代理类别，证明该类代理（包含均值基代理、内部遗憾最小化代理、变学习率乘法权重代理等）不会合谋，且能学会避免被纯支配策略迭代剔除的策略。

Result: 证明了外部遗憾最小化代理在价格竞争市场中会合谋；定义了支配避免代理，并证明了该类代理不会合谋；进一步证明在任何博弈中，该类代理能保证几乎从不执行被纯支配策略迭代剔除的策略。

Conclusion: 提出了一类能避免市场合谋的代理，为设计反合谋的算法代理提供了理论基础。

Abstract: An influential paper of Calvano et al. empirically demonstrated that Q-learning agents spontaneously collude when placed as sellers that compete on prices in a natural market model. More recent results of Fish et al. empirically demonstrated that similar collusion happens with commercial LLMs. We formally prove that such collusion can also happen with external-regret-minimizing agents. We identify a very general class of agents, which we term Domination-Avoiding agents, that provably do not collude in such markets. This class contains all Mean-Based agents and all internal-regret-minimizing agents, as well as others such as Multiplicative-Weight agents with variable learning rate and contextual variants thereof. More generally we show that, in any game, this class of agents is guaranteed to jointly learn to almost never play strategies that are eliminated by repeated elimination of purely dominated strategies.

</details>


### [486] [Distributed Algorithm for Robust Wardrop Equilibrium in Uncertain Aggregative Congestion Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01594)
*Huan Peng,Guanpu Chen,Giuseppe Belgioioso,Karl Henrik Johansson*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类具有不确定耦合约束的聚合拥塞博弈，提出了一种分布式算法，在 Worst-case 不确定性下求解鲁棒广义 Wardrop 均衡 (RGWE)。利用鲁棒优化将原博弈转化为确定性增广问题，并设计结合投影原始-对偶方案和动态跟踪技术的完全分布式算法。通过奇异摄动理论和 LaSalle 不变原理严格证明了算法收敛性，并刻画了 RGWE 与鲁棒广义 Nash 均衡之间的关系。最后通过插电式电动汽车充电控制仿真验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有聚合拥塞博弈研究大多未考虑耦合约束中的不确定参数，而实际系统中（如电动汽车充电调度）不确定性普遍存在。如何在不确定耦合约束下寻求鲁棒均衡解，并设计分布式算法实现，是该研究的核心动机。

Method: 1) 利用鲁棒优化理论将含不确定性的聚合拥塞博弈转化为确定性增广问题；2) 设计结合投影原始-对偶方案与动态跟踪技术的全分布式算法；3) 运用奇异摄动理论和 LaSalle 不变原理证明算法收敛性；4) 通过理论分析刻画 RGWE 与鲁棒广义 Nash 均衡的关联。

Result: 成功设计了可收敛到 RGWE 的完全分布式算法，严格证明了收敛性，并揭示了 RGWE 与鲁棒广义 Nash 均衡之间的理论关系。电动汽车充电控制仿真验证了算法的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文为不确定耦合约束下的聚合拥塞博弈提供了系统的分布式求解框架，理论上建立了 RGWE 与鲁棒广义 Nash 均衡之间的联系，为实际不确定环境下的分布式决策问题（如电动汽车充电调度）提供了可行的算法方案。

Abstract: This paper considers a class of aggregative congestion games with uncertain coupling constraints, and devises a distributed algorithm to seek the robust generalized Wardrop equilibrium (RGWE) under worst-case uncertainty. Utilizing robust optimization theory, we reformulate the original aggregative congestion game with uncertainty into a tractable and deterministic augmented problem. Building upon this reformulation, we design a fully distributed algorithm to seek the RGWE by integrating a projected primal-dual scheme and a dynamic tracking technique. The convergence of the proposed algorithm is rigorously guaranteed via singular perturbation theory and LaSalle's invariance principle. Furthermore, we explicitly characterize the relationship between the obtained RGWE and the robust generalized Nash equilibrium, as the latter captures full strategic interactions. Finally, numerical simulations on the charging control of plug-in electric vehicles corroborate our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [487] [A Framework for Graph-Conditioned Hierarchical Shapley Attribution in Patent Valuation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01632)
*Joy Bose*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出PatentXAI框架，利用可解释AI中的Shapley值结合知识图谱的马尔可夫毯技术，实现专利价值评估的计算可处理性，并支持层级化的利润分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单件专利嵌入在包含数万件专利的产品中，其经济贡献的估算长期以来是知识产权经济学中一个未解决的难题。

Method: 将专利估价视为可解释AI问题，利用Shapley值衡量专利公平份额；通过知识图谱中的马尔可夫毯限制专利联盟规模以实现计算可处理性；利润分配采用层级化方式：精确Shapley分配宏观组件利润，中心性加权Shapley分配组件内专利利润。

Result: n=100时中位马尔可夫毯大小为n的32.9%，90百分位毯大小为55.2%，每件专利运行时间10毫秒；n=12时与精确解的差异为0.088，n=100时与高样本蒙特卡洛参考的差异为0.062±0.003；密集组件实验显示差异降至0.039。

Conclusion: PatentXAI在计算效率和精度上均有良好表现；从真实数据估计v(S)是主要未解问题，论文区分了计算贡献与实证验证，并提出了利用ETSI、USPTO和Lens.org数据集的实证路线图。

Abstract: Estimating the economic contribution of a single patent inside a product that embodies tens of thousands of patents is a long-standing unsolved problem in intellectual property economics. We propose PatentXAI, a framework that treats patent valuation as a problem of explainable AI: given a characteristic function v(S) encoding the revenue achievable by patent subset S, a patent's Shapley value measures its fair share of product profit in a way that satisfies efficiency, symmetry, dummy, and additivity. To make computation tractable we restrict each patent's coalition to its Markov Blanket inside a knowledge graph, grounded in the C-SVE conditional independence theorem (Li et al., 2020). Scaling experiments from n=12 to n=100 patents using Pareto-distributed coverage graphs report median Markov Blanket size of 32.9 percent of n at n=100, with 90th-percentile blanket size of 55.2 percent of n, and runtime of 10 milliseconds per patent. Difference against exact ground truth at n=12 is 0.088; difference against a high-sample Monte Carlo reference at n=100 is 0.062 plus or minus 0.003. A dense-component experiment shows that when 80 percent of patents share one component, the blanket correctly expands to cover that dense cluster, and the difference versus reference falls to 0.039 because the pooled computation becomes more accurate on homogeneous portfolios. Profit allocation proceeds hierarchically: exact Shapley distributes total profit among macro-components, then centrality-weighted Shapley distributes each component budget among covering patents. Estimating v(S) from real data is the primary open problem; we distinguish this from the computational contribution and outline a concrete roadmap for empirical validation using public ETSI, USPTO, and Lens.org datasets.

</details>


### [488] [A Sheaf Framework for Strategic Multi-Agent Systems: From Consensus to Nash Equilibria](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01663)
*Manuel Hernández,Eduardo Sánchez-Soto*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个统一的范畴论框架，将事件演算、SCEL类集成形成和博弈论奖励结构整合到时空历史的Grothendieck topos中，通过“博弈层”概念将纳什均衡对应为导出最佳响应对应层的全局截面，并用上同调障碍分类策略一致性失败，最后通过免疫“堡垒防御”场景验证了框架的表达力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的层论和拓扑论框架虽能处理几何共识、知识对齐和因果规划，但缺乏对价值、奖励和策略选择的显式建模，无法满足异构自主智能体在动态对抗环境中同时满足几何约束、逻辑一致性、时序推理和策略优化的需求。

Method: 构建统一范畴框架：将事件演算、SCEL类集成形成和博弈论奖励结构整合到时空历史的Grothendieck topos中；引入“博弈层”概念，其茎包含效用函数和策略分布，限制映射编码平行传输和最优响应动力学；证明纳什均衡对应于导出最佳响应对应层的全局截面，上同调障碍分类策略一致性失败。

Result: 成功建立了博弈层理论，将博弈论概念嵌入层论框架，实现了几何约束、逻辑一致性、时序推理和策略优化的统一表达；通过免疫“堡垒防御”案例验证了框架在实际异构多智能体系统中的应用可行性。

Conclusion: 该综合框架为可验证、自主且经济理性的多智能体系统提供了严格的数学基础，能够统一处理几何、逻辑、时序和博弈四个维度的约束与优化问题。

Abstract: The coordination of heterogeneous autonomous agents in dynamic, adversarial environments requires simultaneous satisfaction of geometric constraints, logical consistency, temporal reasoning, and strategic optimization. Existing sheaf- and topos-theoretic frameworks provide powerful tools for geometric consensus, knowledge alignment, and causal planning, but lack explicit models for value, reward, and strategic choice. This report presents a unified categorical framework that integrates event calculus, SCEL-like ensemble formation, and game-theoretic reward structures into a single Grothendieck topos of time-space histories. We introduce the notion of a \emph{game sheaf} whose stalks contain utility functions and policy distributions, and restriction maps encode both parallel transport and best-response dynamics. We prove that Nash equilibria correspond to global sections of a derived best-response correspondence sheaf, while cohomological obstructions classify failures of strategic consistency. A detailed case study of an immunological ``bastion defense'' scenario -- heterogeneous agents forming attack/defense ensembles under resource constraints -- demonstrates the framework's expressiveness. This synthesis provides a rigorous foundation for verifiable, autonomic, and economically rational multi-agent systems.

</details>


### [489] [The Price of Decentralization in Block Building](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01874)
*Burak Öz,Fei Wu,Luis Correia,Sen Yang,Bruno Mazorra,Stefanos Leonardos*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文通过随机覆盖博弈模型研究去中心化区块构建中建设者的地理位置选择、用户交易覆盖与奖励集中度之间的张力，证明了纯纳什均衡的存在性、渐近紧的Price of Anarchy界为2，并给出了效用集中度的紧界，最后通过模拟揭示了中间参数区间福利损失最显著、地理集中与效用集中未必一致等关键发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 去中心化区块构建机制用多个建设者取代单一提议者的垄断，但其抗审查性和公平访问性不仅取决于建设者数量，还取决于建设者是否在地理上能够及时覆盖交易。现有研究缺乏对建设者地理位置选择、用户交易覆盖和奖励集中度之间相互作用的系统建模与分析。

Method: 将去中心化区块构建建模为随机覆盖博弈：建设者选择区域，信息源在区块构建轮次中发射交易，延迟决定交易是否在截止时间前被接收。证明该博弈是精确势能博弈，分析纳什均衡的效率（Price of Anarchy）和效用集中度（HHI指数等），并通过模拟在更丰富的延迟和源环境下研究均衡性质。

Result: (1) 建设者区域博弈是精确势能博弈，存在纯纳什均衡；(2) Price of Anarchy渐近紧界为2，量化了非协调放置的去中心化代价；(3) 最低效用建设者至少获得最高效用建设者的一半收益，效用份额HHI最多比平等基线高12.5%；(4) 模拟发现福利损失在中间参数区间最显著，地理集中与效用集中不一定对齐。

Conclusion: 研究结果为协议设计提供了理论指导，指出规划者可通过将建设者分配到低收益边缘区域来改善覆盖，而均衡结果可能更地理集中但效用更均衡。未来方向包括位置-市场建模和替代奖励分配规则的研究。

Abstract: Decentralized block building mechanisms replace the monopoly of a single proposer with multiple builders. However, their censorship-resistance and fair-access benefits depend not only on the number of builders, but also on whether builders are geographically positioned to provide timely transaction coverage. We study this tension between builder location choice, user transaction coverage, and reward concentration by modeling decentralized block building as a stochastic coverage game. Builders choose regions, information sources emit transactions over a block construction round, and latency determines whether each transaction is received before the deadline.
  We show that the builder region game is an exact potential game and therefore admits a pure Nash equilibrium. We prove an asymptotically tight factor-2 Price of Anarchy bound, quantifying the price of decentralization from uncoordinated builder placement, and derive tight bounds on builder utility concentration, showing that the lowest-utility builder earns at least half of the highest-utility builder's payoff, and the utility-share HHI is at most 12.5% above the egalitarian benchmark. We complement the theory with simulations, studying the builder region game under richer latency and source environments. We find that welfare losses are most pronounced in intermediate regimes where peripheral sources are reachable and valuable, but selfish incentives still favor regions with strong access to high-value sources. We also find that geographic and utility concentration need not align: planner allocations can improve coverage by assigning builders to lower-payoff peripheral regions, while equilibrium outcomes can be more geographically concentrated but more utility-balanced. We connect our findings to protocol design and discuss future directions on location-market modeling and alternative reward-sharing rules.

</details>


### [490] [Improved Amenability Bounds for Local Coordination Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01963)
*Ron Peretz,Dean Kraizberg*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究有限社交网络上的局部纯协调博弈，在二元无偏设定下，利用互信息博弈的Shapley值，证明了若平均分歧小于ε，则图满足(O(ε log(1/ε)), r)-可安性，改进了此前Hutchcroft等人的平方根损失结果，给出了局部协调与图可安性之间更紧的定量逆关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在Hutchcroft等人建立的局部协调博弈与图可安性之间的定量联系中，其损失为平方根量级，该文旨在二元无偏设定下改进这一损失，得到更紧的定量逆关系。

Method: 利用与玩家局部输出相关的互信息博弈的Shapley值作为分析工具。

Result: 若平均分歧不超过ε，则图是(O(ε log(1/ε)), r)-可安的。

Conclusion: 给出了局部协调与图可安性之间更尖锐的定量逆关系。

Abstract: We study local pure coordination games on finite social networks, continuing the framework of Hutchcroft, Rospuskova, and Tamuz. They showed that low inefficiency in local coordination forces the underlying graph to be amenable, with a square-root loss in the amenability parameter. We improve this loss in the binary unbiased setting. Using Shapley values of a mutual-information game associated with the players' local outputs, we prove that if the average disagreement is at most $\varepsilon$, then the graph is $(O(\varepsilon\log(1/\varepsilon)),r)$-amenable. This gives a sharper quantitative converse between local coordination and graph amenability.

</details>


### [491] [Private Learning in Bilateral Trade](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02050)
*Simone Di Gregorio,Federico Fusco,Stefano Leonardi,Chris Schwiegelshohn*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究双边贸易中的差分隐私学习机制，证明了在一般分布下隐私与最优性不可兼得，但在σ-平滑分布下可分别用$\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{σ\varepsilonα^2})$和$\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{\varepsilonα}+\frac{1}{α^2})$样本量实现利润和效率的α-最优ε-差分隐私机制，且样本复杂度在精度参数α上本质最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双边贸易模型是经济学中最基本的交互之一，现有学习算法对输入数据集高度敏感，缺乏隐私保护。本文旨在从差分隐私角度研究该问题，确保每个数据点不会显著影响学习到特定机制的概率。

Method: 采用PAC学习框架，要求算法以高概率输出一个在加性α误差内接近最优的ε-差分隐私机制。首先证明一般分布下差分隐私与近似最优性不可兼得，进而引入σ-平滑分布假设，在该假设下分别针对利润和经济效率（贸易收益）设计多项式时间的差分隐私学习算法。

Result: 在σ-平滑分布下，利润最优机制需$\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{σ\varepsilonα^2})$个样本，效率（贸易增益）最优机制需$\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{\varepsilonα}+\frac{1}{α^2})$个样本。这些界在精度参数α上本质紧致，因为即使忽略差分隐私，实现α-最优至少也需要$\frac{1}{α^2}$个样本。

Conclusion: 差分隐私与双边贸易中的近似最优机制学习可以实现兼容，但需要分布满足平滑性条件；所提出的样本复杂度上界在α维度上是最优的。

Abstract: Bilateral trade models one of the most fundamental economic interactions: the intermediation between two strategic agents, a seller and a buyer, willing to trade a good. We consider the learning version of the problem, where the goal is to learn a mechanism from a sampled dataset of agents' valuations to maximize either profit or economic efficiency. While known learning algorithms are characterized by high sensitivity to the input dataset, we specifically study this problem through the lens of differential privacy, ensuring that each data point does not significantly affect the probability of learning any specific mechanism.
  For our results, we adopt the PAC-learning framework: with high probability, the learning algorithm should output a mechanism that is at most an additive $α$ away from optimal, in a $\varepsilon$-differentially private way. As a first result, we show that differential privacy and (near)-optimality are not achievable for general distributions. Surprisingly, assuming that the distribution underlying the agents' valuations is $σ$-smooth, we recover nearly optimal sample-complexity bounds for both economic efficiency and profit.
  For profit, we show how to construct in polynomial time an $α$-optimal and $\varepsilon$-differentially private mechanism using $\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{σ\varepsilonα^2})$ samples. For efficiency, measured by the gain from trade, we achieve the same result using $\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{\varepsilonα}+\frac{1}{α^2})$ samples. Notably, these bounds are essentially tight in the precision parameter $α$, since achieving $α$-optimality (ignoring differential privacy) requires at least $\frac{1}{α^2}$ samples.

</details>


### [492] [Testing Decision Makers without Counterfactuals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02095)
*Yakov Babichenko*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究在部分观测的bandit环境中，外部观察者能否仅基于决策、建议和臂的实现值，长期识别出谁（决策者或顾问）拥有更充分的信息。研究发现：对于同时选择臂的场景，存在评分测试能够成功识别信息更充分的代理；但对于顺序选择臂的场景，则不存在这样的测试。此外，在二元臂环境中，没有评分测试能同时识别信息更充分的代理并实现超过福利最大化决策一半的福利。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在部分信息可观测的bandit反馈环境中，外部观察者能否仅通过观察决策、建议和结果来区分决策者与顾问谁拥有更充分的信息，以及在战略代理试图通过测试时，识别能力与福利最大化之间的张力。

Method: 聚焦于评分测试（scoring tests）类，即为每个观测分配数值分数并基于平均分选择代理。分别分析了同时选择臂和顺序选择臂两种场景下的测试可行性，并进一步研究了二元臂环境下的福利-识别权衡。

Result: 在同时选择臂的场景下，存在能够成功识别信息更充分代理的评分测试；在顺序选择臂场景下，无法构造这样的评分测试。在二元臂环境中，任何评分测试都无法同时实现识别信息更充分代理和达到超过福利最大化决策一半的福利水平。

Conclusion: 识别信息更充分的代理在同时选择场景下可行但在顺序选择场景下不可行；并且识别目标与福利最大化目标之间存在根本性冲突，存在至少一半的福利损失下界。

Abstract: A decision-maker (DM) repeatedly makes choices under uncertainty in a bandit environment, where only the realization of the chosen arm is observed. Another competing agent, the adviser (AD), repeatedly provides recommendations, but the realizations of these recommendations are unobserved unless they coincide with the DM's choice. Both agents possess partial information about the arms' realizations. The central question we focus on is whether, in the long run, an outside observer can identify which agent is more informed based solely on the observed decisions, recommendations, and arm realizations.
  A test selects one of the agents based on the observed data. We focus primarily on the class of scoring tests, which assign a numerical score to each observation and select the agent according to the average score. We study strategic agents whose objective is to be selected by the test. For simultaneous arm choices, we show that there exists a scoring test that successfully identifies the more-informed agent. For sequential arm choices, however, no such scoring test exists.
  Finally, we explore the tension between identifying the more-informed agent and maximizing welfare. A DM whose objective is to pass the test may not necessarily make welfare-maximizing decisions. In a binary-arm environment, we show that no scoring test can simultaneously identify the more informed agent and achieve more than half of the welfare attained by welfare-maximizing decisions.

</details>


### [493] [Conditional Graph Diffusion for Negotiation Support: Overcoming Discrete Infeasibility and Preference Elicitation Gaps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02209)
*Moirangthem Tiken Singh*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出条件图扩散（CGD）框架，在连续双边效用空间中生成谈判推荐，通过图注意力编码、跨注意力对话融合和推理时规范引导梯度，在不重新训练的情况下实现高个体理性率（≥0.997）、低安全差距（≤0.009）和对称性差距（≤0.15），将安全差距相比纳什议价解降低最多70倍，仅以3%的福利成本为代价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统双边谈判支持系统在离散分配空间上搜索，存在结构不可行性（无离散结果满足个体理性）且无法利用自然语言对话中的偏好信号。

Method: 构建CGD框架：1）GATv2编码器通过动态注意力捕捉比较性双边偏好结构；2）跨注意力机制将策略嵌入与基于Transformer的对话表示融合为统一条件上下文，输入去噪扩散概率模型；3）解析推导的规范引导梯度在推理时每步反向扩散中注入单调修正，引导生成朝向个体理性、安全接近性和公平性。

Result: 在合成、CaSiNo和Deal or No Deal语料上：个体理性率≥0.997，安全差距≤0.009，对称性差距≤0.15。相比纳什议价解，安全差距降低70倍，最大福利成本3%。消融实验表明无学习生成先验的朴素约束最小化无法满足规范合规。受控误表示实验证明了跨注意力融合利用对话信号的能力。

Conclusion: CGD框架有效解决了离散谈判支持系统的结构不可行性问题，通过连续空间生成和推理时规范引导实现了规范合规与福利最大化的解耦，可在保持个体理性的前提下恢复帕累托效率。

Abstract: Traditional bilateral negotiation support systems search over discrete allocation spaces. This approach encounters structural infeasibility when no discrete outcome satisfies individual rationality. It fails to incorporate preference signals embedded in natural language dialogue. This study introduces the Conditional Graph Diffusion (CGD) framework to generate recommendations in a continuous bilateral utility space. A GATv2 encoder captures comparative bilateral preference structure through dynamic attention. A cross-attention mechanism fuses strategic embeddings with transformer-based dialogue representations into a unified conditioning context for a denoising diffusion probabilistic model. An analytically derived normative guidance gradient applies at inference time. It injects per-step monotonic corrections at each reverse diffusion step, steering generation toward individual rationality, security proximity, and equitability without retraining. Evaluation across synthetic, CaSiNo, and Deal or No Deal corpora confirms accumulated corrections achieve an individual rationality rate of at least 0.997, a security gap of at most 0.009, and a symmetry gap within 0.15. Relative to the Nash Bargaining Solution, CGD reduces security gaps by up to 70-fold at a maximum welfare cost of 3%. An ablation study demonstrates naive constraint minimization without a learned generative prior fails normative compliance across heterogeneous corpora. A controlled misrepresentation experiment establishes the architectural capacity of cross-attention fusion to exploit dialogue signals. An inference-time welfare guidance mechanism decouples normative compliance from welfare maximization, recovering Pareto efficiency on CaSiNo without retraining while preserving individual rationality.

</details>


### [494] [Optimizing the Envy Cycle Elimination Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02233)
*Karen Frilya Celine,Warut Suksompong*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了公平分配不可分割物品的EF1分配中，通过自然启发式策略改进福利保障的理论与实证分析，重点比较了不同选择维度（联合优化vs单一维度）对最坏情况功利福利损失的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典的嫉妒环消除（ECE）算法虽能保证EF1分配，但其在物品和接收者的选择上存在显著灵活性，这种自由度对福利保障的影响尚未被充分研究。本文旨在探索利用这种自由度来改善分配福利的启发式方法。

Method: 采用理论最坏情况分析与实证平均情况分析相结合的方法。具体研究了三种启发式策略：联合优化选择物品和接收者以最大化效用、仅优化选择物品、仅优化选择接收者，并与经典ECE算法进行对比。

Result: 联合优化选择物品和接收者的启发式策略在最坏情况下显著降低了功利福利损失；而仅单一维度（物品或接收者）的优化策略则无法实现类似的改善效果。

Conclusion: 在ECE算法框架下，同时考虑物品和接收者两个维度的联合优化能有效改善分配福利，而单一维度的启发式改进效果有限，这为公平分配中福利提升策略的设计提供了理论指导。

Abstract: In the fair allocation of indivisible goods, a widely used notion of fairness is envy-freeness up to one good (EF1). A classical way to compute an EF1 allocation is the envy cycle elimination (ECE) algorithm, which iteratively assigns a good to an unenvied agent and, after each assignment, resolves any resulting envy cycle. Although the ECE algorithm always produces an EF1 allocation, it leaves considerable freedom in choosing both the next good to allocate and the agent to receive it. We investigate natural heuristics that exploit this flexibility to improve welfare guarantees. For example, we show that if the heuristic jointly selects the good and the receiving agent maximizing the utility, the worst-case utilitarian welfare loss is significantly lower than that of the vanilla algorithm. By contrast, restricting the heuristic to select only one of these two dimensions does not yield comparable improvements. We also complement our theoretical results with empirical average-case analysis.

</details>


### [495] [Welfare-Optimal Classification with Accuracy Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02435)
*Bana Sadi,Eden Saig,Nir Rosenfeld*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合真实拍卖的学习算法，通过优化社会福利（用户从正确预测中获得的平均收益）而非标准准确率，同时解决用户估值异质性和真实披露问题，实验表明该方法在福利优化与准确率之间存在有趣关联。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统预测算法以最大化准确率为目标，但准确率并不直接等价于用户收益。用户从正确预测中获得的收益存在异质性，且这些估值是私人信息，用户有动机夸大报告。因此需要一种能够同时激励真实估值披露并优化社会福利的学习方法。

Method: 提出一种融合真实拍卖机制的学习算法：将用户对正确预测的私有估值通过拍卖机制激励真实披露，同时以社会福利（用户平均收益）为优化目标进行学习。算法能够高效计算分配和定价，并证明了付费用户数量的上界与样本量无关。

Result: 证明了付费用户数量的上界独立于样本量；在真实和合成数据上的实验验证了所提出算法的有效性，并揭示了社会福利与准确率之间的权衡关系。

Conclusion: 优化社会福利而非准确率能够更好地服务于用户利益，但需要精心设计的机制来解决真实估值披露问题。所提方法在理论上保证了效率与激励相容性，实验上展示了可行性。

Abstract: Prediction algorithms are increasingly used to inform decisions about humans, but maximizing accuracy$\rule[0.25em]{1em}{0.4pt}$the standard learning objective$\rule[0.25em]{1em}{0.4pt}$does not necessarily maximize user benefits. Instead, we propose optimizing social welfare, defined as the average gain users receive from correct predictions. Welfare enables to express, and therefore account for, heterogeneity in how much users benefit from accuracy. But since these valuations are private and users can gain from overreporting them, learning must simultaneously elicit truthful values and optimize welfare with respect to them. To this end, we propose a novel learning algorithm that incorporates a truthful auction. We show how to compute allocations and prices efficiently, and bound the number of paying users$\rule[0.25em]{1em}{0.4pt}$ which surprisingly is independent of the sample size. We conclude with experiments on real and synthetic data that demonstrate our algorithm and explore the connections between welfare and accuracy.

</details>


### [496] [Pluralistic Leaderboards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02547)
*Nika Haghtalab,Ariel D. Procaccia,Han Shao,Serena Lutong Wang,Kunhe Yang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文针对大语言模型评估中传统的Bradley-Terry排名方法无法容纳用户异质性偏好的问题，借鉴社会选择理论中的局部稳定性概念，设计了一种替代性多元排行榜机制，仅需每位用户提供Õ(k)次成对比较即可保证局部稳定性，并在LMArena数据上验证了该方法相较于标准方法具有更强的稳定性保障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于Bradley-Terry模型的大语言模型排行榜将用户成对比较 aggregated into 单一的全局质量分数，这一方法假设用户偏好同质，无法反映不同用户群体对模型行为的多样化偏好，导致部分用户群体被系统性误代表。

Method: 借鉴社会选择理论中的局部稳定性概念，设计了一种新的排行榜机制：要求没有排在前k名之外的模型能够被超过O(1/k)比例的用户集体偏好优于前k名集合；通过仅收集每位用户Õ(k)次成对比较来实现该机制。

Result: 在LMArena数据上，标准Bradley-Terry聚合方法在实践中会违反局部稳定性，而所提出的方法提供了显著更强的稳定性保证。

Conclusion: 多元排行榜（pluralistic leaderboards）通过引入社会选择理论中的稳定性概念，能够在用户偏好异质的情况下提供更公平、更具代表性的模型评估结果。

Abstract: Recent leaderboard-based evaluations of large language models aggregate user feedback by fitting a Bradley--Terry model to pairwise comparisons, producing a single global ranking based on a latent quality score. While appealing for its simplicity, this approach is incompatible with heterogeneous preferences: when LLMs are used across diverse tasks and use cases, users who favor fundamentally different model behaviors can be systematically misrepresented when collapsed into a single quality score. To address this issue, we study \emph{pluralistic leaderboards} that aim to remain \emph{stable} with respect to heterogeneous user populations. Drawing on ideas from social choice theory, we adapt the notion of \emph{local stability}, which requires that no model outside the top-$k$ positions is collectively preferred to the top-$k$ set by more than $O(1/k)$ fraction of users. Building on techniques from the social choice literature, we design an alternative leaderboard mechanism that satisfies local stability while eliciting only $\widetilde{O}(k)$ pairwise comparisons per user, where $k$ is the size of the prefix for which stability is guaranteed. Using data from LMArena, we show that standard Bradley--Terry aggregation can violate local stability in practice, whereas our method provides substantially stronger stability guarantees.

</details>


<div id='cs.CE'></div>

# cs.CE [[Back]](#toc)

### [497] [Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Radial Consolidation of Combined Electroosmotic, Vacuum and Surcharge Preloading Considering Smear Effects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00056)
*Dong Li,Yapeng Cao,Shuai Huang,Yujun Cui,Haiping Fu,Lu Yang,He Wei*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本研究开发了一种无量纲多域物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，用于考虑涂抹效应和联合真空-堆载预压的电渗径向固结分析。对比了三种PINN模型（标准软约束Std-PINN、改进门控Mod-PINN、硬约束边界编码Mod-HC-PINN），其中Mod-HC-PINN通过将阴极边界和初始条件嵌入输出结构，在时变荷载下显著提升了精度（MAE低至0.27 kPa），且对网络架构、配点密度和渗透率变化具有鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种能够高效求解电渗径向固结问题（考虑涂抹效应和联合真空-堆载）的无量纲PINN框架，克服传统数值方法（如FEM）在复杂边界和非线性荷载下的计算瓶颈，并解决标准PINN在时变荷载下多目标竞争导致的精度下降问题。

Method: 提出无量纲多域PINN框架，构建三种模型：标准软约束PINN（Std-PINN）、改进门控PINN（Mod-PINN）以及硬约束边界编码的Mod-HC-PINN。通过门控架构提升陡峭压力梯度分辨率；Mod-HC-PINN将阴极边界和初始条件硬编码到网络输出层，减少优化负担。在四种荷载工况（常真空、指数真空、指数真空+斜坡堆载、指数真空+循环半正弦堆载）下与FEM参考解对比验证。

Result: Mod-HC-PINN在指数真空、斜坡堆载和循环堆载工况下MAE分别为0.43、0.41和0.27 kPa，显著优于软约束模型。敏感性分析表明框架对网络架构、配点密度和渗透率对比度变化具有强鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 硬约束边界编码策略能有效减轻PINN在时变荷载下的多目标学习冲突，提升物理一致性和预测精度；所提框架适用于电渗固结问题的工程分析。

Abstract: This study develops a dimensionless multi-domain physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework for electro-osmotic radial consolidation considering smear effects and combined vacuum and surcharge loading. Three PINN-based models are investigated: a standard soft-constrained PINN (Std-PINN), a modified gated PINN (Mod-PINN), and a modified gated PINN with hard-constraint boundary encoding (Mod-HC-PINN). The models are evaluated against FEM reference solutions under four loading cases, including constant vacuum, exponential vacuum, exponential vacuum with ramp surcharge, and exponential vacuum with cyclic haversine surcharge. The results indicate that the gated architecture applied in Mod-PINN improves the resolution of steep pressure gradients near the cathode and smear-zone interface under constant vacuum loading. Under time-dependent loading, the soft-constrained Mod-PINN shows reduced accuracy because it must learn multiple competing objectives simultaneously. The Mod-HC-PINN mitigates this issue by embedding the cathode boundary and initial conditions into the output structure, thereby reducing the optimization burden and improving physical consistency. The Mod-HC-PINN achieves MAE values of 0.43, 0.41, and 0.27 kPa for the exponential vacuum, ramp surcharge, and cyclic surcharge cases, respectively. Sensitivity analyses further demonstrate that the proposed framework remains robust across practical ranges of network architecture, collocation density, and permeability contrast.

</details>


### [498] [To Wait or To Probe: Arbitrage Competition on High-Throughput Blockchains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00720)
*Fei Wu,Burak Öz*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文研究高吞吐量区块链上最大可提取价值（MEV）的两种搜索架构——定向搜索（off-chain发现机会+路由提交交易）与概率搜索（多次重复提交尝试+on-chain执行中解析机会），并分析其对垃圾交易、区块空间消耗和协议费收入的影响。基于2025年6月至2026年2月Base链上的循环套利数据，开发了追踪级分类器，并通过Flashblocks、代币发行机会冲击和更高费用下限三个事件验证模型。结果显示，概率搜索仅占套利活动的23%，却产生95%垃圾交易并消耗20%的Gas；配置变更后，协议费收入向成功套利转移，垃圾交易减少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 区分MEV的两种搜索架构（定向搜索与概率搜索），理解它们对区块空间效率、垃圾交易和协议收入的不同影响，为区块链协议设计提供依据。

Method: 建立模型分析排序粒度、费用下限和机会冲击如何影响两种架构的竞争；利用Base链循环套利数据开发追踪级分类器；通过三个自然实验（Flashblocks、代币发行冲击、费用下限调整）验证模型预测。

Result: 概率搜索仅占23%的套利活动，但产生95%垃圾交易并消耗20%的Gas；Flashblocks抑制概率搜索；代币发行机会冲击暂时复活概率搜索；更高费用下限淘汰概率搜索机器人；Base配置变更后协议费收入向成功套利转移，概率机器人支付更高优先费，垃圾交易占比下降。

Conclusion: 两种MEV搜索架构对区块链健康有显著不同的影响；通过协议参数（如费用下限、排序粒度）可以调控概率搜索的占比，从而减少垃圾交易、提升区块空间效率和协议收入质量。

Abstract: Maximal Extractable Value (MEV) on high-throughput blockchains can be captured through targeted search, where bots identify opportunities off-chain and submit route-committed transactions, or through probabilistic search, where bots submit repeated attempts that resolve opportunity discovery during on-chain execution. This distinction has direct implications for spam, blockspace consumption, and protocol fee revenue. We model how ordering granularity, fee floors, and opportunity-access shocks shape competition between these architectures. Using cyclic arbitrage data on Base from June 2025 to February 2026, we develop a trace-level classifier for search architectures and show that the resulting labels correspond to distinct execution behavior. We test the model across three episodes: Flashblocks selects against broad on-chain probabilistic scanners; token-launch opportunity shocks temporarily revive probabilistic search; and higher fee floors select against probabilistic bots whose opportunity flow cannot sustain repeated attempts. In our sample, probabilistic search accounts for only 23% of arbitrage activity but produces 95% of spam and consumes 20% of Base gas. After Base's configuration changes, protocol fee revenue shifts toward successful arbitrages and away from spam, probabilistic bots pay higher priority fees, and spam consumes a smaller share of blockspace.

</details>


### [499] [Higher-order Network Analysis of Human Mobility Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00733)
*Timothy LaRock,Chen Zhang,Jürgen Hackl*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文开发了一个基于高阶网络框架的比较方法，用于评估真实观测与合成模拟的个体移动数据的相似性。通过对Île-de-France地区的NetMob 2025数据集与合成人口移动模拟数据的对比分析，发现模拟数据在路径层面虽有潜力替代真实数据，但仍存在关键局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 个体移动数据收集既需大规模高分辨率又需保护隐私，成本极高且困难。合成数据生成工具虽可规避这一问题，但缺乏有效的评估框架来判断其生成的移动轨迹是否足够真实，因此亟需一种系统性的比较方法来验证合成数据的可靠性。

Method: 提出一套基于高阶网络（higher-order network）的比较框架，聚焦个体在基础设施网络中移动的路径模式分析。使用该框架对NetMob 2025数据挑战赛的真实个体移动数据与同一区域的开源合成人口及移动模拟数据进行对比。

Result: 合成模拟数据在整体上具有作为真实移动数据替代品的潜力，但从路径模式角度分析，模拟数据存在关键局限性，无法完全复现真实数据中的某些高阶移动特征。

Conclusion: 模拟移动数据在个体移动研究中具有前景但仍需改进，文章讨论了当前局限性的潜在修复方案以及高阶移动网络分析面临的开放挑战。

Abstract: The detailed study of individual human mobility requires large-scale high-resolution datasets, but collecting such datasets in a way that is both statistically powerful and privacy preserving is a challenging and expensive task. In response, researchers have built tools to generate complex synthetic populations of agents that can be used to simulate synthetic individual mobility data, potentially obviating the difficulties of data collection. While these simulation-based approaches offer a promising avenue for expanding individual mobility research, it is difficult to asses whether such tools are effective at generating realistic mobility traces. In this work, we develop a framework for comparing observed and simulated mobility data using a higher-order network framework that focuses on analyzing patterns of movement in the paths individuals take through the underlying infrastructure network. We apply our framework to a case study comparing the NetMob 2025 Data Challenge Dataset, which includes individual mobility data for thousands of residents of the Île-de-France region, with a sophisticated open-source synthetic population and mobility simulation model of the same region. We show that while simulated mobility data is indeed promising as a surrogate for observed mobility, there are some key limitations to the simulation paradigm from a path-based perspective, which we discuss along with potential future remediations and open challenges for higher-order mobility network analysis.

</details>


### [500] [Graph Attention-Based Virtual Metrology for Film Deposition Processes in Semiconductor Manufacturing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00923)
*Tao Han,Suk Ki Lee,Hyunwoong Ko*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于图注意力机制的虚拟量测框架，用于半导体薄膜沉积工艺中膜厚预测，通过参数-层依赖建模和时序特征学习提升预测性能与可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有虚拟量测模型多为相关性驱动，难以捕捉异构过程变量间的结构化依赖关系，且可解释性有限，难以满足高精度纳米级半导体制造对过程监控的需求。

Method: 将每步-参数对建模为节点，利用卷积特征编码器从高频设备轨迹中提取时序嵌入，通过参数到层的图注意力机制建模方向性依赖，使各膜层能够聚合相关过程信息。

Result: 在工业沉积数据上，所提框架相比基线模型提升了膜厚预测性能；注意力权重分析揭示了与物理过程一致的参数-层关系，捕获了主导工艺因素和时序依赖。

Conclusion: 该框架不仅提高了预测精度，还提供了对过程动力学的可解释洞察，支持半导体制造中的有效监测与优化。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence-driven semiconductor manufacturing increasingly operates at nanometer and angstrom scales, where precise process control depends on accurate and timely metrology. However, physical metrology is limited by measurement latency, cost, and sampling constraints, restricting its scalability in high-volume production. Virtual metrology (VM) has emerged as an effective alternative by predicting wafer-level characteristics from equipment sensor data. Despite recent advances, many existing VM models remain correlation-driven and lack the ability to capture structured dependencies among heterogeneous process variables, while providing limited interpretability. This study presents a graph attention-based VM framework for film deposition processes that integrates temporal feature learning with structured parameter-layer dependency modeling. The proposed approach represents each step-parameter pair as a node and extracts temporal embeddings from high-frequency equipment traces using convolutional feature encoders. A parameter-to-layer graph attention mechanism is employed to model directional dependencies, enabling each film layer to aggregate relevant process information. The framework is evaluated using industrial deposition data collected from production wafers, where the model predicts film thickness from multivariate sensor signals. Experimental results demonstrate improved predictive performance compared to baseline models. In addition, analysis of the learned attention weights reveals interpretable parameter-layer relationships consistent with physical process behavior, capturing dominant process factors and temporal dependencies across deposition stages. These results indicate that the proposed framework enhances prediction accuracy and provides meaningful insight into process dynamics, supporting effective monitoring and optimization in semiconductor manufacturing.

</details>


### [501] [Machine Learning Surrogate Modeling for Homogenization of Hyperelastic Materials with Boolean Microstructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00938)
*Matthias Brändel,Oliver Rheinbach*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于监督学习的代理模型，利用低维微结构描述符（面积分数、形状描述符τ、两点相关函数S₂(r)和线性路径函数ℓ(z)）预测超弹性复合材料的有效Lamé参数。通过留一类颗粒形状交叉验证评估泛化能力，结果表明τ和S₂(r)的组合提供紧凑且高精度的预测，加入ℓ(z)虽降低点误差但可能引入非物理行为，凸显未来需引入物理约束的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据驱动代理模型可作为非均质材料数值均匀化的替代方案，旨在从低维微结构描述符高效预测复合材料有效力学性能，避免昂贵的计算成本。

Method: 基于两相随机微结构（平面布尔模型）的数值均匀化数据集，训练神经网络预测有效Lamé参数。输入包括标量描述符（面积分数、形状描述符τ）和曲线值描述符（两点相关函数S₂(r)、线性路径函数ℓ(z)），并融入极限情况数据以稳定训练和改善外推。采用留一类颗粒形状交叉验证评估泛化能力。

Result: τ与S₂(r)组合提供紧凑表示，具有良好的定量精度和规则稠密响应行为；添加ℓ(z)进一步降低可用数据点的误差，但稠密后训练响应评估显示点精度的提升并不自动保证参数采样值之间的物理可行行为。

Conclusion: 曲线值描述符能提升代理模型精度，但仅关注点误差不足以保证物理合理性，未来需研究物理约束代理模型、损失函数设计、有界输出参数化及曲线值几何描述符的系统化表示。

Abstract: Data-driven surrogate models are an alternative to numerical homogenization of heterogeneous materials. In this contribution, a supervised learning approach is presented for predicting effective Lamé parameters of hyperelastic composites from low-dimensional microstructural descriptors. The data set is based on previously published numerical homogenization results for ensembles of two-phase stochastic microstructures generated by planar Boolean models, covering variations of inclusion shape, phase contrast, and area fraction; see Brändel, Brands, Maike, Rheinbach, Schröder, Schwarz and Stoyan (2022). A neural network is trained on combinations of scalar and curve-valued statistical descriptors, including the area fraction, a derived scalar shape descriptor $τ$, the two-point correlation function $S_2(r)$, and the lineal-path function $\ell(z)$. Additional data representing limiting cases of the parameter space are incorporated to stabilize training and improve extrapolation behavior. The surrogate is evaluated by leave-one-grain-type-out cross-validation in order to assess generalization to unseen grain geometries. Numerical results demonstrate that additional descriptors can reduce relative errors. A predictor trained with $τ$ and $S_2(r)$ provides a compact representation with good quantitative accuracy and regular dense response behavior. Adding the lineal-path function $\ell(z)$ further reduces the error at the available data points, indicating that it is a promising additional descriptor; however, dense post-training response evaluations show that improved pointwise accuracy does not automatically guarantee physically admissible behavior between sampled parameter values. This motivates future work on physically constrained surrogate models, loss formulations, bounded output parametrizations, and a more systematic representation of curve-valued geometric descriptors.

</details>


### [502] [Tokenized but Illiquid? Evidence from Real-World Asset Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01131)
*Rischan Mafrur*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文实证分析了现实世界资产代币化后的链上流动性，发现代币化与流动性是不同维度的结果，黄金支持代币展现出优于国债和私人信贷代币的市场活跃度，且资产规模并不能可靠预测流动性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界资产代币化常被宣传为提升非流动性资产流动性的机制，但链上表示与二级市场流动性是不同概念，现有研究缺乏对代币化RWA实际流动性的系统性实证测量。

Method: 使用RWA.xyz和Etherscan数据构建以太坊上月度面板数据，涵盖美国国债支持代币、黄金支持商品代币和私人信贷代币三类非稳定币RWA；以换手率、活跃地址数和活跃月份指标衡量流动性；采用描述性统计、非参数组检验和探索性面板回归分析。

Result: 不同资产类别间流动性存在显著异质性：黄金支持代币的持有者基础更广、链上活动更持久；国债和私人信贷代币流动性较低；资产规模无法可靠预测观察到的流动性水平。

Conclusion: 研究建立了RWA流动性的实证测量框架，证实代币化与流动性应作为独立结果进行分析，二者不可等同。

Abstract: Real-world asset tokenization is often presented as a mechanism for improving the liquidity of traditionally illiquid assets. However, on-chain representation and secondary-market liquidity are distinct outcomes. This paper examines whether tokenized real-world assets exhibit meaningful observed liquidity and identifies the token characteristics associated with higher market activity. Using token-level data from RWA.xyz and supplemental contract-level observations from Etherscan, the study constructs an Ethereum-based monthly panel of non-stablecoin real-world assets across three prominent categories: U.S. Treasury-backed tokens, gold-backed commodity tokens, and private-credit-related tokens. Liquidity is measured using turnover, active addresses, and an active-month indicator. The empirical design combines descriptive statistics, non-parametric group tests, and exploratory panel regressions suited to short and sparse token histories. The results show substantial heterogeneity across asset categories. Gold-backed tokens exhibit broader holder bases and more persistent on-chain activity than many Treasury and private-credit-related products, while outstanding asset value alone does not reliably predict observed liquidity. The paper contributes to the literature by developing a clearer empirical measurement framework for real-world-asset liquidity and showing that tokenization and liquidity should be analyzed as distinct outcomes.

</details>


### [503] [MsFEM-Inspired CNNs with Transfer Learning for Multiscale Model Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01259)
*Xuehan Zhang,Lijian Jiang,Eric T. Chung*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于MsFEM启发的迁移学习策略(MITL)，将CNN降阶模型与多尺度有限元方法结合，通过预训练学习可迁移的多尺度表示，仅需训练轻量级自适应网络即可适应新任务（源项、边界条件或微分算子变化），显著降低计算成本，尤其在数据稀缺场景下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的深度学习代理模型在源项、边界条件或微分算子发生变化时需要从头重新训练神经网络，导致计算成本高、适应性差。

Method: 将CNN降阶模型与多尺度有限元方法(MsFEM)结合，提出MITL迁移学习策略。CNN降阶模型包含Basis CNNs（学习降阶基函数）和Coef CNNs（预测线性组合系数）。预训练阶段使用全局MsFEM基问题作为源任务，迁移时仅训练轻量级自适应网络来构建任务特定的降阶基和系数。

Result: MITL在多种目标任务上实现了准确高效的预测，在数据稀缺场景下具有显著优势。

Conclusion: MITL策略有效提升了深度学习代理模型在多尺度系统预测中的适应性和效率，大幅降低了新任务下的计算负担。

Abstract: Deep learning-based surrogate models have been extensively developed for efficiently approximating multiscale systems with random input fields. However, most existing approaches require retraining neural networks from scratch when source terms, boundary conditions, or differential operators change, resulting in significant computational costs and limited adaptability. To address this challenge, we integrate our previous CNN-based reduced-order model (ROM) framework with the multiscale finite element method (MsFEM) and propose an MsFEM-inspired transfer learning strategy, termed MITL. The CNN-based ROM consists of two components: Basis CNNs, which learn reduced basis functions, and Coef CNNs, which predict the corresponding linear combination coefficients. To enhance the transferability of learned multiscale representations, global MsFEM basis problems are employed as source tasks during pretraining. For new target problems, MITL requires training only lightweight adaptation networks to construct task-specific reduced bases and coefficients, thereby substantially reducing the computational burden. Numerical experiments demonstrate that MITL achieves accurate and efficient predictions across a range of target tasks, with particularly significant advantages in data-scarce scenarios.

</details>


### [504] [Conservative Discrete Structure Stabilizes Autoregressive Rollouts in a 1D Drift Diffusion Poisson Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01366)
*Yufeng Wang,Lu Wei,Haibin Ling*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文在受控的一维漂移扩散泊松基准测试中，证明了保守有限体积结构（Conservative FluxNet）相比直接神经网络回归、泊松重计算、电荷投影及 rollout 训练等方法，在自回归 rollout 中能够实现接近舍入误差的误差（MSE 7.35×10⁻⁹），而未经约束的基线方法误差高达 4.23×10¹。在 64 组预设配置中，保守模型在 rollout MSE 上赢得 60/64 案例，尽管一步 MSE 仅赢得 19/64，说明局部保守离散结构对稳定长期 rollout 比一步回归精度更重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学习的等离子体输运代理模型在短时间步长上表现良好，但在长时间 rollout 中因未能满足电荷守恒、密度可容性与泊松兼容场重构而导致失效。本文旨在探究这一问题，并验证保守离散结构对稳定长期自回归 rollout 的关键作用。

Method: 提出 Conservative FluxNet，一种结构保持的通量校正模型，结合保守有限体积更新和正性感知限制。在一维漂移扩散泊松基准上，将其与直接下一状态回归器、含泊松重计算的直接变体、电荷投影方法、rollout 训练以及经典保守核心（无学习校正）进行对比实验。

Result: 保守模型实现 rollout MSE 7.35×10⁻⁹，远优于未约束基线（4.23×10¹）、泊松重计算（2.53×10¹）、电荷投影（6.72×10¹）和四步 rollout 训练（2.71×10¹）。在 64 组配置中，保守模型在 rollout MSE 上胜出 60/64 案例，尽管一步 MSE 仅胜出 19/64。

Conclusion: 对于该受控基准和比较类别，局部保守有限体积结构比一步神经网络回归精度对稳定的自回归 rollout 更为关键。本文的核心贡献在于保守离散结构而非学习闭合模型。
