Abstract: Learned plasma transport surrogates can match short horizon states while failing over long rollouts because charge accounting, density admissibility, and Poisson compatible field reconstruction are not enforced. We study this issue in a controlled nondimensional one dimensional drift diffusion Poisson benchmark with Dirichlet electrostatic potential boundaries and zero species wall fluxes. The benchmark is a conservation and rollout test, not a complete sheath wall model. We compare Conservative FluxNet, a structure preserving flux correction model with a conservative finite volume update and positivity aware limiting, against direct next state regressors, direct variants with Poisson recomputation, charge projection, and rollout training, and a classical conservative core without learned correction. The central result is that the classical finite volume core alone achieves near roundoff rollout error, so the paper is primarily about conservative discrete structure rather than learned closure. On the headline experiment, the conservative model achieves rollout MSE $7.35\times 10^{-9}$ versus $4.23\times 10^{1}$ for the unconstrained baseline, $2.53\times 10^{1}$ with Poisson recomputation, $6.72\times 10^{1}$ with charge projection, and $2.71\times 10^{1}$ with four step rollout training. Across $64$ prespecified configurations, it wins rollout mean squared error in $60/64$ cases despite winning one step mean squared error in only $19/64$. These results show that, for this controlled benchmark and comparison class, local conservative finite volume structure is more important than one step neural regression accuracy for stable autoregressive rollout.

</details>


### [505] [Are Economists Open to AI? Text as Data as Survey on Professional Sentiment and Academic Research Trends](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01958)
*Yi Wang,Lei Ge*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: TaDaS是一个将自然发生的文本转换为类似调查证据的框架，通过跨数据集语义检索将问题语料库与答案语料库链接，用于从非结构化文本中提取态度测量。应用于经济学家对AI的反应，发现AI相关讨论在横截面上开放性更低、负面性更高，但随着AI在顶级期刊中更受关注，交互证据显示所有六个维度均呈积极方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统调查成本高、难以回顾性重建且易受自我呈现偏差影响；互联网原始文本丰富但嘈杂、弱结构化且受平台选择影响。需要一种能够从现有文本档案中恢复可扩展、可回顾、非反应性的专业态度测量的方法。

Method: TaDaS框架：首先筛选参考问题语料库构建焦点和可比语义邻域；然后将来自答案语料库的非结构化观测映射到这些邻域；最后对结果话语中表达的态度进行评分。应用时将130万条Economics Job Market Rumors论坛帖子与53,585篇精英经济学和金融学出版物链接，沿六个维度（开放性、消极性、毒性、傲慢、好奇心、困惑）测量专业情绪。

Result: AI相关讨论在横截面上开放性更低、消极性更高；但交互证据显示，随着AI在精英期刊中更受关注，六个维度均朝有利方向变化。

Conclusion: TaDaS能够从现有文本档案中恢复可扩展、可回顾、非反应性的专业情绪测量，为利用自然语言数据替代传统调查提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Traditional surveys are costly, hard to reconstruct retrospectively, and vulnerable to self-presentation bias. Raw internet text is abundant but noisy, weakly structured, and platform-selected. We introduce TaDaS (Text as Data as Survey), a framework that converts naturally occurring text into survey-like evidence by linking a question corpus to an answer corpus through cross-dataset semantic retrieval. TaDaS first screens a reference question corpus to construct focal and comparable semantic neighborhoods. It then maps unstructured observations from an answer corpus onto these neighborhoods and scores the attitudes expressed in the resulting discourse. We apply the framework to economists' reactions to AI by linking 1.3 million research-related posts from Economics Job Market Rumors with 53,585 elite economics and finance publications. Publication-side topics define the research frontier; forum-side replies reveal professional sentiment along six dimensions: openness, negativity, toxicity, arrogance, curiosity, and confusion. AI-related discussion is less open and more negative in cross-section, but the interaction evidence points in a favorable direction on all six dimensions as AI becomes more visible in elite journals. The findings show how TaDaS can recover scalable, retrospective, and non-reactive measures of professional sentiment from existing text archives.

</details>


### [506] [Matter to Mechanism: A Benchmark for AI Co-Scientists in Materials and Battery Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02258)
*Shashwat Sourav,Tanjin. He,Maria K. Y. Chan,Anubhav Jain,Tirthankar Ghosal*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文提出了Matter to Mechanism基准，用于评估AI联合科学家在材料科学（特别是电池研究）中从具体问题到机制驱动的解决方案假设的推理能力。该基准包含2,645个从文献中提取的实例，并引入了一套多维度评估指标，实验表明该基准能揭示系统间可解释的差异，且聚合分数比单一指标更抗干扰。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI联合科学家的评估尚未测试其从具体科学/技术问题到合理的、基于机制的解决方案假设这一关键推理任务，尤其在材料科学和电池研究领域存在空白。

Method: 构建了包含2,645个从科学出版物中提取的实例的基准，每个实例包含结构化问题陈述、候选解决方案假设、显式推理轨迹以及领域标注（材料系统、组件、失效模式、干预措施、机制、目标属性、声称结果）。引入了一套包含推理忠实度、问题对齐、机制特异性、新颖性、合理性、问题分解质量的评估指标，并组合成复合分数。

Result: 评估了多个AI联合科学家系统，发现Matter to Mechanism能揭示标准文本相似度指标无法完全捕捉的系统间可解释差异。对抗性压力测试表明，聚合分数比单个指标维度在面对表面性攻击时更稳定。

Conclusion: Matter to Mechanism基准有效评估了AI在材料科学中的问题到假设推理能力，弥补了现有评估体系的不足。

Abstract: AI co-scientists are increasingly used for scientific discovery, but current evaluations still do not test them on a key task: moving from a concrete scientific or technological problem to a plausible, mechanism-grounded solution hypothesis. This gap is especially important in materials science and, in particular, battery research, where a useful proposal must identify the relevant failure mode, propose a credible intervention, and explain why that intervention should improve the target property. We introduce Matter to Mechanism, a benchmark for evaluating AI co-scientists on problem-to-hypothesis reasoning in materials science, with a focus on battery materials research. The benchmark contains 2,645 instances derived from scientific publications. Each instance includes a structured problem statement, a candidate solution hypothesis, an explicit reasoning trace, and domain-grounded annotations such as material system, component, failure mode, intervention, mechanism, target property, and claimed outcome. We also introduce a metric suite that measures reasoning fidelity, problem alignment, mechanistic specificity, novelty, plausibility, and problem decomposition quality, and combine them into a composite score. Using this framework, we evaluate several AI co-scientist systems and show that Matter to Mechanism reveals interpretable system differences that are only partially recovered by standard text-similarity metrics. We further show through adversarial stress tests that the aggregate score is more stable than individual metric dimensions under superficial gaming attacks.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [507] [PaintBench: Deterministic Evaluation of Precise Visual Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00188)
*Kai Xu,Ellis Brown,Shrikar Madhu,Rob Fergus,He He,Saining Xie*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: PaintBench是一个动态可扩展的精确视觉编辑基准，涵盖几何变换、结构操作、颜色变化和符号推理四类20种操作。评估发现当前最优模型仅达17.1% mIoU，且任务分解揭示了不同操作类型的难度差异及模型特定专长。通过与数据可视化编辑任务（TinyGrafixBench）的强线性相关验证了基准的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态模型在开放式视觉编辑方面表现良好，但在执行精确的单答案编辑方面仍存在重要障碍。为系统性地探测这一挑战，需要建立一个严格、可扩展且抗污染的基准测试。

Method: 通过程序化生成方式构建可配置复杂度的基准PaintBench，包含20种精确视觉编辑操作（四类）。采用确定性像素级评估（无需偏倚的评判模型），并在TinyGrafixBench上验证泛化性。

Result: 11个图像编辑模型中最高分仅17.1% mIoU。几何变换、多数结构操作及基于公式的颜色变化最为困难。场景变化（目标数量、背景复杂度、配色方案、编辑区域大小）会导致性能下降。PaintBench与TinyGrafixBench得分呈强线性相关（R²=0.91，p<0.001）。

Conclusion: PaintBench为测量和推动精确多模态视觉编辑的进展提供了严格基础。

Abstract: While current multimodal models are proficient at open-ended visual editing, executing precise single-answer edits remains an important obstacle. To probe this challenge, we introduce PaintBench, a dynamically scalable benchmark targeting 20 fundamental precise visual editing operations across four categories: geometric transformation, structural manipulation, color change, and symbolic reasoning. Procedural generation with configurable complexity enables an effectively infinite, contamination-resistant evaluation suite, and deterministic pixel-level evaluation eliminates reliance on bias-prone judge models. Across 11 image editing models, we find overall low performance, with the current highest-performing industry leader scoring only 17.1% (mIoU). Task decomposition reveals especially challenging operation types (geometric transformation, most structural manipulation, formula-based color change) and model-specific specializations. Fine-grained benchmark diagnostics further show performance degradations induced by scene variations in object count, background complexity, color scheme, and edit-region size. To test generalization of PaintBench scores to applied task performance, we create a procedural, deterministic evaluation for data visualization editing (TinyGrafixBench) and find strong linear correlation with PaintBench scores ($R^2 = 0.91$, $p < 0.001$). Altogether, PaintBench provides a rigorous foundation for measuring and driving progress in precise multimodal visual editing.

</details>


### [508] [Subgrid Marching Tetrahedra](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00454)
*Hossein Baktash,Mark Gillespie,Keenan Crane*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出了一种子网格行进方法，能够在四面体网格中从连续曲面的穿透点恢复流形、无交点的三角网格，支持每个单元内任意多个曲面片，且无需定义内外或一致方向输入，通过推广几何拓扑中的法坐标绕过奈奎斯特-香农极限，在相同计算时间和网格分辨率下精度远超经典行进方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典行进立方体/四面体方法每个单元只能处理一个曲面片，无法捕捉细小特征和薄片，且依赖明确定义的内外区域或一致朝向的输入几何，这限制了其对复杂表面（如带边界的曲面、多边形汤）的重建能力。

Method: 核心创新是推广几何拓扑中的法坐标概念，通过沿每条网格边的任意整数交点计数来编码表面连通性；每个四面体独立进行局部重建，生成跨四面体边界的兼容网格；该编码方式绕过奈奎斯特-香农极限，固定网格上可解析的特征尺寸无下限。

Result: 在相同计算时间和网格分辨率下（甚至输出相同数量的三角形），子网格行进生成的网格精度远高于经典行进方法；此外可用于将多边形汤转换为流形、无交点的网格。

Conclusion: 子网格行进保留了经典行进的局部并行特性，同时突破了其每个单元单曲面片的限制，无需内外定义和一致方向，能够在固定网格上解析任意小特征，精度显著优于经典方法，并拓展了应用范围（如多边形汤转换）。

Abstract: We describe a method for recovering a manifold, intersection-free triangle mesh from the points where edges of a tetrahedral grid pierce a continuous surface. Unlike classic marching cubes or tets, our subgrid marching scheme allows arbitrarily many surface patches within a single cell, capturing fine features and thin sheets. Moreover, it requires neither a well-defined inside/outside (allowing surfaces with boundary), nor consistently-oriented input geometry. Yet we retain the local, parallel nature of classic marching: reconstruction is performed independently per tet, yielding a conforming mesh across tet boundaries. Our key innovation is a generalization of normal coordinates from geometric topology, which encode surface connectivity via arbitrary integer intersection counts along each grid edge. This encoding sidesteps the usual Nyquist--Shannon limit, putting no lower bound on the size of features that can be resolved on a fixed grid. In practice, for similar compute time and equal grid resolution -- or even an equal number of output triangles -- meshes produced by subgrid marching are far more accurate than those from classic marching. Beyond standard contouring, our method can be used to convert polygon soup into a manifold, intersection-free mesh.

</details>


### [509] [Directed Distance Fields for Constant-Time Ray Queries on Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00817)
*Subhankar MIshra*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出将训练好的3D高斯泼溅(3DGS)场景通过蒸馏一个有向距离函数(DDF)转化为光线追踪Oracle，用于高效计算阴影、环境光遮蔽和全局光照所需的次级光线。DDF是一个小型神经场，接收光线(原点和方向)并返回到第一个表面的距离及是否命中。该方法在142个物体上实现30.3dB的阴影和21.3dB的环境光遮蔽重建质量，查询速度比等效有符号距离场的球体追踪快26-72倍，且内存和查询时间不随场景规模增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3DGS作为光栅化器只能处理来自相机的初级光线，无法处理阴影、环境光遮蔽和全局光照所需的次级光线追踪。现有解决方案如构建有符号距离场或层次包围盒存在速度慢、内存随场景增长等问题。

Method: 从训练好的3DGS场景中蒸馏一个有向距离函数(DDF)作为光线Oracle。DDF是一个小型神经场，以光线起点和方向为输入，输出到首个表面的距离和命中标志。利用神经表面提供的干净距离监督进行训练，无需网格。

Result: DDF查询速度比等效SDF的球体追踪快26-72倍；内存和查询时间不随场景规模增长(恒定52MB)；在142个物体上实现阴影30.3dB和环境光遮蔽21.3dB的重建质量；在真实场景上同样有效。

Conclusion: 证明了DDF作为3DGS场景的次级光线追踪Oracle是高效且可扩展的方案，突破了3DGS无法进行光线追踪的局限，为全局光照等应用提供了实用路径。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) renders new views of a scene in real time. Like every rasterizer, it answers only primary rays, the rays from the camera through the image. It cannot trace the secondary rays that shadows, ambient occlusion, and global illumination need. We turn a trained 3DGS scene into a ray oracle by distilling a Directed Distance Function (DDF). The DDF is a small neural field. It takes a ray, given by an origin and a direction, and returns the distance to the first surface and whether the ray hits anything. Each query is one forward pass. The field is 52~MB, and its size does not depend on the number of Gaussians, so its cost and memory stay flat as the scene grows. We make three points. First, we study what supervision a DDF needs. Depth rendered from the Gaussians is too blurry to teach thin parts, while clean distance supervision recovers them. Second, we measure speed. The DDF is 26 to 72 times faster than sphere tracing an equivalent signed distance field, and unlike a bounding volume hierarchy built over the Gaussians, even on dedicated RT-core hardware, its query time and memory do not grow with the scene. Third, we show a pipeline that needs no mesh: images give a 3DGS scene, a neural surface gives clean distances, and the DDF learns from them. We use the DDF as a secondary-ray oracle for global illumination. It reproduces reference ray-traced shadows at 30.3~dB and ambient occlusion at 21.3~dB across 142 objects, and on real captured scenes. Our codes are available at https://github.com/smlab-niser/ddf-gs.

</details>


### [510] [Temporally-Aligned Evaluation for Audio-Driven Talking Head Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01031)
*Zhicheng Zhang,Lei Wang,Yu Zhang,Yongsheng Gao*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出将音频驱动说话头生成模型的评估从逐帧比较重构为序列对齐问题，通过引入软动态时间规整（Soft-DTW）统一评估框架，在20种方法、7个数据集上的实验表明，该时序对齐度量对时间偏移更鲁棒，能更清晰区分不同建模范式间的权衡（如同步性 vs. 真实感、表现力 vs. 稳定性）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估协议依赖逐帧度量，假设生成视频与参考视频存在严格时间对应，但语音驱动的面部运动自然包含轻微时序偏移、语速差异和风格变化，导致无害的时间差异被误判为质量误差，难以公平比较不同方法及其权衡。

Method: 将评估重构为序列对齐问题，提出将软动态时间规整（Soft-DTW）融入现有评估管线，在对齐特征轨迹的同时保持时间顺序，使框架对有限的时间错位具有鲁棒性，且不改变底层感知、身份或同步编码器。逐帧评估被视为刚性对齐下的特例。

Result: 在20种方法、7个数据集上的大规模基准实验表明：时序对齐度量对时间差异更鲁棒；跨数据集结果更一致；能更好地揭示建模范式间的系统性权衡，如同步性 vs. 真实感、表现力 vs. 稳定性。

Conclusion: 序列级时序对齐评估比逐帧评估更稳定，对时序差异更不敏感，能更清晰区分不同建模范式，应为动态生成模型评估的标准范式。

Abstract: Audio-driven talking-head generation has advanced rapidly, yet existing evaluation protocols mainly rely on frame-wise metrics that assume strict temporal correspondence between generated and reference videos. This assumption does not match speech-driven facial motion, which naturally includes slight timing shifts, different speaking speeds, and stylistic variations. As a result, conventional metrics may treat harmless timing differences as quality errors, making it harder to fairly compare methods and understand their trade-offs. In this work, we argue that evaluation of dynamic generative models should be formulated as a sequence-alignment problem rather than independent frame comparison. We introduce a unified sequence-level reformulation that integrates Soft Dynamic Time Warping into established evaluation pipelines. By aligning feature trajectories while preserving temporal order, the proposed framework provides robustness to bounded temporal misalignments without altering the underlying perceptual, identity, or synchronization encoders. We show that frame-wise evaluation can be viewed as a special case under rigid alignment, while sequence-level alignment provides improved stability, lower sensitivity to timing differences, and clearer separation between modeling paradigms. Building on this principled formulation, we conduct a large-scale benchmark of 20 methods across seven datasets spanning canonical, in-the-wild, and style-diverse scenarios under standardized protocols. Extensive experiments show that temporally aligned metrics are more robust to timing differences, provide more consistent results across datasets, and better reveal systematic trade-offs between modeling paradigms, such as synchronization versus realism and expressiveness versus stability.

</details>


### [511] [AlbedoEdit: Unified Instance-Level Video Editing with Albedo Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01362)
*Xilong Zhou,Bao-Huy Nguyen,Zheng Zeng,Jacob Munkberg,Jon Hasselgren,Thomas Leimkühler,Nima Kalantari,Miloš Hašan,Christian Theobalt*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: AlbedoEdit是一个统一视频编辑框架，通过利用光照不变的固有反照率图（albedo map）作为用户编辑条件，联合支持物体插入、移除和纹理编辑三种细粒度实例级视频编辑任务，在合成数据集上微调视频基础模型，实现编辑内容的和谐融入与复杂视觉效果模拟，性能优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频编辑方法要么只提供粗粒度语义控制，要么为每个编辑任务设计独立框架，缺乏灵活性和通用性。本文旨在提出一个统一框架，同时支持物体插入、物体移除和纹理编辑三种细粒度实例级编辑任务。

Method: 利用光照不变的固有反照率图（albedo map）作为用户友好的编辑条件，在视频基础模型上进行微调，以源RGB视频和用户编辑的第一帧反照率为条件，将其翻译为编辑后的RGB视频。训练使用包含三种编辑任务的配对合成数据集。

Result: AlbedoEdit在定性和定量评估上均优于最先进的视频编辑方法，能够隐式学习编辑内容的和谐融入，并模拟编辑操作触发的复杂真实世界视觉效果，如高光、软阴影和镜像反射。

Conclusion: AlbedoEdit成功实现了一个统一的细粒度实例级视频编辑框架，证明了反照率图作为编辑条件的有效性，为更广泛和更具创意的视频编辑应用铺平了道路。

Abstract: Video generative models have achieved remarkable progress in synthesizing photorealistic video sequences. However, enabling broader and more creative downstream applications requires fine-grained instance-level video editing, including object insertion, object removal, and texture editing, which has emerged as a prominent yet challenging problem. Existing approaches either propose unified generative frameworks with only coarse semantic control, or design task-specific frameworks for individual editing tasks, limiting their flexibility and applicability across diverse real-world scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose AlbedoEdit, a unified generative video editing framework that jointly supports object insertion, object removal, and texture editing. Our key insight is that the intrinsic albedo map, which is invariant to lighting and contains no specularity, shadowing and inter-reflection effects, provides an effective and user-friendly mechanism for specifying fine-grained appearance edits. Built upon video foundation models, AlbedoEdit is fine-tuned to translate source RGB videos into edited RGB videos, conditioned on a user-edited first-frame albedo. Trained on a new paired synthetic dataset covering all three editing tasks, AlbedoEdit implicitly learns to harmonize edited contents and simulate complex real-world visual effects triggered by editing operations, including specular highlights, soft shadows, and mirror reflections. AlbedoEdit demonstrates superior performance over state-of-the-art video editing approaches, both qualitatively and quantitatively. Project webpage is https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/AlbedoEdit/.

</details>


### [512] [MPMWorlds: Material-Point-Method Simulations for Inferring and Extrapolating Physical Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01538)
*Žiga Kovačič,Kevin Ellis*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文构建了2D MPM物理模拟数据集，对比了代码生成与视频扩散两种方法在物理动力学推断和时序外推上的表现，发现代码生成能产生物理稳定但难以从视觉中推断参数的外推，而视频扩散能更好识别几何特性但外推结果物理上不可靠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究从视频中推断物理动力学并向前时序外推的能力，对比不同方法在该任务上的优缺点。

Method: 构建包含可变形物体、流体、动力学物体和发射器等丰富物理现象的2D MPM物理模拟数据集，采用代码生成和视频扩散两种方法，通过改变物理相关侧信息的量来评估其性能。

Result: 代码生成模型能自动合成MPM模拟，但难以从视觉输入推断物理参数；视频扩散模型能更好识别几何属性，但产生物理上不可行的外推结果。代码生成在物理和时间稳定性上优于视频扩散。

Conclusion: 两种方法各有优劣：代码生成擅长物理稳定外推但参数推断能力弱，视频扩散擅长几何识别但物理可靠性不足，提示未来可能需要融合两者的优势。

Abstract: To study the ability to infer physical dynamics from videos and extrapolate them forward in time, we assemble a dataset of 2D Material Point Method (MPM) physical simulations covering rich physical phenomena such as deformable objects, fluids, kinetic objects, and emitters. We study code generation and video diffusion approaches on this dataset, identifying their strengths and weaknesses by varying the amount of physically relevant side information. The code generation model, beyond giving a working demonstration of automatic synthesis of MPM simulations, reveals that such an approach struggles with inferring physical parameters from visual input, but relative to video diffusion, produces physically and temporally stable extrapolations forward in time, while the video diffusion model more strongly identifies geometric properties from visual input but produces physically implausible extrapolations.

</details>


### [513] [KDH-CAD: Knowledge-data hybrid CAD learning under data scarcity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01702)
*Ziqin Gao,Zhijie Yang,Qiang Zou*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出KDH-CAD框架，通过融合预训练基础模型、结构化领域知识和少量标注CAD数据，将CAD学习重构为知识补全与校准问题，在仅用250个训练样本时达到92.6%的分类准确率，显著降低了CAD深度学习对大规模数据集的依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CAD领域面临严重的数据稀缺问题：真实CAD数据难以大规模采集，合成数据又无法忠实反映真实设计实践。现有方法倾向于构建更大的数据集，但本文认为这并非根本解决之道。

Method: 提出知识-数据混合框架KDH-CAD，包含三个核心组件：(1) 利用预训练基础模型中的先验知识；(2) 引入教材/教程中的结构化领域知识来补全基础模型中弱表达或未充分表示的CAD相关概念；(3) 仅使用极少量标注CAD数据在潜在空间中对这些概念进行校准，以适应任务特定的几何变异性，且无需微调基础模型。

Result: 在真实机械零件分类任务上，KDH-CAD在低数据场景下表现优异：250个样本达92.6%准确率，1000个样本达95.8%，且随数据增加持续提升。性能匹配或超越需要多一个数量级数据的现有最佳方法。

Conclusion: 将预训练基础模型与结构化领域知识相结合，能够显著减少对大规模CAD数据集的依赖，为数据高效的CAD学习提供了有原则且实用的方向。

Abstract: Deep learning in computer-aided design (CAD) remains fundamentally constrained by the data scarcity challenge: authentic CAD data is difficult to collect at scale, while synthetic data may not faithfully reflect real design practice. Rather than pursuing ever-larger CAD datasets, this paper alternatively treats CAD learning as a knowledge completion and calibration problem. It introduces KDH-CAD, a knowledge-data hybrid framework that integrates pretrained knowledge in foundation models, structured domain knowledge from textbooks/tutorials, and a very small amount of labeled CAD data. Domain knowledge is used to elicit and complete CAD-relevant concepts that are weakly expressed or under-represented in pretrained foundation models, while labeled CAD data calibrates these concepts in the latent space to account for task-specific geometric variability, without fine-tuning the foundation model. Experiments on real-world mechanical part classification show that KDH-CAD achieves strong performance in low-data regimes, reaching 92.6\% accuracy with only 250 training samples, 95.8\% with 1,000 samples, and continuing to improve with additional data. This matches or exceeds state-of-the-art performance that typically requires an order of magnitude more data. These results suggest that combining pretrained foundation models with structured domain knowledge can substantially reduce reliance on large-scale CAD datasets, providing a principled and practical direction for data-efficient CAD learning.

</details>


### [514] [MidSurfNet: Learnable Face Pairing and Interference Implicit Fields for Generalized Mid-surface Abstraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01891)
*Li Ye,Xinhang Zhou,Xingyu Yang,Ruofeng Tong,Hailong Li,Peng Du,Min Tang*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: MidSurfNet是一个学习增强框架，通过神经面配对模块和干涉隐式场两个创新组件，解决了薄壁CAD模型中多壁厚区域、自匹配面配置和非中心偏移曲面等传统方法难以处理的中间面抽象问题，在包含1500多个手动标注CAD模型的数据集上实现了87.32%的面配对准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于面配对的中间面抽象方法依赖手工几何启发式规则，在工业模型中常见的多壁厚区域、自匹配面配置以及非中心偏移曲面需求等场景下，基于规则的方法持续失效，需要更鲁棒的解决方案。

Method: 提出MidSurfNet框架，包含两个核心组件：(1)神经面配对模块，从几何和拓扑特征中学习预测面配对置信度；(2)干涉隐式场，将中间面表示为两个符号距离函数的干涉，支持通用偏移控制。

Result: 在1500+手动标注CAD模型数据集上，面配对准确率达87.32%，多壁厚场景完成率61.90%，自匹配场景完成率52.94%，优于所有现有方法。

Conclusion: MidSurfNet提供了面向CAE应用的通用中间面抽象学习方法，突破了传统规则方法的局限性，并实现了任意偏移控制。

Abstract: Mid-surface abstraction is essential for finite element analysis of thin-walled CAD models. Existing face pairing-based methods rely on handcrafted geometric heuristics, yet real-world industrial models frequently exhibit multi-wall-thickness regions, self-matching face configurations, and demand for non-center offset surfaces--scenarios where rule-based approaches consistently fail. We present MidSurfNet, a learning-augmented framework that addresses these limitations through two novel components: (1) a neural face pairing module that learns to predict face pair confidence from geometric and topological features, handling complex pairing scenarios beyond rule-based methods; and (2) an interference implicit field that represents mid-surfaces as the interference of two signed distance functions, enabling generalized offset control for flexible positioning in downstream CAE/FEA-oriented workflows. We construct a large-scale mid-surface dataset containing over 1,500 manually annotated CAD models. Experiments demonstrate that MidSurfNet achieves 87.32% face pairing accuracy and successfully handles multi-wall-thickness (61.90% completion) and self-matching (52.94% completion) scenarios that confound all existing methods. Furthermore, MidSurfNet provides a learning-based approach to generalized mid-surface abstraction with arbitrary offset control for CAE-oriented applications.

</details>


### [515] [Single-Line Drawing Generation via Semantics-Driven Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01910)
*Tanguy Magne,Alexandre Binninger,Ruben Wiersma,Olga Sorkine-Hornung*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于语义驱动的单线画生成方法，通过分数蒸馏采样优化均匀有理B样条曲线参数，能够根据文本描述或输入图像自动生成矢量格式的单笔连续线条画，并支持下游制造工艺。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线条画是一种高度表现力的艺术形式，需要艺术家抽象和提炼主题精髓。现有方法缺乏语义驱动且难以生成单笔连续线条的矢量格式，无法直接应用于下游制造工艺。

Method: 采用分数蒸馏采样优化均匀有理B样条曲线参数，确保画作由单一连续笔触构成；通过额外损失项控制细节水平和艺术风格，实现矢量格式的单线画生成。

Result: 在美学质量和风格忠实度上均优于现有最先进的文本到图像模型和优化管线，生成的单线画更符合连续线条画艺术家的风格。

Conclusion: 该方法生成的矢量化曲线可直接支持刺绣、激光雕刻和线材弯曲等下游制造工艺，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Line drawings are a highly expressive art form that requires the artist to abstract and distill the essence of their subject. We present the first semantics-driven method for automatically generating single-line drawings in vector format, guided either by a text prompt describing the concept or an input image depicting it. Our approach leverages score distillation sampling to optimize the parameters of a uniform rational B-spline (URBS) curve, ensuring that the drawing consists of a single continuous stroke by design. This representation provides fine-grained control over the level of detail, while additional loss terms allow us to steer the final artistic style. We demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art text-to-image models and optimization pipelines for this task, producing results that are both more aesthetically pleasing and more faithful to the style of continuous line drawing artists. Furthermore, because our method generates a vectorized curve, it directly supports downstream fabrication processes such as embroidery, laser engraving and wire bending. Our code and results are available at https://github.com/tanguymagne/SLDgen.

</details>


### [516] [Composable function systems as a general-purpose rendering framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02226)
*James Schloss*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于函数系统进行通用（非分形）可视化与仿真的新方法，并介绍了Quibble——一个在GPU上组合此类系统的元编程框架。该方法在运行时性能、创建拓扑非平凡对象以及与其他图形算法的互操作性方面具有核心优势，还可用于低帧率动画的中间帧控制、点云可控变形以及动画工作流的元编程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 函数系统作为无网格创建和操作复杂对象的自然语言，在GPU或CPU上占用极少内存，但缺乏面向通用可视化与仿真的高效方法，现有工作多聚焦于分形领域。

Method: 提出了基于函数系统的通用可视化与仿真方法，并设计了Quibble元编程框架，用于在GPU上组合和编译函数系统。

Result: 该方法在运行时性能上表现优异，能够创建拓扑非平凡对象，并支持与其他图形算法的互操作；同时可应用于低帧率动画中间帧生成、点云变形控制及动画工作流元编程。

Conclusion: 函数系统方法在通用图形学中具有广阔的应用前景，Quibble框架为艺术家和开发者提供了高效、灵活的工具。

Abstract: Function systems exist as a natural language for the meshless creation and manipulation of complex objects while maintaining minimal memory on the Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) or Central Processing Unit (CPU). This paper proposes a new method for general-purpose (non-fractal) visualizations and simulations with function systems and introduces Quibble, a metaprogramming framework for composing such systems on the GPU. We also discuss several core advantages of this method including runtime performance, the creation of topologically non-trivial objects, and interoperability with other graphical algorithms. Beyond general-purpose imagery and animations, this method can also be used to give artists more control over in-between frames in low-framerate animations, controllably deform point clouds, and metaprogram difficult animation workflows.

</details>


<div id='cs.IT'></div>

# cs.IT [[Back]](#toc)

### [517] [Quantum Simultaneous Information and Power Transfer: Capacity-Power Trade-offs in Discrete and Continuous Channels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00406)
*Nizar Khalfet,Ioannis Krikidis*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出量子同步信息与功率传输（QSIPT）框架，研究量子态同时用于经典信息传输和能量收集的折中关系，定义了离散变量和连续变量量子信道的容量-功率函数，并给出了多种信道与编码方案下的闭式解与数值结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在量子通信系统中，量子态携带能量和信息，传统研究通常将两者分离处理。本文旨在探索量子态同时用于信息传输和能量收集的可行性，并刻画两者之间的基本折中关系。

Method: 定义容量-功率函数以刻画通信速率与收集能量间的折中关系。对于DV信道，推导容量-功率函数的性质，给出振幅阻尼信道的解析上下界和量子擦除信道的精确闭式解。对于CV信道，引入广义分束器接收机（可调透射率），联合优化发射机平均光子数预算，分析相干态、压缩态和热态在损耗玻色子信道及加性高斯噪声信道下的折中关系。

Result: 相干态在被考虑的平移高斯编码类中实现了最优的容量-功率折中；压缩态在相位不敏感信道和被动接收机架构下未优于相干态编码；热态可实现能量传输但无法支持可靠通信。给出了相干态编码下联合光子数预算与可调透射率方案的闭式表达式，压缩态编码进行了数值评估。

Conclusion: 量子同步信息与功率传输是可行的，但存在固有的折中关系；相干态是平衡通信与能量收集的最优选择，压缩态在此架构下无增益，热态仅适用于纯能量传输场景。

Abstract: This paper introduces a new framework for quantum simultaneous information and power transfer (QSIPT), enabling the joint use of quantum states for classical information and energy transfer in quantum communication systems. We propose a novel model in which quantum states are simultaneously used to transmit classical information through a quantum channel and transfer energy to an energy harvesting (EH) receiver. The trade-off between communication rate and harvested energy is characterized by the capacity-power function, which is defined and characterized for both discrete-variable (DV) and continuous-variable (CV) quantum channels. For DV channels, we derive the properties of the capacity-power function, providing analytical upper and lower bounds for the amplitude damping channel and an exact closed-form characterization for the quantum erasure channel. For CV channels, we extend the mathematical framework by introducing a generalized beam-splitter (BS) receiver with adjustable transmissivity, jointly optimized with a transmitter mean-photon-number budget, that splits the channel output between the information decoder and the EH receiver. Specifically, we analyze the capacity-power trade-off under various Gaussian encoding schemes including coherent, squeezed, and thermal states for both lossy bosonic and additive Gaussian noise channels. Closed-form expressions are derived for coherent-state encoding under the joint photon-number-budget and adjustable-transmissivity formulation; squeezed-state inputs are evaluated numerically. Our results show that, within the considered displaced Gaussian encoding class, coherent states achieve the best capacity-power trade-off, squeezed states do not outperform coherent-state encoding under the phase-insensitive channel and passive receiver architecture, and thermal states enable energy transfer without supporting reliable communication.

</details>


### [518] [Hybrid Bit and Semantic Communications for UAV-Enabled Wireless Power Transfer Networks: A Decision-Assisted Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00668)
*Jingfu Li,Jingjing Cui,Chong Huang,Jing Zhu,Zheng Chu,Mingzhe Chen,Pei Xiao,Rahim Tafazolli*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了无人机供电无线网络中的语义通信问题，提出了多层级混合比特与语义通信框架，并利用分布式软演员-评论家算法联合优化无人机轨迹、能量收集基站选择、用户关联、语义模式选择和能量收集时间分配，以最大化语义通信效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语义通信可显著降低频谱消耗，结合无线能量传输（WPT）有助于在能量受限且链路预算有限的场景（如无人机网络）中实现高能效传输机制，因此亟需研究无人机WPT网络中语义通信的优化问题。

Method: 提出多层级混合比特与语义通信框架以适应变化的信噪比和任务需求；采用语义通信效率作为优化指标；联合优化无人机轨迹、EHBS选择、用户关联、语义模式选择和能量收集时间分配；引入分布式软演员-评论家（DSAC）算法并设计决策辅助模块以增强收敛性能。

Result: 仿真验证了所提方法和框架的有效性，表明该算法在动态网络环境中能够实现优越的长期优化性能。

Conclusion: 将语义通信与WPT结合，并利用DSAC算法进行联合优化，可在无人机网络中显著提升语义通信效率，适用于动态且能量受限的通信场景。

Abstract: Semantic communications which can significantly reduce spectrum consumption in wireless networks, have recently become a popular research area. When combined with wireless power transfer (WPT), semantic communications can help achieve high spectral efficiency for energy-limited devices in wireless communications. In energy-constrained and link budget-limited scenarios such as UAV networks, the integration of semantic communications and WPT enables highly energyefficient transmission mechanisms. In this paper, we investigate semantic communications in UAV-enabled WPT networks. To achieve adaptability to varying signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) and task requirements, we introduce a multi-layer hybrid bit and semantic communication framework. We adopt a semantic communication efficiency metric and aim to maximize it by jointly optimizing UAV trajectory, energy harvesting base station (EHBS) selection, user association, semantic mode selection, and energy harvesting time allocation. To address this complex longterm optimization problem, we introduce the distributional soft actor-critic (DSAC) algorithm and introduce a decision assistant to further enhance the convergence performance of DSAC. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of the proposed method and framework and demonstrate that our algorithm can achieve superior long-term optimization performance in dynamic network environments.

</details>


### [519] [Information-Theoretic Lower Bounds for Bit-Constrained Stochastic Optimization via a Reduction to Compressed Gaussian Mean Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00703)
*Munsik Kim*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文对低精度预训练（FP8、MXFP4、NVFP4）进行了信息论下界分析。通过将B-bit量化随机梯度优化问题归约到交互式压缩高斯均值估计问题，推导出无条件的下界：TB = Ω(d)（通信界）和T = Ω(σ²d/ε²)（统计界），以及乘积形式T = Ω((σ²d/ε²)·max{1, d/B})。同时给出了近乎匹配的可实现性结果（紧至对数因子）。研究还扩展到相关和漂移梯度场景，修正了早期猜想。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低精度预训练（FP8、MXFP4、NVFP4）已成为前沿语言模型的标准实践，但现有文献几乎全部聚焦于"可实现性"（算法与经验标度律），缺乏信息论层面的理论刻画。本文旨在填补这一空白，为B-bit量化优化提供信息论下界。

Method: 将B-bit随机一阶预言机下的强凸二次族优化问题，精确归约到交互式压缩高斯均值估计问题。利用B-bit预言机下查询不携带信息这一关键观察，将优化问题坍塌为序贯分布式估计问题。使用Fisher信息量（B-bit转录本最多携带O(TB/σ²)的Fisher迹）结合多元van Trees不等式直接导出下界，无需有界似然比截断。同时对相关漂移梯度场景采用序贯率失真视角分析。

Result: 推导出两组无条件下界：(1) 通信界 TB = Ω(d)；(2) 统计界 T = Ω(σ²d/ε²)；(3) 乘积形式 T = Ω((σ²d/ε²)·max{1, d/B})。给出了在有限动态范围预言机下的近乎匹配可实现性结果（紧至对数因子）。修正了关于正噪声相关会降低下界的早期猜想，证明实际上界会上升因子(1+ρ)/(1-ρ)。

Conclusion: 本文为低精度梯度优化提供了信息论基线，明确指出了bits而非维度是限制可恢复信息的关键因素。下界适用于真高斯（无界）梯度，而上界使用有界动态范围预言机，这一预言机差距留待未来解决。结果补充了低精度预训练可实现性文献，给出了任何低比特梯度路径的信息论基础。

Abstract: Low-precision pretraining (FP8, MXFP4, NVFP4) is now standard for frontier language models, yet the literature is almost entirely achievability -- algorithms and empirical scaling laws -- with no matching characterization of what is information-theoretically possible. We study a B-bit quantized stochastic first-order oracle: an optimizer interacts for T rounds and receives, each round, a B-bit adaptive public-coin description of its stochastic gradient. Our main contribution is an exact reduction from optimizing a strongly convex quadratic family to interactively compressed Gaussian mean estimation -- under the B-bit oracle the query carries no information, so optimization collapses exactly onto a sequential distributed-estimation problem. This yields two unconditional lower bounds, a communication bound TB = Omega(d) and a statistical bound T = Omega(sigma^2 d / eps^2), and the sharp product-form bound T = Omega((sigma^2 d / eps^2) max{1, d/B}). The product form is also unconditional: a B-bit transcript carries at most O(TB / sigma^2) of Fisher trace about the mean, so bits rather than dimension limit the recoverable information, and combined with the multivariate van Trees inequality this gives the bound directly, without bounded-likelihood-ratio truncation. We give a near-matching achievability result with exact per-round bit accounting under a bounded-dynamic-range oracle, tight up to a logarithmic factor; the lower bound is for truly Gaussian (unbounded) gradients, and closing this oracle gap is left open. A sequential rate-distortion perspective extends the reduction to correlated and drifting oracles and corrects an earlier conjecture: positive noise correlation raises the bound by (1+rho)/(1-rho) rather than relaxing it. The bounds give an information-theoretic baseline for any low-bit gradient path, not an optimality claim about deployed FP4 systems.

</details>


### [520] [Rank Modulated Composite Encoding for Data Storage in DNA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00978)
*Tomer Cohen,Zhiying Wang,Eitan Yaakobi,Zohar Yakhini*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了将DNA复合编码与秩调制相结合的两种问题，包括使用此类符号的信道容量分析以及相关码字的边界与构造。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DNA合成技术会产生大量副本，复合DNA利用这一特性，每个复合符号不存储单一核苷酸而存储四种核苷酸的混合物。结合秩调制只关心符号中基序的秩这一特性，探索新型存储方案的潜力。

Method: 第一个问题研究使用此类符号的信道容量；第二个问题研究此类码字的边界与构造。

Result: 给出了复合DNA与秩调制相结合的信道容量分析结果，以及相关码字的边界和构造方案。

Conclusion: 复合DNA与秩调制的结合为DNA存储提供了新的编码范式，在信道容量和码字构造方面均有理论贡献。

Abstract: This paper studies two problems that are motivated by combining two novel approaches, namely DNA composite and rank modulation. The recent approach of composite DNA takes advantage of the DNA synthesis property which generates a huge number of copies for every synthesized strand. Under this paradigm, every composite symbols does not store a single nucleotide but a mixture of the four DNA nucleotides. Instead of considering all the possible composite symbols we are interested only in the rank of the motifs in the symbol. The first problem in this paper addresses the capacity of a channel that uses such symbols, while in the second, bounds and construction of such codes are studied.

</details>


### [521] [Beam-focusing Analysis for Modular XL-arrays: Effect of Time Synchronization Errors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01096)
*Mingjiang Wu,Changsheng You,Xianfu Lei*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了近场通信中，由多个子阵列组成的超大规模阵列（XL-array）在存在时间同步误差时的波束聚焦性能。分析表明，对于两个子阵列的情况，时间同步误差会导致聚焦位置偏移，但偏移角度存在上界；而对于多个子阵列的一般情况，时间同步误差会导致波束图案从聚焦变为交错重叠，从而显著降低多用户通信性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近场通信中采用模块化子阵列拼接形成超大规模阵列是一种硬件高效的手段，但不同子阵列间的传输时间同步误差对波束聚焦性能的影响尚未被充分研究，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 首先在完美时间同步假设下，基于最大比传输（MRT）设计发射波束成形并刻画波束图案函数；由于该函数分析困难，进而考虑两个子阵列的典型情形进行理论分析；最后通过数值仿真研究一般多个子阵列的情况。

Result: 对于两个子阵列情形，时间同步误差存在时波束聚焦效应仍然保持，但聚焦位置发生偏移，偏移角度上界为1/M（M为每个子阵列的天线数）；对于多个子阵列情形，时间同步误差导致波束图案从聚焦变为交错重叠（imbricated）。

Conclusion: 时间同步误差会严重恶化近场超大规模阵列的多用户通信性能，表现为期望信号功率降低和用户间干扰增加，因此在实际系统中需要重视子阵列间的时间同步问题。

Abstract: For near-field communications, it is a hardware-efficient means to form an extremely large-scale array (XL-array) by concatenating multiple modular arrays (also referred to as subarrays). In this letter, we aim to investigate the effect of time synchronization errors among transmissions of different subarrays on the beam-focusing performance. To this end, we first characterize the beam pattern function when the transmit beamforming is designed based on maximum ratio transmission (MRT) under the premise of perfect time synchronization. As this function is highly difficult for analysis, we then consider a typical case with two subarrays. Interestingly, we show that for this case, the beam-focusing effect still persists even in the presence of time synchronization errors, while the focused location is deviated from the user location with an angle offset upper-bounded by 1/M, where M denotes the number of antennas in each subarray. Subsequently, for the general case with multiple subarrays, despite analytical intractability, we numerically show that time synchronization errors give rise to an imbricated (instead of focused) beam pattern. This may significantly degrade multi-user communication performance in practice due to the reduced desired signal power and increased inter-user interference.

</details>


### [522] [Cooperative Mitigation against Learning-Based Reactive Jammers: Analysis and SDR Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01197)
*Soumita Hazra,J. Harshan*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一类新型反应式干扰对手（使用广义能量检测器，包括统计和机器学习方法），并针对此类对手设计了协作缓解策略（借助辅助节点），通过理论分析和硬件实现验证了策略的隐蔽性和有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全双工无线电、认知无线电和数据驱动信号处理的最新发展催生了一类更智能的反应式干扰对手，现有抗干扰策略难以应对这种能够同时监听和干扰的强敌手。

Method: 提出广义能量检测器（包括基于瞬时/分布能量统计的检测器以及基于机器学习的分类器）建模对手；设计一系列协作缓解策略（受害节点借助辅助节点），针对不同延迟要求和硬件约束进行优化；通过优化问题选择参数，并进行误码性能和隐蔽性的数学分析；在软件无线电硬件测试平台上实现部署前后两种实验设置，采集真实能量数据训练对手的机器学习分类器。

Result: 分析和硬件评估均表明，在对手使用的广义能量检测器下，所提协作缓解策略以高概率不被检测到。

Conclusion: 所提出的协作缓解策略能够有效对抗采用广义能量检测器的反应式干扰对手，兼具理论保障和实际可行性。

Abstract: Motivated by recent developments in full-duplex radios, cognitive radios, and data-driven signal-processing, we propose a novel class of reactive jamming adversaries wherein the adversary transmits jamming energy on the victim's frequency band while simultaneously monitoring various energy statistics in the network to detect the presence of potential countermeasures, thereby trapping the victim. These adversaries employ generalized energy detectors comprising statistical detectors, based on instantaneous and distributional energy metrics, and data-driven detectors employing machine-learning classifiers to learn patterns in the observed energy sequences. Against such a strong adversary, we propose a family of cooperative mitigation strategies wherein the victim takes assistance from a helper node, with the strategies tailored to operate under a wide range of latency requirements on victim's messages and practical radio hardware constraints at helper node. To provide theoretical guarantees on their efficacy, interesting optimization problems are formulated on the choice of their underlying parameters, followed by extensive mathematical analyses on their error performance and covertness. To assess their practical feasibility, we implement the before-deployment and after-deployment setups on a software-defined-radio-based hardware testbed, and to evaluate their detectability on real energy observations, we collect the corresponding datasets to train and test the data-driven machine-learning classifiers employed by adversary. Both analytical and hardware evaluations show that the proposed strategies cannot be detected with a high-probability under the generalized energy detectors used by adversary.

</details>


### [523] [Finite-Resolution Information from Collision Statistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01218)
*Alexander J. Gates*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了通过低阶Rényi熵（基于碰撞统计量）来近似Shannon熵和互信息的方法，推导了插值误差界，区分了确定性误差与有限样本估计误差，并证明有限碰撞矩无法完全识别Shannon熵。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 碰撞统计量提供了信息的有限分辨率视角，但实际中通常只能使用有限阶的碰撞矩。作者希望理解当仅使用有限阶Rényi熵来逼近Shannon熵和互信息时，哪些信息可以被保留，哪些信息不可避免地丢失。

Method: 推导了Rényi熵路径在Shannon点附近形状控制的插值误差界；将确定性近似误差与有限样本估计误差分离分析；通过数值实验比较了基于碰撞的估计量与plug-in估计量和Miller-Madow估计量。

Result: 插值误差由Rényi熵路径在Shannon点附近的形状控制；固定碰撞阶数下增加样本量能改善对有限分辨率目标的估计，但无法消除与Shannon熵或互信息之间的确定性差异；有限碰撞矩不能唯一确定Shannon熵；提高碰撞阶数会使灵敏度向高概率事件偏移。

Conclusion: 该框架通过有限分辨率视角统一了碰撞计数、Rényi熵、Shannon极限和互信息，明确了低阶重合结构何时含有信息、何时存在不可约的信息丢失。

Abstract: Collision statistics provide a finite-resolution view of information by measuring how often a fixed number of independent samples fall on the same state. These directly countable quantities form the basis of integer-order Rényi entropies. Here, we use low-order Rényi entropies to approximate Shannon entropy and mutual information, while characterizing what is necessarily lost when only finitely many collision moments are used. We derive interpolation-error bounds showing that approximation error is controlled by the shape of the Rényi entropy path near the Shannon point. We also separate this deterministic error from finite-sample estimation error: for fixed collision order, increasing sample size improves estimation of the finite-resolution target but does not eliminate its deterministic difference from Shannon entropy or mutual information. Finally, we show that finite collision moments do not generally identify Shannon entropy, and that increasing collision order shifts sensitivity toward high-probability events. Numerical experiments illustrate the approximation--estimation tradeoff and compare collision-based approximations with plug-in and Miller--Madow estimators. The framework links collision counts, Rényi entropy, Shannon limits, and mutual information through a finite-resolution view of information, clarifying when low-order coincidence structure is informative and when irreducible information is lost.

</details>


### [524] [Upper Bounds on Multiple $b$-Burst Deletion-Correcting Codes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01245)
*Chen Wang,Xiangliang Kong,Eitan Yaakobi,Tolga M. Duman*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了能够纠正多个连续删除错误（即多重b-突发删除）的编码方案。通过刻画删除球的结构性质，推导了此类编码最大尺寸的上界与组合下界，改进了现有参数范围内的已知结果，并在某些情况下达到了渐近最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DNA存储系统中能够纠正连续删除的编码具有重要应用价值，本文旨在建立多重b-突发删除纠正编码的基本极限。

Method: 首先刻画了多重b-突发删除球的若干结构性质，然后利用这些性质推导出多个上界以及一个组合下界。

Result: 新边界在一般参数范围内优于已有结果，并在某些情况下被证明是渐近最优的。

Conclusion: 本文为多重b-突发删除纠正编码的容量问题提供了更紧的界限，推进了对DNA存储系统中删除纠错码理论极限的理解。

Abstract: Motivated by their applications in DNA-based storage systems, codes capable of correcting consecutive deletions have attracted significant attention. An important class of such codes consists of those that can correct multiple consecutive deletion errors, commonly referred to as multiple $b$-burst deletion-correcting codes. In this paper, we investigate the fundamental limits of multiple $b$-burst deletion-correcting codes. Specifically, we first characterize several structural properties of the associated deletion balls. Then, leveraging these properties, we derive several upper bounds and a combinatorial lower bound on the maximum size of such codes. As a consequence, our bounds improve upon the previously known results for general parameter regimes and are shown to be asymptotically optimal for certain cases.

</details>


### [525] [Toward Reliable Semantic Communication: Beyond Average Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01284)
*Boyuan Li,Mingze Gong,Shuoyao Wang,Suzhi Bi,Jia Yan,Ying-Jun Angela Zhang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文综述了语义通信中的可靠性问题，指出当前研究主要优化平均性能而忽视尾端性能。文章回顾了三类可靠性导向设计（信道自适应、鲁棒编解码、HARQ重传），分析了各自局限性，并提出了两个解决方案方向（非理想CSI下的鲁棒自适应语义通信、联合源-信道-校验编码与自适应重传），最后展望了未来研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义通信研究在提升通信效率和平均任务性能方面取得显著进展，但在动态和不确定环境下，可靠性仍是根本性瓶颈。大多数现有设计优化的是平均行为，对不良传输条件下的低尾性能缺乏理解和保护。

Method: 采用综述性方法，首先回顾三类可靠性导向设计（信道自适应、鲁棒编解码、HARQ重传），分析其互补性和局限性，然后提出两个解决方案方向：1) 非完美CSI下的鲁棒自适应语义通信；2) 联合源-信道-校验编码与自适应重传以实现样本级可靠性增强。

Result: 识别出现有可靠性设计方法各自的固有局限性，并明确了两个有前景的解决方向：非理想CSI下的鲁棒自适应方案和样本级联合编码与重传机制。

Conclusion: 未来研究需要关注鲁棒性与重传的联合设计、超越平均值的可靠性度量、以及与现有数字无线网络的兼容性。

Abstract: Semantic communication has emerged as a promising paradigm for improving transmission efficiency by conveying task-relevant semantics rather than raw data. Although recent studies have achieved notable gains in communication efficiency and average task performance, reliability remains a fundamental bottleneck in dynamic and uncertain environments. In particular, most existing designs are still optimized mainly for average-case behavior, while lower-tail performance under adverse transmission conditions remains insufficiently understood and inadequately protected. In this article, we present a unified perspective on reliable semantic communication beyond average performance. We first review three reliability-oriented design categories: channel-aware adaptation, robustness-oriented codec design, and hybrid automatic repeat request (HARQ)-based retransmission. We show that these approaches address reliability from complementary perspectives, but each still has inherent limitations. Motivated by these observations, we discuss two solution directions: robust adaptive semantic communication under imperfect CSI, and joint source-channel-check coding with adaptive retransmission for sample-level reliability enhancement. Finally, we outline several future research directions, including the joint design of robustness and retransmission, reliability metrics beyond averages, and compatibility with existing digital wireless networks.

</details>


### [526] [Digital Twin-Assisted Adaptive Multi-Agent DRL for Intelligent Spectrum and Resource Management in Open-RAN UAV-Enabled 6G Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01324)
*Marwan Dhuheir,Thang X. Vu,Symeon Chatzinotas*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种数字孪生辅助的深度强化学习框架，用于解决6G网络中无人机辅助通信的动态频谱共享与资源分配问题。通过将优化问题分解为粒子群优化的无人机轨迹规划和多智能体深度强化学习的动态频谱-功率-关联管理，实现了智能化决策与自适应协调。仿真结果表明，该方法在频谱效率、数据传输速率和能量利用方面均有显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 6G无线网络向智能化、开放RAN架构演进，无人机在扩展覆盖、增强弹性和确保可靠连接方面扮演关键角色，但无人机辅助环境中存在非线性系统交互、移动性导致的拓扑变化以及严格的延迟和能量约束，使得频谱和资源管理面临重大挑战。

Method: 提出数字孪生辅助的自适应深度强化学习框架：将复杂优化问题分解为两个子问题——采用粒子群优化(PSO)进行无人机轨迹优化，以及采用多智能体深度强化学习(MADRL)进行动态频谱-功率-关联管理。数字孪生驱动的方法实现了智能、上下文感知的决策和无人机间的自适应协调。

Result: 大量仿真表明，该方法在频谱效率、数据传输速率和能量利用率方面取得了显著性能提升。

Conclusion: 该工作展示了迈向自主演进的6G无人机与地面用户连接的变革性路径。

Abstract: The evolution toward 6G wireless networks envisions a seamlessly intelligent, Open-RAN-enabled architecture where unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) play a pivotal role in extending coverage, enhancing resilience, and ensuring reliable connectivity for ground users deployment. However, efficiently managing spectrum and resources in such highly dynamic UAV-assisted environments remains a major challenge due to nonlinear system interactions, mobility-induced topology variations, and stringent latency and energy constraints. To address these challenges, we propose a digital twin (DT)-assisted adaptive deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework that enables intelligent spectrum sharing and resource allocation across distributed ground users. The complex optimization problem is decomposed into UAV trajectory optimization using particle swarm optimization (PSO) and dynamic spectrum-power-association management via multi-agent DRL (MADRL). This hybrid DT-driven approach empowers intelligent, context-aware decision-making and adaptive coordination among UAVs. Extensive simulations demonstrate significant gains in spectral efficiency, data rates, and energy utilization, showcasing a transformative path toward self-evolving, autonomous 6G UAV and ground users (GUs) connectivity.

</details>


### [527] [Low-Subpacketization MIMO Coded Caching with Flexible Stream Allocation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01353)
*Mohammad NaseriTehrani,MohammadJavad Salehi,Antti Tölli*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出一种低复杂度MIMO编码缓存方案，通过虚拟广播信道分解和共享缓存模型扩展，在显著降低子包化需求的同时实现灵活传输速率适配，并能渐进逼近已知最优自由度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 子包化问题严重阻碍了编码缓存在多天线无线网络中的实际部署，现有方案子包化需求过高，难以实用化。

Method: 基于广播信道的虚拟分解，将共享缓存模型扩展到多天线接收机，通过自适应选择可行的用户和流配置，在线性可解码约束下显式控制空间复用增益。

Result: 所提框架能在线性可解码约束下渐进逼近已知最优自由度，子包化需求比现有方案低多个数量级；数值评估表明该灵活性在实际信噪比下能带来显著的吞吐量提升。

Conclusion: 所提方案有效解决了子包化问题，实现了低复杂度、低子包化需求与高性能的兼顾，为编码缓存在多天线网络中的实际部署提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Subpacketization remains a major obstacle to the practical deployment of coded caching (CC) in multi-antenna wireless networks. In this paper, we propose a low-complexity multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) CC scheme that enables flexible delivery rate adaptation while substantially reducing subpacketization requirements. The proposed design builds on a virtual decomposition of the broadcast channel and extends the shared-cache model to multi-antenna receivers, enabling adaptive selection of feasible user and stream configurations and thereby providing explicit control over the spatial multiplexing gain under linear decodability constraints. Analytical results show that the proposed framework can asymptotically approach the best-known achievable degrees of freedom (DoF) under linear decodability constraints while requiring orders-of-magnitude lower subpacketization than existing schemes. Numerical evaluations further demonstrate that this flexibility yields notable throughput improvements at practical signal-to-noise ratios.

</details>


### [528] [Query-Limited Community Recovery in Stochastic Block Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02055)
*Sabyasachi Basu,Manuj Mukherjee,Lutz Oettershagen,Suhas Thejaswi*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究两社区随机块模型下，在有限查询预算内通过嘈杂邻域查询实现精确社区恢复的问题。分析了非自适应均匀查询的基准性能，证明了自适应策略在纯查询场景下可减少查询次数，在结合子采样图场景下可突破亚线性查询的自适应差距，表明自适应数据采集能严格改善精确恢复的信息论极限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在现实网络分析中，数据获取往往受限于查询预算且存在噪声，如何在有限预算下高效获取信息以实现精确社区恢复是一个核心问题。现有研究多假设完整图数据可用，而本文关注更贴近实际的部分可观测、带噪声场景。

Method: 针对两社区随机块模型，考虑两种访问模型：仅通过嘈杂邻域查询（每个查询以固定概率返回真实邻居，不返回非邻居）和结合单次子采样图的混合模型。对比了均匀非自适应查询（每个顶点查询相同次数，观测退化为衰减边概率的SBM，适用Abbe-Bandeira-Hall精确恢复阈值）与两阶段自适应策略的性能。在混合模型下，证明了均匀子线性预算查询无增益，而自适应查询可定向聚焦不确定顶点。

Result: 在仅查询场景下，两阶段自适应策略在均匀查询需要$m n$次查询（$m>1$）的某些参数区域，仅需$n+o(n)$次查询即可成功。在混合模型下，均匀非自适应子线性预算查询相对于仅使用子采样图无改善，而自适应查询可实现精确恢复，证明了亚线性查询的自适应差距。

Conclusion: 自适应数据采集可以严格改善精确恢复的信息论极限，在查询预算受限和噪声环境下具有显著优势。

Abstract: We study exact community recovery in the two-community stochastic block model on $n$ vertices under limited and noisy access to network data. The learner may query a noisy neighborhood oracle that reveals each true neighbor of a queried vertex independently with fixed probability and never returns non-neighbors, subject to a finite query budget. We consider both oracle-only access and a combined model where the learner also observes a single subsampled copy of the underlying graph. For oracle-only access, balanced uniform querying gives a sharp non-adaptive benchmark: when each vertex is queried the same integer number of times, the observations reduce to an SBM with attenuated edge probabilities and the Abbe-Bandeira-Hall exact-recovery threshold applies. We show that this benchmark is not adaptively optimal: a two-stage adaptive strategy succeeds with $n+o(n)$ queries in a regime where balanced uniform querying requires $m n$ queries for some $m>1$. With an additional subsampled graph, we prove a sublinear-query adaptivity gap: balanced data-independent uniform querying with a sublinear budget does not improve over the subsampled graph alone, whereas adaptive querying can target a small set of uncertain vertices and achieve exact recovery. Thus adaptive data acquisition can strictly improve the information-theoretic limits of exact recovery.

</details>


### [529] [QEC and EAQEC Codes from Hermitian Sums and Hulls of Cyclic Codes over $\mathbb{F}_2 \times (\mathbb{F}_2+v\mathbb{F}_2)$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02137)
*Rabia Zengin,Mehmet Emin Köroğlu*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文确定了环 $\mathbb{F}_2 \times (\mathbb{F}_2 + v\mathbb{F}_2)$（其中 $v^2=v$）上循环码的Hermitian壳和Hermitian和的生成多项式，并基于这些结构利用Hermitian对偶版本的Quantum Construction X构造量子纠错码；同时通过矩阵乘积码方法在该环上的线性互补对偶码上导出纠缠辅助量子纠错码族。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为在特定复合环上构造新的量子纠错码和纠缠辅助量子纠错码，利用Hermitian壳、Hermitian和以及LCD码的结构特性。

Method: 确定复合环 $\mathbb{F}_2 \times (\mathbb{F}_2 + v\mathbb{F}_2)$ 上循环码的Hermitian壳与Hermitian和的生成多项式；应用Hermitian对偶版本的Quantum Construction X；采用矩阵乘积码方法处理LCD码。

Result: 基于Hermitian壳和Hermitian和构造了QEC码，基于LCD码通过矩阵乘积码方法导出了EAQEC码族。

Conclusion: 该工作为在复合环上利用Hermitian结构和LCD码构造量子纠错码及纠缠辅助量子纠错码提供了有效方法。

Abstract: In this work, we determine the generator polynomials for the Hermitian hulls and Hermitian sums of cyclic codes defined over the composite ring $\mathbb{F}_2 \times (\mathbb{F}_2 + v\mathbb{F}_2)$, where $v^2 = v$. Based on these structures, we develop quantum error-correcting (QEC) codes by applying the Hermitian dual version of Quantum Construction~X to the obtained Hermitian hulls and sums. Moreover, by employing matrix product code methods on linear complementary dual (LCD) codes defined over the same ring, we derive families of entanglement-assisted quantum error-correcting (EAQEC) codes.

</details>


### [530] [Rotatable Antenna-Enabled Satellite Communication: Joint Design of Boresight Alignment and Beam Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02193)
*Tiantian Ma,Beixiong Zheng,Changsheng You,Ruiqi Liu,Robert Schober*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于可旋转天线（RA）的低地球轨道（LEO）卫星通信框架，通过联合设计收发波束成形和天线视轴方向，利用天线指向重构这一额外空间自由度来应对高动态环境下的波束失准问题，并开发了低开销的信道估计与波束跟踪协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LEO卫星链路因轨道速度高导致角度快速变化，传统固定天线架构下会出现严重的波束失准和阵列增益下降，亟需新的空间自由度来维持高动态下的方向对准。

Method: 在卫星和地面节点两侧部署RA阵列；利用LEO链路的秩1视距信道结构，推导收发波束成形与天线视轴方向的联合闭式解；设计基于卫星可预测轨道的信道估计与波束跟踪协议。

Result: 所提出的RA方案在可达速率和对角度变化的鲁棒性上显著优于固定视轴和随机视轴基线方法。

Conclusion: 旋转空间重构在高动态卫星通信中能有效提升性能，展示了RA技术在高移动性场景中的潜力。

Abstract: Low Earth orbit (LEO) satellite links experience rapid angular variation due to high orbital velocities, which causes severe beam misalignment and array gain degradation under conventional fixed-antenna architectures. In this letter, we propose a rotatable antenna (RA)-enabled LEO communication framework, where RA arrays are deployed at both the satellite and the ground node (GN) to exploit antenna boresight reconfiguration as an additional spatial degree-of-freedom (DoF) for maintaining directional alignment under high mobility. By leveraging the rank-one line-of-sight (LoS) channel structure inherent to satellite links, we derive closed-form solutions for the joint design of the transmit/receive beamforming and antenna boresight directions, revealing that optimal performance can be achieved via decoupled alignment across antennas with low computational complexity. To enable practical operation under dynamic conditions, we further develop a channel estimation and beam tracking protocol that exploits the predictable satellite orbit to continuously update boresight directions with low training overhead. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed RA-enabled design significantly outperforms fixed and random boresight baselines in terms of achievable rate and robustness to angular variations, highlighting the effectiveness of rotational spatial reconfiguration in high-mobility satellite communications.

</details>


### [531] [Four constructions of self-dual binary cyclic codes with a lower bound on the minimum distances better than the square-root bound](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02262)
*Xiaoqiang Wang,Xun Song,Dabin Zheng,Hao Chen,Cunsheng Ding*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文解决了编码理论中一个存在70年的开放问题：是否存在最小距离优于平方根界的无穷族自对偶二元循环码。通过构造无穷族该类码，正面回答了该问题，并附带了参数更优的循环码族作为副产品。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管自对偶二元循环码已被广泛研究，且近期在IEEE Trans. IT上构造了最小距离达到平方根界的无穷族，但是否存在最小距离优于平方根界的无穷族自对偶二元循环码，仍是一个悬而未决70年的开放问题。

Method: 通过提出新的构造方法，直接构造出最小距离下界优于平方根界的无穷族自对偶二元循环码。

Result: 成功构造了无穷族自对偶二元循环码，其最小距离下界优于平方根界；同时构造了若干参数优于已有文献的循环码族。

Conclusion: 解决了该长期开放问题，为自对偶二元循环码的研究提供了新的理论突破。

Abstract: In spite of the intensive study of cyclic codes and the recent construction of an infinite family of self-dual binary cyclic codes whose minimum distances have the square-root bound in IEEE Trans. IT, vol. 71, no. 4, 2025, it is still a 70-year-old open problem whether there is an infinite family of self-dual binary cyclic codes whose minimum distances have a lower bound better than the square-root bound. This paper settles this long-standing open problem in coding theory by presenting infinite families of such self-dual binary cyclic codes. As by-products, several families of cyclic codes with better parameters than those in some references are also constructed in this paper.

</details>


### [532] [Multidimensional Reconciliation in Continuous-Variable QKD: Review, Coding Schemes, and Open Source Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02323)
*Martial Lucien,Rosio Alexis,Diamanti Eleni,Cassagne Adrien,Gouraud Baptiste*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文综述了连续变量量子密钥分发（CV-QKD）中的多维协调技术，重点探讨了超越代数维度1、2、4、8的高维构造方法，描述了虚拟信道的构建、反向协调的实用编码方案及其与线性纠错码的集成，并介绍了开源仿真框架HDirac，用于评估任意维度下的LDPC码性能，揭示了维度、协调效率和帧错误率之间的关键权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CV-QKD系统需要在低信噪比和长距离下实现高效协调，而多维协调通过将物理高斯量子信道转换为虚拟二进制输入加性白高斯噪声（BIAWGN）信道，使得现代纠错码得以应用，从而解决这一挑战。

Method: 综述了多维协调的原理，重点研究高维（>8维）构造方法；描述了虚拟信道的构建过程；讨论了反向协调的实用编码方案及其与线性纠错码的集成；开发了开源仿真框架HDirac，实现任意维度的多维协调，并用于评估先进LDPC码的性能。

Result: 通过HDirac框架评估了先进LDPC码的性能，揭示了维度、协调效率与帧错误率之间的关键权衡关系，为CV-QKD系统设计提供了实用指导。

Conclusion: 多维协调是CV-QKD实现远距离、低信噪比下高效通信的关键技术，高维构造（超越传统代数维度）和LDPC码的优化集成可进一步提升系统性能，HDirac框架为未来CV-QKD系统设计提供了有力的仿真工具。

Abstract: Continuous-variable quantum key distribution (CV-QKD) requires highly efficient reconciliation techniques to operate at low signal-to-noise ratios and long distances. Multidimensional reconciliation addresses this challenge by transforming the physical Gaussian quantum channel into a virtual binary-input additive white Gaussian noise (BIAWGN) channel, enabling the use of modern errorcorrecting codes. In this work, we review the principles of multidimensional reconciliation, with a particular focus on high-dimensional constructions beyond the algebraic dimensions 1, 2, 4, 8. We describe the construction of the virtual channel, discuss practical coding schemes for reverse reconciliation, and analyse their integration with linear error-correcting codes. We also present an opensource simulation framework, HDirac, implementing multidimensional reconciliation for arbitrary dimensions, and use it to evaluate state-of-the-art LDPC codes. The results highlight key trade-offs between dimension, reconciliation efficiency, and frame error rate, providing practical guidance for CV-QKD system design.

</details>
